Name: OJEFER | Tecnologías del hormigón
Description:
Materiales en Hormigón Armado y Polímero, así como tecnología y servicios de ingeniería para la Ganadería, Industria, Construcción y Medioambiente.
Prefabricados Ojefer, S.L. es una empresa familiar de tercera generación, que inició su actividad a mediados de los años 60 en la población de Almacelles (Lleida). Después de muchos años de fabricar elementos de hormigón a medida de forma muy artesanal, en el año 1.997 inicia su proceso de ampliación y expansión adquiriendo en dos etapas 80.000 metros cuadrados de suelo industrial en la vecina población de Altorricón (Huesca). A partir de entonces es, cuando la empresa, inicia un proceso de crecimiento y diversificación que comporta la consolidación de Prefabricados Ojefer, S.L. como empresa pionera dentro de su sector.

Actualmente se encuentra presente en el sector agropecuario, obra civil, medio ambiente, decoración, construcción y tecnológico, siendo pionera en ingeniería y comercialización de sus propias instalaciones productivas. Para ello cuenta con un equipo humano adecuadamente formado, unas instalaciones de primera línea y una filosofía muy clara, “hacer las cosas bien para conseguir los objetivos propuestos”.

A finales de 2009, la empresa inaugura unas nuevas oficinas en Almacelles (Lleida) donde traslada los departamentos de gerencia, administración, comercial y técnico. Este nuevo cambio de imagen y mejora de calidad de trabajo de la organización, repercuten en una mejora de los servicios que estos departamentos desempeñan cara a sus clientes.

En el año 2008, se inicia un Plan de Negocio internacional que comportó la implantación y puesta en funcionamiento en 2009 de una fábrica en Rumania que cuenta con unas excelentes perspectivas de crecimiento en el sector del prefabricado, iniciando proyectos de equipamientos agropecuarios, regadíos y obras diversas.

Name: Experimental Poultry Centre
Description:
The Experimental Poultry Centre (Proefbedrijf Pluimveehouderij) is the Belgian research institute for applied poultry research since 1993. The Experimental Poultry Centre performs research in the same conditions as in commercial practice. Theoretical knowledge is tested and demonstrated under field circumstances. There is a focus on poultry industry’s efficiency and economic sustainability next to solutions for public concerns on animal welfare, both for laying hens and broilers. Through direct communication with the poultry farmers, current topics can be investigated to address the present and upcoming questions and needs from the field. The Experimental Poultry Centre has all the necessary facilities for this purpose, and it has become an internationally respected center for expertise that works closely with Flemish universities and other important national and international research centers. A team of experienced experts (7 researchers and 12 animal caretakers) can guarantee state-of-the-art practical poultry research.
In 2014 the Experimental Poultry Centre opened new sheds for both laying hens and broilers at its location in Geel. The construction and use of the experimental sheds will be completely in line with the new European legislation. The layerhouse has a total capacity of 31 000 laying hens and contains 12 independent test sections with one type of furnished cage (4 identical sections with 3072 laying hens each) and two different types of aviaries (8 sections with 4 identical sections of 1920 and 4 identical sections of 2650 laying hens each). These research facilities enable comparative research of different topics in different housing systems and different commercial lines of laying hens among others. The new broiler house has a capacity of 18 000 broilers and has 8 climate independent sub-units. Together with the remaining sheds the total broiler capacity will be 42 000.

Name: Kentucky Farmed
Description:

Based on a foundation of quality, innovation, and sustainability, Kentucky Farmed not only excels in agricultural production but also pioneers unique marketing opportunities within the hemp sector.

Our Commitment:

Quality: We are dedicated to providing high-quality hemp and strawberry starts, setting the standard for excellence in our industry.

Innovation: Our greenhouses are hubs of innovation, where we adopt cutting-edge techniques and explore new opportunities for growth.

Sustainability: Sustainability is at the core of our operations, promoting responsible agricultural practices that benefit both our community and the environment.

Unique Marketing Opportunities:

Hemp Marketing: We go beyond cultivation by offering brands the opportunity to utilize our space for marketing, fostering creativity and collaboration.

Strawberry Excellence: Our dedication to strawberry starts extends to marketing opportunities within this growing sector.

Kentucky Farmed stands at the intersection of agriculture and innovation, where quality and sustainability thrive, and unique marketing possibilities flourish. We invite you to join us on this journey of growth and excellence in agriculture and marketing.

Name: Agro Maripá
Description:
A Agro Maripá foi fundada em 1979 com o objetivo de selecionar geneticamente cavalos da raça Mangalarga Marchador com aptidão para o trabalho em fazendas e esportes. 
Há mais de 20 anos  concentra um rebanho de mais de 20 mil cabeças da raça Nelore em Juara, no estado do Mato Grosso, na região do bioma amazônico. O rebanho conta com as mais modernas biotecnologias.  como: Inseminação Artificial, Transferência de Embriões, Genotipagem e Ultrassonografia de Carcaça, com foco no avanço genético das gerações futuras, na qualidade de carne e marmoreiro.
A Agro Maripá também foi buscar na Índia a mais pura genética da raça Gir, O resultado de anos dessa seleção são animais de excelente caracterização racial, docilidade, precocidade e conformação para alta produção de leite.
Além de equinos e bovinos,  a Agro Maripá produz e comercializa genética de caprinos da raça Saanen, que se destacam na produção de leite.
Acompanhar a evolução da pecuária, ser sustentável, desenvolver pessoas,  servir de inspiração para outros criadores e olhar para o futuro  são valores que motivam e fortalecem o trabalho da Agro Maripá.

Name: Fazenda São Paulo
Description:
A Fazenda São Paulo iniciou sua história no início da década de 80, constituindo um importante grupo empresarial do agronegócio, com perfil inovador e influente em todas as suas atividades. Suas unidades de produção são localizadas nas cidades de Oliveira e Riachinho, em Minas Gerais, totalizando uma área de mais de 10 mil hectares.

Suas ações são voltadas para o mercado nacional e internacional. Com um moderno sistema de gestão, diversificação e capacidade de gerar emprego e renda, a Fazenda São Paulo conta com mão de obra qualificada em todos os setores.

Ao todo, a Fazenda gera, aproximadamente, 1000 empregos diretos e permanentes. Durante a safra de café, mais 300 postos temporários são criados.

Desde o início, a Fazenda São Paulo tem uma forte convicção de sua responsabilidade social com as pessoas que nela trabalham, residem e com as comunidades vizinhas.

A Fazenda oferece cursos de capacitação e treinamentos nas diversas áreas de atuação de seus colaboradores. Também promove ações voltadas à Segurança do Trabalho e Qualidade de Vida.

Buscando maior viabilidade e opções para os colaboradores, possui parcerias com médicos, dentistas e farmácias da região. Possui creche em horário integral que assiste aos filhos das moradoras e realiza atividades de recreação e educação direcionadas às crianças, o que proporciona mais tranquilidade aos pais enquanto trabalham.

Name: APFC - Associação dos Produtores Florestais de Coruche
Description:
A APFC disponibiliza aos seus Associados uma grande diversidade de serviços nomeadamente:
•	Amostra da Qualidade da Cortiça
Este serviço permite um conhecimento das cortiças de cada produtor, em função da qualidade e calibre, criando uma base sólida para a comercialização das mesmas e melhorando substancialmente a capacidade de negociação do produtor.
•	Amostragem da Qualidade da Pinha
O Serviço de Avaliação do Rendimento da Pinha em miolo de pinhão, é disponibilizado de forma a apoiar a decisão de comercialização da pinha.
•	Apoio ao investimento
•	Certificação Florestal
O Grupo APFCertifica, é um sistema de certificação florestal de grupo no âmbito do Forest Stewardship Council  (FSC) desenvolvido pela APFC, que tem como objetivo a certificação da gestão florestal das explorações dos seus associados.
•	Defesa da Floresta Contra Incêndios
•	Inventário e Planeamento Florestal
Os PGF são instrumentos de ordenamento florestal das explorações. Regulam, no tempo e no espaço, as intervenções de natureza cultural e ou de exploração e visam a produção sustentada dos bens ou serviços originados em espaços florestais.
•	Materiais Florestais de Reprodução
Semente de Sobreiro Certificada e Garfos de Pinheiro Manso
•	Sistema de Informação Geográfica (SIG)
O SIG da APFC agrega toda a informação relativa aos seus associados de uma forma integrada e facilitadora da consulta e visualização da mesma. Esta ferramenta permite ainda facilitar todo o trabalho no âmbito dos inventários florestais associados à elaboração dos planos de gestão florestal e na determinação do valor provável da cortiça no mato.
•	Produção de material cartográfico de apoio à gestão florestal
Com base na informação cartográfica adquirida e disponível é possível a produção de material cartográfico de apoio à gestão, nomeadamente no âmbito de candidaturas a projetos de investimento, execução dos PGF e Certificação Florestal.
•	ZIF - Zonas de Intervenção Florestal
•	Serviço de Aconselhamento Florestal

Name: OPP Group
Description:
En OPP GROUP lideramos la transformación de la producción porcina, convirtiendo explotaciones en modelos eficientes, sostenibles e innovadores. Ofrecemos asesoría integral para porcino y otras especies, con presencia nacional e internacional, y proyectos que generan rentabilidad, bienestar animal y resultados.

Impulsamos el futuro de la ganadería con soluciones que combinan ciencia, tecnología y visión estratégica, apostando por un modelo rentable y responsable donde eficiencia, bienestar e innovación impulsan la productividad.

Qué hacemos
• Diseñamos proyectos llave en mano —nuevos, ampliaciones o reformas— adaptados a cada explotación.
• Desarrollamos programas de salud animal que aseguran bienestar y rendimiento.
• Formamos equipos de granja, alumnos y entidades públicas o privadas.
• Lideramos proyectos de I+D+i en salud, genética y nutrición para una producción más eficiente y sostenible.
• Instalamos y mantenemos equipos y software de alimentación, ventilación y climatización, integrando soluciones digitales para mejorar la gestión.
• Acompañamos la expansión hacia avicultura, rumiantes, cunicultura y equinos, promoviendo ganadería baja en carbono.

Qué aportamos
• Explotaciones modernas, rentables y listas para el futuro.
• Bienestar animal y productividad sostenible.
• Estrategias preventivas que reducen costes y optimizan recursos.
• Acceso a innovación avanzada en genética, nutrición y tecnología.
• Soporte integral como socio estratégico que anticipa retos y genera oportunidades.

Nuestro valor diferencial
Más de dos décadas liderando innovación y bienestar animal en Europa, con visión global y enfoque 360°. Aplicamos innovación que mejora productividad y sostenibilidad, con compromiso con la rentabilidad y el éxito de cada cliente.

En OPP GROUP trabajamos generando soluciones que permiten a cada explotación crecer rentable, sostenible y preparada para el futuro.

Descubre más en www.oppgroup.com
Contacto: opp@oppgroup.com

Name: Ankas Hayvancılık Gıda Tarım Lojistik Enerji Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Şirketi
Description:
Yeni Nesil Tam Otomatik Robotik Süt Sığırı ve Besi Çiftliği

Şirketimiz süt sığırcılığı ve besi sığırcılığı üzerinde yoğunlaşmaktadır. Holstein-Friesian cinsi sığırlar ile çalışmaktayız. Birincil ürünümüz insan eli değmeden sağılan yüksek kaliteli çiğ süttür. Bunun yanı sıra üretilen çiğ sütü işleyerek tereyağı, kaliteli peynir ve işlenmiş süt üretmeyi amaçlamaktayız.

İşletmemizde yetiştirdiğimiz ve tamamı yüksek genetik skorlamalara sahip dişi seçilmiş sperma ile gebe kalan, damızlık gebe düvelerimizi Türk hayvancılığına ve değerli Türk çiftçisine Ankas kalitesi ile sunmaktayız. Tüm damızlık gebe düvelerimiz Amerika’ya gönderilen doku örnekleri ile uluslararası akredite, gebetik araştırma laboratuvarlarında genomik testlerden geçmiş ve yüksek genomik damızlık vasıflarını belgeleyen sertifikalarla belgelenmiştir. 

Süt sığırlarımızın yanı sıra besi işletmemizde yüksek kaliteli sığır eti sunmaktayız. Besi sürümüz tamamı ile kendi anaç hayvanlarımızın yavrularıdır. Böylelikle dışarıdan gelebilecek herhangi istenmeyen bulaşmaya kapalı olup, hayvanlarımızı ilk günlerinden itibaren tanıdığımız için kalitelerini garanti edebiliriz. 

Next Generation Fully Automated Robotic Bovine Dairy and Livestock Farming

Our company specializes in livestock and dairy products of bovine animal especially Holstein-Friesian. The primary product of our dairy division is high quality raw milk, milked by the robotic system to ensure the sterile product. We also aim to process the raw milk to produce butter, quality cheese and processed milk.

Aside from the dairy division we also provide high quality cattle meat. Our livestock herd is formed by the calfs of our very own cows so the risk of outside contamination is minimized and we know our herd from their day 1 so we can guarantee the quality of our product.

Description:

Voer is van onschatbare waarde voor de gezondheid van dieren en heeft veel invloed op de smaak van het eindproduct. Het is onze dagelijkse passie om kwalitatief hoogwaardig voer te produceren voor een optimaal rendement. Onze missie is het om leden en klanten een continu en duurzaam voordeel te leveren. Om dit te kunnen borgen zet Vitelia Voeders actief in op innovatie, kennis en jong talent in de sector.

Vitelia Voeders maakt diervoeders die nauw aansluiten bij de specifieke behoeften van de dieren in elke fase van hun leven. 

Om dit kwalitatieve veevoer te produceren maken wij gebruik van een moderne grondstoffen op- en overslag faciliteit aan de maas en hebben wij 2 productielocaties. Aanvullend in de dienstverlening worden de (ruwe) grondstoffen vanuit de eigen overslag ook rechtstreeks beleverd bij klanten. 

Alle locaties bevinden zich in Noord-Limburg. Een strategische locatie waarmee wij onze klanten in de veehouderij door heel Nederland snel en efficiënt kunnen bedienen.

Name: Ferma lu' Mircea
Description:
Aici vei găsi printre cei mai gustoși pui pe care i-ai gustat vreodată :) și nici ouăle nu sunt rele :))

În primăvara lui 2023, Mircea era foarte mulțumit de viața lui și căuta activ modalități de a o complica. Așa a apărut prima serie de pui, mai mult o joacă, să vadă dacă încă știe să îi crească, așa cum învățase în copilărie. Majoritatea puilor i-a dat cadou pe la cunoscuți, care nu mai mâncaseră asemenea bucate de multă vreme. Treptat, la insistențele tot mai multora, Mircea s-a apucat serios de treabă. Așa a apărut o microfermă hobby cu pui, găini ouătoare, căprițe și alte orătănii.

Acum găsești la Ferma lu' Mircea pui gata de pus la cuptor, pui porționați pentru mămici contra cronometru, pui dezosați pentru grătar și ouă. 

Puii sunt crescuți de la vârsta de 3 săptămâni pe iarbă, în aer liber, văd soarele și scurmă prin iarbă după delicatese. Nu sunt bio sau organici, dar trăiesc corect.

Pentru moment se pot livra doar congelați. Livrarea se face în București (sectoarele 1, 2 și 6), județele Ilfov (oriunde în zonele de Nord și Vest ale capitalei), Giurgiu (în proximitatea A1, oriunde între Corbii Mari și București) și Dâmbovița (oriunde între Titu, Tărtășești și București). Mai mult, te încurajez să vizitezi ferma, pentru a-ți face o idee despre cum a fost produsă hrana ta. Pentru familiile cu copii mici se oferă GRATUIT o serie de scărpinat ieduțe :)

Name: Nationaal Voedselberaad
Description:
De voedsel- en landbouwtransitie draait om het herstellen van de verbinding tussen voedselsystemen en ecosystemen. Wij zien dat regionale voedselinitiatieven bewijzen dat verandering mogelijk is. Regionaal kunnen we verbindingen herstellen tussen boeren en burgers, betere afstemming van vraag en aanbod realiseren en zeggenschap over ons voedsel versterken. Wat we zien is een positieve opwaartse spiraal: van kleine initiatieven van onderop naar groeiende lokale, regionale en nationale netwerken.                                         De uitdaging is om al deze initiatieven te verbinden tot een gezamenlijke, krachtige beweging, geworteld in diversiteit, die al die plekken voedt, nieuwe samenwerking inspireert en een vruchtbare voedingsbodem legt voor een verbindend landbouw- en voedselsysteem.

Wie we zijn
Wij zijn een nationale verbindingsbeweging van lokale en regionale voedselinitiatieven en samenwerkingsverbanden. Wij werken vanuit het principe van een ecosysteem/mycelium waarin iedereen vanuit de eigen rol bijdraagt. Zonder ons te committeren aan een bepaalde term of begrip, stellen we vragen die reflectie stimuleren om van daaruit een breed gedragen beweging op te bouwen. Het initiatief om te verbinden in een Nationaal Voedselberaad is ontstaan vanuit Voedsel Anders, Stadslandbouw Nederland, Ons Eten Den Haag en de WUR en wordt mede mogelijk gemaakt door de EU (SoilValues) en de Nationale Wetenschapsagenda. 

Wat we doen
Wij werken aan het herstellen van verbindingen in ons voedsel- en landbouwsysteem: tussen burger, boer en gemeenschap, tussen bodem, voedsel, natuur en gezondheid, tussen duurzaamheid en economie en tussen praktijk, onderzoek en beleid. Samen leren we van elkaars ‘het kan wel’, bundelen we krachten en vergroten we onze impact. 
De essentie ligt in het zichtbaar maken van vele praktijkvoorbeelden, wat zij gemeenschappelijk hebben en hun maatschappelijke kracht doorvertalen naar beleidsmogelijkheden. 

Info: contact@nationaalvoedselberaad.nl

Name: Innofarm
Description:
Transformamos tu granja: más salud, sostenibilidad y rentabilidad.

En INNOFARM entendemos que gestionar una explotación ganadera hoy es un reto constante: reducir costes, mantener la salud animal, cumplir normativas y cuidar el medio ambiente. Por eso te acompañamos con soluciones reales, eficaces y sostenibles, adaptadas a las necesidades de tu granja.

 ¿Qué hacemos por ti?
 Sanidad ambiental y confort animal: Mejoramos el bienestar de tus animales con soluciones como VITAL BLUE SKIN, nuestro secante de cama formulado con minerales micronizados y aceites esenciales. Reduce la humedad, neutraliza el amoníaco y previene plagas, minimizando el uso de productos agresivos.
 Nutrición natural y reducción de antibióticos: Fortalecemos el sistema digestivo e inmunológico del animal con aceites esenciales, probióticos, prebióticos y soluciones como Enermilk Plus, Inmunofarm o Safygut, ayudándote a cumplir los objetivos de reducción de antibióticos.
 Gestión de purines y aguas: Tratamos los purines con soluciones naturales que reducen olores, estabilizan el nitrógeno y disminuyen las emisiones de amoníaco y metano en las balsas. También prevenimos el crecimiento de algas en las balsas de agua.
 Innovación constante: Gracias a nuestras alianzas con empresas líderes en biotecnología, incorporamos la tecnología más avanzada a tu explotación ganadera.

 ¿Por qué elegirnos?
 Rentabilidad medible: Mejoras en fertilidad, productividad, bienestar animal y ahorro operativo.
 Asesoramiento técnico personalizado: No vendemos productos, ofrecemos soluciones ajustadas a tu realidad.
 Compromiso medioambiental: Productos naturales, eficaces y respetuosos con el entorno, la fauna y los consumidores.

Name: Forest and Land Owners Association of Lithuania (FOAL)
Description:
Lithuanian Forest and Land Owners Association (LMSA) is a national public organization representing private forest owners in Lithuania operating since 1993. Our mission is to unite forest owners and organizations serving private forestry into an association capable of coordinating activities, representing association members and defending their legitimate interests.
LMSA successfully represents and defends private forestry at both national and international levels. During more than 20 years of activity, LMSA has grown into a public organization with more than 6,500 members, which has been accepted into its ranks by the Confederation of European Private Forest Owners (CEPF), European Landowners Organization (ELO), International Family Forest Alliance (IFFA), supported by Denmark, Sweden and associations uniting forest owners of other countries. LMSA is a member of the Lithuanian Chamber of Agriculture, the Lithuanian Association of Independent Wood Surveyors, the Lithuanian Business Confederation, and a participant in the round table of the forest owners' associations of the Baltic Sea countries. Recently, cooperation has been actively developed with the Lithuanian Agricultural Advisory Service, the Lithuanian Biomass Energy Association "Litbioma", the Lithuanian Heat Suppliers Association,
Constructive and immediate cooperation of LMSA with the Seimas of the Republic of Lithuania, the Government, the Ministry of Environment, which oversees forestry in Lithuania, as well as the Ministry of Agriculture and the National Payment Agency attached to it, which administers EU support for rural development, allows us to achieve excellent results in the formation of a correct private forestry policy in Lithuania.

Name: Hub del Norte
Description:
We are a Savory Network hub, providing holistic management training, advisory and support to farmers, ranchers and everyday people in addition to EOV monitoring to verify soil regeneration, serving northern Spain and the Pyrenees.

Changing the way our local and global food systems function is no longer a discussion for the future, but a must for slowing down and reversing climate change as well as repopulating rural areas that are slowly dying.

In line with "it's not the cow, it's the how", it's our management decisions that create the realities we live in, at home and in our daily lives. By using holistic management, we can make decisions that are true to our values and how we want the world we live in to be. They can guide us to live in harmony with natural processes instead of fighting against them, to create communities based on shared values and economies centred on creating long lasting value rather than a quick buck.

We're here to support people in learning how to use those decision making tools to bring quality of life and values back to the centre of their lives rather than allowing short-term decisions, fear and trends makes the decisions for us. So whether you're a producer seeking to enhance your soil, reduce your use of inputs and create a land-based business that will carry on for generations, or a family seeking to create a life centred on values and quality over quantity, or anything in between, we're here to help you—in Castellano, Euskera, Catalá, Français or English.

Nuestro equipo de expertos en ganadería, bioseguridad y nutrición animal está comprometido con la promoción del bienestar animal en un contexto de desmedicalización del sector ganadero.

Name: Naqawa Agriculture - نقاوة الزراعية
Description:
Welcome to Naqawa Agricultural, a trailblazer in the farming industry with a focus on automated and sustainable farming practices. We specialize in cutting-edge technologies such as hydroponics systems, automated agriculture systems, and renewable energy resources. Our journey began in 2023 in Saudi Arabia, inspired by the visionary goals of the Saudi Vision 2030.

At Naqawa, we bring together global expertise and a commitment to sustainable development. Our mission is to revolutionize the way food is grown and produced, ensuring a more efficient and environmentally friendly approach to agriculture. Through our advanced automated farming systems, we aim to optimize crop yields while minimizing resource consumption.

Our hydroponics systems utilize state-of-the-art techniques to cultivate plants without soil, allowing for precise control over nutrient delivery and water usage. By harnessing the power of automation, we streamline the farming process, reducing manual labor and increasing productivity. Additionally, we integrate renewable energy resources to power our operations, further reducing our ecological footprint.

With Naqawa Agricultural, you can trust that every step of our farming process is carefully designed to prioritize sustainability and efficiency. We are committed to playing our part in building a greener future by providing innovative solutions that meet the demands of a growing population while preserving our planet's resources.

Join us on this transformative journey as we pave the way for a new era of agriculture. Experience the power of automation, sustainable practices, and global expertise with Naqawa Agricultural. Together, let's cultivate a brighter and more sustainable future for generations to come.

Name: PDEPS Sénégal
Description:
La valeur ajoutée dans le secteur pastoral est restée inexploitée pendant longtemps au Sénégal même si plusieurs initiatives et investissements dans la sécurisation des ressources pastorales ont été une priorité. C’est l’une des raisons pour l’accélération du développement des chaînes de valeur lait et petits ruminants en vue de s’aligner sur les priorités du Plan Sénégal Emergent (PSE). Ces deux chaînes de valeur ont la particularité de toucher les jeunes et les femmes, qui sont des couches vulnérables et moteur de l’économie de notre pays.

A travers le PDEPS (Projet de Développement des Exploitations pastorales au Sahel), nous allons soutenir les moyens d’existence des communautés pastorales, notamment les jeunes et les femmes.
Pour rappel, le financement de ce projet provient d’une collaboration entre la Banque Islamique de Développement (BID) et de la fondation Bill Gates qui ont mis sur place le fonds pour la vie et les moyens d’existence, où les communautés vulnérables sahéliennes occupent une bonne place. C’est également à cet effet que la zone pastorale du Sénégal a bénéficié d’une partie de ce financement.

Le projet est axé sur 4 composantes :

La première concerne les infrastructures pastorales et la gestion des ressources naturelles ; une façon de sécuriser les ressources pastorales ;

La deuxième est orientée sur les chaînes de valeur lait et petits ruminants avec tous les services connexes (santé animale, services financiers) qui vont accompagner les communautés à développer ces deux chaînes de valeur ;

La troisième concerne le renforcement des capacités des acteurs pour l’atteinte des résultats du projet, et

La quatrième est relative à la gestion et à la coordination du projet.

Le PDEPS intervient dans 5 régions à savoir Louga (Linguère), Saint-Louis (Dagana et Podor), toutes les régions de Matam, Tambacounda et Kaffrine.

Description:
Agrimedic: Leading the Way in Sustainable Agriculture
Established in 2023 as a subsidiary of Agrimedic Global, Agrimedic is at the forefront of transforming agriculture. With a focus on sustainability and innovation, we are proud to be the exclusive partner, bringing the revolutionary Plantos Verde to local farmers, landscapers, and growers.
Our Mission
Our mission is to revolutionize agriculture by providing 100% certified organic solutions that enhance productivity, improve crop quality, and protect the environment. We are dedicated to empowering our customers with eco-conscious products that deliver tangible results, fostering a sustainable future for agriculture.
Plantos Verde: A Breakthrough in Organic Plant Support
Developed by Dr. Peter Ost and patented globally, Plantos Verde is a micromineral ionized plant-support product that harnesses nanotechnology to deliver essential nutrients directly to plants. Inspired by the natural process where minerals from Sahara Desert sandstorms nourish the Amazon rainforest, it boosts photosynthesis, strengthens plant defenses against pests, and promotes healthier growth—all while being purely organic and sustainable.
Key Features:  
Boosts Photosynthesis: Delivers CO₂ directly to plants, optimizing chlorophyll production and energy synthesis.  

Certified Organic: Complies with EC (No. 834/2007 and 888/2008) and NOP regulations; registered under Act 36 of 1947 (B4598).  

Key Benefits of Plantos Verde
Unmatched Yield Increases
Elevated Sucrose Content
Superior Resilience
Earlier Harvests, thus better use of investments and soil
Sustainability at Heart
Robust Plant and Soil Health

Name: FiLoLéG Filière Locale de Légumineuses à Graines
Description:
FiLoLéG (Filière Locale de Légumineuses à Graines pour l’alimentation humaine) est un projet multi-partenarial visant à ce que la région Hauts-de-France soit une région productrice et consommatrice de Légumineuses à Graines en 2030.

Il a pour ambition d’une part de mettre en place un espace d’échange et de concertation entre acteurs, permettant de faciliter l’émergence et la structuration de filières à destination de l’alimentation humaine, et d’autre part de réaliser des études et analyse techniques, agronomiques, économiques, etc. répondant aux besoins des acteurs.

Le projet a démarré depuis 2022 et est organisé en quatre actions : 
1- Structurer et animer un réseau d'acteurs professionnels,
2- Centraliser la connaissance disponible en région et plus largement pour alimenter les études et analyses réalisées, 
3- Faciliter les transactions entre acteurs,
4- Promouvoir les chaînes de valeurs locales.

Name: Mediterranean Youth Task Force
Description:
The Mediterranean Youth Task Force is the youth-branch of the Silva Mediterranea secretariat of the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO). 

It is a self-led group of engaged young people up to 35 years old who are either from or living in the Mediterranean region. Participants are students, researchers, young professionals or those with active roles in the forest sector of the Mediterranean region.  

The overall goal of the MYTF is to facilitate youth engagement in Mediterranean forestry issues. 

The Mediterranean Youth Task Force has three main objectives:  
participate, organize and promote knowledge-sharing and capacity-building activities in the areas of work of the Silva Mediterranea Secretariat, its five active working groups and other forestry youth networks; 
promote spaces for exchange and dialogue, not only among youth, but also with decision-makers in the forestry sector of the region; and 
propose, lead and adhere to innovative actions in the forest sector of the Mediterranean, promoting youth action and participation.

DONDE NACE EL FUTURO.

Description: COOPERAR É UMA FILOSOFIA -  Desde 1995, desenvolvemos o agronegócio com base na união das missões, visão e valores dos nossos cooperados com o objetivo central de prestar serviços aos seus associados, nas áreas de produção e mercado de produtos agrícolas e pecuários. A Topigs Norsvin é uma empresa líder em genética suína, reconhecida por suas soluções genéticas inovadoras para a produção de suínos com boa relação custo-benefício.
A investigação, a inovação e a rápida disseminação do progresso genético são os pilares da nossa empresa. Estamos empenhados em ajudar os nossos clientes a ter sucesso em termos de eficiência de produção, qualidade da carne, robustez dos animais e produtividade elevada e saudável.

Name: Vivagric
Description:
Vivagric: Empowering sustainable agriculture for a brighter future.

We are a modern technology-driven agribusiness company that is committed to growing premium organic crops, fruits, tree plantations, poultry, fish, livestock, dairy, beverages, and processed foods using mechanized farming methods.

We believe that sustainable agriculture is the key to a brighter future for our planet and our communities. That's why we are committed to using the latest technologies and practices to produce high-quality food in a way that is good for the environment and good for the people who produce it.

Our mechanized farming methods allow us to produce food more efficiently and with less environmental impact. We use renewable energy sources to power our operations, and we implement practices such as crop rotation and cover cropping to help protect our soil and water resources.

We also believe that it is important to provide our employees with good wages and benefits, and to create a safe and supportive work environment. We are committed to creating a sustainable food system that benefits everyone involved.

Here are some of the specific ways that Vivagric is working to empower sustainable agriculture:

We are using modern technology to improve our farming practices. For example, we use drones to monitor our crops for pests and diseases and precision agriculture techniques to apply fertilizer and water more efficiently.

We are growing premium organic crops and livestock. Organic farming is a more sustainable way to produce food, as it avoids the use of synthetic pesticides and fertilizers.

We are using mechanized farming methods to reduce our environmental impact. Mechanized farming allows us to produce more food with less land and water and less pollution.

We are committed to being a leader in sustainable agriculture. We believe that we can play a vital role in creating a brighter future for our planet and our communities.

Cultivating a sustainable future for all.

Lakeland Farm and Ranch Direct, a division of Lakeland Group, is an established provider of premium farm and ranch products throughout Canada and the United States. Name: Avex Egg
Description: Approximately 100 million high-quality hatching eggs are produced on annual basis in contemporary facilities with the highest level of bio-safety that are located in Bolu and Ankara border, and exports more than 60% of its capacity to global markets with the optimal route, great efficiency, quality and competitive costs for the purpose of hatching egg or daily chick distribution.

Name: OG ROOTS FARM
Description:
At OG Roots, we started our journey of introducing hydroponics vegetables in India with the goal of helping people live enriching lives. We have devoted years of our lives to hydroponics research and development. We started our journey in 2020 and found an Israel-based technology that enables plants to grow in water.
We used the data to build our hydroponics farms in Gurugram where we grow our produce without chemicals. Our 100% soil-free vegetables grow in a suitable environment created with the help of poly houses. This enables us to grow any vegetable throughout the year without compromising on the nutrients.

Name: Mind Your Melon Foundation, Inc.
Description:
Agriculture is stressful. Life is stressful. But the good news? We are never in it alone. 

Mind Your Melon is a farm stress and mental health advocacy platform built upon inspiring healthier minds through proactive lifestyles. 

Our health is as inter-connected and intricate as our industry's supply chain. Emotional, physical, and business health all play a significant role in the greater picture. And we're studying, compiling and sharing resources on these various facets of well-being. 

Ready to have a conversation? We're always here to listen and help.

Name: Reagro Consult
Description: A Reagro é a primeira empresa brasileira a oferecer de forma integral todos os serviços necessários para a recuperação de valor dos ativos relacionados ao Agro Negócio. Com o conceito One Stop Shop, nossos produtos permitem ao cliente obter os serviços de revaloração de forma integrada.

Name: PELAGRA Moçambique, LDA
Description:
A PELAGRA MOÇAMBIQUE é uma empresa moçambicana dedicada a impulsionar o setor agropecuário do país através da inovação, do conhecimento e da sustentabilidade. Nosso objetivo é claro: do conhecimento nasce uma nova agricultura.

Com uma atuação multifacetada, a PELAGRA MOÇAMBIQUE se destaca em diversas frentes:

Produção e Comercialização Agropecuária: Nossos produtos, cultivados com as melhores práticas, chegam à mesa dos moçambicanos com qualidade e segurança.
Consultoria Especializada: Oferecemos serviços de consultoria em agricultura e geoprocessamento, aplicando o saber técnico-científico para otimizar a gestão e a produtividade no campo.
Impacto Social e Resiliência Climática: Através da nossa ONG, desenvolvemos e implementamos programas de apoio a comunidades, com foco em capacitar agricultores a enfrentar os desafios das mudanças climáticas, construindo uma agricultura mais resiliente.
Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento: Conduzimos ensaios técnico-científicos rigorosos e contribuímos ativamente para o avanço do conhecimento na área agropecuária, buscando soluções inovadoras para os desafios locais.
Parcerias Estratégicas: Estabelecemos parcerias nacionais e internacionais com instituições de pesquisa e inovação, garantindo que as tecnologias agrícolas mais avançadas cheguem ao campo moçambicano.
Na PELAGRA MOÇAMBIQUE, acreditamos que a aplicação do conhecimento e da tecnologia é a chave para transformar a agricultura, gerar prosperidade para as comunidades e construir um futuro alimentar mais seguro e sustentável para Moçambique.

Name: La Paloma Cattle Co.
Description:
La Paloma Cattle Co. and 4F Land & Cattle LP were established in 1996 and 2020 respectively.  We operate our commercial Brangus cow/calf herd and quarter horse breeding program in bluebonnet country outside of Industry, TX (Austin Co.) and on leased country near Charlotte (Atascosa Co.).  The horse program focuses on cutting, roping and ranch horses.

Our bucking bull breeding program operates in south TX on leased land at the La Paloma Ranch in Charlotte, TX established by Louis M. Pearce, Jr. in 1973.  Most of our bulls buck through our partnership with Cervi Championship Rodeo and Cervi Brother Pro Rodeo based out of Roggen and Stoneham, Colorado.

We are members of Texas & Southwestern Cattle Raisers Association (TSCRA), National Cattlemen's Beef Association (NCBA), the American Quarter Horse Association (AQHA), National Cutting Horse Association (NCHA), Cowhorse Classic (CHC) and hold a card in the Professional Rodeo Cowboys Association (PRCA).

Name: Orgo
Description:
Orgo empowers farmers in the transition to a more regenerative agroecological farming. 

Orgo provides Farmer-to-Farmer Coaching and Measurement, Reporting, and Verification (MRV) services to empower you with information about your agro-ecosystem health, focusing on regenerating life above and below ground.

Orgo is also providing Education services, as we believe education plays a crucial role in empowering the current and next generations leading us to a more regenerative society.

We are a member of the Restor Global restoration Network and are committed to science-based best restoration practices. Orgo is already participating in the platform managing restoration sites in Portugal. 
Visit them at: https://linktr.ee/orgo.eco

Supporting the UN Decade on Ecosystem Restoration (2021-2030) #GenerationRestoration

Name: SoDeSeP S.A. (Société Béninoise de Développement des Semences et Plants)
Description:
Crée par décret n°2024-723 du 24 janvier 2024 la Société béninoise de Développement des Semences et Plants (SoDeSeP) S.A vise à optimiser les investissements structurants effectués par l’Etat depuis 2016 dans le secteur de l’agriculture avec pour principal objectif de structurer l'industrie semencière autour des espèces vivrières, horticoles, fourragères et forestières. 

Le but visé est de répondre aux besoins en semences composites et hybrides des agriculteurs, afin de contribuer à la réalisation des objectifs de développement durable.

Name: KARAMOJA MODERN FARMING INITIATIVE (KAMOFI)
Description:
We are Karamoja Modern Farming Initiative (KAMOFI) a community-based organization. 
-Our mission is to establish and strengthen linkages between farmers and markets, and facilitate access to information, inputs, and other services. We also aim to promote sustainable and climate-smart agricultural practices that enhance environmental conservation and resilience.
-Since our inception, we have reached a number farmers in the distrcicts of Abim, Kotido and Napak, aiming at providing them with training, equipment, seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, and extension services. We have also aim at establishing partnerships with local NGOs, government agencies, private sector companies, and donors who support our work. We hope to seen positive changes in the farmers’ productivity, income, food security, health, and well-being.

-We are always looking for new ways to grow our network and expand our reach. If you share our vision of a prosperous and sustainable future for the Karamojongs and their communities, please follow us on LinkedIn or visit our website here. You can also donate here or volunteer here to help us make a difference.

Name: Route 1 MN
Description: Driven by the key values of inclusion, integrity, innovation, courage and community, Route 1 believes that if given the proper amount of support and resources, BIPOC emerging farmers can (a) run a profitable farm enterprise and (b) grow enough healthy, nutritious, and  culturally relevant food to feed their communities.  We also believe that there are significant health outcomes that can be positively influenced by ensuring that communities of color have access to regeneratively grown food sources.   Our work inspires us to introduce black and brown youth to regenerative agriculture and educational and career pathways in agricultural production and processing.  Equity in the agricultural system improves the overall sector, increases innovation, and can create a more robust and resilient economy for all.

Name: Victoria x México

Name: Vedic Biochar
Description: We at Earth Analytica Lab committed towards promoting indigenous Agricultural Research & Analytics by incorporating knowledge of our ancestors farm practices and natural solutions which they had been using without reliancing on chemical & pesticides for farming.we are infusing sustainable agri practices for betterment of soil and  humanity health.we have some field research products like Vedic Biochar a high quality carbon based substance (rich in carbon,high carbon squester), a natural  soil amender for better soil health.Cowdung/Wood-ash a highly Co2 sequester natural source of fertilizers and pesticides. Paddy Straw Residual based compost enriched with many soil benifits.another amazing practice is of Prakritik Kheti which is based on many natural fertilizers & pesticides alternative for farmers i.e.Jeeveamrit ,Bijaamrit,Ghanamrit, Brahmastra etc. they are derived from Desicow Dung and Urine.these nature friendly solutions are more resilient towards the environment and offer sustainable fertilizer alternative for farmers.Our indigenous process of producing Biochar with Soil, Bricks and Paddy muds Based Desi Reactor in slow pyrolysis process,which produces high quality carbon based substances (rich in carbon,High carbon squesting capacity).Our cowdung & wood ash is specially produced in Indian Desi Cooktop (Chulaha) by our indian rural households during their food making process,Its another great Soil improver ,pure natural and refined fertilizer,Cow dung ash can be used as PK Alternative with Nitrogen urea ,it helps farmers provide an alternative solution towards reducing their dependency on chemical fertilizers and producing organic produce to Sustainable fertilizer input supply chain. Let's promote & contribute our bit to protect mother Nature & our future generations by adopting sustainable nature solutions.

Name: Groupe NJS
Description:
Le Groupe Noutchogouin Jean Samuel (NJS) fournit aux Africains une viande de grande qualité à travers ses filiales. Nous oeuvrons pour la sécurité alimentaire en Afrique.

Le groupe NJS est le leader de sa filière au Cameroun et dans la zone CEMAC. Chaque jour, nous délivrons plusieurs millions d’œufs aux Camerounais et permettons à une part substantielle des plus de 55 millions d’Africains qui font la zone CEMA de se nourrir. Nous leur permettons également d’alimenter et d’apporter les soins nécessaires à leur bétail, volaille et animaux de compagnie.

Name: Pluriton Opfokintegratie
Description:
Pluriton levert een belangrijke bijdrage aan de innovatieve en vooruitstrevende legsector in Nederland. Wij leggen elke dag een nieuwe basis voor gezonde en vitale eendagskuikens en leghennen. Of het nu gaat om kolonie, volière, freiland of biologisch. Dit doen we samen met de sector op een transparante en duurzame manier.

Wij geloven in een gezonde toekomst voor onze huidige en toekomstige generaties. Iedere dag opnieuw staan we aan de basis van BRIGHT NEW LIFE.

Name: Elinnove
Description:
Elinnove (Elevage Innovations) est un cluster autour du bâtiment d’élevage dont l’objectif principal est de fédérer les acteurs du bâtiment d’élevage pour le développement de projets de R&D et de l’innovation.

C’est une association loi 1901, créée début 2015, avec le soutien de la Chambre d’Agriculture des Pays de la Loire et de la région des Pays de la Loire. Domiciliée à Angers, Elinnove est présidée par Anthony GOBIN, représentant de Le Roy - Lead Leroy Concept.

Les objectifs d’Elinnove sont multiples :
· Favoriser les échanges entre les acteurs de l’élevage, les équipementiers, constructeurs et installateurs et les représentants de la recherche, du développement et de l’enseignement supérieur pour multiplier les synergies et favoriser la mise en cohérence des actions, 
·  Fédérer ces acteurs français autour de la thématique du bâtiment et des équipements dans le domaine de l’élevage, ainsi que d’assurer une meilleure visibilité de ces acteurs et de cette thématique dans le domaine agricole.
·  Faire émerger, développer et promouvoir des projets de R&D et des innovations pour l’élevage, tant au niveau national qu'à l'international, en consortium ou non.
·  Assurer la représentativité des fabricants français.
Les membres d’Elinnove sont répartis dans trois collèges :
·  Collège A : Equipementiers, constructeurs, installateurs-revendeurs,...
·  Collège B : Filières d’élevages : couvoirs, organisations de productions, abattoirs,...
·  Collège C : Structures de recherche, développement, formation,...

Elinnove est pour le moment limitée aux acteurs du bâtiment avicole. Le développement national est engagé. Un développement progressif à toutes les filières d’élevage est en cours.

Name: ECOlogics Consulting
Description:
En ECOlogics ofrecemos consultoría especializada en ingeniería forestal, agronómica, industrias de la madera, y gestión del ambiente, formulamos y ejecutamos proyectos y planes según las leyes de bosques nativos e implantados, complementamos con servicios de evaluación de impacto ambiental, gestión de proyectos sostenibles en todos los ámbitos incluyendo los relacionados con las energías renovables, certificación ISO, IRAM, CERFOAR, PEFC y FSC, cuantificamos y gestionamos la huella de carbono, desarrollamos proyectos para la obtención de créditos de carbono, desarrollamos software específico y análisis de datos geoespaciales incluyendo nubes de puntos LiDAR. Nos enfocamos en promover prácticas responsables con el medio ambiente y el uso sostenible de recursos naturales.
Correo electrónico: info@ecologics-consulting.com

Name: AQUABIT
Description: Plataforma de inteligência para a produção de peixes e camarão

Name: Regroupement des Tables de concertation bioalimentaire du Québec
Description: Le Regroupement, fondé en 2021, permet d'assurer une meilleur synergie entre ses membres issus du secteur bioalimentaire, de développer d'avantages de projets communs qui seront déployés dans le but de promouvoir l'achat local aux quatre coins du Québec en plus de se doter d'orientation et d'enjeux conjoints.

Name: Continental Land Collective
Description:
At Continental Land Collective, we’re redefining ranching by returning to its roots.

We are a regenerative beef company on a mission to heal 500,000+ acres by 2030 through practices that restore ecosystems, rebuild rural economies, and reconnect people to the land.

Our vertically integrated model—from soil to cattle to consumer—transforms degraded land into living landscapes, producing premium, nutrient-dense beef that supports human and environmental health.

Rooted in tradition and driven by a vision for the future, we regenerate soil, raise healthier livestock, and deliver exceptional products that nourish both people and planet.

We don’t just produce better beef—we produce a better food system.
By working with nature, not against it, we capture the full value chain and prove that ecological health and economic performance go hand in hand.

At CLC, regeneration is more than a philosophy—it’s a daily practice: • Restoring biodiversity and soil function
• Using whole animal utilization to reduce waste
• Creating economic opportunities in rural communities
• Tracking measurable outcomes to ensure impact and transparency

We’re proud to partner with ranchers, educators, chefs, and consumers who share our belief that food can be a force for renewal.

The new way is the old way—and it’s working.

Name: Inseme St Genetic
Description:
INSEME S.r.l. è società italiana, con sede a Modena, leader di mercato nel settore della genetica bovina applicata alla Fecondazione Artificiale (F.A.). Alleviamo e commercializziamo materiale seminale dei migliori riproduttori, frutto del nostro Know-how e del lavoro svolto a fianco degli allevatori italiani, con lo scopo difendere, promuovere e diffondere in Italia e nel mondo la genetica. Conosciamo bene il nostro ruolo e guardiamo al domani con una visione innovativa e attenta alle esigenze del mercato e dei clienti.

Facciamo orgogliosamente parte della grande filiera alimentare italiana, capace di produrre prodotti alimentari di eccellenza, sia nel campo lattiero-caseario che nella produzione di carne, con elevatissimi standard di qualità e di biosicurezza.

Name: Bæredygtigt Landbrug
Description:
Bæredygtigt Landbrug går forrest i arbejdet med at skabe bedre rammevilkår for landbrugsfamilierne.

Foreningen repræsenterer konventionelle og økologiske primærlandmænd, der tilsammen dyrker over 1 mio. ha. Foreningen blev stiftet den 1. februar 2010 med det mål at få afskaffet de økonomisk belastende dele af Grøn Vækst, sikre landbruget mod nye indgreb og få afskaffet skatter og afgifter, der belaster erhvervets økonomi i forhold til konkurrenterne i EU.

Name: Agropecuária Laffranchi Comércio e Indústria Ltda
Dalwhinnie Farms
Description:
Our cannabis is grown at our 300+ acre ranch at the base of the San Juan mountains in western Colorado. Our passion is cannabis, but our responsibility is the land, which causes us to pursue a host of environmentally responsible practices such as geothermal cooling, LED lighting, composting of biomass & media, and water recirculation & reuse. Our ranch is home to horses, cows, honey bees, and goats, as well as our two state-of-the-art cultivation facilities, resulting in a unique blend of western ranch life and modern cannabis production at a large scale. 

Check out our products - Shift Cannabis by Dalwhinnie Farms. Shift is a Colorado mountain brand made for the broader urban market, outdoor adventurers, and true terpene aficionados.

Name: Dehesa El Milagro
Description: Founded by Blanca Entrecanales in 2011, Dehesa el Milagro is a fully sustainable closed-cycle Dehesa farm. We specialize in producing a wide selection of organic meats, fruits and vegetables and an exquisite range of packaged gourmet products. We prioritize the preservation of natural soil cycles, animal welfare, and the craftsmanship of our products in our workshop. With a dedication to quality and sustainability, we ensure that our packaged gourmet products meet the highest standards of taste and ecological responsibility.

Name: AGRONOVA AGROFLORESTAL
Description: Empresa prestadora de Serviço para Área de Silvicultura na Manuntenção de Florestal manual, Grade e Aplicação de Herbicida Mecanizado.
Location: Três Lagoas, Mato Grosso do Sul

Name: Shanghai Xiashu Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd
Description:
XiaShu Technology is a high growth enterprise in Tongji University Science Park, and "Tusstar" company of Tsinghua Tusholdings. 

Xia Shu Technology is committed to the research and application of machine vision in industry and animal husbandry, and has formed a full process research and development service that integrates production, design, research and development, sales, and after-sales services. 

All core R&D personnel of the company's founding team graduated from the top 20 universities in the world, and were among the first batch of master's and doctoral students to graduate from big data and artificial intelligence majors in the United States.

XiaShu Tech uses AI to assist in fine farming, developing core products such as chicken sex identification machine, poultry image weight estimation system, and farm inspection robots, to help reduce costs and improve efficiency in the farming industry, while achieving digital upgrades.

The company won the 7th place and Outstanding Project Award in the 2019 China International Big Data Fusion Innovation Artificial Intelligence Global Competition, and was funded by the Shanghai Pujiang Talent Plan in 2020. The chick sex identification machine developed by the company is currently the only commercially available one-day-old chick sex identification machine in China and even in the world. 

The company is headquartered in Shanghai and has offices in Zhejiang, Beijing, New York City, London, and Jakarta. Serving the world has always been the company's pursuit.

Name: AgroPlan - UFV
Description: A AgroPlan-UFV, Empresa Júnior de Agronomia da Universidade Federal de Viçosa, consiste em um intercâmbio entre Universidade e Iniciativa privada, ex-alunos, órgãos públicos e profissionais da área de Agronomia em geral. Atuando desde 1995 no Brasil, principalmente em Minas Gerais, prestando serviços de assistência técnica, elaboração e desenvolvimento de projetos na área agronômica. É uma associação civil, sem fins lucrativos e com fins educacionais, criada e composta por alunos de graduação da UFV, orientados por renomados professores, mestres e doutores especializados na área de atuação. Por estarmos inseridos em uma instituição de ensino e pesquisa, temos acesso às novas técnicas de produção e novas tecnologias que otimizam os recursos da propriedade e diminuem os custos. Como resultado, temos um alto nível de qualidade na Empresa e, consequentemente, nos serviços prestados a produtores e empresários rurais.

Name: Earth Foundries, Inc.
Description:
We promote healthy forests by delivering economical and sustainable forest residues processing. Earth Foundries contracts with public or private land managers, private tree trimming firms, and other entities to accept their woody forest material, and processes the waste into heat, energy, biochar and/or other carbon negative products. 

Earth Foundries can sell its biochar to a variety of end customers including farmers, vineyards, compost providers, public or private landscaping outfits, water treatment facilities, etc.

We are a certified woman-owned and certified B Corporation.

Name: nutriFORUM
Description:
22 & 23 abril de 2026 en el Palacio de Congresos de Lleida.

nutriForum es uno de los eventos técnicos sobre nutrición animal de mayor relevancia en el territorio español.

Este congreso, organizado por el Grupo de Comunicación agriNews y nutriNews, reúne a nutrólogos enfocados en diferentes especies de interés ganadero, a grandes integradoras, productoras de carne, y a empresas dedicadas a la creación de aditivos para consumo animal.

Cada año se establece una temática sobre la que gira el programa técnico, atendiendo siempre a las necesidades de formulación y actualizaciones metodológicas del sector.

Name: Asociación Española de Ciencia Avícola - AECA-WPSA
Description:
La Sección Española de la World's Poultry Association (WPSA) tiene como principal objetivo promover la investigación y el intercambio científico y técnico entre los especialistas estudiosos y profesionales de la avicultura, siendo hoy día una de las secciones de la WPSA más activas y reconocidas a nivel internacional. Actualmente cuenta con más de 260 miembros en activo, todos ellos técnicos, profesionales e investigadores del sector avícola en España.

Otra de sus finalidades es contribuir con su actividad a un mejor conocimiento y valoración por parte de la sociedad española de la producción y los productos avícolas. Los miembros de la Asociación Española de Ciencia Avícola consideran que ésta debe ser activa en la defensa de las buenas prácticas productivas, que repercuten directamente en la calidad de los productos avícolas y en la seguridad alimentaria, y en ello ponen todos los medios a su alcance, principalmente en las áreas de formación y divulgación dirigidas a los responsables de granjas o industrias avícolas.

Como técnicos, profesionales, científicos y expertos en las diferentes áreas relacionadas con la avicultura (producción animal, sanidad, nutrición, tecnología de los alimentos, etc.) los miembros de la Asociación Española de Ciencia Avícola se ponen a disposición de los consumidores, la opinión pública, los medios de comunicación, las empresas o las instituciones interesadas para ofrecer su colaboración en las materias en que su contribución pueda resultar de ayuda.

Desde el año 2014 AECA forma parte de la Unión de Entidades Españolas de Ciencia Animal (UEECA), creada para agrupar y coordinar a las asociaciones y federaciones constituidas en España con actividades dedicadas a la I + D de la Ciencia Animal.

Name: Agrocerrado Júnior
Description: Empresa Júnior de Ciências Agrárias

Name: Nationale Bomenbank B.V.
Description:
Nationale Bomenbank is al meer dan 50 jaar uw betrouwbare uitvoeringspartner voor alles wat met bomen te maken heeft. Wij bieden een compleet dienstenpakket: van verplanting en groeiplaatsverbetering tot boomverzorging, beheersing van de eikenprocessierups, levering, aanplant en nazorg. Onze betrokken boomspecialisten staan garant voor kwaliteit, vakmanschap en een duurzame aanpak. Samen met onze klanten werken we aan een gezond bomenbestand. Zo dragen we actief bij aan onze visie: met bomen bijdragen aan een klimaatadaptieve leefomgeving.

Vanuit onze visie is Nationale Bomenbank ervan overtuigd, dat:
- er een blijvende maatschappelijke waardering voor bomen zal zijn;
de waarde van een boom in een stedelijke omgeving bestaat uit economische, ecologische, esthetische, functionele en psychologische aspecten
- bomen daarom een belangrijke bijdrage leveren aan het welzijn van de mens en voor een leefbaar milieu onmisbaar zijn in de dynamiek van een stedelijke omgeving.

Samen met onze klanten werken aan een gezond bomenbestand. Wij willen ons in de markt onderscheiden door ons vakmanschap, dat is opgebouwd uit meer dan 50 jaar specialisme, onze servicegerichtheid om altijd een passende oplossing te bieden. Onze missie: Bomen laten leven!

Onze kernwaarden

Kwaliteit: als boomspecialist streven wij naar een hoge kwaliteit.

Betrouwbaarheid: betrouwbaarheid is bepalend voor de relatie met onze stakeholders. Wij streven naar een cultuur van integriteit, menselijkheid, wederzijds respect, helderheid en zakelijkheid.

Betrokkenheid: onze betrokkenheid uit zich in het streven naar een optimale samenwerking met onze klanten, medewerkers, leveranciers en andere relaties. Bovendien voelen wij ons met onze omgeving verbonden en willen wij op maatschappelijk verantwoorde wijze ondernemen.

www.nationalebomenbank.nl

Name: BLUE BI AGROTECH
Description:
Descubra como a inteligência pode revolucionar o agronegócio! Na Blue BI Agritech, acreditamos no poder dos dados para impulsionar a produtividade e a sustentabilidade do setor agrícola. Por meio de soluções personalizadas em Business Intelligence, integramos informações de diferentes fontes, como sensores IoT, sistemas de gestão e dados de mercado, para transformar desafios em oportunidades.

Otimize cada etapa da sua produção! Com nossas plataformas inteligentes, ajudamos produtores, cooperativas e empresas do agronegócio a monitorar suas operações em tempo real, prever tendências de mercado e tomar decisões mais estratégicas. Imagine ter um panorama completo da sua safra, estoques e comercialização ao alcance de um clique — isso é o que entregamos.

Simplifique a gestão de dados agrícolas! Sabemos que, no campo, o tempo é um recurso valioso. Por isso, nossas ferramentas são projetadas para oferecer insights claros e ações práticas, desde o planejamento de safras até a análise de desempenho. Além disso, nossos dashboards intuitivos tornam a gestão de dados acessível para todos, mesmo para quem não é especialista em tecnologia.

Faça parte da transformação digital do agro! Unindo tecnologia, inovação e conhecimento do setor, a Blue BI Agritech é parceira de quem busca aumentar a eficiência, reduzir custos e alcançar novos patamares de competitividade. Já ajudamos diversos clientes a colher resultados impressionantes, e estamos prontos para fazer o mesmo pela sua empresa.

Quer saber como podemos transformar o seu negócio? Entre em contato conosco hoje mesmo e descubra como a Blue BI Agritech pode ser a peça-chave para o sucesso da sua operação no campo. Acesse nosso site ou envie uma mensagem para começar essa jornada de inteligência e inovação!

Name: DANIS NV
Description: Danis is een succesvol familiaal bedrijf dat streeft naar duurzaam leiderschap in de Belgische varkenshouderij, kwalitatieve veevoeders en veredeling van soja door het aanbieden van innovatieve en klantgerichte concepten. Wij werken internationaal met de Benelux als onze thuismarkt.

Name: Topigs Norsvin España
Description: La compañía genética más innovadora del mundo

Name: Re-Genus
Description:
Re-Genus has a range of natural, regenerative fertilisers, growing media and natural crop nutrition which work to bring life back to soils and boost the health and resilience of crops. 

We sell branded products as well as ingredients to other manufacturers who want to add fungi and other natural inputs to their fertilisers and growing media.

By applying Re-Genus products, growers can reduce the carbon emissions in both in fertiliser production and in its use. These products bring nature back to the soil and protect surrounding water courses and ecosystems from synthetic chemicals. 

We work with companies in Agriculture, Forestry and Horticulture. We mainly sell our products in the UK but are actively looking for contract manufacturers, partners and customers globally.

We also manufacture and supply top quality, peat-free and coir-free potting materials, Ellepots, coated seeds, seedlings, mulch using our core ingredients. 

We bring the beneficial microbiome back to soils for healthier, more resilient crops and ecosystems.

Our materials are 99% sourced from within the UK. We up-cycle residues from the food, beverage and forestry industries to create a circular economy.

Description: Trabalhamos com cria recria e engorda de bovinos e lavoura.

Name: Nutrefeed S.A.
Description:
Nutrefeed nació de la necesidad técnica de un grupo de profesionales en los años 80, enamorados de la nutrición animal aplicada, unidos por los mismos valores, marcados por una gran vocación de servicio y un objetivo en común: “Lo mejor debía ser para nuestros clientes”.
En dicha década, se comenzó con el asesoramiento profesional a establecimientos lecheros y de carne, en el área de la nutrición, generándose como una de sus consecuencias la necesidad de palear deficiencias, carencia y excesos, tanto en los Macro como en los Micronutrientes.
Así nos iniciamos en la fabricación de Pre-mezclas magistrales, solicitadas por los técnicos, para balancear la dieta optimizada durante sus visitas, así crecimos, y así llegamos hasta hoy, buscando progresar día a día, y poder entregar lo mejor de nosotros, a nuestros clientes.

Name: Agroforestry Partners
Description: Agroforestry Partners provides a turnkey financing solution to enable agroforestry conversion for farmers and landowners, while providing an uncorrelated, attractive nature-based investment opportunity for investors. We aim to fix the carbon cycle and improve climate health one acre at a time.

Name: Koperwiek
Description: Koperwiek is een biologische regeneratieve kwekerij voor agroforestry, voedselbossen en eetbare tuinen. Gekweekt met respect voor natuur vanuit de gezonde bodem.

Name: AVIR
Description: Mejora de la productividad en explotaciones ganaderas intensivas, combinando los beneficios de la calefacción por infrarrojo lejano con la captación y análisis de datos.

Name: Cooperativa Agrícola, Ganadera y Forestal "La Aguada" Ltda
Description: Nuestra Cooperativa fue fundada en el año 2014, por un grupo de productores agrícolas, ganaderos y forestales de Formosa, Chaco, Santiago del Estero y Entre Ríos, para aunar fuerzas en la comercialización de los productos que se generan en sus tierras, teniendo como principal enfoque el agregado de valor.

Name: agrifoodTEF
Description:
AgrifoodTEF aims at boosting the development of European AI, data and robotics solutions by stimulating the uptake of AI powered solutions in the agri-food sector. 

Built as a European network of physical and digital facilities, AgrifoodTEF will maximise the impact on the agri-food's competitiveness and its main players by providing services that help assess and validate third party AI and Robotics solutions in real-world conditions, aiming to maximise the impact of digitalisation in the agricultural sector.

Name: Dehesa Grande
Description:
Desde el año 2000 Dehesa Grande S. Coop aglutina a través de sus más de 600 socios, 40.000 vacas nodrizas, la mayor parte de la cabaña reproductora son F2 descendiente de la raza autóctona.
Los socios de Dehesa Grande pertenecen a cinco cooperativas de primer grado de la provincia de Salamanca: Consorcio de Promoción del Ovino, Fuentevacuna S. Coop., Ganavaex S. Coop., Campo Vacuno y Carne Natural de Ledesma
Como Sociedad Cooperativa Prioritaria desde 2017, entre sus servicios destacan la certificación de explotaciones que garantiza a los clientes una carne de calidad, lo que exige que los socios de Dehesa Grande cumplan un riguroso protocolo que incluye inspecciones a nivel sanitario y alimentario tanto en las granjas como en la industria cárnica.
Otros de los servicios que la cooperativa presta son el asesoramiento veterinario, con técnicos especializados que atienden cualquier problema sanitario o enfermedad que pueda surgir en las explotaciones, y el asesoramiento técnico. También la comercialización de ganado y la formulación y nutrición animal, donde mensualmente se trabaja con nutrólogos que garantizan que el pienso de Dehesa Grande es siempre el más competitivo en calidad y en precio sin perder propiedades.
La cooperativa cuenta con la Certificación en Bienestar Animal WelfareQuality  en sus cebaderos, industria cárnica y en una gran parte de las granjas de sus socios.

Name: Kanters Special Products
Description:
Kanters Special Products is the water specialist. We develop, produce and market nutritional supplements, cleaning and disinfection agents for (water) pipelines and dosing technology.
The products are used in intensive livestock and on cattle farms to improve business profits by supporting animal health and preventing the use of antibiotics.
To achieve the highest yield against the lowest costs for the farmer, Kanters Special Products offers an expert and personal accompaniment with the use of its products.
Knowledge, excellent quality from own production, practical advice, service and an honest and a cordial way of doing business are the basis to be leading worldwide.

Name: SODALEC DISTRIBUTION - SODIS
Description:
SODALEC DISTRIBUTION - SODIS offers equipment for breeding activities :
- Electronic systems and controllers SODALEC
- Fans & Blowers
- Inlets
- Air treatment and filtration
... Etc.
We offer quality products but also a technical service near your concerns.

Located in Rennes in Brittany, the first breeding region in Europe, SODALEC DISTRIBUTION designs, for over 30
years, equipment for the management and control of the atmosphere in the breeding farms.

From design to manufacturing, SODALEC DISTRIBUTION relies today on its teams and its network, to develop a range of innovative equipment and adapted to each animal production (pig, poultry, rabbit, cattle, sheep ...).

Air treatment (filtration and air cleaning), ventilation, control, heating, cooling, monitoring, internet communication … are solutions that we offer. These are adapted depending on the climate and your needs, whatever the size of your breeding.

Attentive to the training of our clients, having a recognized technical and after-sales department, SODALEC DISTRIBUTION accompanies you in the study and the realization of your project, with the biggest attention. 

To optimize the performances of your breedings is our priority.

Name: EXAT AGRICULTURE
Description:
EXAT AGRICULTURE (Exploitation Agricole Tehui), est une société anonyme de droit ivoirien.
EXAT est spécialisée dans la gestion et le développement de plantations d’hévéa et dans la production de caoutchouc naturel granulé.

Name: PT. Leong Hup Jayaindo
Description:
PT. Leong Hup Jayaindo was incorporated in 2005. We are now a leading producer and distributor of poultry feed, aqua feed and other animal feeds throughout Indonesia. Our head office and feedmill factory are located in Medan, Sumatera Utara. We have a branch office in Jakarta Selatan.

Our subsidiary, PT.Sehat Cerah Indonesia (SCI) is an established distributor of feed additives, vaccines and other farming products. SCI has strong partnership with well-known principals such as Delacon, Norel, Hipra, Calier, and many others in Europe, USA, and Malaysia. SCI has its head office in Jakarta Selatan, and with branches in Krian, Yogyakarta, Solo, Bandung, Medan, Palembang, and Makassar.

Name: Pluriton
Description:
Pluriton satisfies the global demand for poultry. We specialise in the export of premium quality hatching eggs and day-old chicks from layer and broiler breeds. These eggs and day-old chicks are supplied by our own hatcheries and breeder farms and are exported to poultry farmers all over the world.

We believe in a healthy future for the generations of today and tomorrow. Every day, we create the foundations of a BRIGHT NEW LIFE.

NIVAR, empresa líder en el sector avícola, con más de 50 años de trayectoria en la región Zuliana. Su actividad productiva está centrada en la producción de Huevos para el consumo humano, pollos beneficiados y alimentos ABA.

Description: We are a technological solutions company that strives toward safe and sustainable cultivation of plants and animals. Created in 2000, from the beginning we have focused on developing natural products that can partially or completely replace the use of antibiotics, promoting sustainable agricultural production. With 20 years of experience in the market, we are made up of qualified professionals with extensive experience, knowledge and relationships, and we seek to produce the best results for the success of our clients.

Name: Terranova HG
Description: Distribuidor nacional Evans Vanodine International.

Name: MTB Consultoria
Description:
A MTB Consultoria é uma empresa de assessoria e consultoria que atua em todo o Brasil desde 2004.
A sólida e ampla qualificação do corpo técnico da empresa lhe confere agilidade no desenvolvimento de soluções eficazes e éticas para várias áreas de atuação, incluindo indústrias, importadores, exportadores e comerciantes de fertilizantes minerais e orgânicos, corretivos, inoculantes, remineralizadores, biofertilizantes, condicionadores de solo e substratos, bem como laboratórios e prestadores de serviço de armazenagem, acondicionamento e geradores de material secundário para o segmento de insumos agrícolas
A empresa tem como diferenciais a agilidade no retorno, o profissionalismo e a competência da equipe na solução rápida de questões burocráticas junto aos órgãos reguladores do país, com a expertise de dar pleno atendimento à legislação sem perda de produtividade ou engessamento das atividades.
Location: Carmo do Rio Claro , Minas Gerais

Name: INVENTAR GMB - Inventário Florestal
Description:
Empresa especializada em Inventário Florestal, desde a definição de metodologias, coleta de dados e processamento.

Com certificações de qualidade ISO 9001, ISO 14001 e ISO 45001, atuando em 3 estados brasileiros: Minas Gerais, Bahia e Espírito Santo. 

Com sede na cidade de Lavras/MG, onde conta com apoio no meio acadêmico de professores, doutorandos e estudantes da Universidade Federal de Lavras.

Name: Nuffield Brasil
Description:
Nuffield is an international, non-profit institution established in the United Kingdom 70 years ago, designed to contribute to the development of the people who drive agribusiness and, consequently, to the advancement of this sector that is vital to society. To fulfill its mission, Nuffield seeks to connect forward-thinking individuals across multiple countries. Its main instrument for keeping this global network active and growing is its practical research program.
Each year (from July to October), a selection process is opened for agribusiness professionals, and the most outstanding candidates become “new Nuffield Scholars.” With financial support from Nuffield partners, these professionals take part in global conferences and travel the world — both in groups and individually — to learn about challenges and best practices in agriculture across different countries, always with the support of more than 1,700 Nuffield Scholars spread across over 15 countries.
The formal program lasts two years, during which each Scholar balances their professional activities with the development of a research project that is relevant to their region or country. They must also publish their insights and conclusions in an open report and present them at events. After completing the program, Scholars remain active in the network, engaging with peers from other countries and supporting new participants.
The purpose is clear: to contribute to the development of a sector that forms the foundation of society. Nuffield understands that achieving this requires leaders — women and men — who are technically prepared and, above all, open-minded and open-hearted.

Name: Colpar
Description: A Colpar, visando produzir de forma sustentável e eficiente, adotou como modelo de produção a Integração Lavoura Pecuária (ILP). Esse sistema tem como base a integração total da propriedade, trazendo benefícios para ambos os setores produtivos do Grupo. A interação entre os diversos setores produtivos da propriedade possibilita que as áreas sejam utilizadas o ano todo, maximizando a produção de grãos e carne a um custo mais baixo devido ao sinergismo entre as atividades.

Name: Farminova
Description: Being the foundation of life, a seed is indeed a miracle… A miracle small in size but great in capacity, sprouting and perishing as soon as we water it… An incredible miracle containing all the information of a plant, which determines its species, colour, shape and taste…

Name: CECAV
Description:
El Centro de Calidad Avícola y Alimentación Animal de la Comunidad Valenciana (CECAV) da servicio e integra a todos los eslabones de la cadena de producción avícola: fábricas de piensos, producción primaria en granjas y mataderos.

El Objetivo de CECAV es poner a disposición del Sector y de la Administración Pública las herramientas de control necesarias para garantizar la Sanidad Animal y la Calidad de los productos animales, desde la fabricación de piensos hasta los mataderos, pasando por la producción primaria en las explotaciones.

CECAV está regido por una Asamblea General, que es el órgano soberano de Gobierno. Cuenta con una Junta Directiva, que impulsa las estrategias de gestión ejecutadas a través de la Gerencia. Además, CECAV basa sus actuaciones técnicas en las decisiones tomadas por un Comité Técnico abierto a todos los socios, formado por veterinarios y técnicos de las empresas asociadas y de la Administración.

El centro se divide en 6 áreas: Administración, Comercial, Calidad, Laboratorio, Formación y Proyectos. A su vez, el Área de Laboratorio cuenta con 3 unidades: Sanidad Animal, Alimentación Animal y Seguridad Alimentaria.

Consta de los siguientes departamentos, dotados de la tecnología más avanzada al servicio del sector: Microbiología, Serología, Biología Molecular, Necropsias, Anatomía Patológica, Parasitología, Química, Unidades Analíticas de Mataderos, Contabilidad y Facturación. El laboratorio cuenta con equipos de alta tecnología, como PCR Real Time, Separación Inmunomagnética y Detección Electroquímica, Espectroscopía de Plasma ICP-OES y cabinas de bioseguridad II y III.

El centro está dotado de Vestuarios, Comedor, Biblioteca, Almacenes y un Salón de Actos dividido en dos áreas, una destinada a comités técnicos y otra para grandes eventos y conferencias.

El CECAV cuenta con un amplio horario de recepción de muestras, procesándolas de lunes a viernes de 7h a 18h, y sábados y domingos de 8h a 14h.

Name: Kaiku Sociedad Cooperativa
Description:
La cooperativa Kaiku agrupa a más de 400 explotaciones de Gipuzkoa, Navarra, Bizkaia, Araba, La Rioja y Burgos.

Sus actividades incluyen la gestión logística de la recogida de la leche, su venta y la oferta de servicios que aportan una mayor competitividad a los socios.

En marzo de 1999, las cooperativas Gurelesa y Copeleche constituyen en San Sebastián la Cooperativa de 2º grado Kaiku, que desde el día 1 de abril de ese mismo año gestiona la compra de la leche de los ganaderos socios de Gurelesa y Copeleche..

Diez años después, en junio de 2009, las respectivas Asambleas Generales de las cooperativas Gurelesa, Copeleche y Kaiku aprueban la fusión de las mismas en la cooperativa Kaiku que pasa a ser de primer grado, culminando el proceso de integración.

We represent farmers and ranchers in all states, with organized divisions in 33 states. We advocate for grassroots policy positions developed by our membership and adopted at our national convention.

We envision a world in which farm families and their communities are respected, valued, and enjoy economic prosperity and social justice.

Name: Hy-Line South Africa (Pty) Ltd
Description: Global market leader in the development and marketing of egg layer genetic stock. Founded in 1936 by Henry A.
