Rimbawan Market is an integrated platform connecting forest communities and markets.

We are working with local communities to assist them organize collectively, adopt better management practices, and access niche markets for natural forest-based products. On the other end of the value chain, Rimbawan is building a network of responsible businesses, food artisans, and retailers, committed to social and environmental impact, and willing to offer consumers a unique and truly Indonesian experience. 

We have curated a portfolio of unique regional forest products to provide responsible consumers and businesses with the best products Indonesian forests have to offer.

Name: Ranch Resources
Description:
Ranch Resources provides independent management and consulting services to ranch owners throughout Montana.  We provide services to clients on many different levels.  One-time consulting work or long term management of ranch operations.  We can help the new land owner develop realistic goals and objectives and then formulate these into a strategic plan.  We can then move into implementation and management activities to ensure that the goals of the ranch owner are realized on-the-ground.  

Our staff brings a broad base of education and experience to the table as it relates to the management of your ranch.  Everything from agricultural enterprise management, lease administration, wildlife population management and conservation, noxious weed management, soil & water conservation practices, and human resource administration.   We are here to help you have the ranch your land deserves.  

All our decisions and actions are guided by our core values:
CONFIDENTIALITY: We hold the business of our clients in strictest in confidence.
HONESTY: We are forthright and truthful in our dealings with each other, our associates and our clients.
ACCOUNTABILITY: We are accountable for our own actions. 
PRIDE OF WORKMANSHIP: We are proud of the quality of services and products we provide. 
SERVICE: We are here to serve the needs of our clients and their ranches.

Name: AGRI INDUSTRIES (Galvelpor)
Description:
Chez Agri Industries, nous imaginons et fabriquons dans notre usine, ici en Bretagne, du matériel tubulaire pour élevage porcin.

Depuis plus de 30 ans, nous affinons notre expertise et notre expérience, pour apporter un conseil avisé et sincère, en nous focalisant précisément ce qui sera le mieux pour nos clients !

Nous sommes fiers de contribuer à la performance et l’amélioration constante des conditions de travail dans les élevages porcins, ainsi qu’aux conditions de vie et au bien-être des animaux.

Name: Nitrum24
Description:
Somos un equipo multidisciplinario de profesionales comprometidos con el sector agropecuario situados en la ciudad de Junín, provincia de Buenos Aires, que ha desarrollado una tecnología alternativa en la provisión de nitrógeno a la dieta de novillos, vaquillonas, vacas de tambo en forma segura, práctica y económica.

COMPROMISO NITRUM 24
 
Nuestro compromiso es la incorporación de nitrógeno al alimento balanceado de bovinos en forma segura. Ya que ante errores de suministro por parte del personal, no se presentan peligros de intoxicaciones que podrían causar la muerte del animal, o poseen complicaciones que, sin llegar a ocasionar la muerte de los animales, produce una menor tasa ganancia diaria de peso por dosis de nitrógeno como sí ocurre con la UREA.

Name: Industrias Kaeri
Description: Una empresa, líder en genética, cría y producción ganaderas, con presencia internacional. Especialidades: Genética | Producción (empresarial) | ganado lechero | Ganado al vacío de carne |

Name: Numix Nutrición Animal
Description:
Numix Nutrición Animal es una planta de alimentos balanceados ubicada en el Departamento de Durazno, un punto estratégico por su tradición ganadera y cercanía a los principales puertos y zonas de producción. Nos especializamos en la elaboración de alimentos para bovinos, equinos, ovinos, caninos y felinos, además de ofrecer sales minerales, núcleos y premixes para otras plantas elaboradoras de alimentos.

Desde nuestros inicios, hemos crecido de manera constante, ampliando nuestra capacidad de producción de 5 a 20 toneladas por hora, gracias a la automatización y la optimización de procesos. En 2019 inauguramos nuestra planta de Núcleos y Premixes, diversificando nuestra oferta y brindando soluciones a productores lecheros, corrales de engorde y otras industrias agropecuarias.

La calidad es nuestra prioridad. Contamos con certificaciones como MGAyP e ISO 22.000 de LATU Sistemas, garantizando la seguridad, trazabilidad y excelencia en cada uno de nuestros productos. Nuestro compromiso con la innovación nos llevó a desarrollar un Campo de Experimentación, donde trabajamos junto a instituciones como la Facultad de Agronomía, INIA y SUL para perfeccionar nuestras fórmulas y procesos productivos.

Además de alimentar el crecimiento del sector agropecuario, apostamos a la sostenibilidad y la Responsabilidad Social Empresarial. Medimos nuestra huella de carbono, utilizamos energía fotovoltaica en nuestra planta y promovemos la reducción de plásticos mediante la venta de alimentos a granel. También apoyamos la educación, el deporte y el bienestar animal a través de diversas iniciativas comunitarias.

Nos proyectamos como una empresa referente en nutrición animal en Uruguay y la región, combinando tecnología, eficiencia y compromiso con la producción responsable. En Numix, entendemos que somos parte de la cadena de producción animal y trabajamos para contribuir al bienestar, la nutrición y la salud de cada animal, desde el campo hasta el hogar.

Name: LNCR
Description:
The « Laboratoire National de contrôle de reproducteur » (LNCR) is a veterinary diagnostic and research laboratory specialized in the animal health reproduction. LNCR works, particularly with Artificial Insemination centers and Embryo Transfer stations, on monitoring the sanitary status of high genetic value animal, semen and embryo from bovine, porcine, ovine, and caprine species. LNCR is officially mandated by the French Ministry of agriculture to accomplish these missions. 
LNCR is also playing a sanitary key role when exporting animals, semen, or embryo from Europe to the world since it is the OIE Collaborating Center for Reproductive Diseases in Europe.
Based in Maisons-Alfort a few hundred meters from the National Veterinary School and the ANSES site, it has strong collaborations with these structures, particularly in the field of diagnosis and research on animal diseases and fertility.
Our commitments: ACT, while respecting your DEADLINES, in various situations, by offering PERSONALIZED advice, ADAPTED to your needs.

Name: FARM SEMILLAS PRODUCTION COMPANY
Description: We strive to provide the highest quality F1 Hybrid Seeds to seed companies around the world. Our products are developed using the latest advances in seed technology and are tested for quality and vigor before being released to the market. Our knowledgeable and experienced team of agronomists, breeders, and seed specialists is dedicated to providing seed companies with the best F1 Hybrid Seeds available. We also offer technical support and advice on growing and using our products. We are committed to delivering quality, reliability, and innovation to our customers.

Name: DBR Ranch
Description:
The sole purpose of the ranch: to assist active horse owners in their development and maintenance of their animal and continue to grow DBR Ranch and trail a system in that part of Wood County known as "Dream, Believe, Realize Ranch". 

Ride with your horse down miles of beautiful wood county land and private trails with various terrain, from river side walks to wooded trails, get involved in one of the many activities, or just lounge around and enjoy your horse.

We will maintain up to (20) horses providing, board, and training all breeds.

Name: Vosnæs Gods
Description: Familievirksomhed indenfor land- og skovbrug. Vi tilbyder også lejemål til private og erhverv, udlejer jagt og driver maskinstation.

Name: Emissiecoach
Description: Heeft u vragen over erfemissie van gewasbeschermingsmiddelen? De erfemissiecoach helpt u met antwoorden over regelgeving en praktische maatregelen.

Name: Working Ranch
Description:
Working Ranch is the nation’s leading media brand that delivers America’s largest commercial and purebred cow/calf producers and stockers. We focus on ranches with 200 or more head of beef cattle. 

Working Ranch is No. 1 in both market share of ad pages and in time spent reading each issue as measured by READEX. 

We avoid uninspiring, dry reading and instead imbue a level of creative, authentic “ranch” journalism in our print, digital and nationwide radio stations including Rural Radio, Channel 147 on SiriusXM.

Learn more at www.workingranchmag.com.

Name: Santiago Arroyos ,S.L
Description:
Desde 1996 nuestra empresa desarrolla su actividad en el sector primario, en la rama ganadera. 

La experiencia, nuestra inquietud por seguir creciendo y la confianza que depositan en nosotros nuestros clientes día a día, nos han ayudado a crecer como empresa. 

En 2008 nos trasladamos a nuestra actual ubicación, dónde contamos con las instalaciones y personal necesario para ofrecerle un servicio integral:

Asesoramiento en alimentación y estudios de viabilidad de sus proyectos.
Construcción de granjas llave: porcino, vacuno, ovino y caprino.
Remodelación de cualquier tipo de instalación: interiores y exteriores, adaptaciones a nuevas normativas, renovación de materiales, innovación tecnológica, etc.
Servicio de reparación de averías.
Distribución de materiales.
Recambios para instalaciones: chupetes, bebederos, dosificadores, medicadores, etc.
Mantenimiento de instalaciones: bebederos, rejas, vallas, etc.

Name: Rusmolco LLC
Description:
«Русская молочная компания» ("Русмолко") была создана в октябре 2007 года, основной регион деятельности компании – Пензенская область. На сегодняшний день «Русмолко» объединяет девять хозяйств в Башмаковском, Пачелмском, Пензенском, Кузнецком, Наровчатском, Нижнеломовском и Каменском районах. Специализация компании – молочное животноводство и растениеводство.
На сегодняшний день «Русмолко» является крупнейшим производителем молока-сырья в регионе, под управлением компании находится более 133 тыс. га земель.
В 2012 году «Русмолко» подписало соглашение о начале реализации совместной инвестиционной программы с одним из глобальных лидеров сельскохозяйственной отрасли, компанией «OLAM International». Стороны намерены инвестировать до 400 млн. долларов США в рамках первого этапа реализации программы - в срок до 2015 года. В планы на этот период входит формирование дойного стада на 20 тыс. голов и увеличение площади обрабатываемых земель до 106 тыс. га. Второй этап предусматривает удвоение объемов инвестиций в последующие три года, увеличение дойного стада до 50 тысяч голов и расширение площади обрабатываемых земель до 130 тыс. га. В результате реализации программы «Русмолко» станет ведущим российским производителем молока и войдет в десятку крупнейших частных производителей молока в мире.

Name: Produbiogensa
Description:
Produbiogensa es una empresa ecuatoriana, dedicada a la Producción Biotecnología, Genética y Servicios Agropecuarios en todo el País desde hace 20 años.
Contamos con cursos de capacitación permanente en ganadería, veterinaria y agropecuaria.

Name: GAIA - Geologia e Meio Ambiente
Description:
A GAIA – Geologia & Meio Ambiente é uma empresa especializada na prestação de serviços para Proprietários Rurais.

Visamos oferecer aos proprietários de imóveis rurais, soluções ágeis e concretas nos campos da geologia e meio ambiente, voltadas ao acesso às informações e ao auxílio técnico e gerencial.

Dentre algumas das nossas atividades, destacam-se aquelas voltadas à Regularização Fundiária Total do Imóvel Rural, como o Cadastro Ambiental Rural (CAR) e as declarações apresentadas no Sistema Nacional de Cadastro Rural (SNCR), além de serviços ambientais principalmente relacionados aos recursos hídricos e soluções em geoprocessamento.

Nossa meta é DESCOMPLICAR os processos de regularização de imóveis rurais e AUXILIAR os proprietários rurais com qualidade técnica e seriedade.

Name: Corto-Circuito "Passione Campania"
Description: Il Corto-Circuito "Passione Campania" è il primo progetto di sviluppo della filiera corta ad alto livello di valorizzazione del territorio campano.

Name: Molina Protein
Description: Molina are the largest European company specializated in the recollection and classification of tannery side products.

Name: PAMPR'OEUF
Description: PAMPR'OEUF l'élevage qui se moquent des êtres sensible

Name: Mecano Ganadero S.A.
Description:
Mecano Ganadero S.A. es una compañía argentina especializada en el diseño y la construcción de sistemas de corrales móviles de caños con el fin de optimizar el manejo del ganado.

Comenzó en 1968 en 9 de Julio, provincia de Buenos Aires, ofreciendo soluciones a través de instalaciones de madera para el sector ganadero. Desde el año 2000 introdujo a la Argentina los sistemas de caño, siendo los primeros en Argentina en reemplazar todos los productos de madera por productos de caño.

Hoy en día la empresa ofrece una amplia gama de productos para el cliente ganadero como tranqueras, casillas, paneles y bretes brindando soluciones para el campo. Actualmente también comercializa productos para la industria de la construcción.

Name: Triple B Ranch of Gilmer LLC
Description:
Farm to fork cattle ranch specializing in high-quality free range Japanese Wagyu raised in a traditional, low stress, and respectful environment. Orders via invitation only, fractional cow pre-orders only. All USDA inspected. All sales via deposit, with final price based on hanging weight. 

Given our family's Spanish and Japanese heritage, we love our Iberian Longhorn and Japanese Wagyu,  
 
Triple B Ranch is based on traditional Spanish and Japanese bovine raising methodologies, gained from the co-owners having lived and worked in both Spain (mainly the Extremadura and Malaga regions), and Japan, American co-founder lived over 13 years in the Tokyo region, as well as Western Japan, Hyogo Prefecture (birthplace of Wagyu), where the other co-founder, Yumi, hails (with family roots to the agricultural communities).  

The idea of Triple B was born at El Capricho, in Spain. El Capricho is run by Jose Gordon, a man with much passion and respect for our beloved cows and the process of reaching an ultimate finished product. We allow for all our cows to live peacefully at Triple B. "When you mistreat something in some way, you will eat that abuse. So that welfare is fundamental.", Jose Gordon. We live by this code at Trible B!

Name: Afarm's Square
Description: Afarm's Square is a premier agricultural venture located at Sango Ota, Nigeria. We are an ever growing Nigerian agro-business empire. With a focus on both livestock farming as well as Crop farming which includes processing and exporting of our produce within and outside Nigeria, Afarm's Square has established itself as a leading player in the agricultural sector.

Name: Stark Agro
Description:
Nosso objetivo é incentivar uma agricultura sustentável, levando em consideração os aspectos econômicos, ambientais e sociais. Para isso, oferecemos soluções de consultoria personalizadas que visam maximizar a produtividade e a rentabilidade dos nossos clientes, sem comprometer a qualidade do solo, da água e do ar. Além disso, temos como compromisso a preservação dos recursos naturais para as futuras gerações.

Através de nossa expertise e experiência, trabalhamos com nossos clientes para encontrar soluções que atendam às suas necessidades e objetivos específicos, promovendo uma agricultura mais eficiente e sustentável. Nós acreditamos que uma agricultura responsável é fundamental para a saúde do planeta e para garantir um futuro melhor para todos.

Name: ZOOWELLNESS
Description:
LA SOLUZIONE GIUSTA PER IL BENESSERE ANIMALE.
Noi di Cam Consulting società di consulenza alle imprese con una consolidata esperienza commerciale di oltre 40 anni, abbiamo deciso di intraprendere una nuova sfida: Zoowellness.
Non offriamo solamente un pacchetto chiavi in mano, dalla progettazione al collaudo, bensì costruiamo un vero e proprio ambiente "zoocentrico", in cui i bisogni dell'animale sono il fulcro del business dell'imprenditore agricolo.
Sappiamo bene che UN ANIMALE PIU' FELICE E' UN ANIMALE PIU' PRODUTTIVO.

Name: Fjildlab
Description: Fjildlab is een initiatief van Agrarisch Collectief Waadrâne, vereniging Noardlike Fryske Wâlden, Ondernemersvereniging Noordoost Friesland en Hogeschool Van Hall Larenstein.

Name: RISOL SARL
Description:
Description de l’entreprise

Risol Sarl est une entreprise compétente et strictement indépendante. Notre mission est de conseiller d'une façon intégrale dans le domaine de l'aquaculture. Nous avons aussi pour mission l'installation des fermes clé en main, la formation et le recyclage des techniciens dans le domaine de l'aquaculture, la vente d'intrants et de matériels d'aquaculture.

Les éléments clés de cette entreprise sont innovation et créativité, couplées à une grande notion de compétence, d'intégrité et de conscience de qualité. Toutes nos activités sont menées d’une façon sobre et efficace, conforme aux exigences des autorités compétentes. Nous préférons des contacts de longue durée.

En exécutant nos projets, nous nous servons des moyens de pointe. La grande majorité de nos projets est réalisée en Algérie et au Bénin et nous avons actuellement des demandes un peu partout en  Afrique.

La société Risol Sarl intervient aussi dans d'autres domaines outre l'Aquaculture.
L'agrobusiness,  La transformation et la commercialisation des produits aquacoles et
agropastoraux
- La distribution de matériels informatique, électronique et électroménager
- Toutes activités liées au génie civil , au BTP et l 'hydraulique
. La location de chaises, bâches, matériels d e sonorisation, de voitures e t de couverts
- La formation/consulting en aquaculture, agropastorale et informatique
- L' import -Export de marchandises
- La représentation commerciale
. L’agriculture
- Le transfert d 'argent
- La distribution de matériels biomédicaux
- La vente de matériaux de construction/quincaillerie
- Dépôt de boissons
- Transport en commun e t de marchandises
Et plus généralement, toutes opérations industrielles, commerciales ou financières , mobilières ou immobilières, de services se rattachant directement ou indirectement à l 'objet social et susceptible d’en faciliter la réalisation.

Name: The AgTech Diaries
Description:
"The AgTech Diaries"  is a newsletter by Ken Treloar exploring the realm of agricultural technology. It offers insights and information primarily focused on the application of drone technology and other advancements in farming practices. 

The content largely centres around perennial tree crops, berries, and vines. Treloar's stated goal is to educate readers on these emerging technologies in agriculture. Subscribers can expect to gain knowledge about the intersection of tech and specific crop cultivation.

Name: Bently Ranch
Description:
Bently Ranch has been producing high quality cattle since 1997. In 2013 we began offering Certified Natural and Certified Hormone Free grass fed beef. Our beef is Certified GAP Level 4, meaning the cows are pasture centered, have an enriched environment, and are never crowded together.

Today, Bently Ranch remains a local business where every part of our operation is dedicated to producing the West’s best grass fed beef.

We're dedicated to preserving the American ranching tradition. Our advanced techniques conserve our resources, producing the finest quality grass fed beef.

Our beef is:

-Dry aged for 3 weeks
-Grass fed
-Certified Natural
-Certified Hormone Free

Experience beef that can only be described as a cut above!

Name: Gaia Soluções
Description:
Transformamos o mercado de Hortifrúti, trazendo tecnologia para o campo. 

Inovamos na comercialização de produtos, através de uma melhor experiência de compra em diferentes canais de vendas, construindo a presença on-line de sua empresa com Marketing digital.

Nossa solução, além de promover escala para produtores, que possuem dificuldade de encontrar um mercado comprador, auxiliamos ainda nas tomadas de decisão de seu negócio, apresentando relatórios detalhados de suas vendas.

Name: PARTNER CEG Internacional
Description: Productores y profesionales agropecuarios que estamos interesados en trabajar cada día más unidos y por lo mismo en CONECTAR las múltiples partes interesadas (multi stakeholders) que apoyan e impulsan la cultura y el desarrollo agropecuario regenerativo y sostenible en cualquier tierra o comunidad dedicados a la producción de alimentos de origen vegetal y animal en el planeta.

Name: STAG FORESTREE
Description:
OUR MISSION
Build a unique and dynamic network for the popularization of good methods of ecosystem restoration in Africa and in the world with the diversity of communities

ABOUT US IN FEW WORDS
STAG FORESTREE is a young Ivorian company created in 2021. Its head office is located in the beautiful Ivorian political capital (Yamoussoukro, Ivory Coast).

It specializes in the construction of modern forest nurseries (shade net and installation of irrigation systems), industrial production of tree seedlings and forest fruit trees and the establishment of local seed production cooperatives.

Young, we believe in our ability to mobilize and federate initiatives in favor of ecosystems and biodiversity. STAG FORESTREE participates in the production and distribution of forest seedlings in highly degraded cocoa areas, in the establishment of local forest cooperatives and thus in the creation of green jobs in Côte d'Ivoire.

OUR ADDED VALUE
We mobilize scientific (restoration ecology, ecological engineering, etc.) and technological knowledge to accelerate the process of restoring degraded areas

OUR GOAL BY 2030
Help restore and protect 50% of degraded ivorian areas

Name: MONTEC - Consultoria Agropecuária
Description: Nossa missão é gerar inovação e desenvolvimento para o agronegócio brasileiro, através de produtos e serviços de qualidade.

Name: KLAUX.EU
Description:
We choose to take a new path and combine our passion based on our own expertise. Clawhealth/hoofcare and more welfare for dairy cows is our motivation, with a well-known quote “the claws carry the milk”, we also want to contribute more to better animal welfare by developing and building hoof trimming boxes with extra comfort, easy at work and more fun for the animal and the operator . And that "our" cows will have their claws better and more often manicured.

At Klaux.eu we bring together construction, electrical engineering and hydraulic engineering. Klaux hoof trimming boxes are already very complete as standard: the right dimensions for the modern cow, well-lit working environment, handy material / tool holder, 24 volt (low-voltage) controlled for extra safety, special pore-free floor, etc.

We develop and produce all our hoof trimming shutes 100% in the Netherlands. Klaux hoof trimming shutes have been developed and are produced according to the highest standards in terms of safety, working comfort and hygiene, whereby animal-friendliness is always paramount.

We are happy to talk to you !

Name: Uniagro S.A.
Description:
Somos criadero modelo que está situado en nuestro campo, ubicado en la provincia de Santa Fe, localidad de San Agustín, a 1800m de Autovía 19 km 11,5, donde se combinan instalaciones de 1º nivel, excelente genética y alimento estrictamente controlado.
Como primera medida de bioseguridad, en resguardo de la salud de los animales, nuestro criadero se encuentra alejado de zonas urbanas y de rutas transitadas y cada sector  rodeado de alambrados perimetrales, a efectos de impedir el ingreso de personas y objetos no autorizados. Este estricto manejo sanitario elimina la posibilidad de ingreso de agentes extraños, desde el nacimiento de los cerdos hasta la edad de venta, asegurando los mejores resultados en la obtención de un producto sano y natural.
Los animales son alimentados con raciones elaboradas en planta de balanceados propia, con cereales comprados y analizados estrictamente, asegurando de esta forma la calidad e inocuidad de los alimentos producidos.
Nuestro objetivo primordial es mantener un alto status sanitario, para disminuir al máximo la utilización de medicamentos y obtener una muy buena calidad de carne. 
Nuestro criadero posee la más avanzada tecnología para la producción de cerdos, lo que permite que sus crías puedan pasar correctamente por las etapas de lactancia, recría, desarrollo y terminación en perfectas condiciones nutricionales e higiénicas hasta alcanzar un óptimo estado de peso corporal.

Name: ReCreArte
Description: An art space, from gallery to workshop. A space where artists can come to share, exhibit and exchange in the heart of Locarno, Switzerland.

Name: Dicknoteboom.nl
Description: In Rotstergaast bij Boer Bart op het terrein hebben wij een halve hectare met onbespoten groente, fruit en bloemen. w ij staan bekend om onze jam en marmelade uit eigen keuken. kijk op onze website voor meer informatie. www.dicknoteboom.nl

Name: 9 Farms
Description:
Introducing 9 Farms: Cultivating Seasons, Nurturing Livestock
At 9 Farms, we are dedicated to harnessing the bounties of nature through sustainable practices. Specializing in seasonal crops, cattle rearing, and goat farming, we bring you the freshest produce and ethically raised livestock. Experience the harmony of nature's cycles with 9 Farms, where we cultivate seasons and nurture our animals with care.

Description: A Geniagro prospecta e desenvolve oportunidades entre o campo e as cidades gerando benefícios para produtores e consumidores

Contacta directamente con nuestro departamento comercial a través de comercial@fmgrupo.com

Name: First Choice Farm and Lawn
Description: Kubota Elite Dealer with headquarters in Troy, TN. Store locations include Union City, TN, Dyersburg, TN, Covington, TN, Eads, TN, Savannah, TN, Mayfield, KY, and Brookland, AR. Product lines include Kubota, Exmark, Bad Boy, Woods, Land Pride, CMI, Hustler, Echo, Wright, Bush Hog, Loftness, Merlo, Mean Green, GIANT, Versatile, Delta Trailers, and Texas Bragg Trailers.

Name: Landvolk Osnabrück
Description:
Als Partner vor Ort machen wir uns stark für die Interessen unserer 2.800 Mitglieder gegenüber Politik, Behörden, Verbänden, Wirtschaft und Wissenschaft.
Wir begleiten unsere Mitglieder in allen Bereichen rund um die Landwirtschaft, die Agrarpolitik, den Agrarmarkt u.v.m.
Über unsere berufsständische Tätigkeit hinaus, beraten wir unsere Mitglieder auch in rechtlichen, steuerlichen und sozialrechtlichen Belangen.

Name: PT. Wellard Indonesia
Description:
Wellard is meeting rising global demand for protein through the supply of quality livestock and value-added-product to consumers throughout the world.

Its principal business is the supply of live sheep and cattle to the Middle East and Asia, providing an important link between producers of quality livestock and consumers.

The company is also growing a complementary network of meat processing facilities in Australia, South East Asia and the Middle East.

As the world’s leading livestock exporter and a global agribusiness, Wellard is committed to excellence in the export and processing of livestock, from the procurement of sheep and cattle on-farm, the supply of quality feeds, pre-export preparation, maritime transport using the company’s advanced fleet of livestock vessels and modern processing facilities which adhere to international animal welfare standards.

Wellard has operations in exporting countries and import destinations on every continent, providing it with unparalleled supply opportunities and access to import markets. Wellard has developed a number of joint ventures in importing countries to utilise the company’s technical expertise and value add the livestock.

Australia leads the world in live export animal welfare and quality, and from its base in Perth, Western Australia, Wellard has been at the forefront of advances in the industry.

Het Platform Melkgeitenhouderij heeft, met het oog op verduurzaming van de geitenzuivelketen, de Duurzame GeitenZuivel Keten (DGZK) opgericht. Binnen DGZK verband werken zuivelondernemingen en melkgeitenhouders samen aan de uitwerking van 3 thema’s: dierenwelzijn en diergezondheid, energie en klimaat en sectortransparantie. In het DGZK-programma kunnen
melkgeitenhouders punten scoren voor bovenwettelijke inspanningen die bijdragen aan een duurzamere sector. 

Platform Melkgeitenhouderij is initiatiefnemer van consumentenplatform Ontdek de Geit.

Name: AGRIBITE SOIL TO SERVE PRIVATE LIMITED (soiltoserve.store)
Description:
AGRIBITE SOIL TO SERVE PVT. LTD. (soiltoserve.in), operating under the brand name Soil to Serve, is a purpose-driven agri-food enterprise committed to building a sustainable, inclusive, and nutrition-focused food system. Headquartered in Odisha, the company integrates sustainable agriculture, ethical food processing, and responsible consumption into a single value chain that starts from the soil and ends at the consumer’s plate.

The brand name Soil to Serve encapsulates the company’s core mission: to nourish people by nurturing the soil. From empowering smallholder farmers to creating healthy, culturally rooted food products, every stage of the value chain is designed to add value at the grassroots and deliver trust, transparency, and nutrition to the consumer.

The company promotes regenerative agriculture, capacity building of farmers, and value-added food processing that complies with Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) and food safety standards. Special focus is given to processed food, which are processed using clean-label methods and packaged responsibly for conscious consumers.

Soil to Serve emphasizes traceability, zero-waste practices, and community participation, working closely with farmer groups, self-help collectives, and rural youth. It also leverages partnerships with institutions, research bodies, and development agencies to scale its impact across rural and urban markets.

With a strong commitment to food safety, nutrition, and environmental stewardship, AGRIBITE SOIL TO SERVE PVT. LTD. aims to redefine the way food is grown, processed, and consumed—ensuring that every product served is not just food, but a story of sustainability, health, and rural prosperity.

Name: Timazootec
Description:
Timazootec è il brand di Groupe Roullier Zone Italie specializzato nella nutrizione e nel benessere animale. La sua missione è migliorare l’efficienza alimentare degli allevamenti di vacche da latte, bovini da carne e piccoli ruminanti attraverso tecnologie innovative e supporto tecnico di alto livello.

L’INNOVAZIONE
Il Centro Mondiale per l’Innovazione di Groupe Roullier sviluppa soluzioni tecnologiche che migliorano l’efficacia degli elementi minerali essenziali per lo svolgimento delle funzioni metaboliche. Dalle ricerche in laboratorio si sviluppa una vasta gamma di prodotti potenziati dai cosiddetti “nutrienti speciali” che consentono ai nutrizionisti di Timazootec di creare un sistema di razionamento più evoluto in grado di garantire all’allevatore un maggior reddito con l’ottimizzazione del potenziale produttivo dell’intera mandria.

LE SPECIFICITA’ 
CALSEAGRIT è una specificità ottenuta dalla selezione e raffinazione dello scheletro di alghe della famiglia Corallinaceae pescate nelle profondità marine. Il Calseagrit è fonte di calcio, magnesio, ferro, iodio ed altri oligo-elementi. Agisce nel rumine come bioattivatore della flora microbica.

NEOPHOS è l’unico additivo zootecnico registrato nella categoria dei “fosfati di calcio e di sodio”. Grazie alla sua composizione, Neophos migliora l'attività ruminale e i processi metabolici dell'animale. La sua altissima assimilabilità riduce i residui di fosforo nelle deiezioni, prevenendo così il problema dell'eutrofizzazione delle acque superficiali a vantaggio dell'ambiente. 

MAG26 è uno speciale additivo zootecnico, esclusivo di Groupe Roullier, registrato nella categoria dei “fosfati di magnesio”. L'elevata biodisponibilità dei suoi elementi essenziali consente di soddisfare in modo ottimale i fabbisogni fisiologici di magnesio e fosforo degli animali. Mag26 ha inoltre un elevato potere tampone che crea l'ambiente ruminale ottimale per i microorganismi.

L’ASSISTENZA TECNICA
Gli ATC di Timazootec sono tecnici appassionati e competenti che insieme all’allevatore definiscono gli obiettivi di miglioramento dell’efficienza alimentare e del benessere animale, misurando l’efficacia delle azioni intraprese e quantificandone il vantaggio economico. 

Timazootec è certificata ISO 9001/2015, ISO 14001/2015 e possiede la certificazione di operatore biologico.

Name: ANGUA S.A
Description:
ANGUA FIBER es una empresa ecuatoriana dedicada a la producción y comercialización de fibra de abacá, siguiendo las líneas de responsabilidad social y ambiental que caracterizan su origen. Esta es parte de un grupo empresarial español que por años se ha dedicado a contribuir con un mundo más sostenible, a través de la implementación de proyectos que evitan la emisión de más de 1.000.000 TnCO2eq al año.

ANGUA FIBER toma el mismo nombre de su empresa madre “ANGUA FORESTAL”, la cual cuenta con más de 2000 Ha de bosques nativos en Corrientes, Argentina que han sido plantados y cuidados con el objetivo específico de producir madera sostenible, es decir, sin deforestación, manteniendo la biodiversidad y contribuyendo con la eliminación del CO2 disperso en la atmosfera.
La producción y procesamiento de la fibra de abacá se realiza en los sectores de Valle Hermoso (Santo Domingo de los Tsáchilas) Centro de procesamiento y La Villegas (La Concordia) Centro de producción. ANGUA FIBER, es una empresa convencida de que el pequeño productor merece un trato justo, formalidad que involucre contratos a largo plazo y capacitación, permitiendo así que la producción local crezca y proyecte un exponencial desarrollo comunitario. 

De acuerdo a los lineamientos y fundamentos de responsabilidad corporativa característicos de nuestro grupo, ANGUA FIBER se encuentra preparando sus plantaciones y procesos de producción, para demostrar al importador la trazabilidad del producto, a través de la certificación de las plantaciones, con la implementación de sistemas de producción que se encontrarán en armonía con el ecosistema y demostrarán el mejoramiento de las condiciones de vida de pequeños productores asociados a los objetivos de sostenibilidad de nuestra empresa.

Name: MicoLab
Description:
Services for truffle growers: consultancy, analyses and trainings

For nursery owners and truffle farmers

At MicoLab we provide services for truffle growers, nurserymen and specialists in the field of black winter truffle and summer truffle cultivation (Tuber melanosporum and Tuber aestivum).

The basic objective of our consultancy service is to make land owners aware of the possibilities of their plots for successful truffle farming. We also aim to help them select the field works to be carried out and the most suitable management techniques to achieve high yields in truffle plantations.

At MicoLab we will help you decide where and how to plant. We will analyze and assess if the plants to be used have the right quality to produce truffles in the future. You will also be able to know the progress of the black or summer truffle mycorrhizae in your plantations and the presence of possible contaminating mycorrhizal fungi that could endanger the productive future of your plots.

Through our training service we offer high quality practical courses to obtain higher yields and increase efficiency in the nurseries, plantations and laboratories. Our courses are designed to focus on the needs that we identify in the sector, through our experience as analysts, plantation managers and trainers.

Name: D-Care
Description:
Bij D-Care geloven we dat gezonde zeugen de basis vormen van een winstgevend en toekomstbestendig bedrijf. Met diepe wortels in de sector, jarenlange ervaring in de varkenshouderij en een passie voor innovatie, combineren we praktijkkennis met de kracht van kunstmatige intelligentie (AI).

Onze missie is om varkenshouders te ondersteunen met technologie. Dankzij 24/7 inzicht in de stal maken we het onzichtbare zichtbaar. Zo helpen we om gezondheidsproblemen vroegtijdig te signaleren, betere keuzes te maken en rust te creëren – voor dier én mens.

We bieden slimme, praktische tools zoals onze gepatenteerde D-Tags en AI-modules voor gezondheidsmonitoring (Health) en berigheid (Heat). Wat ons onderscheidt, is onze mentaliteit: WE CARE. Om varkenshouders. Om zeugen. Om de toekomst van de sector.

Varkenshouders kunnen vertrouwen op D-Care’s technologie om het dagelijkse werk slimmer, efficiënter, duurzamer en winstgevender te maken.

 Meer weten? www.d-care.ai

Name: CID - Crop Innovation Denmark
Description: Crop Innovation Denmark (CID) is a public–private partnership bringing together Danish breeding companies and universities to drive innovation in plant breeding. Using tools like genomic selection, AI, and CRISPR/Cas, we focus on developing high-yielding, resilient, and sustainable crops to support climate action and global food security.

Name: Centre Agro-pastoral FeedMe (CAPFeedMe)
Description:
Le Centre Agro-Pastoral FeedMe (CAPFeedMe) incarne une initiative ambitieuse de développement agricole et d’élevage intégrés, destinés à maximiser la productivité et à créer un impact social et économique durable. Implanté dans plusieurs zones clés telles que Djidja, Allada, Ketou et Dassa, le projet cherche à redynamiser l’agriculture locale et à encourager l’entrepreneuriat rural à travers un modèle diversifié d’activités. CAPFeedMe se concentre sur l'élevage, la culture maraîchère, les plantations arboricoles et les infrastructures de soutien telles que les centres de formation, les espaces de stockage et la boucherie.
Ce projet vise à répondre aux besoins alimentaires locaux, à générer des revenus durables, et à offrir un cadre structuré de formation, afin de promouvoir l’autonomie des jeunes et des communautés rurales. En associant des techniques modernes aux savoirs traditionnels, CAPFeedMe met l’accent sur la durabilité, l’innovation, et l’adaptation aux défis du secteur agricole.
Au Centre Agro-Pastoral FeedMe (CAPFeedMe), nous offrons un service complet pour soutenir vos projets d'élevage, d'agriculture et de pisciculture. Que vous soyez un entrepreneur en herbe, un jeune en quête de formation ou un agriculteur chevronné cherchant à diversifier son activité, notre centre met à votre disposition un large éventail de solutions et de matériels adaptés à chaque besoin.

Name: Sergi Farms LLC
Description:
We believe in raising our cattle in a healthy humane environment. Our cattle graze green pastures in the rolling hills of Southeastern Wisconsin.

We take the benefits of both grain fed beef and grass finished beef. Our animals are finished on a 95% grass diet, with the other 5% consisting of all natural organic minerals/salts and locally sourced grain (only about 3-5lbs per animal per day).  This is used as a tool to add the correct marbling and nutrition an animal needs while ultimately delivering, you, the customer the healthiest and most delicious beef in the grass finished industry. 

We take pride in the fact we never use, growth hormones, steroids, antibiotics or growth implants. We take much pride in grazing our cattle on pasture, raising them in an all natural system and always using low-stress animal handling techniques on the farm. Our cattle are processed in the most humane way in the industry, while also being processed at a facility regulated at the highest level of processing facilities by the United States Department of Agriculture.

Name: Congreso Nacional de Sanidad e Inocuidad Agroalimentaria
Description:
Sanidad e inocuidad para la seguridad alimentaria, el desarrollo social y económico de México.

En esta primera edición reuniremos a expertos nacionales e internacionales más influyentes, quienes a través de sus conocimientos e innovaciones, han transformado la sanidad e inocuidad en un pilar del sector agroalimentario de México y el mundo.

Este evento está dirigido a productores, comercializadores, funcionarios públicos, empresas, academia, organizaciones científicas y gremiales.

Name: Soma Farm Group
Description:
Soma Farm Group partners with longterm investors to buy, lease, operate and regenerate strategic tropical farmland. We specialize in regenerative agroforestry, valuable hardwoods, heirloom cacao, and various specialty spices.

Our team is comprised of agroforestry specialist, agronomists, professional investors, farm operators, and supply chain experts. Beyond the leadership team, we have a deep network of partners and niche specialist that we rely on as needed.

Name: Dinklage Feed Yard, Inc.
Description:
Louis Dinklage pioneered the cattle feeding business in 1923 with the establishment of a 3,000-head operation near Wisner, Nebraska. By the late 1960’s Dinklage was considered the largest cattle feeder in the country. When a former partner moved to the western part of the state, he reported that he had found an excellent location to feed cattle. Louis was quick to recognize the attributes of the drier, more arid region, its abundant feed sources and water supply. He envisioned the panhandle as a major feeding area. 

His vision was correct, for today, Dinklage Feedyards is one of the largest and most successful commercial feeding operations in the nation. 

Under new leadership the Dinklage team have changed the face of Dinklage and are aggressively meeting industry challenges. Make Dinklage part of your team and allow us to help with your success.

Name: Falster Farm & Cattle Ranch
Description:
Ranchers of Pure Bred Mini Cows Cattle. Our Miniature Cows Cattle let folks living on small acreages enjoy the Miniature Cattle country cattle lifestyle. Our Pure Bred mini cows are happy miniature cattle and finish out on grass without hormones. We are life members of the American Hereford Association.

Falster Farm miniature Hereford cattle was established in 1999 to the Falster Family Organic Farm began as an avocation in 1970, long providing small farms with the expertise and genetics that can give them the edge in mini cattle farming and rural life sustainability. Our Quality, Service and Consultation are what set us apart from our competitors. If you are serious about growing your small acreage and are looking at ways to increase your fun and "pay for the place", then we will have a solution for you, and you will find it here.

Name: t Krulstaartje Weidevarkens
Description: ’t Krulstaartje verkoopt niet zomaar varkensvlees, het is namelijk weidevarkensvlees met een uniek verhaal! Bij ’t Krulstaartje staan de weidevarkens centraal, dat betekent dat ze opgroeien op een natuurlijke wijze. Daarnaast kunnen de weidevarkens doen wat ze het allerliefste doen namelijk, wroeten in de wei! Doordat onze varkens het grootste gedeelte van hun leven kunnen scharrelen in de wei zal je dit ook terug proeven. Het vlees dat ’t Krulstaartje produceert bezit een mooie marmering vet waardoor het vlees extra smeuïg en smaakvol is.

Name: GREEN FRUIT COMPANY SAS
Description:
Somos una empresa comprometida con la calidad y el bienestar en nuestros productos, nacidos directamente del corazón de la tierra.

En Green Fruit Company estamos comprometidos con el cumplimiento de los objetivos de
desarrollo sostenible (ODS 17) : reconocemos en las alianzas y cooperación colectiva las
bases para alcanzar las metas individuales, empleamos estrategias y técnicas de producción
responsables, protegiendo el ecosistema e impulsando el desarrollo sostenible en las
comunidades.

Nos mueve la misión de justicia alimentaria, brindarle a Antioquia, Colombia y el mundo la
posibilidad de acceder a alimentos saludables, orgánicos y culturalmente apropiados que
provengan de medios de producción justos y sostenibles.

Nos apasiona el campo y la inmensa variedad de productos agrícolas que nuestra tierra nos
ofrece y nos esforzamos día a día por imprimirle esa pasión y amor a lo que hacemos.

Name: Texas Landowner’s Association
Description:
Texas Landowners Association is the fastest-growing and most interactive organization of landowners in the Lone Star State.  We've combined the timeless fulfillment of owning land in Texas with today’s user-friendly speed, service and platforms.  We've stuck with the traditions that work- and added a few more of our own that we believe add benefit and ease to managing land in Texas.

What we offer Landonwers:

24/7 MEMBER SUPPORT & RESOURCES

Owning land is a full time operation . At TLA, we’re here to help around the clock. Got questions about your land? From “How do my water rights work?” to “Can you recommend some local fence builders?”  our Member Services Department is happy to help you one-on-one during business hours or 24 hours, 7 days a week via e-mail.

TEXAS LANDOWNER MAGAZINE

Texas Landowner Magazine is the official publication of TLA. This isn’t your ordinary farm circulation: it’s packed with the industry’s trending topics, DIY ranch projects, gear reviews and “need-to-know” resources about hot-button items like pipeline easements, mineral rights and more.

You can check out our official website www.LandAssociation.org, or become a loyal follower through our social media outlets;
 
FACEBOOK /TexasLandownersAssociation  INSTAGRAM TXLandowner  TWITTER @TheLandOwner

Name: Wagyu Uruguay
Description:
We are a family owned and operated business with more than 60 years producing cattle, involved in Wagyu since 2002.

Pioneers of Uruguayan Wagyu producing top Wagyu genetics and beef.

We manage a whole integrated Wagyu premium beef program which starts on our Wagyu genetics selection, going through top selected farmers, exporting our branded beef worldwide. 

Our Wagyu beef is +F2, pure bred and full blood.

We export our beef to the most demanding markets worldwide.

Name: CELOS Suriname
Description:
De Stichting Centrum voor Landbouwkundig Onderzoek in Suriname (CELOS) is opgericht in 1967. Op het CELOS, wordt een integraal onderzoek gedaan op het gebied van landbouw, bosbouw en beheer van natuurlijke hulpbronnen. Dit geschied vaak in samenwerking met (inter) nationale instituten en universiteiten, de lokale overheid en NGOs. CELOS is ook actief op het gebied van onderwijs en training en biedt aan studenten van de Anton de Kom Universiteit van Suriname (AdeKUS) en van het Natuurtechnisch Instituut in de Engineering studies (NATIN) de gelegenheid om onderzoek te doen.

Onze afdelingen en ondersteunende laboratorias zijn verantwoordelijk voor het opstellen en het implementeren van onderzoeksprogrammas en projecten, met o.a. als stakeholders rurale gemeenschappen, boeren en ondernemers.

Name: ZIRAAT FARMS
Description: Complex of modern African farms specialized in the sustainable production, processing, and distribution of food products, utilizing advanced technologies and environmentally friendly practices

Name: HoRa Höfig Ramos
Description:
HoRa I Höfig Ramos - Genética Nelore Sustentável
Há mais de 60 anos, as famílias Höfig e Ramos produzem carne. A HoRa é a marca registrada da Höfig e Ramos. Com a terceira geração da família à frente dos negócios há quase 30 anos, a HoRa direciona suas atividades para a excelência em melhoramento genético, produzindo touros, matrizes, sêmens e embriões para incremento do rebanho brasileiro, ajudando o país a se tornar o maior exportador de carne do mundo.  
A HoRa foca no futuro, desenvolvendo projetos inovadores, ampliando processos de gestão junto a funcionários, acadêmicos, grupos de pesquisa, parceiros e outros públicos. 
Sua dedicação e trabalho diferenciados creditam à HoRa reconhecimento nacional e internacional. É sua marca registrada a garantia de seus produtos, priorizando a proximidade e o atendimento aos criadores que compartilham da responsabilidade de produzir a melhor carne do mundo.

Name: Estancia El Alamo
Description: El Alamo is a family owned working estancia located the the Represa India Muerta in Rocha, Uruguay. We rear and raise premium Aberdeen Angus cattle for sale to export markets of Europe, the US and Asia. We employ the latest breeding techniques and feed management systems to produce consistent high quality, natural grass fed beef. El Alamo is a fully functional agropastoral farm, and we pride ourselves in working with the most up-to-date technology and systems to produce quality with efficiency.

Name: ROCKING C BAR CATTLE CO
Description:
Welcome to Rocking C Bar Cattle Co, a legacy of flavor rooted in three generations of passion for quality beef. Nestled in the heart of Southeast Oklahoma, our family has dedicated itself to raising premium grassfed, grain-finished, free-range beef. From our sprawling pastures to your table, we take pride in providing an unparalleled culinary experience.

At Rocking C Bar Cattle Co., our commitment to sustainable and ethical practices is as deep as our ranching roots. Our cattle graze on lush, nutrient-rich grasslands, allowing them to thrive in a natural environment. With the utmost care, we oversee the grain-finishing process, along with a very strict nutrition program, ensuring that our beef achieves the perfect balance of tenderness and marbling that discerning palates seek.

We believe in transparency, traceability, and the joy of knowing where your food comes from. 

As a third-generation ranch, we are not just selling beef; we are sharing a story, a heritage, and a commitment to excellence. Join us on a journey from pasture to plate, and savor the unparalleled taste of our grassfed, grain-finished, free-range beef—a testament to the timeless traditions and unwavering dedication that define Rocking C Bar Cattle Co.

To reserve your beef - Whole/Half/Quarter, please reach out to us at candice@rockingcbar.com or management@rockingcbar.com - we have 2 nice size/unclaimed for a 2024 butcher date.

Name: FATHIMA FARMS PRIVATE LIMITED (Chembra Estate)
Description: Fathima Farms Pvt Ltd (Chembra Estate) is a prominent agricultural company with a sprawling 1000-acre plantation. We specialize in the cultivation of high-quality tea, coffee, arecanut, and pepper. Alongside our agricultural endeavors, we offer exceptional tourism activities, providing visitors with memorable experiences amidst the scenic beauty of our estate.

Name: Bluestem Bison Ranch
Description:
At Bluestem Bison Ranch, we’re committed to offering you nutritious, wholesome meat while staying true to nature. Our bison are free to roam and thrive naturally, with minimal human interference.

Here’s what makes our bison meat stand out:

* 100% Grass-Fed and Grass-Finished
* Free from Va><ines, Antibiotics, and Synthetic Hormones
* Grain-Free & GMO-Free
* Chemical Free: Including Glyphosate-Free, Atrazine-Free, Paraquat-Free
* Field Harvested and Ranch Processed
* Ultra-Lean, Nutrient-Dense, and Packed with Protein

Description: Agroimport Agrícola passou a fazer parte das unidades agrícolas da corporação Dondoni SA. São unidades com foco no Agro Brasileiro, entre elas Agricultura, Pecuária e Silvicultura, nos Estados de Santa Catarina, Paraná e Mato Grosso do Sul.

Description: Excel Hort Consult Agribusiness Incubator (EHCAI) operates as an agribusiness incubation and innovation hub. It provides business incubation management, agribusiness enterprise development, and agro-industry value chain development services to local, national, and international organizations.

Name: NZ27
Description:
NZ27 is een biologisch landbouwbedrijf met acht medewerkers in Zeewolde. De gronden en gebouwen zijn sinds 1996 in bezit van Stichting Beheer NZ27 en worden duurzaam geëxploiteerd door het eigen bedrijf BV Exploitatie NZ27. Naast biologische akkerbouw en groenteteelt is het bedrijf gespecialiseerd in professionele opslag en verwerking.
De stichting heeft destijds de voormalige gronden van de Rijksdienst voor de IJsselmeerpolders overgenomen van de Nederlandse overheid. Op de 210 hectare van het landbouwbedrijf zijn sinds de drooglegging van de polder in de zestiger jaren van de vorige eeuw nooit chemisch-synthetische middelen gebruikt. De gewassen zoals granen, aardappels, rode bieten, uien, pompoen, kool, erwten, bonen en suikermais worden dus sinds jaar en dag op ecologisch unieke bodem geteeld. De stichting heeft in haar statuten vastgelegd dat NZ27 voor altijd biologisch zal blijven.

Name: SUPERFLYZ
Description: SUPERFLYZ is an insect-based waste management company, that develops and produces high-quality, sustainable, proteins and other ingredients for animals and fertilizer for agriculture.

Name: J2Agro
Description:
Criada para gerir as fazendas do grupo, a J2 Agro tem o comprometimento com a qualidade em seu DNA. Conta com sócios que atuam na pecuária de forma sólida há mais de 30 anos e a nova geração traz a tecnologia e inovação para o negocio.

Acreditamos que a qualidade e o aprimoramento genético do rebanho é fundamental para conquista de uma marca forte e consolidada no mercado.

Name: Covered S Ranch
Description:
The Covered S is a 23,000-acre working ranch with Black Angus cattle, horses, and wildlife.  The ranch’s terrain includes mesquite, cedar, rolling plains, rugged canyons, and open pastures.  In the daytime the skies are vast and “the stars at night are big and bright.” Our one-of-a-kind accommodations, which can host up to 50 guests, are thoughtfully woven into the ranch’s landscape. Ranging in size from one-bedroom suites to a five-bedroom home, we offer four distinct styles of lodging: Hacienda suites, a bunk house, homes, and R.V. spots for glamping. The design echoes home more than hotel – with deluxe amenities, custom furniture, and decor that showcases a distinctive Western heritage.
Located just off the caprock of the Llano Estacado, the Covered S offers year-round unique activities on an authentic 19th century homestead. We balance Western adventure with lavish all-inclusive amenities. Start the day with chuck wagon style breakfast.  Then hike, hunt, or rent a helicopter ride. Bring your own four-wheeler or horse for some adventure or just sit and experience the awe-inspiring view of Flat Top Mesa from the porch of the Hacienda.

Name: Noveu Florestal
Description:
Na Noveu Florestal, acreditamos que o sucesso do seu plantio começa com a escolha certa. Somos especialistas em oferecer a você o TOPO DA PERFORMANCE em reflorestamento, fornecendo mudas clonadas com genética comprovada e alta tecnologia.

Nosso Compromisso com a Alta Produtividade: Impulsionados pela ciência e pela inovação, desenvolvemos e cultivamos mudas de eucalipto que são sinônimo de máxima produtividade no campo.

Name: Primal Pastures
Description:
What began with 50 chickens in a Southern California backyard in 2012 has grown into a mission to bring America's cleanest meat to dinner tables across the country. As a physician assistant and father of four, our founder Rob witnessed firsthand how food choices could either heal or harm, inspiring him to create a better way to feed our families. Guided by the simple truth that "you are what you eat, eats," and inspired by regenerative farming pioneers, we set out to offer truly clean meats raised the way nature intended – not just another greenwashed label making empty promises. From our grass-fed and grass-finished cattle to our 100% corn and soy-free chicken, every product reflects our unwavering commitment to nutrient density and ethical farming practices.

Today, Primal Pastures continues to set the gold standard for wholesome, pasture-raised meats, proving that when you respect nature's wisdom and prioritize true quality over quick profits, everyone benefits: the animals, the land, and the families who gather around dinner tables across America.

Name: CABINET PROAGRO SARL
Description:
Le Cabinet ProAgro est une société béninoise spécialisée dans les études, les consultations en agronomie, la formation et le suivi-évaluation des activités agricoles et connexes. Fondé en 2019, notre cabinet propose des services et prestations de haute qualité, tant au niveau national qu'international.
Nos activités se concentrent principalement sur les domaines suivants :
•	Études hydrobiologiques, environnementales et écotoxicologiques aquatiques, ainsi que l'aménagement des pêcheries.
•	Restauration de la biodiversité et repeuplement des cours d'eau et plans d'eau.
•	Formation et suivi-évaluation dans les secteurs de l'agriculture, de la pêche, de l'aquaculture, de l'élevage et de la foresterie.
•	Renforcement des capacités des acteurs du secteur agricole, sensibilisation, formation et reconversion des jeunes.
Avec une équipe pluridisciplinaire d'experts composée d'ingénieurs et de docteurs spécialisés dans leurs domaines respectifs, nous offrons des solutions innovantes basées sur des données scientifiques et les meilleures pratiques.
Nous avons déjà réalisé avec succès plusieurs prestations et sommes attributaires de marchés importants, parmi lesquels ceux réalisés pour le compte de l'Agence Territoriale de Développement Agricole Ouémé-Atlantique-Littoral-Mono (ATDA-OALM), African Parks (Bénin), l'Agence Nationale de Promotion des Patrimoines et de Développement du Tourisme (ANPT), etc.
Forts de notre expérience, de notre expertise et de notre engagement envers nos clients, nous sommes prêts à relever de nouveaux défis et à contribuer activement au développement durable de l'agriculture.
Rejoignez-nous pour découvrir comment notre équipe d'experts peut contribuer à votre succès.
Restez connectés pour en savoir plus sur nos réalisations et nos projets à venir.

Name: Lora Seeds Co.
Description:
At Lora Vegetable Seed Co., we believe that every seed tells a story and holds the potential to flourish. As an innovative leader in the global vegetable seed market, we take pride not only in offering high-quality seeds but also in cultivating meaningful relationships within the agricultural community.

We understand that success is rooted in collaboration. By maintaining open and consistent communication with our breeders, farmers, and partners, we create a rich network of shared knowledge. This direct engagement keeps us at the cutting edge of agricultural advancements, enabling us to meet the diverse needs of our customers worldwide.

Let Lora Vegetable Seed Co. be your trusted partner in growth as we work together to plant the seeds of success and harvest the rewards of tomorrow.

Name: Hidrotex - Forraje Verde Hidropónico
Description: Solución integral en alimentación ganadera. Fabricación de Sistemas de Forraje Verde Hidropónico (FVH). Hidrotex es una empresa especializada en la fabricación de sistemas que permiten la germinación y el cultivo de cereales basándose en los principios de Hidroponía, obteniendo Forraje Verde Hidropónico (FVH) de forma sostenible y muy rentable. Name: Boerennatuur Noordwest Overijssel
Description:

Onze belangrijkste taak is de uitvoering van de regeling Agrarisch Natuur- en Landschapsbeheer (ANLb). Daarnaast doen we diverse projecten, altijd gericht op de samenwerking tussen landbouw en natuur.

Name: Tuna Agro
Description:
TUNA AGRO

Tuna Agro olarak çalışan tecrübeli mühendis ve teknik hizmet ekibimizle, müşterilerimize en kaliteli sistemleri sunmayı kendimize misyon edinmekteyiz.

Firmamız Damlama Sulama Sistemleri, Yağmurlama Sulama Sistemleri, Pivot Sulama Sistemleri, Profesyonel Meyve Bahçeleri, Soğuk Hava Depoları, Seralar, Agronomik ve Teknik Hizmetler, vermektedir. Tuna Agro olarak bitkisel üretimde toplam verim ve kaliteyi yükseltmek için araştırma ve geliştirme faaliyetlerine ara vermeden devam etmekteyiz. Aynı zamanda, en son teknolojileri ve bilimsel araştırmaları takip ederek geliştirilmiş yüksek kalite standartlarında, yenilikçi, çevreye duyarlı hizmetlerin hepsini çiftçilerimize sunmaktayız. 
Amacımız; daha az kaynak kullanarak daha kaliteli ve daha yüksek verim elde etmesine olanak sağlayan bir tarım yaklaşımıdır. Bu yaklaşımla sunduğumuz ürünlerin hepsini dünya standartlarında üretim yapan firmalardan temin etmekteyiz.

Name: VEDIC FARM
Description:
Vedic Farm | Pure. Natural. Honest.
We’re on a mission to bring back the true taste of India’s natural farming. 
At Vedic Farm, we produce and deliver 100% natural, chemical-free food directly from trusted farmers to your kitchen. From traditional jaggery and stone-ground flours to farm-fresh pulses and spices — everything we grow carries the essence of purity and sustainability.

 Traceable origins |  Eco-friendly practices |  Made with love in India

 Shop authentic farm products & join the movement for healthier living.
