Name: Frigorifico Rosario
Description: FRIGORIFICO ROSARIO comenzó sus actividades el 4 de Abril de 1989. Con el transcurso de los años fuimos incorporando edificios y modificaciones, para poder ampliar la capacidad de faena. Nuestra moderna maquinaria ha permitido que FRIGORIFICO ROSARIO expandiera su capacidad de abasto y así su habilitación para exportar a diferentes países.

Name: Opgan Tech - Optimuu
Description:
En Optimuu trabajamos para facilitar el trabajo de los ganaderos y ganaderas del sector de vacuno de leche.

Nuestros servicios mejoran el bienestar animal y la calidad del producto. También trabajamos por una producción más eficiente y sostenible.

Ofrecemos una interfaz que permite controlar y gestionar los datos recopilados por los robots y sensores instalados en las ganaderías. Además, analizamos e interpretamos los datos recopilados mediante un modelo predictivo que mejora el funcionamiento global de la granja.

Name: Angus Las Suertes del Monte - GuadAngus
Description: "Angus Las Suertes del Monte -GuadAngus produces 100% angus meat for consumption, as well as is dedicated to the breeding and sale of cattle of this breed imported from Ireland, England and Scotland in the area known as Las Suertes del Monte, in the term municipality of Mohernando, in the province of Guadalajara."

Name: Flore Aromatik Bitkiler (Flore Aromatic plants)
Description:
Nous cultivons la lavande dans nos champs 
et produisons de l'huile essentielle de lavande en Turquie depuis 2016. 
Nous fournissons sur demande l'huile essentielle de lavande. 

2016 yılından beri Türkiye'de tarlalarımızda lavanta yetiştiriyor ve saf lavanta yağı üretiyoruz. 
Talep üzerine saf lavanta yağı tedarik ediyoruz. 

We grow lavender in our fields and have been producing lavender essential oil in Turkey since 2016.
We supply lavender essential oil on request. Aromatic Raw Material

Name: MASSA HORSES DRESSAGE
Description: MASSA Horses (Elevage Massa) est né d’une grande histoire, fruit de la passion et de la détermination d’un homme, Sylvain MASSA. Passionné par les chevaux et charmé par les Lusitaniens, il a la volonté de faire acquérir aux lusitaniens la propulsion nécessaire pour concurrencer les chevaux de dressage moderne. Pour réaliser ce défi, huit ans plus tard, il se met alors en quête de juments lusitaniennes répondant à des critères de sélection rigoureux répondant à des qualités indispensables pour le dressage : un bon pas, un galop équilibré, une très forte propulsion et la capacité à s’étendre.

Name: Mountain View Equestrian
Description:
Mountain View equestrian is a fully managed facility to take care of all your horses needs from fully livery to looking after retired horses. 
Our newly built sand school is now available for hire.
Enjoy a Welsh holiday with your horse with boarding at Mountain View Equestrian

Name: Los Poleos
Description:
Somos un establecimiento agrícola-ganadero ubicado en Las Peñas, Córdoba. Integramos feedlot, recría a campo y agricultura bajo un modelo productivo propio: ordenado, eficiente y con identidad.
Creemos en una forma de trabajar basada en el criterio técnico, la planificación y el compromiso cotidiano. Nuestro sistema combina escala productiva con trazabilidad completa, decisiones ajustadas y supervisión constante.
Contamos con un feedlot modelo con capacidad para más de 14.000 cabezas, manejo nutricional propio y habilitación para Cuota 481 y UE No Hilton. Lo complementamos con una base agrícola estratégica y recría extensiva en Córdoba, Santa Fe y Santiago Del Estero.
Más allá de los números, lo que nos define es cómo hacemos las cosas: con responsabilidad, cercanía y una cultura de trabajo que refleja nuestra identidad de campo.

Name: GRUPO VENERO CLARO
Description: Somos una empresa especializada en la producción y distribución de carne de Ávila con la mejor calidad.

Name: AGROVERT SAS
Description:
AGROVERT SAS, es una empresa colombiana, fundada por profesionales en ciencias agronómicas, con más de 10 años de experiencia en el sector agroindustrial; en actividades de desarrollo técnico-comercial de insumos agrícolas,  actividades de registro y normas ICA, promoción y comercialización de agroinsumos, comercialización de maquinaria e implementos agrícolas y asesoría técnica en diferentes cultivos del país
MISION. 
Agrovert SAS, suministra con responsabilidad productos para la protección y nutrición de cultivos a nivel nacional, maquinaria e implementos agrícolas.  Brindamos además asesorías técnicas y pruebas de eficacia para la obtención de registro de venta y ampliaciones de uso de insumos agrícolas, actuando bajo altos estándares de calidad y confiabilidad para garantizar la satisfacción de nuestros clientes.

Name: Alderspring Ranch
Description: Family owned ranch specializing in regenerative grass fed beef. Sold direct to patrons since 1994.

Name: Etude Mandataire judiciaire
Description: Etude Mandataire judiciaire is a ranching company based out of France.

Name: CBH Cooperative
Description: CBH COOPERATIVE is a company based out of 2030 MAIN ST, Sturgis, South Dakota, United States.

Name: Ag Source Magazine
Description: Ag Source Magazine has been connecting farmers with the latest new & used equipment since 1996. “Farm with us!” Ag Source Magazine provides all the resources you need to improve your daily operations. You can pick up a magazine from one of 1,400 agribusiness locations, subscribe to receive the print or digital magazine, or search the online farm equipment marketplace at http://AgSourceMagazine.com.

Name: Deniz Tours: Car Rental in Morocco
Description: Welcome to Deniz Tours - a car rental agency Marrakesh and Agadir near the Menara airport in Morocco, Rent a 4x4 luxury or economical vehicle in Marrakech for cheaper rates even in high season, Quality and exceptional service at Deniz Tours , The leading car hire in Marrakech and Agadir. Visit our website to book a cheap car.

Name: RANCHER'S CHOICE
Description:
At RANCHER'S CHOICE it is our mission to provide our customers with only the very best agricultural products and companion animal foods. Our company’s principal objectives support this mission:
-  Manufacture and distribute safe, quality products that meet the highest 
    standards for our customers.
-  Improve existing products and develop innovative, nutritious products for the 
    well-being of livestock and companion animals.

We’ve been on the job serving agriculture since 1956 as the premier wholesale distributor of products and services for farmers and ranchers. We provide our retail customers with products for animal nutrition, feed ingredients, feed grade pharmaceuticals, amino acids, nutritional pre-mixes, and specialty products for the livestock industry.

In addition to our work in wholesale goods we have developed a line of companion animal products including horse feeds, pet foods, show feeds, and pet treats. 

If you’re a retailer, regional feed manufacturer, feed dealer, vet clinic or producer lets’ talk. You’ll find that we do business the old-fashioned way…and when we shake hands you know the product and our word is solid.

Name: Três Pontos Commodities
Description: Somos especialistas na comercialização de grãos, e oferecemos apenas produtos certificados por nós e nossos parceiros, sempre seguindo as normas e legislações vigentes. Nosso compromisso é entregar produtos de qualidade, seguindo rigorosamente nossa filosofia de eficiência e idoneidade em todas as nossas operações. Nossa equipe é liderada pelo CEO Alisson Dias, que tem mais de 20 anos de experiência no agronegócio. Se você estiver procurando por produtos de commodities de qualidade e serviços de transporte confiáveis, entre em contato conosco. Estamos prontos para ajudá-lo!

Name: America's Conservation Ag Movement
Description: America’s Conservation Ag Movement is one of America's largest public-private partnerships, dedicated to helping farmers adopt and scale climate-smart agriculture.

Name: Massimiliano Gatti - Carni Pregiate
Description:
𝐒𝐢𝐚𝐦𝐨 𝐢𝐥 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐦𝐨 𝐞𝐝 𝐮𝐧𝐢𝐜𝐨 𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐨 𝐝𝐢 𝐁𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐢 𝐢𝐧 𝐈𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐚, 𝐢𝐧 𝐔𝐦𝐛𝐫𝐢𝐚 𝐬𝐮𝐥𝐥𝐞 𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐥 𝐋𝐚𝐠𝐨 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐬𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐨. 𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐜𝐡è 𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐁𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐢 𝐚 𝐏𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐞? 𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐜𝐡è 𝐚 𝟐𝟎 𝐤𝐦 𝐝𝐚𝐥 𝐧𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐨 𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐨 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐢 𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐮𝐭𝐢 𝐢 𝐟𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐥𝐢 𝐝𝐞𝐥 𝐁𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐮𝐬, 𝐢𝐥 𝐝𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐨 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐥 𝐧𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐨 𝐁𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐁𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐧 (adesso conservati presso il museo Paleontologico G.Boldrini di Pietrafitta,PG).
Proprio così! Il bisonte pascolava nelle nostre terre umbre già 14000 anni fa e dava sostentamento ai nostri antenati in età pleistocenica. 
Un animale dalla lunghissima storia che conserva ancora tutte le caratteristiche nutrizionali e organolettiche di un animale preistorico.
𝐋𝐚 𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐞 𝐝𝐢 𝐁𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞, 𝐨𝐥𝐭𝐫𝐞 𝐚𝐝 𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐞𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐳𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐞 𝐞 𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐦𝐚 è 𝐮𝐧𝐚 𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐞 𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞 𝐧𝐮𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞, 𝐜𝐨𝐧 𝐬𝐨𝐥𝐨 𝟏𝟎𝟒𝐊𝐂𝐚𝐥, 𝐢𝐥 𝟕𝟎% 𝐝𝐢 𝐟𝐞𝐫𝐫𝐨 𝐢𝐧 𝐩𝐢ù 𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐨 𝐚𝐥 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐳𝐨, 𝐎𝐦𝐞𝐠𝐚𝟑 𝐞 𝐎𝐦𝐞𝐠𝐚 𝟔, 𝐬𝐨𝐥𝐨 𝐥𝐨 𝟎,𝟎𝟑𝟓% 𝐝𝐢 𝐜𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐨𝐥𝐨 𝐩𝐞𝐫 𝟏𝟎𝟎𝐠 𝐞 𝐯𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐁𝟔 𝐞 𝐁𝟏𝟐, 𝐢𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐞𝐦𝐞 𝐚 𝐟𝐨𝐬𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐨, 𝐫𝐚𝐦𝐞, 𝐳𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐨 𝐞 𝐦𝐚𝐠𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐨.
Noi li alleviamo liberi, allo stato brado, rispettandoli in ogni fase della loro vita: le mamme rimangono insieme ai vitellini finchè essi non decidono di staccarsi autonomamente, la monta è naturale, la selezione genetica è dettata dalle gerarchie del branco e i nostri animali, non vanno al mattatoio ( sofferenza del tutto evitabile) ma li abbattiamo in azienda. Per onorarne il sacrificio, oltre al consumo di carne, utilizziamo tutto quello che l'animale ci offre, per questo conciamo le pelli, lavoriamo le ossa e le corna, raccogliamo la lana e diamo vita a capi d'abbigliamento di pregio e utensili moderni.

Name: We Feed Assalzoo
Description:
We Feed è un progetto di Assalzoo per mostrarti quante e quali siano le possibilità di carriera nel settore dell’alimentazione animale e della mangimistica.
We Feed vuole promuovere la conoscenza del settore dell’agri-business, un settore che coniuga tradizione ed innovazione, allo scopo di attrarre nuovi talenti ed immettere nel sistema nuove energie e nuove idee.

Name: Agro Tamareira
Description:
Agro Tamareira | Excelência em Reprodução Animal e Genética

A Agro Tamareira é referência em reprodução de gado, oferecendo genética de alta qualidade para o fortalecimento da pecuária nacional. Há mais de 40 anos, trabalhamos com seleção genética e reprodução, com foco em desempenho e produtividade do rebanho. 
Referência também nas tropas de Cavalo Crioulo, que ofereceram sua resistência e funcionalidade para a lida no campo, a Tamareira é Bi-Campeã do Freio de Ouro, com seu reprodutor J.A. Libertador, que juntamente com o melhor da raça, fortalece nossa genética de resultado também nos equinos.
Nosso compromisso é com a excelência, unindo a tradição familiar e a constante busca na melhoria da equipe e seus processos, contribuindo com o desenvolvimento sustentável do agronegócio.

 Agro Tamareira – Construindo Genética com Resultado.

Name: PT. Arkadiya Fourhaka Indonesia
Description:
For more than 7 (seven) years PT Arkadiya Fourhaka Indonesia (AFI) which is member of ARKATO group has been operating in the Forestry and other related industries throughout Indonesia. What distinguished AFI as a Premium Service provider, was the ability to deliver complete solutions, on time and at reasonable costs. With a focus on “life cycle cost”, AFI worked hand-in-hand with its customers to ensure that they benefit from the most efficient and effective cost of ownership on both an ongoing and long-term basis.

In early of November 2016, AFI has obtained trust from reputable and worldwide Harvester Head manufacturer, KESLA Oyj from Finland to represent it product across Indonesia territorial. Since then, a number of initiatives and investment had been taken up to Y2019 in order to determine the most suitable product of KESLA Harvester head shall be sold and distributed and comply with customer experience.

Name: Aero Vines Pty Ltd
Description:
Aero Vines is an innovative precision agriculture company that believes in the power of technology to revolutionize the farming industry. We are dedicated to providing reliable, data-driven solutions that help farmers optimize their operations, increase yields, and promote sustainable farming practices.

Our team of agricultural specialists and tech enthusiasts is well-versed in a range of technologies. We employ latest tools to provide detailed land and canopy surveys, allowing farmers to make informed decisions about land and crop management. From vineyards to broadacre farms, our services cater to various facets of the agricultural, mining industry, environment conservation.

At Aero Vines, we also take sustainability seriously. We are committed to helping farmers understand and reduce their carbon footprint through effective carbon mapping and smarter tillage techniques. Our goal is to empower farmers to turn their operations carbon positive, contributing significantly to climate change mitigation.

Operating across Australia, we are proud of our expanding footprint and the trust our clients place in us. We are always on the lookout for new opportunities and are excited to be part of the future of precision agriculture.

At Aero Vines, we blend traditional knowledge with cutting-edge technology to turn farming into a more precise, productive, and sustainable endeavor. Join us on this exciting journey as we continue to push the boundaries of what's possible in agriculture and mining.

Name: Allflex Polska
Description: Allflex Livestock Intelligence, part of Antelliq, is the world leader in the design, development, manufacturing and delivery of solutions for animal identification, monitoring, farm management, and traceability. Our solutions empower farmers to act in a timely manner, to safeguard their animals’ health, while achieving optimal production outcomes for a healthy, sustainable food supply.

Name: Be Ô Bois
Description: Services d'agroforesterie et d'écopâturage. Tourisme local écoresponsable. Education et sensibilisation aux enjeux environnementaux.

Name: Connect Agri
Description: Com o conceito de ser a maior plataforma de Treinamento e Desenvolvimento Profissional na Gestão do Agronegócio. Exclusivos para pessoas que querem fazer um Agro diferente. O mercado exige profissionais de Alto potencial de Desempenho e Resultados.

Name: Centre de formation CasaBio
Description:
Le Centre de formation agrotouristique « CasaBio », composé d’une ferme pédagogique, d’un écolodge et d’un incubateur de startups, situé au village de Bagadadji (Sédhiou, Casamance, Sénégal), s’est fixé comme objectif de participer au développement économique, social et environnemental de la Casamance par la formation gratuite en agriculture biologique, élevage responsable, agroforesterie, pisciculture, éco construction, transformation agroalimentaire, cosmétiques naturels, tourisme responsable ; et l’insertion professionnelle des jeunes, femmes, personnes en situation de handicap et migrants de retour.

Le Centre de formation « CasaBio » prévoit de former par an plus de 1200 jeunes, femmes, migrants de retour et personnes en situation de handicap aux métiers de l’agroécologie et de l’écotourisme sur son site de 10 hectares, situé en bordure du fleuve Soungrougrou (Casamance).

L’écolodge d’application propose des formations en matière d’accueil, hébergement et restauration, art culinaire, gestion hôtelière, comptabilité, écoguidage, valorisation du patrimoine naturel, culturel et de l’artisanat local.

La ferme pédagogique propose des formations en horticulture, riziculture, arboriculture, élevage responsable, pisciculture, apiculture, transformation des produits agroalimentaires, production de cosmétiques naturels, boulangerie et pâtisserie utilisant des farines et des produits locaux, hygiène, conditionnement biologique et écoconstruction.

Le projet fournit aux bénéficiaires des formations de qualité et des compétences innovantes grâce à l’intégration de nouvelles technologies, de cours de marketing, informatique, entrepreneuriat et éducation financière afin de développer des compétences spécifiques en matière de gestion d’entreprise dans le but de promouvoir l’emploi indépendant et la création de micro-entreprises.
Location: Commune de Diaroumé, Département de Bounkiling

Name: Giz Çiftliği
Description:
Doğanın nefesi peşinde...

Yeni bir yaşamın ailemize katılımı ile sorgulamaya başladığımız İstabul'daki hayatımızı, ülkemiz ve Dünya'mızı etkisi altına alan pandemi ile beraber değiştirmeye karar verdik. 

Her zaman hayalini kurduğumuz üretimi, aslından yani doğadan kopmadan ve hatta doğanın tam kalbinde olabileceğini düşünmeye başladık.

İstanbul'da hızla akan hayatı durdurup, bir yudum nefesi yakalamak için başlayan yolculuğumuz bugün, bio dinamik ve dijital tarım uygulamaları ile kendi kendine yeten büyük bir çiftlik hayatına dönüştü.

Çiftlik deneyimi yaşamak ve doğanın nefesi ile yenilenmek isteyen misafirlerimiz için de çalışmalarımız devam ediyor... 

Bizi takip etmeye devam edin!

Name: Integra Consultoria e Assessoria Agro
Description:
A Integra Consultoria e Assessoria é uma empresa focada em transformar desafios do agronegócio em oportunidades concretas de crescimento. Atuamos como parceira estratégica para empresas do setor agro, oferecendo um portfólio de serviços que une profundo conhecimento técnico à inovação. 

Nosso objetivo é maximizar resultados e fortalecer a competitividade de nossos clientes, sempre com uma visão sustentável e de longo prazo. 

Com mais de 10 anos de experiência em desenvolvimento de mercado e estratégias comerciais no agronegócio, fidelização de clientes e parcerias sustentáveis, aprimorando estratégias de implementação para o campo.

Name: AGROPECUARIA VIRTUOSA
Description: Há 10 anos atuando no mercado agropecuário com cultivo de grãos (Soja e Milho) e gado de corte, a Agropecuária Virtuosa, hoje conta com ampla área produtiva, localizada proximo a grandes centros da Região Norte do país, levando seu cultivo com seriedade e sustentabilidade.

Name: Casa Serra
Description: Siamo una società agricola a gestione familiare che si occupa di allevamento di bovini allevati allo stato brado.

Name: Lumaca Madonita
Description: Con una produzione di circa 20 tonnellate di chiocciole ogni anno, Lumaca Madonita è l’azienda con il più grande allevamento di chiocciole in Italia: di queste, quasi il 90% sono destinate al mercato mondiale. Lo sviluppo di un innovativo Made in Italy non è mai stato così veloce se si parla di lumache. L’azienda nasce nel 2006 grazie a tre giovani agricoltori di Campofelice di Roccella con lo scopo di produrre chiocciole secondo un sistema innovativo, che permette di creare un allevamento naturale, produttivo ed etico. L’obiettivo è offrire ai consumatori un prodotto di alta qualità e formare aziende che vogliono produrre col “metodo Madonita”. In breve tempo l’azienda diventa un punto di riferimento nel settore, con un impianto di 40 mila metri quadri, la commercializzazione di chiocciole ad alta qualità, centinaia di “allevamenti partner” attivi in tutta Italia e un ventaglio di creazioni che vanno dai prodotti di bellezza a quelli gastronomici, fino ad arrivare all’Haute Cuisine con la linea gourmet e le preziosissime uova di chiocciola!

Name: Easy Drench
Description:
Easy Drench ondersteunt veehouders bij de zorg voor een gezonde veestapel. Zelf drenchen was nog nooit zo makkelijk voor de boer en zo comfortabel voor de koe.
 
 
Easy Drench biedt u een praktische en voordelige oplossing bij de verzorging van uw dieren. U kunt nu zelf of met begeleiding dieren drenchen die te maken hebben met uitdrogingsverschijnselen door bijvoorbeeld ziekte.
 
Werken aan de gezondheid van de veestapel is een continu proces. Veehouders hebben veel verschillende taken en maken regelmatig gebruik van ondersteuning van buitenaf. Wanneer de gezondheid van dieren in het geding is, dan wordt vaak een veearts ingeschakeld. Kies voor het drenchen van uw dieren de Easy Drench.

Name: Agro-Environment & Development Expertise
Description:
AGREDE est une société d'expertise, de recherche et de formation spécialisée en Agriculture, Elevage, Environnement et Gestion des ressources Naturelles et Développement Rural et Social.  Ce cabinet a pour mission d’accompagner la réussite des partenaires et la communauté en mettant à leur disposition une équipe d’experts internationaux, expérimentés bénéficiant d’une connaissance approfondie des méthodes et outils d’évaluation des politiques publiques, d’une expérience très étendue dans multiples domaines dont l'aquaculture, l'agriculture et l'élevage de precision,  la foresterie, l’agroforesterie, le développement rurale, la biologie, le tourisme, la biostatistique, l’agronomie, le marketing et communication, la banque et finance, l’agrobusness, le numérique, le génie civile...,ainsi que d’une expertise marquée sur les problématiques environnementales et territoriales. 
En travers nos réseaux, partenaires et notre équipe, nous avons toujours su conjuguer la technicité pointue, diversifiée, la capacité d’analyse, de réflexion stratégique, d’exécution et d’audit. La maîtrise de nombreux métiers et la connaissance des contextes réglementaires très variés, nous permettent d’aider nos bénéficiaires à trouver des solutions appropriées.   Chaque projet est donc, unique et  fait appel à une équipe aux compétences pluridisciplinaires permettant en interne d’intégrer un grand nombre de problématiques pour des projets réussis et cohérents. Notre organisation répond, donc aux besoins des différents des collectivités publics, des particuliers, des entreprises et des professionnels de l’aménagement faisant recours à nos compétences.

Name: HUGE FOREST
Description:
Somos una startup que desarrolla soluciones innovadoras para la recuperación de ecosistemas degradados. Combinamos ciencia, tecnología y colaboración para impulsar proyectos de restauración vinculados a compensaciones ambientales, relaciones comunitarias y alianzas con instituciones públicas.
Nuestra metodología se basa en identificar y habilitar áreas disponibles, con un fuerte trabajo con comunidades locales, que luego se adaptan a estrategias de restauración específicas según los objetivos del proyecto. Invitamos a empresas a ser parte de este proyecto y promover un verdadero cambio en la restauración de nuestros bosques

Şubat 2023’te meydana gelen ve 11 ili etkileyen depremler, özellikle Gaziantep, Adıyaman, Hatay, Kahramanmaraş ve Malatya’da ciddi yıkıma neden olmuş; bölgedeki tarımsal altyapı, iş gücü ve geçim kaynakları büyük zarar görmüştür.
Tarım sektörü açısından stratejik öneme sahip bu illerde yaşanan kayıplar, Türkiye ekonomisi ve gıda güvenliği üzerinde uzun vadeli etkiler yaratmıştır.

Bu kapsamda Avrupa Birliği  ve Türkiye Cumhuriyeti  tarafından ortaklaşa finanse edilen ve Tarım ve Orman Bakanlığı tarafından yürütülen "Çiftçiler için Teknik Yardım: Sürdürülebilirlik için Tarımsal İyileşmenin Hızlandırılması ve Deprem Etkilerinin Azaltılması" (FARMERS) Projesi; bölgedeki tarım sektörünün sürdürülebilir, kapsayıcı ve afetlere/iklim değişikliğine dirençli bir yapıya kavuşturulmasını hedeflemektedir.

Proje iki temel hedef üzerine inşa edilmiştir:

 Tarımsal ekosistemin dayanıklılığını artırmak, afetlere karşı hazırlıklı ve sürdürülebilir tarım uygulamalarını yaygınlaştırmak
 Tarım işgücü piyasasını desteklemek ve dezavantajlı gruplara eğitim ve istihdam olanakları sağlamak

 Ayrıca, genç nüfusu tarım sektörüne ve ekolojik tarıma çekmek amacıyla çiftlik içi staj olanakları sunulacak ve sürdürülebilir tarım yöntemleri teşvik edilecektir.

Name: The Cattle Range
Description:
The Cattle Range is the Leader in Internet Marketing of Cattle...

75,000+ cattle are listed for sale in 45+ States and Canadian Provinces

Our website statistics:
- Over 50,000 unique visitors per month with a bounce rate of only 2.45%
- Over 2 Million monthly page views for an average of 65,000+ daily
- Average visitor views 17 pages

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Offering a No-Risk, Low-Cost Marketing Option...
- No-Risk because there is No Charge to List Cattle for Sale:
- You pay a sale fee only if you sell to a buyer originating from the website
- If sold otherwise, you pay nothing
- Not an Internet Auction – Buyers & Sellers Deal Directly
- Low-Cost because TCR’s fees are a fraction of the cost of selling at auction


Advantages for Sellers...
Unlike most private treaty sales in which cattle are offered to only a few buyers, The Cattle Range exposes cattle to large numbers of buyers, most of whom would never know about your cattle or that they are for sale. 
And unlike selling at auction where the cattle are only “on the market” for a short time and are offered to a limited number of buyers, cattle listed for sale on The Cattle Range are exposed to large numbers of geographically-diverse buyers and the cattle can remain “on the market” until sold.
Interested buyers contact sellers directly, allowing time to consider offers and negotiate, increasing the odds of making the best deal available.
  

Advantages for Buyers...
Buying cattle listed for sale on The Cattle Range allows viewing the cattle in their home environment from which their quality, care received, and dispositons can be accurately assessed.
Additionally, buying cattle "in the country" significantly reduces the risk of bringing home cattle exposed to or infected with contagious diseases.
The Value of Marketing...
To improve their bottom line, cattlemen have done an impressive job of increasing the pounds of beef produced.  However, in most cases, increased production requires increased investment of capital, time, and labor. More pounds doesn’t always result in more profit.
Cattlemen often overlook that the most efficient and least expensive way to increase profitability is on the marketing side of the equation.
 

The Cattle Range is an Effective, Low-Cost, & Valuable Marketing Tool!

Onze opleiding, workshops en cursussen hebben als uitgangspunt natuurlijke landbouw en gaan over de praktijk van permacultuur op een agrarisch bedrijf, agroforestry, natuurlijk vee houden, waaronder kippen, varkens, runderen en schapen, no-dig groenteteelt en ondernemerschap op een natuurinclusief landbouwbedrijf.

Boeren in het Bos wordt geleid door Richard en Mariska, echte bosboeren in hart en nieren. Samen met een mooi team medewerkers en vrijwilligers beheren ze landgoed Boschhoeve in Nijeberkoop. Hier komen natuurbeheer, landbouw en vee op een holistische manier samen. Naast de opleidingen en cursussen is er bij Boeren in het Bos ook een permacultuur zelfoogsttuin, een webshop en een boerderijwinkel met o.a. gezond natuurvlees van eigen dieren en producten uit eigen tuin.

Name: Ideas For Milk
Description:
O Agro chegou no mundo 4.0 e você deve vir conosco nessa revolução!
O Ideas for Milk é um movimento que tem como objetivo fomentar soluções inovadoras para a cadeia produtiva do leite no Brasil. Fazemos isso através do Desafio de Startups, das Caravanas 4.0 e do Vacathon.
Desafio de Startups: é uma competição nacional que busca soluções inovadoras para o setor lácteo. Qualquer um pode participar, desde que tenha uma ideia, produto ou serviço que melhore a eficiência e as vantagens competitivas da cadeia produtiva do leite. As propostas devem ser enviadas pelo site e serão avaliadas por um júri técnico altamente qualificado e multidisciplinar. Dessas, cinco melhores soluções são selecionadas para a
grande final do Desafio que este ano acontece no prédio do Cubo em São Paulo.
As finalistas conquistam destaque nacional no ecossistema ligado a cadeia do leite.
Caravanas 4.0: começamos com o pé na estrada! Com o intuito de fortalecer e dar acesso
à informação, a Caravana visita universidades, eventos de inovação e comunidades
startup em todo o Brasil para conversar sobre a cadeia produtiva do leite e todas as
oportunidades e possibilidades que ele oferece.
Vacathon: equipes de estudantes do Brasil inteiro acampados na sede da Embrapa Gado
de Leite, para cinco dias de imersão total no universo do setor lácteo. Este é o Vacathon!
O Ideas for Milk é uma realização da Embrapa Gado de Leite com Agripoint, Bovcontrol, Ciatécnica, KER Innovation, Qranio, Texto e com a correalização do Sebrae. 
Esse movimento conta com o patrocínio da Belgo Bekaert, CLAAS, FAEMG/INAES/SENAR, JA Saude Animal, Nestlé, Piracanjuba, Tetrapak, Tim, Tortuga, Vaccinar, Vivalacteos, Vivare.
@belgobekaert  @claas.brasil  @faemgdigital  @jasaudeanimal  @nestle_br  @oficialpiracanjuba  @sistemafaemg  @tetrapakbrasil  @timbrasil  @tortuga.dsm  @vaccinar  @viva.lacteos  @vivare_insumos

Name: FlyBae Ranch
Description:
FlyBae Ranch was founded in 2018 by Mufaro Dzvova, a lady with diverse background in both Aviation and Agriculture. Growing up in a farming family, she initially pursued a career as a Commercial Pilot and Engineer, becoming qualified in both fields. However, her family's agricultural roots continued to draw her back.

In 2012, Mufaro’s parents gifted her their beloved cow, Lemon, when she graduated from Flight School, which then sparked her passion for livestock farming. Lemon went on to birth twin calves, and the love for animals grew from there. Over the years, she has built up a sizeable flock of Dorper sheep, Brahman and Nkone cattle. 

Reflecting on her aviation background, Mufaro named her farm "FlyBae Ranch." Today, FlyBae Ranch is a thriving livestock operation that combines her expertise in engineering, piloting, and traditional farming. It stands as a testament to Mufaro’s ability to blend her varied interests and experiences into a successful agricultural business.

Ziel der Geflügelwirtschaft Österreich ist eine wachsende, profitable und verantwortungsvolle Geflügelhaltung beziehungsweise Eier- und Geflügelfleischproduktion in Österreich. Die Geflügelwirtschaft Österreich bekennt sich zu Ihrer Verantwortung gegenüber Konsumenten, Landwirten, Tieren, der Umwelt sowie besonders zukünftigen Generationen und steht für eine nachhaltig wachsende, profitable und verantwortungsvolle Geflügelhaltung. Name: Manejo de Suelo Regenerativo
Description:
En Manejo de Suelo Regenerativo impulsamos una agricultura más eficiente y sostenible mediante el diagnóstico avanzado y la gestión integrada de la salud del suelo. Nos especializamos en la evaluación integral de la salud del suelo mediante un enfoque técnico y regenerativo, integrando análisis físicos, químicos, biológicos y satelitales para mejorar la productividad agrícola de forma sostenible.

Contamos con un equipo multidisciplinario con más de 15 años de experiencia en geoestadística, manejo de suelos, espectrometría y economía de recursos naturales, lo que nos permite generar diagnósticos precisos y recomendaciones diferenciadas a nivel de cuartel.

Desarrollamos e implementamos servicios avanzados como:

 SoilSense: Diagnóstico sitio-específico del suelo para decisiones más eficientes en fertilización, bioestimulación y enmiendas.

 SkySense: Monitoreo satelital para evaluar vigor, estrés hídrico y respuesta a tratamientos agrícolas.

 FruitSense: Mapeo y análisis de fruta para anticipar rendimientos y mejorar la calidad del producto.

 RootSense: Evaluación de raíces mediante reconocimiento de imágenes para medir desarrollo radicular.

 LabSense: Diagnóstico de salud del suelo con indicadores físicos y biológicos como masa microbiana, estabilidad de agregados y respiración basal.

Nuestro propósito es claro: regenerar el suelo, optimizar los recursos y contribuir a una agricultura más resiliente, productiva y saludable. Porque todo comienza en el suelo.

Name: Shambhala Orchard & Agro
Description:
At Shambhala Orchard and Agro, we believe that true farming is rooted in nature, nurtured by tradition, and driven by innovation.

Founded on ancient wisdom and modern health consciousness. Inspired by the Shambhala Kingdom's ideologies—a mythical realm in Tibetan Buddhism symbolizing harmony with nature and ethical values—we are committed to sustainable farming.

Our founder's experience in the life sciences industry, particularly in cell and gene therapy, revealed how food quality directly impacts human health. Studies by the World Health Organization (WHO) and the International Agency for Research on Cancer (IARC) have linked pesticides and chemicals in industrial farming to health risks, including cancer and reproductive issues. This realization led us to adopt organic farming practices focused on health and wellness while avoiding harmful chemicals.

At Shambhala Orchard and Agro, we revive ancient techniques from the "Vrikshayurveda" (The Science of Plants), which emphasize soil health, natural pest control, and organic inputs. By implementing these traditional practices, we produce nutrient-rich crops that benefit both people and the environment.

We cultivate a diverse range of fruits, including figs, mangoes, table grapes, and exotic varieties. Using 100% organic methods like Vermicompost, Trichoderma, Neem cake and natural fertilizers, we nurture the soil for healthy plant growth. Our agroforestry approach integrates trees of non-invasive species, generating biomass while enhancing soil fertility and biodiversity—reflecting principles in "Agroforestry for Sustainable Agriculture".

This data-driven approach optimizes planting, irrigation, and other activities, reducing risks and ensuring sustainable yields. We are also registering for Nature-Based Solutions (NBS) carbon credits, reinforcing our commitment to environmental sustainability.

Name: Meilleur Plantations
Description:
Meilleur Plantations (MS INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED) is an leading agarwood plantation company . We are also a member of MSME, GST, DGFT, FSSAI & APEDA. Agarwood, also known as oud, is a highly prized fragrant wood that is used in perfumes, incense, and traditional medicines. It is known for its distinctive and intense aroma and is sourced from a variety of evergreen trees.
Meilleur Plantations is focused on the cultivation and production of agarwood and is committed to sustainable and ethical practices. The company aims to provide high-quality agarwood to the global market while preserving the natural resources and ecosystem of the regions in which it operates.
With its experienced team and innovative techniques, Meilleur Plantations is well positioned to meet the growing demand for agarwood and contribute to the development of the industry in India. By combining traditional knowledge with modern technology, the company strives to deliver the finest agarwood products to customers while promoting sustainable and responsible agriculture practices.

Description:

De boeren van de Heyde Hoeve hebben de ambitie het allerlekkerste varkensvlees te leveren met de best mogelijke zorg voor dier & omgeving.

Heyde Hoeve varkensvlees is van uitstekende kwaliteit. De varkens zijn van het Duroc-ras. Duroc varkens hebben mooi gemarmerd vlees wat zorgt voor niet alleen mals- en sappigheid, maar ook een volle pure smaak. Het Heyde Hoeve varken is in 2012 verkozen tot “Beste Varken van Nederland”, op smaak en duurzaamheid! Dat wordt genieten van varkensvlees met de smaak van vrüger!

Name: SOLU'NATURE
Description:

Les domaines d’application sont :
-	Prevention, bien-être et santé des animaux
Solutions alternatives pour soutenir les systèmes immunitaire, digestive, respiratoire, reproducteur, cutané… via une approche cohérente et globale pour faire en sorte que les traitements antibiotiques et chimiques deviennent le dernier recours
o	Ruminants
o	Equins
o	Volailles
o	Canins 
o	Apiculture

-	Protection des végétaux 
Solutions alternatives pour protéger les plantes des ravageurs et maladies fongiques et faire en sorte que les traitements aux pesticides (herbicides, fongicides, insecticides) deviennent le dernier recours
o	Arboriculture
o	Jardinage
o	Maraichage

-	Fertilisation des sols
Solutions pour neutraliser l’acidité du sol, permettre une meilleure biodégradation de la matière organique, une meilleure valorisation des éléments fertilisants et une diminution de l’utilisation des engrais de synthèse
o	Jardinage
o	Maraichage

Solu’Nature développe ses produits en respectant l'approche globale "One-Health" ("une seule santé") et utilise en priorité des matières premières et ingrédients d’origine naturelle (végétale ou minérale) et les microorganismes. Les ingrédients sont sélectionnés en fonction de leur efficacité et sécurité afin de respecter l’environnement et les êtres vivants. 
Solu’Nature s’engage à collaborer avec les fournisseurs et fabricants français pour agir sur l’économie locale, garantir la qualité de produits et le respect des normes sociales et réduire l’impact environnemental. Solu’Nature s’investit dans des projets pour la protection des abeilles (le parcours « vitalité de l’abeille) et la recherche des pathogènes de l’abeille avec la mise en place de tests de diagnostic PCR. 
Solu’Nature s'engage pour un monde plus durable.

Name: Porc des Blés Noirs
Description:
Éleveurs bretons passionnés depuis plusieurs générations, nous œuvrons à redonner ses lettres de noblesse à la viande de porc. Nous produisons des Porcs Des Blés Noirs dans un souci de qualité afin que vous retrouviez la saveur et la tendreté du porc d’antan.

Pour nos Porcs Des Blés Noirs, nous préparons sur l'exploitation une alimentation variée et maîtrisée avec des céréales 100% françaises. Lors de la dégustation, vous retrouverez ainsi le goût originel du porc d'autrefois.

Nous valorisons notre travail en circuit court avec des producteurs des Côtes-d’Armor. Afin de pérenniser l'emploi de notre région, nous nous engageons pour faire vivre au juste prix les éleveurs de Porc Des Blés Noirs, et ce dans le respect de l'environnement.

L’or noir de Bretagne est l’une des spécificités de la culture de nos terres : une graine complète, sans gluten et riche en fibres. Elle est cultivée sans engrais ni pesticide. Le Blé noir participe à la diversification de nos cultures.

Vos sens sont mis en éveil par le goût, la texture et la jutosité de la viande de Porc Des Blés Noirs. Pour en préserver toute la saveur et la tendreté, privilégiez une cuisson à feu doux.

Name: Agnello di Sardegna IGP
Description: Nelle IGP Indicazioni Geografiche Protette sono racchiusi i valori, la storia e la cultura di un territorio e dei suoi abitanti. In quest’ottica, tutelare e valorizzare i prodotti ad indicazione geografica è un atto di responsabilità sociale verso il patrimonio storico, culturale e sociale del Paese. Il riconoscimento di qualità europeo è riservato ai prodotti agricoli ed alimentari di qualità per i quali è dimostrato che la produzione avviene esclusivamente in un territorio delimitato e per i quali esiste il nesso causale tra la zona geografica e una qualità specifica, la reputazione o altre caratteristiche di un particolare prodotto. L’Agnello di Sardegna ha ricevuto l’ambito riconoscimento di produzione ad Indicazione Geografica Protetta a tutela e garanzia totale della qualità ed origine delle carni commercializzate con Regolamento (CE) n. 138/01 della Commissione del 24 gennaio 2001 e con decreto 28 ottobre 2005 del Ministero delle Politiche Agricole e Forestali). Al CON.T.A.S. sono state attribuite le funzioni di tutela, promozione, valorizzazione, informazione del consumatore e di cura generale degli interessi relativi alla denominazione dell’I.G.P Agnello di Sardegna. CON.T.A.S. è composto da operatori economici appartenenti all’intera filiera produttiva ovina regionale (allevatori 66%, macellatori 17%, porzionatori 17%).

Name: MALLAS GALBIS, S.L.
Description:
Mallas Galbis was founded in 1940 in the region of Los Pedroches, an area of great livestock farming tradition in the north of Cordoba, offering long-lasting solutions that protect and respect the environment of its customers.

We manufacture, market and distribute metal mesh, barbed wire, posts and everything necessary for the enclosure of livestock farms, game farms, sports facilities, industrial enclosures and residential fences. 

After years of work, our third generation faces the future with a continuous commitment to digitalisation and process innovation, with the aim of improving the quality of our products and customer service, seeking to consolidate our national market and expand into new international markets. 

The trust of professionals in the sector allows us to be a reference, with a wide range of products for the feeding, handling and protection of all types of livestock. We seek the satisfaction of our more than 40,000 customers, because their experience is our guarantee of progress. 

We are the result of a great human team. Without them, our work would never be possible.

Mallas Galbis, united to the land.

Description: KGZS Zavod murska Sobota is one of the eight regional institutions that make up the Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry of Slovenia. It was established to provide public agricultural consultancy services, professional tasks in the production of agricultural plants, professional tasks in animal husbandry, gene bank tasks, professional tasks in forestry and fisheries and other tasks that are in accordance with the concessions obtained in the area of Pomurje region. KGZS Murska Sobota aims to preserve the population of the countryside, professionally advise and educate users in agricultural activities, while at the same time supplying them with the highest quality genetic material for animal husbandry. Furnished with its knowledge, experience and expertise, visionises to become a central professional, advisory and educational institution for agriculture and rural development in the region.

Name: Vereniging voor de bevordering van het welzijn van landbouwhuisdieren vzw
Description:
Dierenwelzijn is vandaag maatschappelijk belangrijker dan ooit.
Het dierenwelzijnskeurmerk “Beter voor dieren” wil de consument
meer inzicht geven in het dierenwelzijn doorheen de volledige keten
(boerderij, transport, slachthuis) en hem/haar helpen bij het maken
van onderbouwde keuzes in de winkel, net zoals hij/zij rekening kan
houden met de ecologische voetafdruk (Eco-Score) en de
voedingswaarde (Nutri-Score) van een voedingsproduct. De “Beter
voor dieren”-Score (1 tot 3 plusjes) is een maat voor de extra
inspanning die doorheen de volledige keten geleverd werd om een
hogere mate van dierwelzijn te creëren voor het dier dan wettelijk
vereist.
Het “Beter voor dieren”-keurmerk werd opgericht door de vzw
“Vereniging voor de Bevordering van het Welzijn van
Landbouwhuisdieren” en biedt een antwoord op de vraag van
Vlaams minister Ben Weyts, bevoegd voor dierenwelzijn, om een
systeem uit te bouwen om het dierwelzijn in de voedselketen in
Vlaanderen te verbeteren en te monitoren. De vzw schrijft daartoe
lastenboeken uit voor veehouders, transporteurs en slachthuizen, en
werkt een solide controlesysteem uit om de naleving ervan na te
gaan.
De lastenboeken houden rekening met de adviezen van een
onafhankelijk samengesteld wetenschappelijk adviescomité en
worden afgetoetst bij een maatschappelijk adviescomité en een
sectoradviescomité.
In een eerst fase wordt werk gemaakt van een lastenboek voor de
varkenssector (2024). Daarna volgen lastenboeken voor de
pluimveesector (2025) en de rundveesector (2026).

Name: Saung Domba International
Description:
Peternakan Saung Domba dinaungi oleh bendera PT SAUNG DOMBA INTERNATIONAL yang dikukuhkan dengan Akta dari Notaris Wiwik di Depok pada tahun 2010, berlokasi di Citayam, Bogor ini memiliki area 2000 m2 dan luas kandang 400 m2 dengan kapasitas 300 ekor domba .

Dengan seiring berjalannya waktu begitu banyak rencana yang sudah kami persiapkan untuk membesarkan nama Saung Domba untuk menjadi salah satu usaha yang tidak hanya menjadi peternakan profesional biasa akan tetapi dapat menjadi pemain utama dalam pengembangbiakan domba untuk nasional dan internasional.

Saung Domba dimiliki oleh 4 profesional muda yang bekerja di empat perusahaan yang berbeda. Kami menjadikan Saung Domba ini tempat implementasi dari semua ilmu yang didapat dari perusahaan tempat kami berkerja. 

Dengan adanya Team Saung Domba, diharapkan Saung Domba dapat secara profesional menggerakkan roda operasionalnya yang meliputi 10 Kegiatan Utama yaitu:

- Pembibitan
- Pemberian Pangan
- Perawatan Ternak
- Kesehatan Ternak
- Menjaga Kebersihan Kandang
- Pengembangan Usaha
- Pendanaan dan Finance
- Marketing (Daging, Domba Guling, Akikah, Pupuk, Kulit, Kepala, Bibit, Kurban)
- Distribusi
- Pemberdayaan Masyarakat Setempat

Dengan 10 kegiatan utama di atas, kami berharap dapat menjadikan Saung Domba menjadi peternakan yang memiliki kualitas higienis dan kesehatan yang optimal. Sehingga menjadikan kami produsen daging domba yang berkualitas tinggi dan dapat memaksimalkan rasa daging domba bagi para penikmatnya.

Name: Herbae - Cochons Millésimes
Description:
Notre domaine se niche sur La Baïse, rivière qui naît au pied des Pyrénées
centrales. Sur ce versant, à l’abri des vents dominants, nous élevons des
porcs noirs de bigorre. 

Nous leur laissons la liberté de s’alimenter dans ces paysages ancestraux : de grands espaces de prairies naturelles, des sous-bois et des sources naturelles d’eau fraîche…

Notre jambon Noir de Bigorre est l’expression la plus aboutie du lien unissant nos cochons et leur écosystème. Elaboré pendant 20 mois minimum, dans le cadre de l’Appelation d’Origine Protégée Jambon Noir de Bigorre, il
acquiert lentement son caractère si particulier : beaucoup de fondant, des
arômes de fruits secs, et une longueur en bouche inoubliable. 
 
Nos charcuteries sont fabriquées de manière naturelle, sans conservateur ni ingrédient dénaturant à quelques kilomètres de notre élevage. Nous cherchons à mettre en évidence la complexité aromatique de nos gras ; nous travaillons le fondant, l'intensité et la persistance du goût.

Name: Animal Production Freelance-Science

Professionals dedicated to this company implement appropriate action strategies for each service, so they are trained to do so, more than technical assistants are extension workers, whose priority is communication skills and teaching / learning tools, involving social responsibility.

Name: Ferme de la Boislivière

Name: Confederação Nacional da Agricultura
Description:
A CNA define-se como a “expressão organizada, predominantemente, dos agricultores e agricultoras das explorações agrícolas familiares”. Entre outros princípios, assume “as preocupações actuais sobre a construção de uma agricultura que responda às exigências de qualidade dos produtos, de defesa do meio ambiente, do mundo rural, da saúde, do trabalho e que promova a melhoria dos rendimentos e da qualidade de vida dos agricultores portugueses”.
A CNA é fundamentalmente constituída por Associações de
Agricultores, embora também enquadre outras Associações voltadas para o âmbito mais abrangente do desenvolvimento rural.
A nível europeu, a CNA está filiada na Coordenadora Europeia Via Campesina - CEVC, que congrega Organizações de diversos países da Comunidade Europeia. Por sua vez, a CEVC pertence à Via Campesina, movimento agrícola que se estrutura à escala global.

Name: CRA (Confederaciones Rurales Argentinas)
Description:
CRA representa, dentro del panorama gremial del campo argentino, la presencia de una organización federal de profunda raigambre democrática, en la que encuentran su más cabal expresión todas las voces de la producción en su diversidad geográfica como en sus distintas variantes productivas.

Fundada en 1943, ha crecido hasta contar en la actualidad con 16 confederaciones y federaciones, integradas a su vez por más de 300 sociedades rurales de todo el país. En total, están representados a través de la acción de CRA poco más de 109.000 productores agropecuarios.

Tanto productores pequeños, medianos o grandes son recibidos y bienvenidos en CRA, como un reflejo fiel de su espíritu federalista que inspiró su creación.

A través de sus más de 70 años de vida acreditó sobradamente su conducta gremial, fortalecida en la defensa irrestricta de los intereses del productor y de las empresas rurales y con ese férreo estandarte se ha guiado.

Confederaciones Rurales Argentinas es:

Una Asociación civil gremial su objetivo central es la defensa del productor agropecuario y sus intereses.
Federativa de tercer grado. Más de 300 rurales de todo el país dan sustento a 16 confederaciones y federaciones rurales, el pilar de CRA.
Una entidad sin fines de lucro y su cuadro directivo no recibe honorarios por su labor.
Una entidad gremial que propende al fomento y desarrollo de las actividades agropecuarias.
Una entidad que coordina la acción de todas las entidades que agrupa y se integra con asociaciones de similares características.

Name: D'n buff waterbuffelboerderij
Description:
Op onze boerderij D’n Buff lopen tientallen grijszwarte waterbuffels op hun dooie gemak door het gras of liggen heerlijk te relaxen in de enorme waterpoel, die speciaal voor hen is uitgegraven. De exotische dieren zijn helemaal thuis in Boxtel. Na tien jaar als vierde generatie Van Oirschot melkvee te houden, was het voor ons tijd voor een nieuwe uitdaging. We gooiden het roer om en verruilden onze melkkoeien voor waterbuffels. We wilden uit de bulkmarkt en zijn daarom in deze nichemarkt gedoken. We wilden dat er weer toekomst is voor eventuele opvolgers, met het oog op onze zoons Thijm en Lau. We werken nu weer met plezier met z’n allen op ons mooie waterbuffelbedrijf en het is ook zo mooi dat het ernaar uitziet dat de nieuwe generatie staat te popelen om het bedrijf over te nemen.

Het melken van de buffels gebeurt met twee robots, waar in principe geen man aan te pas komt. Alles is computergeregistreerd en geautomatiseerd. Tijdens het melken worden de dames beloond met brokjes. Niet alleen lekker maar ook noodzakelijk, want buffels zijn zeer eigenwijs en laten zich niet zo makkelijk sturen als koeien. Een ander belangrijk aspect is dat buffels eigenlijk nooit ziek zijn en wordt er door buffelboeren dus weinig tot geen antibiotica gebruikt om de dieren gezond te houden.

“We hebben weer zin in ons bedrijf en gaan trots door het leven”.

Name: Vilamas Ranch
Description:
Vilamas Ranch is a family-farm Venture located in Sakon Nakhon province, in southeast of Thailand, that prioritizes a natural farming approach with a strong focus on sustainability and community engagement. A distinctive feature of the ranch is Vilamas Indigo, an area dedicated to cultivating indigo plants for natural dye production. The entire operation is powered by solar energy, reflecting a commitment to self-sufficiency.

Activities and Offerings
Vilamas Ranch provides immersive experiences for visitors interested in sustainable agriculture, including:

Farm Experiences: Opportunities for guests to engage in hands-on farming activities.
Harvesting and Collecting: Participation in gathering seasonal fruits and vegetables, highlighting sustainable practices.
Outdoor Cooking: Cooking meals using fresh, farm-sourced ingredients, promoting the farm-to-table concept.
Fishing and Hunting: Engaging in food sourcing directly from the farm, fostering a deeper appreciation of nature.
Farm Events: Organized community-focused events aimed at educating guests on sustainable farming.
The ranch also cultivates rice, seasonal fruits, and raises water buffaloes, pigs, chickens, dugs, while emphasizing the cultural heritage of the region through the art of indigo dyeing.

Goals and Philosophy
The core philosophy of Vilamas Ranch revolves around back-to-nature principles that seek to preserve traditional farming techniques and enhance the connection between people and the land. The use of solar energy not only supports local biodiversity but also contributes to community awareness of sustainable practices.

Visitors enjoy a truly "farm fresh" experience, leaving with a greater appreciation for food and lasting memories from their time at this sustainable venture. For further information, inquiries are welcomed

Name: Forest Plastics Working Group
Description:
The Forest Plastics Working Group brings together partners to focus on the reduction in single use and temporary use plastics in tree and woodland establishment. It includes a comprehensive range of sector representatives.

The Forest Plastics Group use a collaborative approach to look at concerns and problems with the use and management of plastic and associated waste and compliance.

The group has broad support from across the United Kingdom and the Republic of Ireland, and includes a comprehensive range of sector representatives, including the major Environmental NGOs: Woodland Trust and National Trust, forestry companies, the nurseries, the National Parks, and the state (Coillte, Forestry & Land Scotland, Confor, Scottish Forestry, Natural Resources Wales, Forestry England, Forestry Commission, Forest Research, Defra, Resources and Waste, Environmental Quality Directorate). 

FPWG brings together partners to focus on the reduction in single use and temporary use plastics in tree and woodland establishment. The Forest Plastics Working Group believes increasing woodland planting should not entail a subsequent increase of plastics in the environment.

What we do?

Name: Adopt A Forest- Ke
Description: Adopt A Forest (AAF) champions the establishment of sustainable forestry in arid and semi-arid areas (ASALs), making up 89% of Kenya. We believe in proper post-planting management of trees to guarantee at least a 97% survival rate. ASALs areas of Kenya have the lowest forest and tree cover, standing at below 4%. We cannot discuss climate change adaptation, mitigation, and food security when leaving out 80% of the country. Our clarion call is for stakeholders to "ADOPT FORESTS"; this means caring for and nurturing planted trees for three years to ensure they survive and grow into healthy, valuable crops. Trees, like all crops, need good management, site preparation, soil assessment, quality seedling, watering, weeding, physical protection, and pest and disease control. Poor post-planting management of tree seedlings reduces the survival rate significantly. According to World-Agroforestry-ICRAF, unmanaged trees have less than a 30% chance of survival, while 35% of the lucky ones are at risk of being stunted and sickly. The survival rate is even lower ASALs because of unsupportive weather and poverty. Our business model is guided by research and years of interactions with ASAL regions. Adopting a tree for three years is $5 (World Wildlife Fund WWF). The high-cost calls for innovative ways of raising funds. Only 11% of climate change adaptation funds in Kenya are available (UNEP 2022, & Climate Policy Initiative (CPI) 2020). Forests are valuable economic resources if used sustainably: agroforestry, carbon credits, land restoration, pulp, medicine, timber, and fodder. Our model encourages a shift from tree-planting donations to forest assets. We want to incentivize people and companies by offering them a return on investment. At Adopt A Forest Ltd, you can participate in the war against climate change while generating wealth through trees.

Trabalhamos lado a lado com uma ampla gama de parceiros, desde empresas de pesquisa até agricultores individuais, institutos, organizações governamentais e ONGs. Nossa flexibilidade nos permite criar soluções personalizadas, inovadoras e eficazes, adaptadas às necessidades específicas de cada um.

2019年，公司实现营业总收入178亿元，同比增长12.96%；实现归属于上市公司股东的净利润11.99亿元，同比增长117%；实现归属于上市公司股东的扣除非经常性损益后的净利润11.91亿元，同比增长119.55%。公司营业收入、归母净利润连续6年持续增长。

Founded in 2008, it was fully acquired by CP Group China in 2015.

5) Shanghai Zhengfu Food (CPFUKUDA): A joint venture between CPSHZC and FUKUDA, Japan, CPFUKUDA specializes in engineering and manufacturing food machines like unhairing cleaning lines, slaughter lines, and food deep processing equipment.

Name: Wagyu del Sur
Description:
Nuestra empresa busca comprender la genética de la raza, a través de su comportamiento productivo en los diversos sistemas, tanto en animales puros como en las cruzas. Para esto, utilizamos y generamos constantemente nuevos sistemas de selección, con herramientas cuantitativas de evaluaciones fenotípicas y genotípicas (ADN). El objetivo es producir líneas que maximicen el marmoleo y que se adapten a nuestros sistemas de producción.
Las líneas negras son las que producen el máximo marmoleo, y en la cruza lograrán un óptimo balance entre el aporte del Wagyu (capacidad de marmolear), y los atributos de rusticidad y tamaño de la raza cruzada. Para esto seleccionamos animales con un alto porcentaje Tajima a través de un cuidadoso estudio del pedigree, buscando buen crecimiento y conformación, y un máximo marmoleo. De esta manera, producimos genética para carne de calidad y de alto valor.
Así mismo, ofrecemos un al comprador un seguimiento y asesoramiento sobre las líneas a usar según su sistema de producción y el objetivo final de la cruza.

Name: Sustainable Agriculture Sustainable Tourism SAST
Description:
Rethinking -'Sustainable Tourism & Sustainable Family Farming! - 
'ST & CBT - Sustainable Tourism' is the key to achieve UN SDGS-17 Goals 2030 Agenda! - 
What is “Sustainable Family Farming “and Why “Sustainable Family Farming ?
- KEY FACTS:
#Family farms occupy around 70-80% of farmland worldwide.
#Women hold only 15%. More than 90% of farms are run by an individual or a family who rely primarily on family labor.
# FAMILY FARMERS ARE THE AGENTS OF CHANGE WE NEED TO ACHIEVE ZERO HUNGER
#CONCEPT OF FAMILY FARMING -
Family Farming (including all family-based agricultural activities) is a means of organizing agricultural, forestry, fisheries, pastoral and aquaculture production that is managed and operated by a family and is predominantly reliant on the family labor of both women and men. The family and the farm are linked, co-evolve and combine economic, environmental, social and cultural functions. "With the launch of the United Nations Decade of Family Farming (2019-2028), FAO and IFAD reiterate our determination and commitment to support concerted actions to fulfill the ambitions of the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development, and to step up interventions for a healthy, resilient and sustainable food system."

DO YOUR BIT! BIG OR SMALL, EVERY BIT COUNTS!
Let us put 'Sustainable family farming 'at the center to lead this transformation for this decade and beyond- UN SDGS-17 2030 Agenda!
"Sustainable Family Farming " लाइ २ categories मा बाडन सकिन्छ ,
1.Sustainable Rural Family Farming -Horizontal, Free-Range,Permaculture.
2.Sustainable Urban Family Farming- (Vertical,Soilless,Aquaponics) 
Sustainable Tourism is a way of travelling and exploring a destination while respecting its culture, environment, and people. According to the United Nation (UNWTO)-Sustainable tourism is, “Tourism that takes full account of its current and future economic, social and environmental impacts, addressing the needs of visitors, the industry, and the environment & Host Communities.

Description:
El Laboratorio de Análisis de Suelos, Plantas, Aguas y Fertilizantes, es una Unidad de Investigación y Servicios del Departamento de Suelos de la Facultad de Agronomía de la Universidad Nacional Agraria La Molina. Fue fundado en 1958, con la finalidad de realizar análisis físico - químicos de suelos, químico de aguas, niveles nutricionales en plantas y riqueza de fertilizantes. 

El Laboratorio cuenta con personal técnico experimentado y altamente capacitado, además con la infraestructura adecuada, equipos e instrumentación, y metodología analítica que le permite realizar los análisis físicos y químicos de suelos, químicos totales de plantas, aguas, materias orgánicas y fertilizantes bajo normas de control de calidad internacional, y con equipos de última generación, garantizando rapidez, confiabilidad y eficiencia en los resultados de las} determinaciones realizadas. Analítica que le permite realizar los análisis físicos y químicos de suelos, químicos totales de plantas, aguas, materias orgánicas y fertilizantes bajo normas de control de calidad internacional, y con equipos de última generación, garantizando rapidez, confiabilidad y eficiencia en los resultados de las determinaciones realizadas.

- Alimenter le changement de paradigme pour démontrer qu'une agriculture nourricière, nutritive et abondante est possible, et qu'elle peut devenir la norme.

Name: GOD in Gardening
Description:
Welcome to GOD in Gardening, a newsletter dedicated to exploring the intersection of faith, gardening, and urban agriculture. Through inspiring stories, practical tips, and biblical insights, we aim to empower individuals and communities to cultivate a deeper connection with God through the act of gardening.

Whether you're a seasoned gardener or a curious beginner, we invite you to join us on this journey of spiritual growth and hands-on learning. Together, we'll discover how gardening can be a transformative practice that nourishes our souls, strengthens our communities, and reflects God's love and abundance.

In each newsletter, you'll find:

Uplifting stories: Hear from individuals and communities who are using gardening to connect with their faith, cultivate hope, and foster positive change.

Practical gardening tips: Receive easy-to-follow gardening advice tailored to urban settings, covering topics like soil preparation, container gardening, pest control, and harvesting techniques.

Biblical insights: Delve into the rich tapestry of biblical teachings related to gardening, exploring themes like stewardship, growth, and abundance.

Engaging interviews: Learn from experts, practitioners, and community leaders who are shaping the landscape of urban agriculture and Christian gardening initiatives.

We believe that gardening is an invitation to nurture not only our plants but also our spirits. As we tend to our gardens, we simultaneously cultivate a deeper connection with God, fostering a sense of purpose, peace, and joy.

Join us on this enriching journey as we explore the beauty and bounty of GOD in Gardening.

Subscribe today and start cultivating a garden of faith and flourishing in your own life.

Name: Africa Climate Resilience
Description:
Reach net zero by engaging in pre-emptive climate action by funneling climate finance to frontline rural development projects in the Global South and particularly Sub-Saharan Africa, disproportionately impacted by climate change. 

They face historic and current inequities, and most acute impacts of climate change, and have limited resources and/or capacity to adapt. These groups are often communities of color, Indigenous, low-income, or those whose lives and livelihoods depend on climate-sensitive natural resources.

Many forward thinking organizations in Africa are achieving incredible results with limited means: our goal is to increase investment towards these grassroots projects and scale their progress. These organizations live in silos and are often unaware of funding sources targeting them. 

Billions of dollars are invested in aid every year, but a significant percentage of the funds are spent on costly overheads and not always fully optimized. It is time funds are optimized and better channeled into direct rural development activities.

Goals of Africa Climate Resilience & Adaptation

1) Support front line communities, workers and projects that advance nature-based community climate resilience activities

2) Increase funding towards water and reforestation projects in Sub-Saharan Africa arid zones

3) Enhance the technical, logistical and economic capacity of frontline development workers, communities and organizations in their climate resilience and adaptation work

4) Establish connections, relationships, and mutual learning between grassroots organizations, communities and global communities.

5) Scale up local solutions and lessons learned to global decision makers at various levels of government, private sector and other resourcing entities

6) Scale local solutions out to similar communities facing similar challenges for duplication 

7) Support frontline-community initiatives and projects to advance community-based climate resilience.

Name: 5th World Congress on Agroforestry
Description:
On July 17th-20th, 2022, in Québec City, Canada, as well as in virtual mode, will be held the 5th World Congress on Agroforestry: Transitioning to a Viable World. This congress, organized by the Université Laval, in partnership with the International Union for Agroforestry (IUAF) and the International Centre for Research in Agroforestry (ICRAF), will be an opportunity to stimulate an open and inclusive dialogue between various stakeholders from around the world including farmers, researchers, advisors, policy makers, and representatives from the government, the civil society and the private sector.

Considering agroforestry participates in enhancing soil health, protecting water quality, increasing biodiversity, mitigating and adapting to climate change, and providing food security, health and revenues, it is an essential component of the needed ecological, energetic, social and economic transition. This critical transition can and must be achieved through a participatory collaboration process that helps building bridges between research, policy decisions and field work.

The 5th World Congress on Agroforestry will help creating or strengthening those connections by promoting knowledge sharing for a transition to a unified and healthy world.

Name: ABPM Clube da Maçã Brasileira
Description:
O Clube da Maçã é uma página criada e mantida pela Associação Brasileira de Produtores de Maçã (ABPM) para divulgar os benefícios da maçã brasileira. Por aqui, encontre conteúdo diferenciado sobre vida saudável, gastronomia, sustentabilidade e mais.

A Associação Brasileira de Produtores de Maçã (ABPM) foi criada em Porto Alegre, em 31 de janeiro de 1978. Na época em que foi fundada, cerca de 95% das maçãs ingeridas pelo brasileiro eram importadas. Isso tornava o consumo da fruta elitizado e implicava também na transferência de muitas riquezas para o exterior, já que, em relação à importação de alimentos, apenas o trigo superava a maçã.

Os objetivos da ABPM desde então consistem em: estimular a pesquisa para o desenvolvimento de pacotes tecnológicos para produção de maçã dentro das condições climáticas brasileiras; fomentar o investimento na implantação de pomares e packing-houses (espaços para processamento e embalagem pós-colheita); promover e popularizar o consumo da maçã nacional no Brasil.

Depois de quase 40 anos, o Brasil possui cerca de 33 mil hectares de pomares de maçã, uma produção anual próxima a 1,35 milhões de toneladas, com geração de R$ 6 bilhões em riquezas para o País e mais de 150 mil empregos diretos e indiretos. Atualmente, a cada dez maçãs consumidas no Brasil, nove são nacionais. A fruta é a terceira de maior consumo no País, de acordo com o IBGE.

Segundo a Organização das Nações Unidas para Agricultura e Alimentação (FAO), o Brasil está entre os 12 maiores produtores de maçã do mundo. De grande importador que éramos quando a ABPM foi fundada, passamos a ser um grande exportador – chegamos a exportar anualmente para mais de 40 países.

Desde 1992, a sede da ABPM está localizada em Fraiburgo (SC). A instituição possui em seu quadro de associados e diretores produtores fraiburguenses, de São Joaquim (SC), de Vacaria (RS) e de Palmas (PR).

Name: Asociación Española de Comercio Exterior de Cereales y Productos Análogos  (AECEC)
North Carolina Urban Forest Council
Description:
The North Carolina Urban Forest Council is a nonprofit organization that consists of individuals, citizen groups, nonprofit organizations, businesses, and agencies from around the state.  All members share an interest in community and urban forestry and are dedicated to protecting trees where we live, work, and play.  Collectively, we pursue urban forest protection in three ways.

First, NCUFC organizes educational programs for arborists, landscape contractors, and landscape planners/architects.  These continuing education and training events help all members of the tree care industry stay informed of the latest developments in arboriculture and maintain their licensing credentials.  We also partner with local colleges and the tree care industry to promote careers in arboriculture among North Carolina youth.

Second, the Council helps local tree advocacy groups achieve their unique goals for urban forest management.  We provide these groups with a forum for networking and discussion and offer tree planting grants through our annual Legacy Tree Fund.  

Lastly, NCUFC promotes the socio-economic and ecological values of trees in our urban and rural communities.  We educate elected officials and decision-makers about critical issues affecting the health of trees in North Carolina’s communities.

Financial support for NCUFC originates from member donations and our annual partners:  Arborguard Tree Specialists, Bartlett Tree Experts, North Carolina Forest Service, Duke Energy, Leaf & Limb, and Davey Resource Group.

Name: Osman Goat Farm
Description: Osman Goat Farm has started operations in 1989 in Kangkar Tebrau, Johor Bahru. Started as a hobby in spare time, Osman Bin Cheya Kutty has bought five goats, cattle in the village to the ground behind his home. But the government's call to develop agriculture and livestock when it has aroused keen interest to become a full time goat herder. In 1993, with the help of the Department of Veterinary Services, he has brought in five dairy goats from British Alpine type from New Zealand and 10 goats meat from Jamnapari type. Osman was the first farmer in Johor who respond to the government in dairy goat farming. The cooperation and guidance from the Department of Veterinary Services Johor, Osman Goat Farm has begun to market its dairy and meat goats commercially in 1995.Starting from this, the Company's products have received overwhelming response from the local community. Government assistance in promoting goat milk has opened the minds of society to switch to goat's milk much better quality and nutritious than cow's milk. On this day, Osman Goat Farm has more than 500 dairy goats and cattle from British type Alpine, Anglo Nubian and Saneen, Jamnapari, Farel and other.

Canruiz is more than a company; it’s a living brand that:

We’re not competing with industrial food monopolies.
We’re building something different, meaningful, and profitable.

The future of agribusiness begins here — in Kentucky.

Name: Landmandsdrevet Innovation
Description:
Landmandsdrevet Innovation (Farmer-Driven Innovation) er et nyt, nationalt projekt, der bringer danske landmænds egne idéer og erfaringer i centrum for udviklingen af fremtidens bæredygtige landbrug. Projektet samler landmænd fra hele landet i regionale innovationsnetværk, hvor de – i samarbejde med rådgivere og eksperter – udvikler, tester og deler nye løsninger for mere miljøvenlig planteproduktion.

Fra foråret 2026 bliver marker over hele Danmark til levende laboratorier, hvor nye metoder og teknologier prøves af i praksis. Målet er at omsætte landmændenes praktiske viden til dokumenterede resultater, som kan styrke både landbrugets konkurrenceevne og bidrage til den grønne omstilling.

Projektet er støttet med 23 millioner kroner fra Novo Nordisk Fonden og løber fra 2025 til 2027. Landmandsdrevet Innovation drives i samarbejde mellem regionale rådgivningsselskaber landet over samt Teknologisk Institut og Agrovi, der er initiativtagere.

Landmænd mødes i netværk, udvikler og deler idéer og afprøver bæredygtige dyrkningsmetoder på flere niveauer – fra enkle markforsøg til avancerede test.

Erfaringer og resultater formidles løbende via workshops, markvandringer og netværksmøder, så flere kan få glæde af nye metoder. Nogle løsninger kan tages i brug med det samme, mens andre videreudvikles gennem eksisterende innovationssystemer.

Formålet med Landmandsdrevet Innovation er at skabe en platform, hvor landmænds praksisnære idéer hurtigt kan afprøves, dokumenteres og komme hele landbruget til gavn – til fordel for miljø, natur og økonomi.

Name: Southern Loggers Cooperative
Description:
In October of 2004, a small group of insightful businessmen decided to do something about the rising costs associated with the logging industry. The plan was simple. By forming a cooperative to utilize the "strength in numbers" approach, as a group they would be able to negotiate better prices than they would individually. Founded on the premise of value for its members, Southern Loggers Cooperative (SLC) set out in 2004 to give independent loggers, truckers, farmers and ranchers a helping hand in the form of real bargaining power to meet the challenges of today’s market. 

The SLC is a member-owned cooperative association which provides expertise in negotiation and contract formulation for the membership, which is composed of harvesters of timber, haulers of forest products in the natural state, finished products or products for recycling, forest road contractors, silvicultural contractors, forest landowners, farmers, ranchers, horticulturists or viticulturists. The philosophy of this cooperative is that the membership must receive the most competitive prices for their supplies, services and equipment in order to thrive in this ever-changing industry. 

Today our cooperative-owned fueling stations stretch from Texas to Ohio with annual fuel sales of nearly 57 million gallons in 2024. Our growth has been steady, but we’re far from finished. Saving our members money on fuel is our primary focus. We presently have 34 stations in 7 states including: AL, LA, MS, OH, SC, TX and VA. SLC membership has now reached over 6000 members spanning more than 27 states. Our members are part owners in a strong, independent organization with fantastic benefits.  Future plans include even more fuel locations, services and deeper discounts. Our members save on fuel, tires, parts, and fuel transfer pumps; and now the SLC is proud to offer our members Diesel Exhaust Fluid (DEF) at the pump at all stations.

Name: Star Farmers Innovation and Incubation Hub
Description:
Star Farmers Innovation and Incubation Hub is an agro-based training and development
organization dedicated to empowering farmers, agro-entrepreneurs, and agricultural
enthusiasts with the skills and resources required to thrive in a rapidly evolving
agricultural landscape. The Hub is committed to fostering innovation, promoting
sustainable farming practices, and bridging the gap between agricultural knowledge and
practical application.

Objectives
Our main objective is to raise the next Generation of Agro-Millionaire, and we hope to dothis through:
1. Capacity Building: Provide comprehensive training programs on modern agricultural
practices, technology adoption, and agro-business management.
2. Innovation Promotion: Encourage the development of innovative solutions to addressagricultural challenges, leveraging technology and research.
3. Market Linkages: Facilitate connections between farmers and markets to enhance
productivity and profitability.
4. Sustainability: Promote environmentally friendly farming practices to ensure longterm agricultural sustainability.
5. Youth Engagement: Inspire and support young people to venture into agriculture as a
viable and rewarding career path.

Services

1. Incubation Programs
2. Training and Capacity Building
3. Agribusiness Advisory Services
4. Innovation and Technology
5. Research and Development

InnoBovino es un App diseñada para el sector ganadero, apoya a las ganaderías con un sistema amigable y muy completo en el cual ingresan datos diariamente de sus actividades dependiendo del sistema productivo que utilicen (Lechería, Desarrollo, Engorde, Cría, Doble propósito) InnoBovino convierte esos datos en información funcional y a la mano, para impulsar la toma de desiciones inmediata, basada en información. 
InnoBovino Apoya a los técnicos y profesionales en el sector, permitiéndoles ser autorizados desde el App y sus usuarios personales, a las fincas que les estén brindando sus servicios. Facilitándoles hacer diagnósticos previos para dar un mejor servicio.

InnoBovino Apoya a las organizaciones e instituciones del sector, por medio del análisis de datos masivo. Toda organización ganadera que desee apoyar a sus miembros por medio de estudios, análisis y asesoría grupal, lo puede hacer con InnoBovino.

InnoBovino cuenta con un sistema de alertas, el cual es personalizable por los usuarios, permitiéndoles llevar un monitoreo remoto meticuloso.

Otra funcionalidad innovadora de InnoBovino, es la sección de InnoAprende, incluida en la App. En está sección nuestros usuarios pueden acceder a cursos, tutoriales, entrevistas, etc.. los cuales son impartidos por expertos en cada tema. 

Lo que viene en InnoBovino:
-Carbono neutralidad.
-Gestión Bufalina.
-Gestión de Ovinos.
-Gestión de Caprinos.
-Gestión de Porcinos. 
-Gestión de Caballos.
