Name: Shenandoah Hunting Safaris
Description:
Discover the extraordinary hunting safaris offered by Shenandoah, a well-known outfitter renowned for its exceptional hunting adventures in the breathtaking landscapes of South Africa. Since 1996, we have been seasoned professionals committed to the art of hunting and the conservation of wildlife.


At Shenandoah, each safari is a true masterpiece, showcasing the beauty of nature. Our team, intimately connected to the diverse landscapes we explore, brings a wealth of expertise to guide you through exhilarating pursuits. We tailor every adventure to your unique desires, striking a balance between challenge, tranquility, and unforgettable moments.

Why Choose Shenandoah for Your Hunting Experience:


Unmatched Expertise:
Drawing on a heritage dating to 1996, we offer decades of expertise as hunting guides and outfitters. Our team possesses extensive knowledge in the art of hunting and shares a profound connection with the landscapes we explore. 

Dedication to Conservation:
Beyond the thrill of the hunt, Shenandoah Hunting Safaris is dedicated to conservation. We firmly believe in responsible and sustainable practices that contribute to the preservation of wildlife and their habitats. 


Personalized Experiences:
Your preferences and aspirations are our top priority. Whether you seek the adrenaline rush of pursuing the mighty Cape buffalo or the serenity of hunting plains game, our tailor-made packages cater to your unique desires. 


Exceptional Hospitality:
At Shenandoah, we understand that the journey is not solely about the hunt; it encompasses the entire experience. Our pledge to hospitality guarantees your embrace into a community that treasures your comfort, safety, and contentment. 
We invite you to discover the endless possibilities that awaits you at Shenandoah Hunting Safaris. Embark on a remarkable journey by making a single choice, and allow us to transform it into an extraordinary experience. Please reach out to us with any questions.

Name: Chateauneuf
Description:
Chateauneuf offre le meilleur des viandes de terroir aux restaurants et aux épiceries dans les métropoles parisiennes, lilloises et la côte d’Opale.

Notre ferme-atelier vous propose bœuf, veau, agneau et cochon, élevés de manière traditionnelle et responsable dans les contrées vertes du Pas-de-calais, découpés et transformés dans notre atelier et livrés directement par nos camions électriques à vos portes.

Nous valorisons tous les morceaux, pour vous proposer tous les goûts de la viande.

Name: Fundación IDEAGRO

La Fundación IDEAGRO es una institución dedicada a la investigación y el desarrollo agropecuario en el Chaco paraguayo.

Name: PT. Kerta Mulya Saripakan
Description:
Selamat datang di PT. Kerta Mulya Saripakan, sebuah perusahaan yang berdedikasi dalam pembuatan makanan hewan ternak berkualitas tinggi untuk memenuhi kebutuhan nutrisi dan pertumbuhan optimal hewan ternak Anda. Sejak didirikan, kami telah menetapkan standar kualitas yang tinggi dalam setiap langkah produksi kami, dengan fokus pada inovasi, penelitian, dan pengembangan untuk menghasilkan pakan ternak unggulan.

Di PT. Kerta Mulya Saripakan, kami memahami betapa pentingnya peran pakan ternak dalam mencapai hasil yang optimal dalam peternakan. Oleh karena itu, kami menggabungkan pengetahuan mendalam tentang nutrisi hewan dengan teknologi modern untuk menciptakan formula pakan yang seimbang dan berkualitas tinggi.

Merek dagang kami, Saripakan, telah menjadi pilihan utama bagi peternak di seluruh Indonesia. Saripakan dikenal karena konsistensi kualitasnya, keunggulan nutrisinya, dan hasil yang terbukti dalam pertumbuhan dan kesehatan hewan ternak. Kami bangga menjadi mitra terpercaya bagi peternak dalam memenuhi kebutuhan pakan ternak mereka.

Komitmen kami terhadap kualitas dan keunggulan terpancar dalam setiap produk Saripakan yang kami hasilkan. Dengan tim profesional yang berpengalaman, fasilitas produksi yang modern, dan kontrol kualitas yang ketat, kami memastikan bahwa setiap kemasan Saripakan yang Anda beli adalah jaminan mutu yang terbaik untuk hewan ternak Anda.

Kami di PT. Kerta Mulya Saripakan berkomitmen untuk terus menjadi inovator dalam industri pakan ternak, menyediakan solusi nutrisi yang unggul dan mendukung pertumbuhan serta kesehatan hewan ternak Anda. bersama Saripakan, mari kita wujudkan masa depan yang lebih baik untuk peternakan Anda.

Name: Toccaverde
Description:
For growth you need space. And space you need to create. We create. 
We honor late Barbara Schütze in all we do.

Toccaverde today: our business is cattle farming and horticulture with warmhearted respect to our farmland, to nature, to our health and to all our workers and their families involved. 
Growth in harmony with a sustainable existence. Nature is our foundation.

Toccaverde, our company initially:
a balanced team of professionals with successful experience in operational business life, enriched with academic excellence; we formatted our expertise into a successful approach to support companies to grow their performance: long term productivity or at the bottomline, financial results.
We research, we support, we advise, we coach and we collaborate with fresh pleasure. We believe in the strength that houses in our clients, in practical solutions, in common sense, in good values and standards and in working towards the essence of the business. Nature is our inspiration.

Name: Temel Gıda
Description:
Çekirdeksiz kuru üzüm işleme ve paketleme alanında faaliyet gösteren ve yıllık 23.520 ton üretim kapasitesine sahip olan Temel Gıda, kaliteyi ve müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutan ihracat ve iç piyasa pazarındaki tecrübesi ile Türkiye’deki sayılı firmalar arasında yer almaktadır. 40’ı aşkın ülkeye ihracat yapan Temel Gıda, iç piyasada da önemli ve büyük markalara ürün tedarik etmektedir.

Temel Gıda’da kuru üzüm işleme ve paketleme işlemleri, eğitimli ve tecrübeli çalışanlarımız tarafından son teknoloji kullanılarak yapılmaktadır.

Name: Lartirigoyen & Oromí SA
Description:
Somos una consignataria de hacienda que busca permanentemente la excelencia en el servicio al cliente a través de la transparencia en nuestras operaciones y el cumplimiento de la palabra empeñada. 

En el año 2003 Lartirigoyen y Cía. con el objetivo de brindar mayor cobertura a los servicios agropecuarios se asocia a Ignacio Oromí, quien cuenta con más de 40 años de trayectoria operando en el sector ganadero, creando así la consignataria.

La misma comienza a operar abriendo su casilla en el Mercado de Liniers y desarrollando negocios de invernada y cría, ventas directas a frigoríficos y remates feria.

En el año 2013, la consignataria cambia su nombre a Lartirigoyen & Oromí S.A. conservando los mismos valores, fortalezas y vocación por el servicio a nuestros clientes.
Location: Retiro, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Agronômica - Consultoria em Agronomia
Description:
A AGRONÔMICA é uma empresa 100% mineira, que surgiu em 2013 com a união de dois profissionais:

• Fernando de Jesus Cunha - ENGENHEIRO AGRÔNOMO com MESTRADO em Solos e Nutrição de Plantas pela Universidade Federal de Viçosa - UFV. CREA MG - 95682 D;

• Reis Bernardo da Silva - Pós-graduado em Gestão Estratégica em Negócios pela Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais - UFMG.

Dessa forma, resolveram colocar em prática as experiências e conhecimentos técnicos nas áreas de Agronomia e Comercial, com intuito de inovar o mercado de serviços de plantio, manutenção, tratamento, combate a pragas e doenças em jardins, gramados, pomares, horta, entre outros.

Nosso objetivo é o atendimento com produto diferenciado, soluções rápidas e planejadas, prestando serviços com qualidade, responsabilidade e segurança, visando minimizar custos e riscos, proporcionando tranquilidade e ganho de tempo para nossos clientes.

Nossos serviços vão desde cuidados simples, até os mais complexos, como: Recomendação Técnica de acordo com as necessidades das plantas, Análise de solos, Orientação na aplicação de calcários e adubos, Controle de pragas em gramados, jardins, pomares e hortas, entre outros.

É desta forma que a AGRONÔMICA espera surpreender você!

Name: Cabinet DK
Description:
Le Cabinet DK est une entreprise familiale depuis 1980, spécialisée dans la gestion de propriétés agricoles, viticoles, rurales, touristiques et immobilières. Nous travaillons pour une clientèle privée ou pour des institutionnels sur l’ensemble du territoire français. Réactif, discret et disponible, nos experts vous accompagnent.

Le cabinet Sarl DK est membre de la confédération des Experts Fonciers de France. Il intervient auprès des propriétaires particuliers, et institutionnels, partout en france, et particulière en régions Ile de France, Bretagne et Rhône-Alpes. Ses clients sont des viticulteurs, agriculteurs, chatelins, propriétaires de biens immobiliers urbains et ruraux.

Name: S.K. Farm & Agriculture (Pvt) Ltd.
Description: We are a multiple farming with over 250 acres of Coconut plantation, vegetable, prawn and animal farming and are therefore one of the leading agriculture companies of the northern part of Sri Lanka. We organise social growths as women empowerment and English classes within the company.

Name: Pro Earth Animal Health
Description: Pro Earth Animal Health provides all-natural products made up of plant extracts (corn, soy, onion), vegetable based fatty-acids, tree oils, and water. We are dedicated to helping cattlemen increase the overall health of their animals as well as increase profit.

Name: Ganaderos Comunidad
Description:
Ganaderos comunidad nace del encuentro, participación e intercambio continuo entre los distintos actores de la cadena ganadera de Argentina y Latinoamericana. 
Apuntamos a ser el espacio REFERENTE en nuestra actividad en donde, con la participación de todos, podamos mejorar la eficiencia de procesos, aumentar la sustentabilidad de nuestros sistemas y brindar soluciones a todos y cada uno de los actores que participan de la cadena ganadera.

Name: MoreMilk2Day
Description: MoreMilk2Day is committed to dairy farmers who want to produce more, healthy milk by keeping cows free of pathogens. MoreMilk2Day offers an early disease detection system that focuses on preventing diseases such as mastitis instead of curing them. Our goal is to support the dairy farmer in keeping healthy cows that produce fair and delicious milk.

Bovbjerg Genetics A/S tilbyder TN70 polte fra Europas største avlsselskab Topigs Norsvin. Bovbjerg Genetics er Danmarks førende opformeringsbesætning af TN70 polte, og med virksomhedens etablering blev TN70 polte for alvor gjort tilgængelige på det danske marked.

TN70 polte fra Bovbjerg Genetics er bæredygtige grise, der via racens egenskaber kan bidrage til at landmanden kan maksimere sin totaløkonomi og samtidig sikre dyreetik og velfærd. 
Vi ønsker at skabe en gris, der kan være med til at udvikle den konventionelle griseproduktion, så vi lever op til forbrugernes ønsker.

Bovbjerg Genetics blev etableret i 2018 og har i dag kapacitet til 1800 søer fordelt på to primærlokationer for at sikre og fastholde den højeste sundhedsstatus, rød SPS, til vores kunder.

Name: Agropecuária Vista Alegre
Description:
A Agropecuária Vista Alegre (Better Beef Confinamento), é o maior confinamento coberto da América Latina, referência em bem-estar animal, sustentabilidade e rastreabilidade. Com capacidade instalada para 40 mil bovinos e expansão prevista para 55 mil animais nos próximos anos, integra o Better Group, um ecossistema que conecta campo, indústria e consumidor em uma Jornada da Qualidade sustentável e transparente, que você vê, sente e confia. É aqui que nasce o padrão de excelência premium da carne Better Beef.

Aliando infraestrutura moderna, baias concretadas e tecnologia de ponta, a Vista Alegre garante conforto, desempenho e produtividade com responsabilidade socioambiental. A operação é fortalecida por uma fábrica de ração própria, com capacidade de produção de 594 toneladas por dia, que utiliza coprodutos agroindustriais em um modelo de economia circular, transformando coprodutos em energia limpa e fertilizantes naturais.

Cada detalhe do processo é guiado pelos Cinco Domínios do Bem-Estar Animal, reconhecidos pela OIE, assegurando que ciência, ética e cuidado estejam presentes desde o manejo até a nutrição de precisão. Esses pilares garantem monitoramento sanitário contínuo, nutrição balanceada e rastreabilidade total da origem ao produto final.

Na Agropecuária Vista Alegre (Better Beef Confinamento), a qualidade não é apenas um objetivo, é o ponto de partida. Respeito aos animais, às pessoas e ao planeta sustentam a produção da carne premium Better Beef, reconhecida por sua excelência, segurança e confiabilidade.

Agropecuária Vista Alegre.  
Alimentando hoje, cuidando do amanhã.

Name: Bc INSTITUT

1897 yılında Zagreb’de (Eski Yugoslavya) kurulan Bc Institut; tarla bitkileri
üretim programları ile farklı türlerde araştırma, bitki ıslahı, üretim ve pazarlama konularında faaliyet göstererek, zamanla Hırvatistan’ın en büyük
araştırma kurumu haline gelmiştir.
Daha öncesinde Enstitü olarak sadece Ar-Ge faaliyetleri yürüten Bc Institut; Hırvatistan’ın kuruluşundan bu yana, tarla bitkileri ıslah çalışmalarının yanında, üretim ve pazarlama konularında bir anonim şirket olarak
faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir.
Bc Institut Hırvatistan merkezli olarak, başta Türkiye olmak üzere Bosna
Hersek, Sırbistan, Ukrayna, Portekiz, İtalya, İran, Slovenya, Makedonya,
Rusya, Macaristan, Kosova, Arnavutluk, Fransa, İsviçre, Romanya, İspanya, Kazakistan, Azerbaycan, Bulgaristan, Yunanistan gibi dünyanın birçok
ülkesinde faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir.
Bc Institut’un vizyonu; en son gelişmeler doğrultusunda, tamamen doğal
yöntemlerle, hastalık ve zararlılara dayanıklı, yüksek verimli, modern tohum üretimi sağlamaktır. Kendi çeşitlerini geliştirip üreten şirket, üretim
ve dağıtım organizasyonunu da gerçekleştirir. Bünyesinde bulunan yüksek kaliteli gen kaynaklarının daha da iyileştirilmesi için her yıl araştırma
ve ıslah ekipleri ile binlerce yeni hibrit üzerinde çalışıp, yeni çeşitler tescil
ettirerek, tarımsal üretimin gelişmesine katkıda bulunur, tüketicilerinin
yaşam kalitesini arttırır.
Bc Institut’un misyonu uzun vadeli ilişkiler kurmak ve sürdürmektir. Orijinal ürünler sunan Bc Institut iş ortaklarının ve tüketicilerin bireysel ihtiyaçları doğrultusunda, genetiğiyle oynanmamış, kaliteli, yüksek verimli ve
tamamen doğal ürünler sunmaktadır.
Bc Institut, 2008 yılından itibaren Türkiye’de yapılanmış, üretim, satış,
ar-ge, çeşit tescili, bitki ıslahı ve melezleme faaliyetlerini Türkiye’de de
yapmaya başlamıştır.

Name: Monte Silveira Bio
Description:
[EN] Monte Silveira Bio has been an organic farm since 1999 and is located in Castelo Branco. Regenerative agriculture and planned animal management are farming practices that allow us to produce nutrient-dense food while nourishing and regenerating soil health and fertility, and respecting biodiversity and ecosystem boundaries.
Of the approximately 700 ha, five hundred are occupied by a silvopastoral system of holm and cork oak (montado), where the Adaptive Multi-Paddock grazing of cattle, sheep, pigs, and horses is carried out. The remaining 200 ha are dedicated to cereals, legumes, fodder, and olive groves, also using regenerative practices with animal integration.
In addition to contributing to a more prosperous and healthier diet, we have an environmental duty to sequester more carbon, reconstitute organic matter, promote biodiversity, and improve nutrient and water cycles, all critical factors for the sustainability and resilience of the ecosystem and planet.

[PT] O Monte Silveira Bio é uma exploração agropecuária, em modo de produção biológico desde 1999, localizada em Castelo Branco. A agricultura regenerativa e pastoreio adaptativo dos animais são práticas que nos permitem produzir alimentos ricos em nutrientes enquanto nutrimos e regeneramos a saúde e a fertilidade do solo e respeitamos a biodiversidade e os limites do ecossistema.
Nos cerca de 700 ha, cinco centenas estão ocupadas por sistema silvopastoril de montado, onde é realizada a gestão planeada das pastagens com bovinos, ovinos, suínos e equinos. Os restantes 200 ha são dedicados a cereais, leguminosas, forragens e olival, usando-se também práticas regenerativas com integração dos animais.
Para além de contribuirmos para uma alimentação mais rica e saudável, temos o dever ambiental de sequestrar mais carbono, reconstituir a matéria orgânica, promover biodiversidade e melhorar os ciclos de nutrientes e água, tudo fatores chave para a sustentabilidade e resiliência do ecossistema e planeta.

The business development of the group is based on a philosophy centered on animal welfare, innovation, and sustainability, with automated infrastructures aimed at optimizing production. Name: Le Faux Bourdon Apiculteur
Description:
Il mio viaggio tra le api: da una passione a una professione
Tutto è cominciato nel 2018, quando ho seguito un corso di apicoltura presso l’Associazione Produttori Agripiemonte Miele a Torino (www.agripiemontemiele.it). La curiosità, però, era presente da tempo: ho sempre nutrito un forte interesse per l’autosufficienza alimentare e ho trovato nel rapporto con la natura una fonte di equilibrio e serenità.

Ho iniziato con una sola arnia (sbagliando, come spesso accade quando si comincia!), ma oggi gestisco con orgoglio venti alveari e continuo a crescere. Le api, oltre al miele, mi regalano pace e concentrazione. Il lavoro è impegnativo, ma non pesa quando è sostenuto dalla passione.

I miei apiari si trovano in ambienti ricchi e diversi, ciascuno con un'identità unica:

Saint-Vincent (575 m s.l.m.) – apiario invernale, ideale per i trattamenti sanitari e per il clima mite della "Riviera delle Alpi".

Challand Saint-Victor – fraz. Chataignere-viran – un’oasi incontaminata tra pascoli e boschi: da qui nasce un miele millefiori con sentori di tiglio o castagno.

Ase (Vallone di Dondeuil, 1.400 m s.l.m.) – apiario d’altura per il pregiato miele di flora alpina.

Perrière (frazione di Saint-Vincent) – qui si concentrano gli aromi intensi del miele di bosco e di castagno.

Dal 1° gennaio 2024, questa passione si è trasformata in una vera e propria attività professionale, animata dallo stesso amore con cui è nata.

Name: Nutrir Mangimi
Description:
Nutrir nasce dall’esperienza nel settore della famiglia Pezzullo, che negli anni ’50 con Luigi, già fondatore dell’omonimo molino, decide di specializzarsi anche nella produzione di alimenti per animali intravedendo diversi punti di incontro tra le due attività. L’intuizione di Luigi risulta vincente e, da quel momento, il Gruppo Pezzullo diventa un punto di riferimento nel settore della zootecnia non solo per il celebre mangimificio, ma anche per la partecipazione diretta e indiretta all’intera filiera con una serie di nuovi progetti aziendali.
Negli anni ’60 Sossio, figlio di Luigi, prende in mano le redini del mangimificio e inizia a sviluppare una fitta rete vendita in tutto il Sud Italia. Tuttavia, ben presto, il core business della famiglia diventano gli allevamenti e il mangimificio inizia a lavorare soprattutto per il Gruppo stesso, diventandone il fornitore di riferimento.
Nel 2007 la famiglia Pezzullo decide di trarre forza dall’esperienza quarantennale nell’allevamento di suini e avicoli e di investire nuovamente nei mangimi fondando Nutrir e puntando su tecnologie e innovazione. Con Nutrir, che oggi fa parte del Gruppo Pezzullo insieme a Agriovo e Suime, il progetto portato avanti già da Sossio è ricominciato e l’azienda, forte di un incremento ingente della produzione, è nuovamente presente in molte regioni del Sud Italia.

Name: MSD Animal Health (OS ID)
Description:
Vi er en internasjonalt ledende utvikler og produsent av øremerker for husdyr, og vi tilbyr også systemer for aktivitetsmåling og løsninger for innhenting av vevsprøver. Slik sikrer vi husdyrs identitet og sporbarhet og leverer verdifulle data om helse, velferd og produktivitet. Dataene gir deg oversikt og innsikt, slik at du kan effektivisere og forbedre drifta. Smart husdyrhold gir mer bærekraftig produksjon av verdens viktigste vare – maten vi spiser.

Med produkter, løsninger og support fra oss får du som gårdbruker mer ut av husdyra dine og av tida di. Slik oppnår vi smart, dyrevennlig og bærekraftig matproduksjon.

OS ID ledes fra fjellbygda Os i Nord-Østerdalen, og det er også her vi produserer øremerkene våre. Vi er stolte over å kunne levere norskproduserte øremerker til norske bønder. Samtidig er vi til stede i mange land og i flere verdensdeler, og øremerkene fra Os brukes på dyr verden over. Som en del av MSD Animal Health Intelligence, verdens ledende selskap innen dyrehelse, merking og aktivitetsmåling, gir vi kundene våre direkte tilgang til den ypperste teknologien innen aktivitetsmåling og vevsprøvetaking.

Med øremerker fra OS ID i kombinasjon med avlesere, automater, aktivitetsmåleren SenseHub og andre installasjoner sparer du tid – og tid er som kjent penger. Samtidig kan du være trygg på at dataene du får ut, er pålitelige. Slik registrerer og håndterer du dyra rasjonelt, både på gården og på beite. Vissheten om at du får fulgt opp dyra dine godt, samtidig som produksjonen flyter effektivt, gir trygghet og frihet!

Vi produserte våre første øremerker så langt tilbake som i 1936.  dag er OS ID et internasjonalt ledende teknologiselskap i vår bransje. I staben har vi 65 dyktige og dedikerte mennesker som arbeider med produkt- og teknologiutvikling, produksjon, salg, support og distribusjon. Vi har medarbeidere i flere land, og flere av oss er husdyreiere. Dette gir oss enestående kompetanse innen løsninger for smart husdyrhold.

Name: Agro Business Services (ABS Group)
Description:
1.	Mission d’entreprise

La mission de notre structure est de promouvoir des produits locaux en y apportant un surplus de valeur tout en créant un cadre permettant aux apprenant des écoles coraniques de bénéficier une initialisation aux métiers de l’agriculture et de l’entrepreneuriat dans le secteur.



2. Valeurs de l’entreprise 

Le Management de notre entreprise repose sur certaines valeurs tels que le sens de l'effort et la résilience, l’innovation et la notion de valeur ajoutée, une conduite inclusive ou les apports de tous feront notre image dans le futur.

3. Vision et objectifs

Notre vision est de créer une structure de renommée a travers une ferme d’exploitation et des boutiques de distribution « Agro Boutiques » pour nos produits locaux avec des dérivées ouvrant a d’autres recettes pour une meilleures consommations de nos produits locaux. Être l’entreprise industrielle nationale la plus axée dans la production, transformation et la distribution de notre culture locale dans un délais de trois ans.
A travers cette mission Agro Business services par ces fermes AgroDaara a pour objectifs de combler un gap pour une partie des jeunesse sénégalaise ,notamment les Apprenants des écoles coraniques ayant besoin une formation professionnelle lors de leur cursus a partir de leur 16 ans .Ainsi, AgroDaara fera office d’une structure intégrée avec des établissements ou les pensionnaires de (15-20 )âgés au moins de 16ans auront l’occasion d’être formés et initiés aux métiers de l’agrobusiness tout en continuant leur apprentissage initial par un programme établis par un personnel expérimenté.

Name: Projeta Agroflorestas
Description:
A Projeta Agroflorestas prima por uma visão integradora das várias dimensões da sustentabilidade da interação lucrativa entre florestas (madeira), culturas agrícolas e animais, a partir da elaboração e acompanhamento de Projetos Técnicos Agroflorestais. Presta serviços de consultoria, observando sempre os aspectos financeiros, legais, ambientais e de qualidade.

Prestamos serviços e elaboramos projetos na área dos agronegócios, tanto para produtores independentes, ampliando a inserção destes no mercado de agronegócios, mantendo sua atividade principal (pecuária e agricultura) com renda a curto e médio prazo, quanto para grandes empresas através de consultoria. 

Solucionamos necessidades diversas para o suprimento de biomassa, projeta o plantio de florestas objetivando o uso da madeira em demandas diversas (toras, postes, dormentes, lenha, carvão vegetal e biocombustíveis) – produtos sustentáveis demandados cada vez mais pelo mercado no Brasil e no exterior, além de projetos para recuperação de áreas degradadas e intermediação na solução de conflitos através de emissão de laudos e/ou pareceres técnicos.

Aos profissionais do agronegócio, a Projeta Agroflorestas oferece, através de um fluxo de caixa realista e consensado, análise econômico-financeira dos investimentos dedicados aos projetos, ferramenta imprescindível e extremamente útil para a gestão profissional dos agronegócios.

Name: HAYGER İSTİRİDYE MANTARI
Description:
Şirketimiz tarım ürünleri, istiridye mantarı üretimi ve ihracatı amacıyla 2007 yılında “HAYALDEN GERÇEĞE" sloganıyla Hayger Organik Gıda Ltd. Şirketi adı altında Muhammet Yakar tarafından Denizli'de kurulmuştur. Firmamız farklı markalarıyla (HAYGER, XAYME) ürün çeşitliliğini artırarak faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir.
Firmamız Denizli’de kendi bünyesinde ve kurulumunu yaptığı müşterilerinden gelen istiridye mantarı ile beraber pazara aylık 15 ton istiridye mantarı sunmaktadır. Bünyemizde bulunan kompost üretim alanında da aylık 450 ton kompost üretim kapasitesine sahiptir.
Ayrıca kurutulmuş İstiridye Mantarını büyük parça, granül ve toz haline getirerek pazarın ihtiyacını karşılamaya çalışmaktadır.
Firmamız teknoloji, deneyim ve güven unsurlarını bir araya getirerek anahtar teslim istiridye mantarı üretim çadırları, tesisleri de kurarak, sektörün hızlı büyümesini katkı sağlama çabası içerisindedir.
Şirketimiz kurumsallaşmaya önem vermekte yeni yatırımlar yapmaya ve üreticileri teşvik etmeye devam etmektedir. Bu amaçla firmamız yeni girişimcilerimize yön vermekte, istiridye mantarının tanıtımı ve üretimini artırabilmenin azami gayreti içerisindedir. İşimize ve kaliteye verdiğimiz önemin göstergesi olarak sahip olduğumuz ISO 9001:2000 ve ISO 22000:2005 kalite yönetim belgelerimizi gösterebiliriz.
BİZ "Hayal kurar, gerçekleştirmek için çaba sarf eder ve gerçekleştiririz.
Our company was established (Turkey) by Muhammet Yakar in Denizli under the slogan "Hayal Organik Gıda Ltd." Company in 2007 with the motto of agricultural products, oyster mushroom production and exportation in 2007. Our company is continuing its activities with different brands (HAYGER, XAYME). Our company presents 15 tons of oyster mushrooms per month together with oyster mushrooms which come from its customers in its own establishment and in Denizli. Our compost has a production capacity of 450 tons of compost per month in production area. Name: WPSA - België
Description:

De WPSA tracht haar doel te bereiken door: 
- Het uitgeven van het WPSA-Journal met wetenschappelijke artikelen. Het Journal verschijnt vier keer per jaar, kan door alle leden van de WPSA digitaal worden ingezien of wordt toegezonden.
- Stimuleren van de organisatie en deelname aan wereldcongressen, regionale congressen, symposia en studiebijeenkomsten. De congressen vinden elke vier jaar plaats, afwisselend een wereldcongres en een Europees congres. 
- Samenwerking met andere (internationale) organisaties.

Name: L'Uovo D'oro - Prodotti Biologici
Description:
L’azienda “L’Uovo d’Oro” nasce a luglio 2015 dal desiderio di creare il primo allevamento biologico del sud Italia. La mission è quella di fornire un prodotto di qualità e allo stesso tempo prendersi cura del benessere animale, senza che una cosa escluda l’altra. 

Da agosto 2015 è azienda biologica certificata, perché soddisfa pienamente i requisiti richiesti dalle normative vigenti in materia. 

La struttura si sviluppa in circa sei ettari nel comune di Campagna, località Puglietta, a un’altitudine di circa 350 metri sul livello del mare. Il clima tipicamente mediterraneo e le temperature abbastanza miti creano condizioni paesaggistiche e climatiche ideali per l’applicazione del metodo di allevamento biologico. 

La produzione di uova biologiche avviene attraverso un metodo di allevamento all’aperto che consente a ogni gallina di razzolare deponendo in assoluta libertà le proprie uova, in spazi curati e puliti, nutrendosi di mangimi ottenuti da agricoltura biologica. 

L’azienda segue la filosofia del “fare bene”, nel rispetto della natura e contribuendo a creare un futuro migliore attraverso il concetto di sostenibilità, conciliando i bisogni del presente a quelli delle generazioni future. 

www.luovodoro.bio

Name: Beaty Butte Wild Horse Training Facility
Description:
The wild horses of Beaty Butte and the pioneers who forged this western community are inseparable from the historical fabric in this remote corner of the Oregon desert. Like the families that live under these infinitely blue skies, the Butte’s horses are direct descendants that represent the enduring grit and drive that binds both to this limitless and cultural landscape.

For the last three years, community members from Adel, Oregon and Lake and Harney County have collaborated with a broad group of stakeholders to determine how, together, they could best assist the growing list of uses on the 437,120-acre Beaty Butte Herd Management Area (HMA). From these meetings came a ground-breaking commitment to create a first-of-its-kind, combined public and private wild horse program.

The key to this new concept is the non-profit, Beaty Butte Wild Horse Training Facility, in Adel. BBWHTF will make professionally-trained horses available for adoption to lovers of these mustangs while preserving the population within its mandated Appropriate Management Level (AML). The goal is to maintain a thriving ecosystem, preserve the historical connection to the horses, and reduce or end the horse round-ups that have become common.

Name: Ferma Animalelor
Description:
Ferma Animalelor este o afacere de familie și este prima fermă–parc de animale domestice din România gândită special pentru copii. Este deschisă din luna Iunie 2009 chiar lângă Ferma de Lapte din orașul Pantelimon, județul Ilfov. Ferma de Lapte (Ferma Pantelimon) există din 1973, fiind una din fermele de elită ale României pentru vacile din rasa Holstein. A fost ridicată pe locul unde până la sfârșitul secolului trecut se afla Școala de Agricultură din București, fiind cunoscută și drept ferma doctorului Petcu. În prezent, aici locuiesc câteva sute de văcuțe, care produc zilnic peste 5.000 de litri de lapte de cea mai bună calitate. Vestea bună este că, după ce v-ați distrat la Fermă, la plecare, puteți lua acasă lapte proaspăt direct de la dozator și produse lactate proaspete de la Fabricuța de Lactate, deschisă în 2015.

Ferma Animalelor este un loc special amenajat pentru copii pe o suprafață de peste 40.000 mp, unde cei mici se pot apropia în mod firesc de animalele domestice. Este așezată aproape de oraș (doar 12 km depărtare de Piața Universității), astfel că poți ajunge ușor la ea, dar este totuși și suficient de „la țară” încât să reprezinte o adevărată escapadă în natură, departe de blocuri, trafic și tot ce mai implică peisajul urban. Odată ce ați ajuns la Fermă puteți petrece mai mult timp, căci avem și un restaurant unde puteți mânca ceva bun (deschis în weekend-uri și sărbători legale) și apoi, distracția continuă nestingherită.

Name: agrifoodTEF Austria
Description:
AgrifoodTEF ist ein Netzwerk von Testzentren in Europa, das Unternehmen & Start-ups aus dem Agrar- und Lebensmittelproduktionssektor bei der Produktentwicklung von KI- und Robotik-Lösungen unterstützt.

Zur Förderung einer nachhaltigen und effizienten Lebensmittelproduktion bietet AgrifoodTEF eine breite Palette unterschiedlicher Services für Unternehmen an, die diesen dabei helfen sollen, ihre Produktentwicklungen im Bereich KI & Robotik unter realen Bedingungen zu testen und zu validieren. Damit wird den Unternehmen eine einzigartige Möglichkeit angeboten, ihre Produkt- bzw. Anwendungsidee einen entscheidenden Schritt weiter in Richtung Marktreife zu bringen.

Die Projektpartner bilden ein Netzwerk, welches den heterogenen Bedingungen im Agrar- und Lebensmittelproduktionssektor in ganz Europa gerecht wird. Die nationalen TEF-Knoten, wie die nationalen Konsortien im Projekt bezeichnet werden, bieten hierfür Services an, die für die jeweiligen Fachgebiete und territorialen Bedürfnisse optimiert sind. Das Serviceangebot umfasst neben physischen Test- und Validierungsmöglichkeiten, z.B. in Form von Feldversuchen oder auf Maschinenprüfständen, auch virtuelle Services, z.B. Testen von Algorithmen auf Grundlage verschiedener Datensätze, welche komplett remote durchgeführt werden können und damit für Kunden aus ganz Europa jederzeit verfügbar sind.

Name: ionprovince

ion province foça ile sınırlı kalmaksızın ege bölgesinde yeni iyon bölgeleri tasarlayarak, fide seçimi ve üretimi ile birlikte, tıbbi aromatik bitki olan lavanta ile çoğalarak yeni yeni büyümektedir.  

Lavantaya ilginin arttığı son yıllarda tıbbi aromatik bitki üretimindeki tecrübelerimizi çiftçilerimizle buluşturmak amacımızdır.

Lavanta bitkisinin  - esansiyel yağ çıkarma kazanları ve distilasyon sistemlerinin   konusunda tecrübeli iş ortaklarımız ile damıtma hizmetimiz yanında  sizlere teknik destek vermekteyiz.

Foça da kendi ürettiğimiz lavandula angustifolia sevtopolis cinsi  lavantalarından esansiyal yağ ve hidrosol ürünlerimizden satın almak için bizimle irtibatta kalabilirsiniz.

Name: Estancia Buena Esperanza
Description:
Estancia Buena Esperanza es una empresa agropecuaria familiar, con manejo profesional, que se dedica a la producción bovina (Hereford y Braford), ovina (Romney Marsh) y de semillas (arroz y forrajeras -rye grass y avena). Creada en 1878, el negocio de la compañía se desarrolla en sus Estancias de Los Conquistadores, Entre Ríos, y Centeno, Santa Fe. 

La empresa realiza remates anuales de Hereford, Braford y Romney Marsh, y con su Cabaña Braford se presenta en exposiciones de nivel nacional y regional, en donde ya ha obtenido importantes premios.

Buena Esperanza comenzó su actividad hace más de 130 años con un rodeo Hereford y una majada Romney Marsh, que fruto de la selección y esfuerzo de quienes llevaron adelante la empresa, obtuvieron como resultado un ganado de reconocida calidad.

Siguiendo el corrimiento de la ganadería hacia el norte, con el transcurso del tiempo se fue sumando el rodeo Braford. Con el fin de adaptarlo a la situación actual, su fuerte vocación los llevó a trabajar en pos de lograr lo mejor de esta noble actividad sin perder las líneas del origen europeo.

Seguidamente y complementando la actividad ganadera, se incorporan el arroz y la agricultura de secano, dinamizadores que han permitido mejorar lo ecuación productiva de Estancia Buena Esperanza.

Quienes formaron parte de esta historia, trabajaron con mucho entusiasmo y en comunión con el medioambiente. Su respeto por la naturaleza les valió una cadena de logros que comenzó desde el principio mismo, allá por 1878.

Name: Shagaya Agri
Description:
Founded in 2024, Shagaya Agri is pioneering large-scale, integrated cattle feedlot operations and agricultural ventures in Nigeria. Through strategic collaboration with the Plateau State Government, we are implementing sustainable practices that support Nigeria's agricultural transformation and position Shagaya Agri as a key driver in the industry.

Our flagship operation in Zakali, Bassa Local Government Area of Plateau State, will be a fully integrated feedlot facility. We are committed to producing high-quality cattle efficiently while managing resources responsibly. Our operations span from cattle backgrounding programs and feed crop cultivation to streamlined feedlot management, positioning Shagaya Agri to deliver top-tier beef products to the Nigerian market.

We’re continuously expanding our infrastructure and technology to accommodate an exponential increase in production over the coming years. We are dedicated to establishing a world-class cattle feedlot management process that will enable us to meet market demands while maintaining the highest standards of quality and sustainability.

With plans to establish dedicated sales and distribution centres, we’re building an efficient, end-to-end supply chain that will support our vision for growth. Shagaya Agri’s aim is to strengthen regional economic growth, enhance food security, and drive private sector investment within Nigeria’s agricultural sector, setting new standards in cattle farming and agribusiness.

AFRD’s advocacy policy for development farmers and farming movements comprises several components: Holding training courses and educational seminars in different regions of Georgia for Organic Farming, Biodiversity Conservation, Climate Change, Renewable energy projects. Genes Bank for Plants Germplasm collection, Giving juridical consultations to farmers, defending their rights, Drafting Legislation, Lobbying, Rise of public awareness and broaden support, Supporting Rural and Ecotourism in Rural Areas of Georgia. For sharing of high experience develops young farmers and students training and educational programs in EU and US, Support of SME, Rural and Urban Youth Employment. Name: Manegrow Agro
Description:
Manegrow Agro Products Pvt. Ltd. is Asia’s leading mushroom farm, headquartered in Pune, Maharashtra. Specializing in the cultivation and distribution of premium mushrooms—including button, oyster, and shiitake varieties—we are committed to pioneering sustainable, tech-driven farming practices.

Our 36-acre facility in Maval, equipped with 50 environment-controlled cultivation rooms, produces up to 14–15 tonnes of fresh button mushrooms daily. Certified by FSSAI, ISO, and APEDA, we uphold the highest standards in food safety and quality. Our product range extends to exotic vegetables and fresh fruits, catering to a diverse clientele.

Manegrow’s products are available through major retail and food service platforms, including Amazon Fresh, BigBasket, DMart, Swiggy, and JW Marriott. Our mission is to transform traditional agriculture into a modern, sustainable enterprise that supports farmers and promotes healthier lifestyles.

Founded in 2020 by a visionary team led by Managing Directors Umesh and Mohini Mane, and Brand Custodian Snehal Mane—an international tennis player—Manegrow embodies a blend of innovation, wellness, and community impact.

Name: Unión Ganadera Regional de Porcicultores de Guanajuato
Description:
En la Unión Ganadera Regional de Porcicultores de Guanajuato elaboramos alimento balanceado para todo tipo de ganado como cerdos, rumiantes, gallos y caballos, con calidad y formulados para aumentar la rentabilidad de los productores y contribuir al sostenimiento de la actividad. 

Representamos a los porcicultores ante autoridades; para apoyar y vigilar el cumplimiento de las Leyes, reglamentos; revisar, vigilar y actualizar la situación jurídica de las asociaciones de porcicultores filiales; regular y controlar la movilización del ganado porcino, productos y subproductos derivados de la carne de cerdo.

Contamos con una farmacia veterinaria donde distribuimos medicamentos, implementos y equipo para todas las especies, con una amplia variedad y a precios accesibles, así como también ofreciendo un servicio de asistencia técnica.

En la parafinanciera la cual es una entidad dispersora, trabaja con recursos de Financiera Nacional y FIRA, con la finalidad de otorgar financiamiento oportuno, suficiente, a tasas preferenciales a nuestros socios para cualquier actividad agropecuaria que se desarrolle en el medio rural.

Proporcionamos seguros que permitan avalar los créditos que cualquier casa crediticia otorgue tanto agrícolas como ganaderos, proteger el patrimonio de los agremiados y protección contra desastres naturales catastróficos. 

El área del centro de transferencia genética, cuenta con un solo módulo de sementales instalados, para ofrecer semen porcino de calidad, tiene una tasa de remplazo anual del 50 %, el proceso tiene estrictas medidas de bioseguridad.

Contamos con un laboratorio donde se realizan análisis clínicos, necropsias, histopatología, estudios citológicos, bacteriología, serología y virología. Para cerdos y también se realizan estudios clínicos para rumiantes.

En el área de Carne Unión ofrece cortes de carne de cerdo al alto vacío y estaremos investigando y desarrollando nuevos productos que alimenten mejor a los mexicanos.

Cultmare est une entreprise algérienne spécialisée dans l’élevage des moules et des huîtres implantée en bord de mer, à Kouali 3, à 6 km à l’Est de Tipaza.
Pour l’implantation de notre ferme d’élevage, Cultmare dispose d’un terre-plein de 2000 m²  et d’une concession maritime de 36 hectares dans laquelle sont installées, en sub-surface, 20 filières conchylicoles de 300 mètres chacune.
Nos moules et nos huîtres sont naturelles, élevées en mer ouverte dans une eau régulièrement contrôlée, sans aliments ajoutés ni produit chimique. Elles sont ensuite clarifiées en bassin dans le bâtiment de production dont dispose Cultmare sur son terreplein, puis conditionnées avant d’être commercialisés.
Nos moules et nos huîtres se nourrissent exclusivement de phytoplancton marin naturel.

Description:
At NN Hedges, we specialize in the sale of premium hedge plants and cater to businesses across Europe. Our offering encompasses a wide range of hedge species and varieties, thoughtfully selected to meet the diverse needs of our clients.

Our customer-centric approach means that we focus on our clients' requirements, providing flexible solutions for both small and large businesses. At NN Hedges, we believe in transparency and simplicity in our processes. Here's how our ordering and delivery process works:

Order: Customers can place orders with us for hedge plants, with a minimum purchase of a pallet box or pallet spot. This allows businesses to choose the quantities that best suit their needs.

Payment: Once the order is placed, customers can securely and conveniently make payments. We accept various payment methods to make the process as smooth as possible for our clients.

Pick-Up: After successful payment, the customer will receive the pick-up address for our hedge plants. The transportation of the plants to the desired location must be arranged by the customer. This approach provides flexibility and allows our customers to manage logistics according to their preferences.

At NN Hedges, quality is our top priority. We guarantee that our hedge plants are of the highest standard, carefully cultivated and healthy. Our expertise in the horticultural sector enables us to offer advice and support, helping clients select the right hedge plants for their specific projects.

Contact us today for top-quality hedge plants and reliable service in the European horticulture industry. We are here to support your green projects and provide high-quality hedge solutions.

Name: CNOG
Description:
Originalmente Confederación Nacional Ganadera, la CNOG nace en marzo de 1935 en la primer Convención Nacional durante la legislatura del Presidente Lázaro Cárdenas.  

Gracias a esta Convención se emitió la Ley de Asociaciones Ganaderas, publicada en el Diario Oficial de la Federación en mayo de 1935. En esta Ley se establece la estructura y propósito de las Asociaciones Ganaderas, así como sus funciones. Este acontecimiento propició el marco legal necesario para que en septiembre del año siguiente (1936) se constituyera la Confederación Nacional Ganadera (hoy CNOG).
Location: Mariano Escobedo 714, Colonia Anzures. Del. Miguel Hidalgo. Ciudad de México 11590 México

Our guides will take you out on a hunt of a lifetime. Guides can handle up to 3 hunters at one time on stand. Our guides will also film your hunt so you can share it with your friends. 

Hunters may use all weapons and will hunt from a variety of stands. We offer fully enclosed non elevated and elevated box blinds with heaters that can accommodate firearm or archers, as well as wheelchair handicapped. Other stands include ground blinds and ladder stands.

Guests will have a variety of meals prepared each day of the hunt. Guests will also have their own rooms to stay in at our lodge.

Name: SICampo, Salón Internacional del Campo
Description:
Impulsado por Alianza Rural, el Salón Internacional del Campo, SICampo , tiene lugar en mayo el Hipódromo de la Zarzuela, Madrid.
Además, en el marco de SICampo se celebra el CONGRESO AGROFORUM SICAMPO (mayo, en IESE Business School), con dos jornadas: 'Agua, un recurso renovable' y 'Campo y medio ambiente'.

Somos la convocatoria más representativa a nivel nacional e internacional: 
-Un encuentro de todos los actores del mundo rural, que fortalece vínculos comerciales, explora nuevas oportunidades de mercado e impulsa crecimiento, conocimiento, innovación y transformación positiva del sector rural.
-Un congreso profesional con presencia de expertos de primer nivel que generan diálogo y compromiso en retos como la gestión del agua y del medio ambiente.
-Un espacio que reúne a agricultores y ganaderos, instituciones y empresas, técnicos y profesionales, y conjuga experiencias que permitan a la sociedad una aproximación al campo, es decir, a su despensa y a sus raíces.
OBJETIVOS
1.- Convocar al sector del campo en un evento profesional, socio-educativo y lúdico, que permita dar visibilidad y fomentar el diálogo con las administraciones públicas e instituciones vinculadas al sector, poniendo el foco en los retos del campo.
2.- Establecer una nueva relación entre lo urbano y lo rural fomentando la creación de condiciones que frenen la despoblación, afiancen una economía sostenible y garanticen el acceso a la tecnología en el ámbito rural.
3.- Proporcionar una plataforma para abordar los desafíos del mundo agroempresarial y brindar oportunidades para establecer contactos con líderes del sector.
4.- Promover la conexión entre la naturaleza y la juventud y acercar la vida del medio rural disfrutando de un día de campo ambientado con gastronomía y conciertos.
5.- Promover el emprendimiento y la innovación, el desarrollo del talento, la formación profesional y la empleabilidad en medio rural.

Name: AURA AGRO
Description:
Somos uma empresa inovadora que atua em duas frentes distintas, unindo conhecimento técnico e expertise em relações humanas para transformar o agronegócio brasileiro.

AURA FERTILIZANTES: Nutrição Essencial para o Solo
Oferece soluções com a comercialização de produtos granulados para nutrição do solo, com foco em magnésio, cálcio, enxofre e boro. Nossos produtos são cuidadosamente formulados para otimizar a produtividade das lavouras, promovendo um manejo regenerativo e sustentável.

 AURA INTENTO: Potencializando Pessoas e Equipes
 Acreditamos que o sucesso do agronegócio depende do desenvolvimento das pessoas que o impulsionam. Por isso, oferecemos soluções em gestão comportamental para equipes de revendas agrícolas, suporte personalizado para lideranças e análise do componente humano das empresas.

Na Aura Agro, acreditamos que a agricultura moderna se baseia em três pilares:

1.	Inovação Sustentável: Buscamos soluções de vanguarda para otimizar a produtividade e a sustentabilidade das lavouras.
2.	Relacionamentos Duradouros: Valorizamos conexões humanas de qualidade, construindo parcerias duradouras com representantes, revendas e produtores, com base em transparência, confiança e compromisso.
3.	Lucratividade: Otimizamos o uso de insumos, reduzimos custos, aumentamos a produtividade e tornamos o agronegócio mais lucrativo.

Nossa área de atuação compreende os estados do Centro-Oeste, Sudeste e Paraná.

Junte-se a nós na jornada para um futuro agrícola mais próspero!

#AuraFertilizantes #Agronegócio #AgriculturaResponsável #NutrindoATerraValorizandoPessoas

Name: Wijntuin De Blaak
Description:
Onze wijntuin ligt in het buitengebied van Fijnaart, tussen percelen voor gangbare landbouw en - fruitteelt, achter een dijk langs de Dintel. De wijntuin bestaat uit een bescheiden wijngaard (350 druivenstruiken), een voedselbosrand, een eetbare tuin en een kleine boomgaard. 
Kenmerkend voor onze manier van werken is dat wij samenwerken met de natuur. Dat wil zeggen dat wij de energie van de zon en de natuurlijke eigenschappen en talenten van de planten en de (bodem)dieren optimaal faciliteren met als doel de gewassen te laten groeien en bloeien en voedsel te laten produceren. We laten ons hierbij vooral inspireren door de positieve effecten van regeneratieve landbouw, in het bijzonder de syntropische landbouw. Wij gebruiken geen kunstmest en geen bestrijdingsmiddelen. Sinds 2024 nemen wij deel aan een onderzoek van Wageningen University naar de effectiviteit van schimmelbestrijding met in de natuur voorkomende vijanden van de schimmels. In 2025 is hiertoe in een deel van de wijngaard een proefplot ingericht. 
Sinds maart 2020 verbouwen wij witte en rode druiven en diverse soorten fruit. De voedselbosrand is in 2021 aangeplant en bevat bekende voedselbos bomen en struiken zoals de uiensoepboom, szechuanpeper, olijfwilg, krent, honingbes. Ook staan er diverse notenbomen. In 2025 hebben wij de syntropische eetbare tuin aangelegd. Deze bestaat uit diverse kruidenplanten, bessenstruiken en fruitboompjes. Van de druiven maken wij zelf wijn, het fruit verwerken we tot verschillende producten. Doordat we in Wijntuin De Blaak samenwerken met de natuur hebben we de biodiversiteit en het natuurlijk evenwicht in het ecologisch systeem binnen de wijntuin enorm zien toenemen. Wij zien de wijntuin vooral als inspiratiebron voor ecologisch bewustzijn van onze bezoekers. De wijntuin is een plek waar je via dé natuur in contact komt met je eigen natuur, letterlijk met je handen en je voeten in de bodem en door te luisteren naar de vele zingende vogels en zoemende insecten.

Name: ERSO
Description:
ERSO is a pioneering startup at the forefront of agriculture and environmental solutions. We specialize in organic regenerative farming, agrivoltaics, agroforestry, soil regeneration, and a range of environmental services. We build regenerative biodiverse agroecosystems.

Our mission is to revolutionize the way we manage land, with the main commitment of restoring the environment. Through our innovative approaches and cutting-edge technologies, we aim to create organic regenerative farming systems that restore degraded land while producing a positive environmental impact.

Our soil regeneration services focus on rebuilding healthy soils by utilizing natural processes. By fostering soil vitality, we support nutrient cycling, water retention, and carbon sequestration, ultimately contributing to a healthier environment.

ERSO agrivoltaic solutions are innovative and disruptive because we adapt our farming techniques to the solar photovoltaic parks exactly as they are built. This approach allows to use the same land for both energy and crop production, providing multiple win-win benefits, including increased land use efficiency and higher photovoltaic energy yield.

In the realm of organic regenerative farming, we employ practices that prioritize soil health, biodiversity, and carbon sequestration. By implementing organic regenerative agriculture techniques, we restore soil fertility, enhance ecosystem climate resilience, maximize land utilization, and promote long-term sustainability.

Join us in our mission to transform agriculture and create a regenerative future. Connect with us to explore partnership opportunities, learn about our innovative solutions, and join the movement towards a more sustainable and resilient planet.

Name: American Castanea
Description:
At America Castanea, we are on a mission to bring the American chestnut tree back from the brink of functional extinction.

 For millennia, billions of chestnut trees reigned over 200 million acres of eastern woodlands until succumbing to a lethal disease known as the chestnut blight during the first half of the 20th century - an event called the greatest ecological disaster in the history of North American forests.

In many ways, the chestnut was America’s perfect tree. It has a broad, protective canopy, grows quickly, and supplies straight-grained rot-resistant lumber. Chestnut lumber was a vital part of the economy and was used for everything from cradles to coffins.

These trees also produced an annual abundant and nutritious food source - up to 6,000 nuts per tree per year. 

Recent research also suggests that American chestnuts store significantly more carbon than other hardwood species like oak or hickory.

After over thirty years of scientific achievement by a diverse coalition of scientists, land owners, and passionate volunteers, we stand ready to return a keystone species in the eastern forest ecosystem and U.S. economy. American Castanea, a public benefit corporation, is dedicated to the large-scale, responsible restoration of the American Chestnut tree.

Name: Trauffer Holzspielwaren AG
Description:
Ob mein Grossvater Alfred Trauffer sich freut, wenn er heute auf uns herunterschaut? 1938 begann er Kühe und andere Tiere in einfachen, konkreten Formen zu schnitzen, meine Grossmutter Rosa Trauffer-Michel bemalte sie. Der schönste Lohn für ihre Arbeit waren die strahlenden Kinderaugen.

Seine damals gegründete Kindertraumfabrik gibt es noch heute. Grösser, mit viel mehr Mitarbeitenden und einer viel grösseren Auswahl an Holzspielwaren. Aber, immer noch im beschaulichen Hofstetten bei Brienz, stellen wir die Tiere auf dieselbe Art und Weise her und leben dieselben Werte: handgemacht, hochwertig, nachhaltig. Die strahlenden Kinderaugen sind, was uns auch heute noch antreibt. Und Eltern, die darüber staunen, mit wie viel Fantasie ihre Kleinen stundenlang mit analogen Spielwaren glücklich und zufrieden sind.

Die Kühe sind längst Schweizer Kult. Für Kinder. Für Touristen. Für Liebhaber von Tradition.

Name: Veepro Holland
Description:
Wereldwijd wordt er aandacht gevraagd voor voedselonzekerheid. In Nederland lijkt het vanzelfsprekend. Hoe anders is dat in het buitenland. Een van de oplossingen die Nederland te bieden heeft zijn melkkoeien. De kwaliteit van onze melkkoeien staat wereldwijd hoog aangeschreven. Met de export van deze dieren, het sperma en de embryo’s wordt een belangrijke bijdrage geleverd aan het verkleinen van voedselonzekerheid. Zodat landen op termijn kunnen voorzien in hun eigen zuivel- en vleesproductie. 

Hiermee onderschrijven we de sustainable development goals van de Verenigde Naties. Door de opbouw van een goede agrarische sector in landen buiten Europa te ondersteunen, dragen we bij aan de realisatie van die doelstellingen. 

Vlees en zuivel hebben een hoge voedingswaarde en bevatten veel essentiële bouwstoffen voor het lichaam. Wanneer dit lokaal beschikbaar is, wordt de honger ter plaatse verminderd. Door de opbouw van lokale productie wordt een bijdrage geleverd aan het verminderen van armoede. En aan het levensonderhoud van boeren in deze landen. 

De bijbehorende zuivel- en vleessector zorgt voor werkgelegenheid. Door de lokale productie op een hoger niveau te brengen wordt ook een bijdrage geleverd aan het terugdringen van de ongelijkheid tussen landen, regio’s en geslacht. En tenslotte, door de lokale productie te stimuleren, levert dit uiteindelijk een kortere kringloop op. Wat weer bijdraagt aan de klimaatopgave.

Our Space: 
Nestled deep within the Western Ghats lies our first and flagship project, the Dancing Frog Habitat - a project that is as enchanting as its name. Named after the captivating Dancing Frog, known for their unique breeding behaviours, this ancient forest is a sanctuary of biodiversity. 70 acres of thriving ecosystem, supports a diverse range of species  from birds to a myriad of insects, plant and fungi life. 

Our Collective:
Accompanying the Habitat is the Dancing Frog Collective, a group of dedicated individuals who invest in the land, embracing their roles in protecting and nurturing this ecological treasure. 
The collective operates in harmony with their landscape, ensuring their presence supports and enhances the natural environment. Members are not only investors but active participants in a larger conversation narrative.

Name: Sustayn Group
Description:
Sustayn Group, together with its partners, are building Europe’s regenerative biomass infrastructure.

We develop, own, and operate industrial-scale Miscanthus plantations across the EU, delivering a stable, low-carbon feedstock for construction, packaging, energy, and advanced bio-products.

Our model combines:
- Long-term land partnerships with farmers, landowners, and communities
- Vertical integration from propagation to processing
- Trusted technology partners with decades of operational experience
- Alignment with EU frameworks (RED III, EUDR, EU Taxonomy) to ensure compliance and bankability

By scaling Miscanthus, a perennial, non-invasive grass that regenerates soils and sequesters carbon, Sustayn Group enables industries to replace fossil-based and deforestation-linked raw materials with sustainable, local alternatives.

Our mission: To create lasting value for investors, partners, and communities by making Miscanthus the backbone of Europe’s bio-based economy.

Lely también trabaja en conceptos empresariales que garanticen la neutralidad energética de las explotaciones lácteas. 

Durante muchos años Lely ha sido líder en sistemas de ordeño automatizado. La compañía tiene una sólida posición en el mercado de los productos de cosecha de forraje y más de 65 años de experiencia en el ciclo agrícola. El grupo Lely opera en más de 60 países y cuenta con unos 2000 empleados.

Name: GenTORE
Description:
GenTORE – “GENomic management Tools to Optimize Resilience and Efficiency” - is a European Union funded project within the Research and Innovation Program H2020.

GenTORE will develop innovative genome-enabled selection and management tools to empower farmers to optimize cattle resilience and efficiency (R&E) in different and changing environments. The combined research and outreach program of GenTORE will make a contribution to addressing the challenges facing farming in a changing and volatile world.

This project receives funding from the @EU_H2020 Research & Innovation Programme. Any related tweets reflect only the view of the project owner.

Name: Los Grillos Hermanos
Description:
We are an Agritech startup that produces an hyperproteic insect-based powder. A revolutionary ingredient that grants a x3 times higher intake of protein than meat/fish and a considerable reduction of the environmental impact.

Our mission is to convince people to convert part of their protein consumption into insect-based food, in order to reduce the pollution emitted by humanity's consumption of protein. At the same time, our task is to low down the price until cricket powder will be in direct competition with meat/fish, because we believe that the real size of the insect market is exponentially inversely related to the price.

We will start soon our operations in Cortona (AR), Italy, where we will rent-to-buy a farmhouse to breed massive quantities of crickets.

Vision

Temos como objetivo, ajudar a suprir a demanda crescente de alimento e energia limpa. Trabalhamos com o entendimento que o Brasil tem uma vocação natural para a produção agropecuária, e assim usamos a tecnologia como indutor do equilíbrio produção/ sustentabilidade.

Promovemos a valorização real do ativo terra e captamos ganhos recorrentes, provenientes da operação agrícola. Somos comprometidos com a transformação, para melhor, da produção de alimentos e energia renovável. 

Somos focados em garantir a construção de um futuro sustentável através das gerações, buscando sempre o desenvolvimento socioeconômico das regiões em que atuamos.

Name: CORSEAGRO COLOMBIA
Description: CORPORACIÓN SOCIAL, EDUCATIVA Y AGROEMPRESARIAL DE COLOMBIA, cuya sigla es “CORSEAGRO DE COLOMBIA” es una persona jurídica de derecho privado, de las reguladas, en lo pertinente, por los   por los artículos 633 a 652 del Código Civil Colombiano, el Decreto 1529 de 1990, el Decreto 2150 de 1995, el Decreto 427 de 1996 y demás normas concordantes. Se constituye como una entidad sin ánimo de lucro, de carácter permanente, independiente y autónomo y de utilidad común. La Corporación Social, Educativa y Agroempresarial de Colombia dirige sus principios al pleno desarrollo de todos los miembros de la comunidad, en los distintos aspectos de la vida del hombre resaltando los intelectuales, los humanos, los éticos, los morales, los sociales y todo aquello que lo vitalice para ser parte activa de la actual sociedad y pueda:  ·  Desarrollar un alto grado de servicio, donde haga uso de la responsabilidad, el respeto, la tolerancia, la solidaridad y el amor, como medio que le permitan un verdadero accionar humano. ·  Realizar actividades intra y extra clases que realcen la significación y el valorar de nuestra visión y misión teniendo en cuenta las ordenanzas, normas y leyes de nuestra Constitución, hacer de la evaluación, la planeación y la organización, prácticas permanentes que orienten un aprendizaje constructivo- activo y eficiente y hacia el desarrollo de las inteligencias múltiples. ·  Buscar constantemente el desarrollo humano y espiritual a nivel individual y colectivo, que permita una convivencia pacífica y productiva. ·  Cultivar atributos y propiedades que permitan alcanzar las dimensiones de Calidad Educativa, apoyadas en un aprendizaje por competencias laborales. ·  Impulsar una cultura de paz, tolerancia, respeto, conocimiento y reconocimiento recíproco entre personas, países, culturas, credos, clases y entidades de derecho, primando siempre el predominio de la palabra sobre cualquier forma de violencia ·   Prevenir el uso y consumo de sustancias psicoactivas

Name: AQUAGAN BIOCIDAS SL
Description:
¿Quieres mejorar la calidad del agua? ¿Te gustaría implementar sistemas de bioseguridad para proteger a tu explotación?

Plenamente conscientes de los retos a los que se enfrenta el sector agroganadero, en AQUAGAN realizamos una valoración personalizada de cada explotación para establecer protocolos individualizados y poder así recomendarte los tratamientos de agua y sistemas de dosificación, control y/o medicación más adecuados en tu caso.
También ofrecemos nuestros productos y servicios para el tratamiento de aguas de uso industrial y doméstico.

Además, en un mundo globalizado y con el concepto One Health como estrategia clave para nosotros, hemos creado BIOGAN Bioseguridad Integral para aportar soluciones globales y personalizadas en el sector ganadero, alimentario y de distribución.
Para ello, te ofrecemos un asesoramiento personalizado en base a tus necesidades en materia de bioseguridad, comenzando con la realización de un estudio previo (BIOCHECK), diseño, implantación, seguimiento y verificación de las medidas instauradas. 
Nuestro objetivo es proporcionar soluciones de bioseguridad personalizadas, efectivas, dinámicas y realistas.

Description:

The San Antonio Stock Show & Rodeo has grown to be one of the largest, most prestigious single events in the city of San Antonio, with approximately 1.3 million visitors entering the fairgrounds each year. The success of the San Antonio Stock Show & Rodeo is attributed to over 6,000 volunteers who give countless hours to the organization. With community, donor, sponsor and volunteer support, the organization has committed more than $243 million since inception. Through scholarships, grants, endowments, junior livestock auctions, calf scramble program and show premiums the event impacts over 19,000 youth in Texas annually.

Name: The Farming Buddha
Description:
Tamper-proof and Traceable from our cow to your cup, The Farming Buddha brings hormone-free, zero-antibiotic, raw milk from local farms with real-time daily test results. Milked today. Delivered today.

The Farming Buddha is an integrated digital platform where farmers list their hormone-free, free-range, non-homogenized, unpasteurized, raw milk with zero-antibiotic residue milked every morning at 4 AM. 

Farming Budhha's IoT-based blockchain technology makes the entire journey of your milk tamper-proof and traceable from cow to cup.  Daily test reports with multiple parameters are made available in real-time before the milk reaches your door each morning.  Your health is a non negotiable priority for The Farming Buddha.

Description:
Granda Team opera da 25 anni nel mercato Agrozootecnico si evolve e si trasforma ascoltando le esigenze degli allevatori per riuscire ad essere non solo fornitore di prodotti ma partner di soluzioni integrate volte alla crescita professionale e al miglioramento continuo dei risultati economici delle aziende clienti.

Granda Team contribuisce a massimizzare il valore generato dalle filiere agrozootecniche, migliorando la salute degli animali.

I professionisti GRANDA TEAM hanno, come obiettivo principale quello di creare valore nei modelli di business dei loro clienti.

Non ci occupiamo solo di fornire prodotti ma accompagniamo l’allevatore in un percorso di sviluppo professionale ed economico mettendo a sua disposizione diverse opportunità.

I professionisti Granda Team intervengono con consulenze e prodotti selezionati sulle performances produttive dell’allevamento migliorando il risultato economico del tuo agribusiness.

MERCATO DAIRY: Granda Team si inserisce nel MODELLO DI BUSINESS di una DAIRY FARM, come partner strategico, e concorre alla generazione di valore, migliorando e presidiando, attraverso i propri servizi e soluzioni, tutte le attività chiave.

MERCATO BEEF: Gli specialisti Granda Team lavorano al fianco degli allevatori, insieme a tecnici e professionisti di campo, contribuendo alla sostenibilità della filiera del bovino da carne, massimizzando performances e stato di salute degli animali.

Name: Keywater Fisheries ltd
Description:
Keywater Fisheries is a family run fish farm located in Co. Sligo between Lough Key and Lough Gara, just 5 minutes outside the town of Boyle.
We produce Perch for the table in our environmentally friendly and sustainable pond rearing systems, where good water quality is maintained by plants and algae that naturally grow on our farm.
Wild fish stocks and fresh water resources are under increasing pressure around the world from rising demand. We aim to produce our fish in the most sustainable way possible, by using less water than traditional fish farming methods. We believe that healthy fish grown in a natural environment results in the finest quality product, and our innovative split pond design allows us to do just that.

Name: Ganadería Simmental-Fleckvieh "Los Caudillos"
Description:
Somos ganaderos dedicados a la cría en pureza de Simmental Fleckvieh en la provincia de Badajoz (España). 

En nuestra ganadería se combinan experiencia y tradición con capacidad técnica adquirida en centros de investigación universitarios y estaciones experimentales de mejora y selección. Nuestro principal objetivo es obtener, a través de técnicas de reproducción asistida y cruzamientos dirigidos, animales Simmental-Fleckvieh de aptitud cárnica de alto valor genético, nacidos y criados en España.
 
Para ello, hace años que iniciamos un exhaustivo proceso de búsqueda, estudio de la descendencia y selección de sementales por toda Europa, con el objetivo de encontrar animales que transmitan los caracteres más interesantes a la hora de adaptarse a las condiciones de explotación típicas de España, respetando los elementos fundamentales que definen a la raza.

Spanvall is a global company with world-class standards due to our years of experience, expertise, aspirations, and exceptional entrepreneurship in the bedding market.

We are known for manufacturing high quality animal bedding, suitable for all types of animal husbandry and livestock, such as broilers, horses and cattle. 

Spanvall is a family-owned company of second generation, and we are proud to be specialized in broiler bedding with our well-known patented product Spanvall Broiler Bedding - a mixture of wood shavings and plant fibre.

Name: Radwa Agro
Description:
Radwa Agro is a pioneering agricultural enterprise transforming the landscapes of Saudi Arabia into thriving centers of sustainable food production. Rooted in the heart of Tayma, we are building one of the Kingdom’s most advanced integrated agri-business projects — a self-sufficient farming ecosystem that delivers fresh poultry, eggs, vegetables, and fruits to households and institutions across the nation.

Our mission is to drive food security and agricultural innovation in alignment with Saudi Vision 2030, reducing reliance on imports and contributing to a resilient, locally-driven food supply chain. Through cutting-edge technologies in closed-system poultry housing, intelligent greenhouses, water recycling, and renewable energy, we are redefining what is possible in desert agriculture.

From deep-well water extraction and modern infrastructure to smart energy and sustainable land use, every aspect of Radwa Agro is designed to serve both today’s nutritional needs and tomorrow’s environmental goals.

We are proud to partner with global agricultural leaders, local talent, and visionary thinkers to set new standards in agribusiness across the region.

Radwa Agro — Cultivating a Greener Future for Saudi Arabia.
#AgTech #Sustainability #Poultry #FoodSecurity #SaudiVision2030 #Agribusiness #DesertFarming #GreenEconomy #RadwaAgro

Description:
ORIGINE est une société qui a pour objectif de cultiver des algues marines en bassins à terre, selon un procédé innovant, contrôlé et respectueux de l’environnement.

En maitrisant tous les paramètres de culture, nous souhaitons produire des macroalgues de haute qualité, toute l’année, pour assurer un approvisionnement fiable et régulier aux acteurs du Marché.
Par une approche durable, nous répondons ainsi à une demande croissante et exponentielle de cet or bleu, tout en diminuant la pression de récolte sur le milieu naturel.

Dans les produits alimentaires, cosmétiques et en pharmacie, les algues marines sont partout ! Elles constituent l’une des ressources les plus riches, vertueuses et prometteuses afin de répondre aux besoins grandissants de nos sociétés. 
Elles peuvent également être une alternative aux cultures terrestres, ne nécessitent pas d’eau douce pour se développer, et sont de véritables puits-carbone.

Et pourtant, aujourd’hui, en France, elles sont trop peu exploitées !

Au sein d’ORIGINE, nous nous engageons donc chaque jour pour développer, optimiser et pérenniser les processus de production de nos algues, en minimisant notre empreinte écologique et en contribuant à la préservation des écosystèmes marins.

Vous souhaitez participer à un projet innovant, respectueux de l'environnement et sur un secteur en pleine croissance ?
ORIGINE vous offre l'opportunité de contribuer à un avenir durable tout en valorisant les ressources marines de manière responsable.

Name: Paicines Ranch
Description: Located in central California's San Benito County, Paicines Ranch is a historic 7,600-acre ranch that works to regenerate ecosystems by growing healthy soil, nutrient-dense food and vibrant, diverse communities. Using the practices of regenerative agriculture, the ranch team manages this diverse landscape in partnership with nature and livestock to produce 100% grass-fed-and-finished lamb and beef, and pastured pork and turkey. They also grow organic forage crops, as well as organic winegrapes in their polyculture vineyard that is designed to be managed by sheep. Over the years, the ranch has become a renowned destination for learning about regenerative agriculture through their practices, programs and educational workshops while also serving as a treasured location for weddings, retreats, and events.

Name: British Columbia Cattlemen's Association
Description: The British Columbia Cattlemen's Association (BCCA) has been the official voice of cattle ranchers throughout British Columbia since 1929. For more than 80 years, the Association - whose membership is close to 1,200 ranchers - has represented the interests of beef cattle producers in the province of BC. BCCA is proud to work on behalf of approximately 72% of the provincial cattle herd.

Name: The Ocean Ranch
Description:
The Ocean Ranch integrates regenerative aquaculture, agroforestry, and ecological water treatment producing seafood, fishmeal, and forest products with significant social and environmental impact. 

By reforesting land, repurposing for aquaculture and agroforestry, and utilizing native species we create a circular economy recycling ammonia pollution to regenerative products while improving water quality in the waterways and restoring biodiversity. This circular economy creates an integrated agriculture solution that is 80 times more profitable than destructive extensive livestock and mono-crop agriculture common in the region. Personnel who manage operations serve as protectors and stewards of the forest. 

Regenerative fishmeal provides for zero FIFO (fish-in to fish-out) aquaculture production allowing for the continued expansion of the aquaculture industry without additional stress on wild fisheries.

Founded on the principles of circular economy and 0 FIFO, we are the first regenerative aquaculture technology to utilize ecological water treatment and native Amazon species to produce shrimp and fish with positive social and environmental impact. The integration of aquaculture, agroforestry, and ecological water treatment produces significant yields of low-cost and nutritious products at global scale.

Name: Kuikenbroederij en Pluimveebedrijf "Het Anker"
Description:
Wij leveren graag kuikens en jonge hennen aan u. Maar daar houdt het niet mee op. We begeleiden u in het traject zoveel mogelijk, om het maximale rendement te halen. We willen in onze communicatie transparant zijn en in ons handelen betrouwbaar.

'Het Anker' bv is een familiebedrijf waar de arbeidsinzet hoog is. De structuur van het bedrijf is eenvoudig en er op gericht de klanten zo goed mogelijk van dienst te zijn.

Isa Brown, Bovans Brown en Dekalb White

Onze huismerken zijn Isa Brown, Bovans Brown en Dekalb wit. In 'Isacom', ons dochterbedrijf, houden wij de ouderdieren van deze rassen.

De Isa Brown blinkt uit in de productie van veel courante eieren, lage uitval en de perfecte bevedering. Deze efficiënte hen is geschikt voor scharrel-, volière-, vrije uitloop- en kooisystemen. De ISA Brown kan zich gemakkelijk aanpassen aan verschillende productieomstandigheden.

De Bovans Brown is een topper op de markt van bruine eieren. Deze hen past zich gemakkelijk aan: u kunt het merk houden in scharrel-, volière-, en vrije uitloopsystemen. De uitstekende voederconversie van de Bovans Brown is de beste die de legpluimveemarkt kent.

De Dekalb White legt mooie en opvallend sterke eieren. Gunstig voor uw rendement zijn de hoge kilogramproductie en de uitstekende voederconversie. Deze rustige hen voelt zich thuis in kooi-, scharrel- en volièresystemen.

Naast deze kippen leveren we ook andere rassen.

Description:
Feed-a-Gene aims to better adapt different components of monogastric livestock production systems (i.e., pigs, poultry and rabbits) to improve the overall efficiency and to reduce the environmental impact.

The Feed-a-Gene Project has received funding from the European Union’s H2020 Programme under grant agreement no 633531. This publication reflects the views only of the author, and the European Union cannot be held responsible for any use which maybe made of the information contained therein |

Name: Tangshan Finely Animal Care Co.,Ltd
Description:
Finely Animal Care Co., Ltd - это группа компаний, которая объединяет ферментные технологии, корма для животных и имущества, связанные со здоровьем животных.
  Наша компания создано в 1995 году,Создаваемая ранее  занимается научно исследовательской и производством кормовых ,пищевых и текстильных ферментов. Наш первый ферментный завод находится в Нинся. Через разванитя 20 лет,Мы расширили наш бизнес с добавлением кормовых добавок в отрасли животноводства и ветеринарии, а также создали фабрику в провинции Шаньдун, которая занимается производством продуктов для здоровья животных.В настоящее время у нас есть две национальные стандартные лаборатории, одна для разработки новых продуктов, а другая для контроля качества.
  Персонал насчитывает более чем 2300 сотрудников,которые занимается разработкой,производством и продажей.Штаб-квартира находится в провинции Хэбей.В россии,Австрарии и Бангладеше создано филиал,позволяет лучше и вовремя предлагать услуги нашим клиентам
Многолетний опыт работы дал нам уверенность в предоставлении высококачественной продукции и услуг всем нашим клиентам.
Приглашаем Вас к сотрудничеству! и надеемся, что наше сотрудничество послужит способом для извлечения максимальной пользы.

Name: Agricultura Pecuária e Comércio Palmares
Description:
Há quase três décadas, a Agricultura Palmares começou sua jornada sob a liderança visionária de João Guedes Pereira (in memorian). Hoje, honramos seu legado ao manter nosso compromisso com a excelência e a sustentabilidade no setor agrícola.
Nosso principal foco está no cultivo de cana-de-açúcar, soja e na criação de gado para corte. Essas atividades não apenas nos permitem oferecer produtos de alta qualidade, mas também contribuem para o desenvolvimento econômico e social das regiões onde operamos.
Além disso, temos o orgulho de possuir certificações reconhecidas, incluindo o TOP CANA, BONSUCRO e Elos-Raízen nível 4, que atestam nosso compromisso com práticas sustentáveis em toda a nossa cadeia de produção. Também somos certificados pelo SISBOV, demonstrando nosso comprometimento com a qualidade e a rastreabilidade em nossa produção de gado.
Com sede em Matão e filiais estrategicamente localizadas em Riolândia/SP, Orindiúva/SP, Paulo de Faria/SP e Palestina/SP, estamos comprometidos em atender às demandas do mercado de forma eficiente e sustentável.
Na Agricultura Palmares, unimos tradição e inovação para garantir um futuro próspero para nossa empresa, nossos colaboradores e as comunidades que servimos. Junte-se a nós nessa jornada rumo a um mundo agrícola mais resiliente e responsável!

Name: Grupo INATEGA
Description:
