Implantados en España, atendemos al mercado nacional e internacional con fuerte presencia en Portugal, Francia, y Partners consolidados en Europa y USA.

Trabajamos en cada campo con los mejores técnicos especialistas y la experiencia que nos caracteriza bajo las marcas de Inatega, Cuhigen, Inagenetics y Genex

Name: Huevos Velasco
Description:
Somos una empresa familiar fundada en el año 1963, que se dedica a la producción de huevos, garantizando el bienestar animal de nuestras aves y contribuyendo al medio ambiente. Controlamos todo el proceso productivo, gracias a nuestros criaderos, podemos tener el control total sobre nuestras aves de puesta desde su primer día de vida, además, poseemos nuestra propia fábrica de pienso, lo que nos permite la elaboración de alimentos diferentes según las necesidades de nuestras aves. Por último, gracias a nuestro centro de clasificación y nuestra flota de transportes, somos capaces de controlar todo el proceso productivo desde que el huevo es puesto en nuestras instalaciones hasta que llega al almacén final, permitiéndonos tener una trazabilidad constante del producto. Contamos con una amplia variedad de producto: huevo campero, suelo, ecológico, codorniz y ovoproductos.
Además, colaboramos con tres bancos de alimentos de la Fundación Padre Ángel y con la ONG Colectivo Azálvaro que se dedica a la alimentación de aves carroñeras.

Name: Eriş Yem
Description:
1991 yılında 30/ton saat kapasiteli olarak kurulan fabrikamız, sürekli kendini yenileyerek 50/ton saat kapasiteye  çıkmış  ve 2008 yılında  expander teknolojisine  kavuşmuştur.
Sizlere daima en doğrusunu sunmak amacında olan firmamız, teknolojik gelişmeleri sürekli yakından takip etmektedir. Sorunlarınızı daha iyi anlayabilmek için 2002 yılında faaliyete geçen büyükbaş Çiftliğimize ilaveten, küçükbaş Ar-Ge Çiftliğimiz de 2011 yılında faaliyete geçmiştir. Müşterilerimize her zaman daha iyi hizmet sunmak amacı ile 100 ton /saat kapasiteli yeni bir tesis inşaatını başlatmış bulunmaktayız.
Bu tesisin 2014 yılında faaliyete geçmesi planlanmaktadır. Bu vesile ile aynı yerde 150 ton /saat kapasiteye ulaşılması beklenmektedir. Sizlere en uygun, en kaliteli, en karlı, en bereketli ürünleri sunmak temel amacımızdır.

Description:

Sabemos que o agronegócio, assim como qualquer empresa requer planejamento, estrutura adequada e excelência operacional. Temos ciência que não é fácil gerir o seu negócio e cuidar de toda a burocracia dentro da atividade rural. Por isso, ter ao seu lado um parceiro de credibilidade, que te auxilie na busca de estratégias afim de alavancar os resultados dentro da atividade com melhor custo-benefício para que o produtor e empresário rural foque no que é mais importante, que é PRODUZIR ALIMENTOS!

Somos credenciados nos principais bancos e instituições financeiras que operam com o crédito rural, sendo eles o Banco do Brasil, Banco do Nordeste, Caixa Econômica Federal, SICOOB, SICREDI, BANESTES.

WP - Projetando Sonhos, colhendo resultados.

Name: EMPA
Description:
The European Mollusc Producers Association (E.M.P.A.) brings together national or regional associations and bodies representing mollusc producers within the European Union, through a production of over 500 milions tons and worth 1170 million euros, and more than 50% of the European aquaculture production.  

With members from six European Countries, - Spain, France, the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, Italy and Ireland - the E.M.P.A.
plays a crucial role in the European shellfish industry, representing 90% of the companies or operators involved in the production and marketing of shellfish in Europe. 

The EMPA is a member of the Aquaculture Advisory Council (AAC) and the Market Advisory Council (MAC).
The Association is currently chaired by Mr Addy Risseeuw from the Netherland Producers Association.

Name: PRODECA -Programa Desarrollo & Capacitación-
Description:
Somos una empresa ligada al rubro agrícola, especializada en brindar asesoría y capacitación tanto a grandes, medianos como a pequeños agricultores, que deseen lograr y mantener una óptima producción y calidad de leche. Nuestro trabajo se enfoca en asegurarnos de entregar a las vacas condiciones óptimas de bienestar y salud desde terneras para que desarrollen su máximo potencial productivo en la sala de ordeño, fortalecido a través de medidas preventivas en los manejos.

Desde 2001 venimos prestando asesoría veterinaria a más de 300 agricultores desde la Región de la Araucanía a la Región de los Lagos, que avalan nuestra seriedad, profesionalismo y buenos resultados obtenidos.

Manejamos información en diferentes idiomas, que nos ayuda a mantenernos al día con las últimas investigaciones desarrolladas internacionalmente.

Name: GreenKër-AgriStart
Description: Au Sénégal, l’élevage en tant qu’activité de production est caractérisé par la coexistence entre un système pastoral localisé au Nord-est du pays, un système agro-pastoral dans la zone centre et sud, et un système intensif essentiellement urbain et périurbain. Chacun de ces systèmes dispose d’énormes potentialités, qui peut être profitable à d’autres zones agroécologiques, d. C’est dans ce contexte que le site ghtech.org a été mise en place. Ce site d'e-commerce dédié aux produits d’élevage permet de mettre en relation les zones de consommation et les zones de production. Un client qui est à Dakar peut désormais commander le lait de Dahara, de même qu’un client de Salémata peut commander des poulets de Dakar. À long terme, d'autres technologie seront mises en place pour les éleveurs notamment l’usage de puce RFID pour l’identification du cheptel et de drone pour le suivi du cheptel. En plus de cela Gaïnako High Tech fournit un service de consultance, pour installer ou moderniser sa ferme le promoteur peut se rapprocher de notre équipe constituée d’ingénieurs agronomes. De la conception à l’exécution nous les accompagnerons dans la mise en place de leurs activités : production laitière, bergerie moderne, embouche ovine et bovine, aviculture, apiculture, aquaculture, etc.

Name: Bee Responsible
Description:
Bee Responsible est l'association d'apiculture de NEOMA Business School, à Rouen, créée en 2014.
Ses membres, au nombre de 22, entretiennent les 15 ruches situées dans la forêt du campus, récoltent le miel et le vendent aux étudiants. Ils assistent régulièrement à des cours d'apiculture, et bénéficient d'une relation privilégiée avec les apiculteurs locaux. Leur but est aussi de sensibiliser les étudiants autour de l'importance du rôle des abeilles dans l'écosystème. 

Chaque année, Bee Responsible participe au Challenge Ecricome, 3e événement sportif étudiant de France : l'association distribue le miel aux étudiants, dans le but d'adoucir la gorge des sportifs et supporters aguerris, et dispose d'un stand où elle présente ses productions.

Name: Junges Netzwerk Forst
Description:
Das Junge Netzwerk Forst (JNF) versteht sich als Treffpunkt der Forstnachwuchskräfte in Deutschland und ist die Nachwuchsorganisation des Deutschen Forstvereins e.V.

„Junge Themen“ sollen diskutiert und Impulse gegeben werden. Die nachwachsende Förstergeneration soll vernetzt, zusammengebracht und miteinander bekannt gemacht werden.

Das Netzwerk steht für eine ehrliche und offene Diskussionskultur innerhalb und außerhalb des Forstvereins und ist Plattform für den Zukunftsdialog der Forstbranche. Politisch unabhängig, besitzartenübergreifend und über Landesgrenzen hinweg widmet sich das JNF forstfachlichen, branchentypischen und karriereorientierten Themen.

Mitglieder und Interessierte werden aufgefordert, sich mit Ideen und Tatkraft einzubringen und die Weiterentwicklung durch einen kontinuierlichen, kritischen aber konstruktiven Dialog zu sichern – ganz im Sinne der nachwachsenden Forstgeneration. 

Junges Netzwerk Forst - "Weil der Wald Nachwuchs braucht!"

The Palm Cattle Company was founded on an Old Florida Cattle Ranch in the big bend region of Florida by a family who believes that beef is more than just protein on your plate— it’s a story of hard work and a community of wonderful people. 
 
Behind every perfect bite is a proud team of ranchers, farmers, delivery drivers, butchers, chefs, and administrators on a mission to feed America with only the best! 
 
Our standards of excellence are accomplished by stewarding the land and cattle in balance with nature and our community. Bold American ranch-raised flavor is what you can expect from our beef that’s born, raised, and harvested in the U.S.A. by grateful people that love what they do! From the entire team at The Palm Cattle Company, we want to say thank you for choosing American Beef!

Name: Bear Hug Cattle Company
Description:
Bear Hug Cattle Company (BHCC) is a 501(c)3 non-profit that provides veterans with the resources and knowledge to be successful in the ranching industry. Transitioning service members complete a 10-week intensive course headquartered in Bozeman, Montana. 

The overarching goal is to help veterans break into the ranching industry after their military service. Veterans and ranchers alike are selfless, values-driven, leadership-focused, hardworking, outdoor oriented, and mission centered. Military service members, cowboys, and ranchers get up early, work long hours in tough environments, and function as part of a team.

Upon the completion of the program, BHCC provides veterans with opportunities to "interview" through on-the-job training at ranches all over the U.S. We believe that the cowboy lifestyle and team environment will help excite Soldier's integration into civilian life, and provide newfound passion and purpose.

Name: OLIVE OIL AL ANDALUS PREMIUM ARTISANAL ORGANIC  GOURMET NO. 1 IN THE WORLD
Description:
AL ANDALUS PREMIUM OLIVE OIL Contacto CEO: +34646884510 WhatsApp

**Al-Andalus Premium Olive Oil The Essence of Andalusian Tradition**

Immerse yourself in the rich heritage of Al-Andalus with our Premium Olive Oil, a liquid gem that encapsulates centuries of olive-growing tradition and excellence from the Andalusian region. This oil is not just a condiment; it is a sensory experience that celebrates the intimate connection between the land and the olive tree, offering unparalleled quality in every drop.

**Unmatched Origin and Quality**

Sourced from the fertile valleys and sunny hills of Andalusia, our olive oil is extracted from the finest hand-picked olives at their peak ripeness. Grown in a privileged natural environment, these olives are the result of sustainable and environmentally friendly agricultural practices, ensuring a pure and highest-quality final product.

**Production Process**

Al-Andalus Premium Olive Oil is crafted through a cold extraction process, preserving all the flavors, aromas, and nutritional properties of the fruit. This artisanal and meticulous method ensures that each bottle contains extra virgin olive oil from the first press, with low acidity and a superior organoleptic profile.

**Organoleptic Characteristics**

Our oil is distinguished by its golden color with green reflections, a sign of its freshness and purity. On the nose, it unveils an intense fruity aroma with notes of freshly cut grass, tomato, and almond. On the palate, it exhibits a perfect balance between bitterness and spiciness, with a persistent and pleasant aftertaste that evokes the essence of the Andalusian landscape.

**Culinary Versatility**

Al-Andalus Premium Olive Oil is a versatile ally in the kitchen. Ideal for dressing salads, marinating meats and fish, and enhancing the flavor of both traditional and contemporary dishes. Its sensory richness makes it the perfect ingredient for chefs and gourmet enthusiasts, elevating every recipe to a gourmet experience.

Name: AIDA, Asociación Interprofesional para el Desarrollo Agrario
Description:
La Asociación Interprofesional para el Desarrollo Agrario (AIDA) es una asociación sin ánimo de lucro, abierta a todos los profesionales del sector técnico, social y económico agrario. La Asociación no persigue fines lucrativos ni políticos, sino de interés social y técnico en el campo agrario.

La Asociación se creó el 5 de octubre de 1967, aunque no es hasta 1973 cuando adopta el nombre de Asociación Interprofesional para el Desarrollo Agrario. En su origen era la Asociación de Técnicos Diplomados por el Centro de Investigación y Desarrollo Agrario del Ebro (CIDADE). Nace con la finalidad de crear un medio para facilitar la difusión y el intercambio de conocimientos, para dar ayuda profesional entre los asociados, así como contribuir al avance científico y técnico del sector agrario.

En la actualidad se mantienen estos fines, consiguiendo esta difusión a través de la organización periódica de Jornadas, Jornadas sobre Producción Animal los años impares y Jornadas sobre Producción Vegetal los años pares, donde se presentan comunicaciones y los profesionales comparten sus conocimientos e inquietudes.

AIDA edita la revista ITEA-Información Técnica Económica Agraria, que aparece indexada en las bases de datos de revistas científicas más importantes (SCI Expanded, Journal Citation Reports/Science Editions, ICYT, CABI y Scopus) y que en la actualidad se encuentra accesible en open-access.

En la actualidad la Asociación cuenta con unos 300 socios

Name: ANW Deutschland
Description:
Die ANW ist ein Zusammenschluss von Waldbesitzern, Forstleuten, Wissenschaftlern und Waldinteressierten. Schon seit 1950 verfolgen wir das Ziel eines möglichst stabilen Ökosystems Wald mit seinen Lebensgemeinschaften. Die vom Menschen beeinflussbaren Belastungen dieses Ökosystems sollen so weit wie möglich begrenzt werden, damit die Leistungen von stabilem Wald nachhaltig für Eigentum und Gesellschaft bereitgestellt werden können.
Der von uns angestrebte strukturreiche und gemischte „Dauerwald“ erfüllt diese Anforderungen optimal. Hierzu bedarf es einer stetigen strukturfördernden bzw. erhaltenden Bewirtschaftung.
Wir wollen einerseits mit seinem Produkt „Holz“ Geld verdienen, gleichzeitig aber im Einklang mit einer intakten Naturausstattung andere, ggf. zu honorierende gesellschaftliche Ansprüche wie z.B. sauberes Trinkwasser oder gesundheitsfördernden Erholungsraum befriedigen.

Name: Consorcio de Exportadores de Carnes Argentinas (ABC)
Description:
Entidad sin fines de lucro que fue creada a finales del año 2002 como respuesta a las necesidades de la industria de las carnes bovinas, teniendo como objetivos:

- Promover la prosperidad del complejo agroindustrial de las carnes bovinas mediante el máximo agregado de valor a la carne argentina contribuyendo, de esa forma, al desarrollo económico y productivo de la Nación.

- Conservar las ventajas comparativas conferidas por un rodeo de más de 50 millones de cabezas, criado en condiciones naturales,  preservar el medioambiente  y el bienestar animal.

- Vigilar el cumplimiento  de los estándares más exigentes en materia de sanidad  e inocuidad, aspectos centrales para  ofrecer un producto único a nivel mundial: el bife argentino.

El Consorcio de Exportadores de Carnes Argentinas, conjuntamente con otras entidades de la cadena de las carnes bovinas,  interviene en el diseño y desarrollo de estrategias dirigidas a mejorar la competitividad, condición necesaria para expandir las exportaciones y alcanzar metas de crecimiento sostenido de la cadena de valor.

Name: Hade Dinamis Sejahtera
Description:
PT. Hade Dinamis Sejahtera traces its roots back to 1947, when Oen Boen Liong founded a cattle and horse trading business in Melolo, East Sumba, Indonesia. In 1963, his son Eric Hartono expanded into international markets by exporting local cattle to Hong Kong. When export regulations changed in 1975 to protect the domestic supply, the company strategically shifted to focus on supplying the Jabodetabek market.

In the early 1990s, under the leadership of the third generation, Hendrik Hartono, the company was formally established as PT. Hade Dinamis Sejahtera. Hendrik introduced a major strategic pivot by importing high-quality cattle from Australia to meet growing domestic demand and ensure a consistent supply.

Today, PT. Hade Dinamis Sejahtera proudly serves customers across Indonesia, with a primary focus on the Java region. The company supplies premium cattle while upholding a strong commitment to quality, reliability, and contributing to the growth of Indonesia’s cattle industry.

Description:
PT Perkebunan Sumatera Utara (Persero) merupakan salah satu badan usaha milik daerah Provinsi Sumatera Utara, didirikan berdasarkan Peraturan Daerah Tingkat I Sumatera Utara Nomor 16 Tahun 1979 dengan bentuk badan hukum yang pertama sekali berupa Perusahaan Daerah (PD). Kemudian disempurnakan dengan Peraturan Daerah Nomor 24 tahun 1985 yang disahkan dengan Keputusan Menteri Dalam Negeri Nomor 539.22-1434 tanggal 16 Oktober 1985 dan diundangkan dalam lembaran daerah Provinsi Sumatera Utara tanggal 29 Januari 1986. Dalam rangka mengantisipasi era globalisasi (perdagangan bebas) dan turut serta membantu Pemerintah dalam menggerakkan ekonomi kerakyatan, dipandang perlu meningkatkan peran dan fungsi Perusahaan Daerah Perkebunan Sumatera Utara sehingga mampu menarik minat investor baru untuk turut serta dalam penyertaan modal. Berdasarkan pertimbangan tersebut, bentuk badan hukum perusahaan dirubah dari PD. Perkebunan Sumatera Utara menjadi PT. Perkebunan Sumatera Utara, berdasarkan Peraturan Daerah No. 4 Tahun 2004 tanggal 17 Juni 2004 tentang Perubahan Bentuk Badan Hukum Perusahaan Daerah Perkebunan menjadi Perseroan Terbatas (PT) Perkebunan Sumatera Utara dengan Akta Pendirian Perseroan Terbatas No. 98 tanggal 29 Agustus 2005 yang telah disahkan oleh Menteri Hukum dan HAM Republik Indonesia No. C-14712 HT.01.01 TH 2006 tanggal 18 Mei 2006 dan telah diumumkan dalam Berita Negara Republik Indonesia No. 63 tanggal 8 Agustus 2006, Tambahan Berita Negara No.8420/2006 tanggal 24 Juli 2006. Anggaran Dasar Perusahaan mengalami perubahan sesuai dengan UU No. 40 tahun 2007 tentang perseroan terbatas, dengan Akta Penegasan Berita Acara Rapat Umum Luar Biasa Pemegang Saham PT. Perkebunan Sumatera Utara No. 10 tanggal 26 Nopember 2008 yang dibuat dihadapan Notaris Alina Hanum, SH di Medan.

B. Maksud dan Tujuan Perusahaan
Maksud dan tujuan pendirian perusahaan seperti yang dinyatakan pada akte pendirian perusahaan adalah berusaha dalam bidang pertanian, industri dan perdagangan.

Name: LINNEOS (Andrés Pintaluba)
Description:
LINNEOS es una unidad de negocio del Grupo Andres Pintaluba S.A. Nos especializamos en el diseño, desarrollo y fabricación de productos aditivos sensoriales que ayudan a aumentar el consumo de pienso y a evitar rechazos. 
LINNEOS dispone de tres líneas de productos sensoriales para piensos: AROMAS, EDULCORANTES y PALATANTES:

APSAROM es una gama de productos aromatizantes de alta intensidad, especialmente diseñados para atraer a los animales hacia el pienso y aumentar su ingesta. Sus fórmulas poseen una excelente fluidez que proporciona una mezcla uniforme y gran persistencia del aroma en el pienso, mejorando ademas el sabor por efecto retro-nasal.

APSABOR se compone de edulcorantes de origen natural a base de glicósidos de esteviol (planta de estevia rebaudiana), autorizados en la UE como edulcorantes para piensos en animales sin limitación de edad, especie, ni dosificación.

APSAPAL es un palatante de nueva generación basado en extractos de levadura y plantas. Estos componentes otorgan al producto un intenso sabor umami. Conjuntamente con la presencia de una mezcla aromática, confiere además del característico aroma retro nasal, una mejora palatina muy significativa que también proporciona un sabor más natural al producto final.

Description:
Fondée en 2002, Géosane est une entreprise spécialisée en diététique et hygiène dans le monde de l’élevage qui intervient sur le plan national. L’objectif des experts de Géosane est d’apporter aux professionnels des solutions fiables et efficaces pour améliorer la performance et la qualité sanitaire des élevages dans le cadre du plan national Ecoantibio 2.

La distribution des produits d’hygiène et de diététique Géosane s’inscrit dans une démarche de biosécurité et de renfort des défenses naturelles avec notamment une meilleure maîtrise de l’équilibre digestif.

Spécialiste de la phytothérapie, des huiles essentielles et des plantes, Géosane crée des produits issus de la démarche Alterbiotique du groupe Cristal dont l’objectif est de diminuer l’usage des antibiotiques. Dans le cadre de cette pratique respectueuse de l’environnement, du bien-être animal et des attentes sociétales du consommateur, Géosane contribue au développement durable en agriculture.

Pour remplir cette mission, Géosane est composée, d’une équipe complète et experte qui participe à l’élaboration de nouveaux produits et de nouveaux protocoles :
– 1 responsable commercial
– 5 commerciaux,
– 3 collaborateurs back office qui œuvrent de la prise de commande client à la réalisation de documents de communication
– des consultants vétérinaires spécialistes par espèce (volailles, ruminants et porcs)

Name: Soil in Formation, PBC
Description:
At Soil In Formation (SIF), we are transforming how the world can interact with, understand and regenerate soil health. Our mission is to revitalize global soils by democratizing soil health measurement through the development of innovative SIF sensor technology and our global contextual soil health data platform. SIF sensors use electrochemical technology advanced through biomedical research for unparalleled accuracy. Unlike other solutions, our technology is highly affordable, scalable and exceptionally accurate by gold standards, making advanced soil health monitoring accessible to all.  Farmers and others will now have the data needed to drive economically sound and regenerative practices, and receive contextual total carbon (both organic and inorganic) and water retention capabilities in addition to other soil metrics for their land. SIF enables core environmental measurement for all soil health parameters - in field and in real-time, with no technician needed.

This real-time auditability provides stakeholders with precise, up-to-date information, ensuring informed decisions and transparency. By fostering healthier soils, we’re strengthening the carbon cycle and retention, increasing biodiversity, enhancing agricultural efficiency, and protecting clean water and health.

Despite soil’s vast potential, the lack of quality MRV systems has limited our understanding and utilization of this crucial resource. With SIF, you’re not just measuring soil—you’re unlocking the immense potential of the earth beneath your feet. Join us in pioneering a future where soil health drives global prosperity and ecological balance.

Name: Plattform Erneuerbare Antriebsenergie für die Land- und Forstwirtschaft (PEALF)
Description: Mit Biokraftstoffen und weiteren erneuerbaren Antriebsenergien lassen sich unmittelbar die Emissionen der Maschinen auf Acker- und Waldböden erheblich reduzieren, zugleich wird eine Unabhängigkeit der Landwirtschaft von fossilen Importen gewährt und die regionale Wertschöpfung gefördert. Aus diesen und zahlreichen weiteren Gründen setzt sich die Plattform Erneuerbare Antriebsenergie für die Land- und Forstwirtschaft dafür ein, dass der gezielte, quantitativ limitierte Einsatz von klimafreundlichen Dieselalternativen innerhalb des land- und forstwirtschaftlichen Berufsstandes, der Landmaschinenindustrie sowie in der Politik, Öffentlichkeit und Gesellschaft akzeptiert wird.

Name: 2W Livestock Equipment
Description:
2W Livestock Equipment is a locally owned company in Nanton,
Alberta, the heart of Canadian cattle country. 2W has been built
on the foundation of providing the cattle industry with high-quality
livestock handling and pro-rodeo equipment.

Having over 100+ years of family ranching history in Canada’s
western frontier, 2W understands the concerns of today’s cattle
ranchers and aims to align company values to support those of its
customers. By combining cutting-edge manufacturing practices
with a sharp product design team and more than a century of real-world
ranching experience, 2W is able to deliver high-quality cattle
handling products made to last for future generations to come.

2W Livestock Equipment began in 1988 as a small fabrication shop
dedicated to providing local Albertan ranchers with high-quality
homemade equipment and has since developed into a leading
North American livestock handling equipment manufacturer. 2W
strongly supports large local Albertan livestock community events
such as the world-famous Calgary Stampede, Canadian Finals
Rodeo, Canadian Western Agribition, AlphaBull Events, as well as
supporting important community organizations such as the Royal
Canadian Legion, Canadian Livestock Curling Association, Nanton
Local Fire Department, and many more.

Name: K&C Silviculture Ltd.
Description:
K&C Silviculture Ltd. is located in the heart of wine country in Oliver, BC.  We first began commercial forest seedling production in 1981 under the name of World Silviculture Ltd., when the B.C. Government established a policy to allow private nurseries to grow seedlings for the BC Ministry of Forests.

First year production was 5 million seedlings.  Over the last 40 years, we have increased our production volume to be in excess of 42 million trees serving clients in Western Canada and Pacific Northwest of the United States.

We have focused our attention on building and improving relationships with all of our stakeholders – clients, staff, suppliers, and our owners – while providing high quality products and services.

Name: Central Texas Young Farmers Coalition
Description:
Central Texas Young Farmers Coalition (CTYFC) has a mission to support young and beginning farmers in Central Texas through education, connection and advocacy. We are a grass-roots, volunteer-led coalition organized by active and former young farmers who volunteer their time to educate, connect, and advocate on behalf of young, beginning, and aspiring farmers in Central Texas. We envision a collaborative and diverse farming community through which young and beginning farmers make a living as a key component in agricultural production and ecological stewardship.

The biggest pillar of our work is to provide resources and advocate for the next generation of growers, producers, and land stewards in this state.


CTYFC understands the need for more workers entering the farming profession. Increasing the number of young farmers in Texas will be instrumental in increasing food security and awareness, curbing carbon emissions, and building a stronger relationship between local food and local economies. By banding together and supporting one another, we can help create a positive environment for young farmers to network, exchange ideas, and become better farmers.

“Together we can build the farm future we deserve.”

CTYFC is part of the National Young Farmers Coalition (NYFC), connecting us to a national policy voice. The National Young Farmers Coalition is a national grassroots advocacy organization working to shift power and change policy to equitably resource our new generation of working farmers. We envision a just future where farming is free of racial violence, accessible communities, oriented towards environmental well being, and concerned with health over profit.

Membership

You can become a member of the National Young Farmers Coalition any time, for as little $1/month.

Name: Turkey Berry Nepal
Description:
Message from Co-Founder & CEO - Ms.Binaya Pokhrel :
The Undiscovered Power of Turkey Berry! Turkey Berry is not just a Plant but it is Nutritional Powerhouse! 
 From a Vision to a Movement – My Journey with Turkey Berry Nepal 
Every big idea starts with a question.
For me, it was simple: “How can we introduce something truly impactful for health, farmers, and Nepal’s future?”
That question led me to Turkey Berry a plant often overlooked, yet carrying immense nutritional, medicinal, and economic value.
As the Co- Founder & CEO of Turkey Berry Nepal, I feel proud to pioneer this journey in Nepal:
 Establishing our first pilot project in Sauraha, Chitwan
 Exploring Turkey Berry’s role as a superfood for health and wellness
 Creating opportunities for farmers, entrepreneurs, and researchers
 Building a vision where Nepal becomes a global leader in Turkey Berry innovation
Turkey Berry is more than a fruit. It’s a chance to empower rural communities, promote nutrition security, and inspire the next generation.

Let us put family farming at the center to lead this transformation for this decade and beyond. Family farmers play a critical role in making agri-food systems more inclusive, sustainable, resilient, and effective. According to the FAO (2014), family farming employs 30% of the global workforce and accounts for over 80% of global food production. They also serve as custodians of biodiversity, landscapes, and cultural heritage. According to Lowder, Sánchez, and Bertini (2019), there are more than 600 million family farms in the globe today, with more than 98 percent of them occupying less than 20 hectares (HLPE, 2013).
Family farmers are among those most impacted by poverty and vulnerability, despite playing a crucial role in reforming agri-food systems to feed the globe sustainably (FAO, 2020). Family farmers, particularly small-scale food producers, women, youth, Indigenous Peoples, and ethnic minorities, are among those who face challenges.

Name: Petty Creek Mountain Ranch LLC
Description:
Petty Creek Mountain Ranch: Where Purpose Meets Passion
Just 25 minutes from Missoula Airport, Petty Creek Mountain Ranch (PCMR) spans 710 acres in western Montana. This sanctuary embodies decades of dedication, innovation, and connection to both technology and nature.

Through 41 years of effort and unwavering faith, this ranch has become the embodiment of my life's journey. It's where my core strengths—strategic thinking, responsibility, achievement, disruptive activation, and futuristic outlook—blend with my mission to advance, advise, and adventure.

My wife and I have revitalized this historic property, where century-old log cabins offer havens from the outside world's chaos. Here, curiosity roams freely among towering trees, and tranquility awaits by the fireside. This is a spiritual haven where the soul communes with the divine, and fly fishing becomes effortless poetry of the heart.

Bordering the 2-million-acre Lolo National Forest, PCMR hosts diverse wildlife including deer, turkeys, bighorn sheep, and elk. The ranch's elevation ranges from 3,400 to 5,200 feet, with several creeks enriching the land.

As a working ranch, we raise Scottish Highland cattle and produce weed-free hay. Our accommodations include:

The Ranch House: A three-bedroom log home with wood-burning fireplace and outdoor pizza oven

The Cooks Cabin: A two-bedroom haven with chef's kitchen

The Bighorn: A restored four-bedroom cabin along West Fork Creek

The Tamarack: Our newest cabin overlooking a trout pond

Activities include fly fishing on nearby rivers, shooting sports on our range, and hiking trails with wildlife observation opportunities. 

Ask about our limited Recharge Retreat slots for a unique opportunity to disconnect and rejuvenate.

PCMR represents more than a destination; it's where rhythms of nature synchronize with personal growth and genuine connections. Here, amid towering trees and meandering creeks, guests discover not just a place to stay, but a space to truly live.

Name: Subagan
Description:
Somos una empresa que propicia espacios, para que oferentes y demandantes de semovientes y toda clase de bienes transables, encuentren las mejores condiciones de mercado para la comercialización de sus productos.

Subasta de Ganado Gordo
Las subastas comerciales de ganado gordo son esenciales de la cadena de suministro de carne. Facilitan la compra y venta eficiente de ganado listo para el sacrificio.

Subastas Especiales
Las subastas especiales de ganado de alta calidad son vitales para la industria ganadera, ya que permiten a los criadores y compradores acceder a animales de alto valor genético .

Sistema MIC de Subagan
MIC es una sigla que significa Mercado Integrado de la Carne y es el nombre de nuestro servicio de información de ofertas de ganado fuera de coliseo. El servicio se soporta en un software informático llamado Sistema MIC, de uso interno y exclusivo de empleados y contratistas de Subagan, desarrollado con el objeto de organizar las necesidades de compra y venta de ganado de nuestros clientes, facilitando el proceso de encontrar las mejores ofertas disponibles al momento de la negociación, el recibo de un producto con un estándar de calidad uniforme en el punto de entrega seleccionado y el registro histórico de la información. Inicialmente solo negociamos fuera de coliseo el ganado gordo que va para sacrificio o exportación, pero en la siguiente etapa incluiremos varios tipos de ganados y especies animales. La rueda semanal de negocios inicia los lunes a las 9:00 am y finaliza los viernes a la 1:00 pm, y las entregas se pueden pactar desde el día siguiente a la negociación hasta el domingo de la semana siguiente.

Name: Institut Technique de l'Elevage (ITEL)
Description:
ITEL est un institut technique agricole (ITA) destiné aux éleveurs de Guadeloupe et de Saint-Martin. Piloté par les éleveurs-agriculteurs, il a été créé en juillet 2017 afin de répondre à des problématiques propres à ces territoires et prend la relève de l’institut IKARE qui intervenait sur les Antilles et la Guyane. 

L’élevage en Guadeloupe et à Saint Martin a en effet de nombreuses spécificités : conditions tropicales, insularité – voire double insularité -, coûts des matières premières, conditions pédoclimatiques, problématiques de pollution des sols, contexte social et historique, accès au foncier, pluriactivité…, qui en font des territoires singuliers où les techniques et recherches issues d’autres horizons ne sont pas toujours transposables à l’identique.

 ITEL a pour vocation d'être un organisme de recherche appliquée, d’appui technique, d’expérimentation, d’expertise, de formation et d’information. Il a aussi une mission opérationnelle d’adaptation au terrain et joue, à ce titre, un rôle essentiel dans la création et la diffusion du progrès technique en production animale et dans son aval.

ITEL se propose ainsi d’être l’interlocuteur des acteurs de l’élevage afin de pouvoir pérenniser et développer les productions d’élevage sur tous les territoires où il intervient.

Name: El Baqueano

La estancia se ubica en la confluencia de los arroyos “Los Baqueanos“ y “Las Minas de Callorda“ que se juntan para desembocar en el gran Rio Negro justo después de “Rincón del Bonete“ en el departamento de Durazno.
Son campos de basalto con bajos fértiles y cerros de piedra que poseen lagunas profundas y cañadas que generosamente proveen de agua de calidad para el ganado. Los montes naturales y algunos plantados proveen sombra, En este entorno El Baqueano produce toros Hereford, carneros Corriedale y caballos de raza Criolla para trabajo.

Name: Carney Wagyu Cattle Ranch
Description:
Carney Wagyu Cattle Ranch is a 2nd-generation family farm in Trumbull County, Ohio. After decades raising Angus cattle, we transitioned to breeding only 100% full-blood Wagyu – prized for its rich flavor and melt-in-your mouth texture.

Our Wagyu cows are reared in a humane and stress-free environment, where they can graze and feed whenever they want. We take our time, allowing them to mature twice as long as American cattle breeds to develop the extraordinary marbling that’s a telltale sign of real, full- blood Wagyu that used to be available only in Japan.

Our breeding and feeding programs are based on traditional methods, backed by scientific testing, to assure our Wagyu steaks and chops aren’t just an American interpretation of the original, but the authentic artisanal Wagyu beef product that has captured the world’s culinary imagination.

Name: De Goed Gevulde Boerderij
Description:
Natuurinclusieve kringloop boerderij de Goed Gevulde, waar Heimen en Inge gewassen en vee houden. Welkom op de mooiste plek van de wereld!

Ooit werd het varken in tijden van overvloed ‘gevuld’, als spaarpot. Wanneer de voorraden minder werden, richting de winter, werd er geslacht. Op het platteland én in de stad. Elke buurt had een varken dat met overgebleven producten werd gevoerd. Dat is wat de Goed Gevulde nu ook doet: voedselverspilling tegen gaan en de lokale voedselkringloop sluiten, daarmee spekken we de lokale economie. Restproducten als fruit, groente, brood en zuivel van lokale supermarkten, bakkerijen en kaasmakerijen dat niet meer geschikt is voor onze consumptie wordt nu niet zomaar weggegooid. Met deze restproducten worden onze varkens Goed Gevulde spaarvarkens. Ze krijgen maximale ruimte in onze houderijen, waar ze uitgebreid buiten kunnen wroeten. Kortom, een Goed Gevuld verhaal dus!

Name: Uwe Schmidt mmb - Milchvieh Management Beratung
Description:
Agriculture in balance

The elements of animal, human, environment, soil and plant are interrelated as a system and form a more or less stable balance. As soon as we turn one side, everything else inevitably turns with it. This is how we understand agriculture, which is why we work with you to find holistic solutions for agriculture in balance.

Consulting services and products:

We work according to the precautionary principle: our advice is based on a holistic approach and aims to prevent problems before they arise. Our largely natural products promote the vitality of animals, plants and soil and are therefore the basis for healthy food.

Animal nutrition

The mmb feeding concept is based on the evolutionary understanding of the ruminant and the current needs of the high-performance cow.

Our values

VITALITY - We promote health in people, animals, plants and soil life, in social interaction on the farm and in ourselves.

HONESTY - We stand up for our values and convictions and communicate honestly and openly with each other and with our customers.

HOLISTICITY - We take a holistic, systemic view.

CUSTOMER SATISFACTION AND QUALITY - We meet the needs of today's milk production with high-quality and partly natural products. At the same time, we can react flexibly to our customers' wishes and thus contribute to maximum customer satisfaction.

RESPECT FOR ALL LIFE - We respect and honor all life.

Name: GEAT - Grupo Especializado de Atendimento ao Trauma
Description:
QUEM SOMOS

O grupo foi fundado em 2003 por uma equipe de profissionais de saúde dedicados e qualificados, consciente das responsabilidades e desafios a superar. Desde então, vem desenvolvendo com experiência e compromisso diversos cursos na área de saúde e atendimento a emergências.

O QUE FAZEMOS

Capacitação, treinamento, atualização e consultoria em urgências e emergências, especialmente Atendimento Pré-hospitalar (APH), Trauma e Prevenção de Acidentes. O aprendizado teórico é sempre reforçado pela prática, proporcionando uma capacitação realística e assimilação dinâmica do conteúdo.

FILOSOFIA E MISSÃO

Nossa filosofia é baseada no lema "Educar para Salvar", pois acreditamos que a capacitação é a melhor arma no combate ao trauma e às emergências. Temos a missão de preparar nossos alunos para enfrentar diversas situações de ameaça à vida, através do mais qualificado e completo treinamento.

Name: Boviteq, div. Alliance Semex
Description: L'Alliance Boviteq (LAB) inc. is an embryo transfer centre located in Saint-Hyacinthe, Québec, Canada, about 50 km east of Montréal. It is a very unique enterprise highly specialized in the production of bovine embryos using both in vivo and in vitro technology. LAB is linked to The Semex Alliance and is an important part of its research and development program. Research and development (R & D) LAB has a significant involvement in research and development in order to provide state-of-the-art technologies in reproduction to our customers. This involves the investigation and application of new technologies in bovine reproduction in order to provide the cattle breeding industry with the tools needed to produce superior genetics such as sexing of embryos, freezing sexed embryos and production of embryos from in vitro fertilization of oocytes. Our scientific and professional staff work in close collaboration with government and university researchers in order to bridge the gap between basic and applied research. Besides owning and housing livestock, LAB has well equipped laboratories and competent personnel, thus providing opportunities to undertake research projects with other organizations. Services to breeders LAB offers breeders a wide variety of services such as conventional embryo collection, in vitro fertilization as well as treatment of repeat breeders. LAB is the privileged place for breeders who wish to get specialized services for their donor cows. TYPE OF SERVICES AVAILABLE ·Housing of donor females ·Collection and freezing of embryos ·Embryo sexing ·Oocyte recovery and in vitro fertilization ·Recipients on site to produce guaranteed pregnancies ·Ultrasonography to confirm early pregnancies and foetal sexing ·Treatment of repeat breeders HEALTH STATUS Our installations can provide housing of leucosis positive donors, as well as maintaining the status of leucosis free donors. Our recipient herd is free of leucosis, neospora and BVD. LAB is accredited by Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada for embryo export to the EEC and other markets. Achievements in R & D include: -First heifer born from a split embryo and first identical twin in 1990 -Numerous calves resulting from embryos produced by in vitro fertilization (IVF) -In vitro fertilisation of oocytes collected on farm and transported to LAB -Embryo sexing by molecular probe, including sexing of IVF embryos produced at LAB -Freezing of sexed embryos -Embryo culture -Ultrasound technology, including fetal sexing -Improvement of superovulatory response PRODUCTS AVAILABLE ·Frozen embryos, quality 1 and 2 ·Sexed frozen embryos ·Heifer calves, 3 to 9 months of age Contact us by phone (450-774-7949) or fax (450-774-1740) for a list of embryos or calves for sale.

Inicialmente se realizaron unas subastas en Hacienda La Primavera que “eran concentraciones de ganados y amigos en torno a una subasta”.  Luego convocaron a ganaderos e inversionistas de la región para conformar la sociedad como tal, que se creó con un total de 214 socios.  Después de su conformación, se da inicio en Chigorodó, a la construcción del coliseo de subastas en noviembre del 99, concluyéndola en abril del año 2000 e inaugurándola el 19 de mayo de ese mismo año

Name: IDAPI - Institut de défense de l'Apiculture
Description:
La sauvegarde des abeilles peut se réaliser par différents moyens:
- Derrière un ordinateur en faisant de la publicité et en sous traitant avec des apiculteurs; 
- ou alors en étant sur le terrain et en créant réellement une nouvelle ruche à chaque nouveau parrainage. 
Et là, c'est à vous de vérifier!  Comment? En rencontrant les apiculteurs qui peuvent vous montrer VOTRE ruche.
C'est simple et IDAPI l'a fait.
Venez nombreux soutenir un un combat qu'il est urgent de défendre.Si les abeilles disparaissent, les étales de votre marché seront vides! et ça c'est pour bientôt!    www.abeilles-idapi.fr

Name: SoilHealing
Description:
SoilHealing distributes a proprietary product called Ensoil Algae. It is the only living green algae, bio-stimulant on the market!! This all-organic product is a live colony of Chlorella vulgaris that is applied to the soil and can also be used in foliar feeding. Every plant, grass or tree group responds positively with Ensoil, promoting a balanced and fertile environment that supports optimal development. Regenerative growth processes using this live algae has shown substantially improved soil function, nutrient uptake, and stress adaptation. The reduced need for chemical inputs like NPK can be up to 50% on average! For as low as $9/acre, growers are experiencing reduced input costs, greater yields and higher ROI.

Good for the Soil, Good for the Soul

Name: Sindicato Rural de Pedregulho
Description:
O Sindicato Rural de Pedregulho é uma entidade sem fins lucrativos, reconhecida pelo Ministério do Trabalho e Emprego e mantida pelos produtores rurais. É filiado à FAESP (Federação da Agricultura do Estado de São Paulo), integrante da CNA (Confederação da Agricultura e Pecuária do Brasil), que reúne 27 federações, 2.300 sindicatos.

A defesa dos interesses dos produtores rurais é a razão de ser do Sindicato. Braço político do homem do campo, articula reivindicações do segmento, como melhoria da infraestrutura, ampliação do crédito, preços condizentes com os custos e investimentos, redução de impostos para a cadeia produtiva e garantias para quem se dedica a uma atividade de elevado risco e fundamental para o País.

A entidade atua na organização e valorização da classe. Viabiliza suporte através de levantamentos e estudos sobre questões de ordem econômica, social e ambiental. Representa legalmente a categoria com assessoria previdenciária, tributária, econômica e jurídica. Promove ainda cursos e treinamentos para melhoria da qualidade de vida e dos processos de produção, beneficiando a família rural e a sociedade como um todo.

Name: Omni Agro
Description:
Na Omni Agro, estamos revolucionando o agronegócio por meio da tecnologia. Nossa abordagem omnicanal conecta produtores, distribuidores e consumidores, impulsionando a eficiência e o crescimento sustentável do setor.

Acreditamos que a tecnologia é a chave para superar os desafios enfrentados no agronegócio. Por meio de soluções digitais inovadoras, estamos democratizando o acesso à informação e criando oportunidades para todos.

Com nossa plataforma centralizada, oferecemos acesso fácil a dados, inteligência de mercado e ferramentas de gestão, capacitando os agentes do agronegócio a tomar decisões estratégicas e assertivas.

Utilizamos tecnologias avançadas, como IoT, IA e análise de dados, para desenvolver soluções que aumentam a produtividade, reduzem o impacto ambiental e promovem a segurança alimentar.

Além disso, estamos comprometidos com a sustentabilidade em todas as nossas ações. Valorizamos a preservação dos recursos naturais e buscamos promover a responsabilidade social em toda a cadeia produtiva.

Na Omni Agro, acreditamos na colaboração e na construção de parcerias duradouras. Promovemos a troca de conhecimento e melhores práticas entre produtores rurais, fornecedores e revendedores, visando fortalecer o setor como um todo.

Estamos impulsionando a transformação do agronegócio e convidamos você a fazer parte dessa jornada. Junte-se a nós e descubra um universo de possibilidades para o futuro do setor. Vamos construir, juntos, um agronegócio mais eficiente, sustentável e próspero. Vem com a Omni Agro!

Los cambios  de las regiones productivas ganaderas en nuestro país y la especificación de la carne vacuna, atendiendo a las demandas locales y globales , más la aparición de  las NTIC, nuevas tecnologías de información y comunicación y su permanente desarrollo, Ej: Remates por t.v. e internet,  han llevado que los Mercados se diversifiquen y especializen.

Name: Rancho Llano Seco
Description: Rancho Llano Seco is a 6th-generation family farm with a rich history of balancing agriculture, livestock husbandry and conservation. The Rancho is one of the last intact Mexican land grant properties, a reminder of a lost era when Californian, American, Mexican, and Spanish history intersected. We responsibly raise pigs and cattle for our meat products with humane animal husbandry tactics, and grow heirloom beans and ancient grains. We raise our animals from “farrow to fork”, directing every aspect of our product supply chain from animal birth through slaughter, butchery, recipe creation, production, marketing and distribution. Our pigs are fed GMO-free vegetarian feed, 75% of which is grown on our ranch, and raised in deep-bedded hoop barns with continual access to large open air pastures with plenty of sunshine and a great view of the California Buttes. Almost 90% of our land is protected and stewarded under agricultural and conservation easements. Our products are free of antibiotics, hormones, nitrates, nitrates, GMOs, and confinement practices. We distribute to restaurants, butcher shops and grocery stores throughout California and beyond. We also sell direct to consumers via our webstore llanoseco.com and other webstores and delivery services like GoodEggs. We are loyal participants of the Chico, Ft. Mason (SF) and Sunset Mercantile (SF) Farmers Markets each week as well.

Name: Landgut Kemper & Schlomski
Description:
Nachhaltigkeit und Qualität im Einklang mit der Natur – Das Landgut Kemper & Schlomski (LGKS) liegt am Rande der Sächsischen Schweiz in unmittelbarer Nähe zu Dresden.
Seit 2004 wird die Gesamtfläche von nunmehr 110 ha, davon 66 ha Wald, nach ökologischen Grundsätzen bewirtschaftet. Zur Sicherung der Artenvielfalt in der Kulturlandschaft wurde ein Bio-topverbund von Teichlandschaften, Waldlebensräumen und Streuobstwiesen angelegt.
Als Baustein für eine enkeltaugliche Waldbewirtschaftung sind unsere 66 ha Wald PEFC-zertifiziert. In Verbindung mit dem Projekt „Ein grünes Netz für die Fledermaus“ wird durch Maßnahmen, wie die Anlage artenreicher Waldsäume, ein strukturreicher Biotopverbund entwickelt, der neben einem reichhaltigen Nahrungsangebot auch wertvolle Lebensräume für Tier- und Pflanzenarten bietet.
Die Naturschutzprojekte am LGKS werden zudem begleitet von einer themenbezogenen und praxis-orientierten Umweltbildung.

Anflug der Wildbienen – Der Bienenwald am LGKS: 2018 fiel der Startschuss für unser Bienenwald-projekt. Mit diesem Leuchtturmprojekt haben wir ein Zeichen für den Natur- und Artenschutz ge-setzt. Im Frühjahr 2020 erfolgte die Auszeichnung als offizielles Projekt der UN-Dekade Biologische Vielfalt.
Das Konzept dieser insektenfreundlichen Aufforstung wurde bereits auf Standorten außerhalb Sach-sens adaptiert und wir hoffen auf weitere Bienenwälder in ganz Deutschland.
Mit unserem Kinderbuch – “Die kleine Wildbiene Wonka – Der Abenteuerflug im Bienenwald“ wer-den Kinder für den Natur- und Artenschutz begeistert.

Anfang 2023 wurde das LGKS erneut als hervorragendes Beispiel der UN-Dekade zur Wiederherstel-lung von Ökosystemen im Ökosystem-Komplex „Wälder“ ausgezeichnet.

„Wer A(rtenvielfalt) sagt, muss auch B(ienenwald) sagen – Ein „summendes“ Waldkonzept als bun-desweites Erfolgsmodell“: Am LGKS kann jeder bereits ab 1qm einen Beitrag für die Artenvielfalt leisten.

Name: Grupo Operativo FUNTRAPA
Description:
Grupo Operativo FUNTRAPA – Fungos parasiticidas para a transición de gandeirías a réximes pastorís (Hongos parasiticidas para la transición de ganaderías a regímenes pastoriles).

Con foco en el sector ganadero, el grupo operativo FUNTRAPA busca desarrollar técnicas innovadoras de control biológico de los parásitos que afectan a los animales de pastoreo, en concreto aves ponedoras y cerdos, con especial interés en facilitar la transición a los sistemas pastoriles.
Proyecto financiado por las ayudas para la ejecución de proyectos de los grupos operativos de la Asociación Europea da Innovación (AEI), cofinanciadas con el Fondo Europeo Agrario de Desarrollo Rural (FEADER) en el marco del Programa de desenvolvemento rural (PDR) de Galicia 2014-2020. La Consellería do Medio Rural es el órgano de la Administración gallega al cual le corresponde proponer y ejecutar las directrices generales en el ámbito rural, y engloba las competencias en materia de agricultura, ganadería, desarrollo rural y ordenación comarcal, estructuras rurales, industrias agroalimentarias y forestales, montes, prevención y defensa de los incendios forestales.
Presupuesto: 180.000 €
Ayuda pública: 180.000 € 
Feader: 75%

Name: OXEN CURRAIS
Description:
A Oxen Currais vem desde março de 2003 desenvolvendo projetos para o setor pecuário através da construção de currais inteligentes.
Além de produtos de alta tecnologia, a empresa oferece treinamentos com a finalidade de capacitar e melhorar o manejo não somente nos currais anti-stress Oxen, mas também em currais tradicionais.
Outro serviço oferecido é a adequação de currais tradicionais para o manejo anti-stress com o intuito de melhorar o trabalho com os bovinos. Esta adequação diminui a quantidade de peões no manejo dentro do curral.
Além disso, outro grande objetivo da Oxen é manter parcerias com empresas especializadas no setor para uma melhor consultoria nas diferentes necessidades do campo: pesquisas de comportamento animal, desenvolvimento de novos produtos, fornecedores de matéria prima para a construção de currais anti-stress, empresas de consultoria econômica, entre outros, tornando assim um conjunto fortalecido e capacitado para atender o mercado com qualidade e precisão ao menor custo possível.
A empresa atende todo território nacional com equipes capacitadas para execução de projetos de novos currais, adequação de currais tradicionais para anti-stress e treinamentos para peões. E no Uruguai e Angola no continente Africano.

Name: Cattleman's Choice Loomix, LLC
Description:
Cattleman’s Choice Loomix, LLC is a company rich in tradition and experience.  The company can be traced back to the early 1950’s.  The staff of Cattleman’s Choice Loomix, LLC has more than 100 years of experience in the Loomix business.  The management team has nearly 40 years of combined experience managing the Loomix business.  

The primary owners of Cattleman’s Choice Loomix, LLC are all actively involved in the management and day to day operation of the company.  President Kenneth P. Munsch has been active in the management of the Loomix product line since 1978.  Vice President, Michael Troska is a ruminant nutritionist, with 20 years of Loomix experience.


Cattleman’s Choice Loomix, LLC and its sister company, Loomix West’s primary product is the Loomix liquid feed supplement.  The Loomix liquid feed supplement is recognized as a pioneer in the liquid feed supplementing business.  Liquid feed supplementation is also the fastest growing segment of the livestock feeding business.

Name: USA Clydesdale Preservation Foundation
Description:
The U.S.A Clydesdale Preservation Foundation is dedicated to the preservation of the Clydesdale Horse. We created the foundation because of their “at risk” status. Through our efforts we hope to educate the public about the breed's current plight and to contribute to the betterment of the breed. Currently the foundation has 6 Clydesdales that live in Gilbert, AZ.

 
Helping Through Education and Demonstration
 
USACPF provides an educational resource for colleges and high schools to enhance their equestrian curriculum and offers important information about the Clydesdale Horse. When invited USACPF staff will instruct using our curriculum.

Young Women’s Program provided by USACPF includes youth education about horse care, safety and offers beginner rider opportunities. Additionally, the young members learn about the Clydesdale Horse and become Youth Ambassadors for USACPF.

Educational Programs and demonstrations provided by both USACPF and the USA Clydesdale Drill Team demonstrations are available to 4-H, FFA, county fairs and other community programs to teach about the versatility and care of the Clydesdale horse, as well as participate in community parades.
Resources Available - USACPF provides resources for first time Clydesdale owners and Clydesdale breeders who are new to Arizona.  Additionally, we offer information about how to help the Clydesdale Horse adapt to their new environment.

Name: Rabbitry World
Description: Rabbitry World is a sustainable rabbit farming operation based in Suffolk Farm, Marondera, Zimbabwe, dedicated to producing premium rabbit breeds (New Zealand White, California), organic fertilizers (manure and urine), and high-quality rabbit meat. Inspired by regional success stories and driven by innovation, we combine natural feeding practices, consistent animal welfare, and modern farming techniques to support local agribusiness. Our growing enterprise also offers breeding services, training, and expert consultancy, with future plans to establish a rabbit meat abattoir, a farmer training center, and a farm-to-table restaurant with bed & breakfast facilities. At Rabbitry World, we’re raising more than rabbits — we’re building a greener, more profitable future for agriculture in Zimbabwe and beyond.

Tudo isso foi intensamente estudado e cuidadosamente elaborado em um planejamento sobre onde, quando e como as mais modernas tecnologias (equipamentos, softwares e etc.) poderiam ser utilizadas de forma que o produtor realmente obtivesse bons resultados. A partir daquele momento a equipe técnica da Agro S3  voltou todos os seus esforços na busca por compartilhar seus conhecimentos a fim de levar as melhores e mais atualizadas técnicas ao produtor.

Name: Avis 3000
Description:
În spatele oricărei fripturi gustoase de pui sau a ouălor servite la micul dejun exista o poveste.

Povestea oamenilor care și-au lăsat o bucățică de suflet, acolo, printre fermele cu pui, în frigul abatorului, în incubaţie sau în marea „bucătărie” care prepară hrana zilnică pentru zeci de milioane de pui. Chiar dacă e greu de imaginat, friptura gustoasă din farfurie şi ochiul de ou cu care vă începeți ziua, conțin un ingredient secret: sufletul avicultorului.

În momentul de față, AVIS deține două ferme de găini ouătoare crescute liber, de câte 100.000 de capete, o hală de creștere a tineretului pentru găini ouătoare, trei ferme pentru creșterea puilor de carne: Ferma 1, la Mintia, cu o capacitate maximă de 240.000 de pui, Ferma 7, la Șoimuș, cu o capacitate de 480.000 de pui, și Ferma 9, de la Bălata, tot cu 480.000 de pui. În ferma din Leșnic, cresc, în fiecare an, trei serii a câte 15.000 de găini și cocoși pentru reproducere, care produc ouă ce sunt incubate în propria stație de incubație din Leșnic. Conceptul de „complex avicol integrat” cuprinde producția de carne de pui obținută din propria linie de reproducere, abatorizarea păsărilor destinate consumului, producția de ouă, precum și fabricarea furajelor necesare creșterii păsărilor. Fabrica de furaje din Mintia produce nutrețurile pentru toate fermele firmei, iar abatorul, cu o capacitate de 30 — 35 de tone de carne pe zi, asigură desfacerea cărnii neinjectate — proaspete, refrigerate și congelate.

Name: Golden Oaks Farm
Description:
Just 50 miles outside of Chicago in the village of Wauconda, IL up the picturesque tree-line driveway is Golden Oaks Farm. Golden Oaks Farm was founded by the Crown family of Chicago, IL in 1948, the passion for dairy is lustrous as John Crown's love for Holsteins. John would spend his time at the farm fueling his passion and laying the building blocks to achieve an over 70-year reputation for outstanding Holsteins in an urban location. 

Today, the Crown family relies on a team of 16  dedicated full-time and several part-time employees to make Golden Oaks Farm successful both in the Dairy and Genetic markets.  Our team is driven by the mission statement: To efficiently and profitably produce quality dairy product and superior cattle genetics while maintaining the integrity of agriculture in a suburban setting.

Golden Oaks Farm is known for breeding sound, well-balanced cows that have the combination of dairyness and strength needed to be highly productive while creating bloodlines with a strong maternal and paternal side to breed in the future. Our herd consists of roughly 720 milking females and 680 young stock, with about 99% of these animals registered. We aim to produce 19,000,000 pounds of milk every year with solid components.   We classify several times each year and currently have 45 Excellent and 200 Very Good cows.

Most of our 1,600 crop acres are planted each spring and harvested by custom harvesters in the fall. Alfalfa haylage, dry hay, corn silage, high moisture corn and oatlage are produced on the farm to feed the cows. Winter wheat is also grown to provide both straw for both feed and bedding.  Additional dry hay, straw, corn gluten feed and a protein-mineral mix are purchased to fill out the ration.

Name: Holistic Management Canada
Description:
Land managers are facing growing uncertainty from increasingly unpredictable weather patterns, unstable financial conditions, and rising societal pressures. Across Canada, in all ecoregions, farmers and ranchers are facing the same challenge. We have been living through relatively stable conditions and have gotten by with a recipe-type approach to land management. If I do this, I can expect this. In this new uncertain world, this approach no longer serves us. We need an approach to management that helps land managers predict changes, diagnose problems, and design solutions in contextually-appropriate, adaptive and timely ways that benefit the farm, ecology, economy and society. 

Holistic Management Canada offers courses, mentorship and peer networks to empower farmers to regenerate land and communities. Do you know if your management is resulting in land regeneration? One exciting program we offer is Ecological Outcome Verification. EOV is a powerful management tool for land managers to know whether the land is degenerating, stable or regenerating. Contact us for more info.

Name: BARNES PRCA RODEO
Description:
Established in 1950, Barnes PRCA Rodeo from Peterson, Iowa continues to be a premier livestock contracting company and member of the Professional Rodeo Cowboy Association.  Marty Barnes, the eldest son of the late Bob and Donita Barnes, manages all aspects of the livestock,  rodeo production and breeding program.   

The Rafter B Bar brand is synonymous with Barnes PRCA Rodeo and quality rodeo productions.  Barnes PRCA Rodeo is in a elite class of being one of only two firms across North America selected to provide livestock for every National Finals Rodeo, since its inception in 1959.  The athletic talent of the bucking horses, bulls and saddle horses are award winning.  During the 2015 Wrangler National Finals Rodeo,  Red Horse Crossin disqualified her riders and was judged the best horse of the performances in round 3 and round 8.  Notably CAT Power was selected nine consecutive times from 2005-2013 to the WNFR.  In 1977 Crystal Springs was named the PRCA Saddle Bronc Horse of the Year.  The foundation sire Boy Ballou continues to influence the breeding program today.  He made five trips to the National Finals Rodeo.  The Rafter B Bar brand has been represented the past 40 years at every RAM Great Lakes Circuit Finals Rodeo. 

Today the second and third generations of Barnes family handle the day-to-day operations on the ranch and provide for the health and welfare of 165 bucking horses and 70 bulls.  The longevity of Barnes PRCA Rodeo is captured in the marketplace across the Midwest where community celebrations dating back 40, 50 and 60 years are continuous partners.
  
Sixty-six years ago, Barnes PRCA Rodeo was founded with the guiding principles of integrity and hard work.  Bob Barnes was known as "the Colonel"," and today is still one of the most respected stockman in professional rodeo.  He was selected as the 1984 PRCA Stock Contractor of the Year and inducted into the ProRodeo Hall of Fame in 1994.

Name: KIVANÇ TARIM & DANIŞMANLIK
Description:
Kıvanç Agricultural Consultancy: The Fertility of the Soil, the Assurance of the Future

Established in 2020, Kıvanç Agricultural Consultancy is a pioneering company in Turkey’s agricultural sector, dedicated to sustainable farming and trade. By blending scientific methods with traditional agricultural knowledge, we aim to provide farmers with high yields, quality products, and sustainable agricultural techniques.

What Do We Do?
Through our agricultural consultancy services, we guide farmers at every stage, from planting to harvest. Our services include:

Fertilizer and pesticide prescriptions,

Climate and soil analyses,

Supply of seeds, fertilizers, and agricultural equipment,

Field inspections and one-on-one farmer support,

Training in sustainable agricultural practices.


How Do We Work?
We conduct regular visits to fields and orchards, continuously monitoring soil and plant health. By maintaining direct communication with our farmers, we address issues on-site and provide 24/7 support. Our expert team offers customized solutions for every farmer, prioritizing not only product quality but also the success and satisfaction of our clients.

Our Vision
At Kıvanç Agricultural Consultancy, our goal is to spread sustainable farming practices across Turkey, empowering our farmers economically and environmentally. We are committed to leaving a legacy of healthy soils and sustainable agriculture for future generations.

Why Choose Us?

Farmer-friendly, solution-oriented service approach

A perfect blend of scientific expertise and cultural knowledge

Guaranteed high yields and quality

A dedicated consultancy team always by your side


We are here to value our soils and grow together.

Kıvanç Agricultural Consultancy – Carrying the Power of the Soil to the Future.

Name: Herdade do Moinho Novo
Description:
A Herdade do Moinho Novo é uma exploração agrícola real, biológica, com uma área total de 60ha, constituída por Montado de Sobro e várzeas, habitadas por uma flora e fauna muito rica que sustentam uma biodiversidade única e que no seu conjunto constituem uma paisagem magnífica com uma beleza natural excecional.

Longe do turbilhão dos grandes centros urbanos , mas a escassos 35 minutos de Lisboa, a Herdade do Moinho novo possui as condições ideais para a realização de  eventos ou  atividades inseridas no meio rural, em contacto direto com a natureza optando dentro de um vasto leque de programas ao ar livre, desde o simples contacto com os animais da quinta ou o simples disfrutar do puro lazer no campo, até ao  Slide, Rappel,  Escalada, BTT, TT, Balonismo, Batismo Paraquedas, Paint Ball, Atividades Equestres, entre outras.

Realizamos e  promovemos programas  Lúdico-Pedagógicos para crianças em eventos de um dia, fim de semana ou CAMPOS DE FÉRIAS no âmbito do nosso projeto Aventuras no Campo, com atividades especificas de aprendizagem e lazer ativo, direcionadas para crianças e jovens, com uma forte componente ecológica, em convívio com a natureza o mundo rural e os animais da quinta, proporcionando experiências gratificantes numas férias diferenciadoras e criativas em ambiente saudável e emocionante.

Além destes programas, temos um hotel para cães com boxes amplas, compostas por duas zonas distintas, uma coberta e uma descoberta, e áreas verdes onde podem brincar e fazer exercício em contacto direto com a natureza. 

O nosso projecto mais recente é o de Agroturismo, consituído por 8 bungalows todas eles em perfeita harmonia com a natureza envolvente. Cada um deles com temas e decorações distintas, mas com um denominador comum: o cenário de floresta e ambiente rural. As varandas têm vista privilegiada sobre o montado, onde se avistam cavalos e vacas, e sobre a piscina exterior.

Berlokasi strategis di jantung salah satu lumbung pertanian Indonesia, perusahaan kami menempatkan diri sebagai mitra terpercaya bagi para petani, pekebun, pengembang properti, hingga pemerintah dalam upaya reboisasi dan penghijauan. Kami tidak hanya sekadar menjual produk; kami menawarkan solusi holistik yang dimulai dari bibit terbaik, didukung oleh pengetahuan dan pengalaman, demi memastikan keberhasilan setiap proyek penanaman.

Didirikan oleh para ahli dan praktisi di bidang pertanian, CV Lintas Batas Agro lahir dari pemahaman mendalam akan kebutuhan pasar domestik akan bibit yang tidak hanya tumbuh, tetapi juga produktif dan memiliki daya tahan tinggi terhadap berbagai kondisi lingkungan. Kami menyadari bahwa pondasi keberhasilan sebuah kebun atau hutan terletak pada kualitas bibitnya. Oleh karena itu, seluruh operasional kami berpusat pada satu tujuan utama: menghasilkan bibit unggul yang menjadi jembatan menuju masa depan hijau dan berkelanjutan.

Name: From The Farm
Description:
At From The Farm, we believe that our mission to create a better food system is not just a business endeavor—it is a calling from God. We are deeply committed to reshaping the food supply chain in a way that honors the farmers who grow our food and the consumers who depend on it. Our goal is to build a system where people come before profit, where the connection between the land, the producer, and the consumer is restored, and where food sovereignty is a reality for every family.

We don’t walk this path alone. As an organization, we make it a regular practice to pray for guidance, seeking divine wisdom in every decision we make. Integrity, courage, and respect for the laws of nature are core to our values, and we believe that through God’s grace, we can build a system that is both just and sustainable.

We also honor the divine roles given to men and women in this mission. Masculine men are called to protect, provide, and preside over their families, farms, and communities. We believe in the strength of men to stand as guardians of the land and stewards of its resources. Likewise, women hold the sacred role of nurturing, caring for, and guiding both their families and the natural world around them. It is through this balance of strength and nurture that true sustainability and harmony can be achieved.

From The Farm isn’t just a platform; it’s a movement rooted in faith, integrity, and a commitment to building a food system that reflects God’s design. We invite you to join us in restoring balance to our food supply, empowering family-owned farms, and creating a future where the land is respected, the producers are honored, and the consumers are connected to the source of their nourishment.

Together, we will continue to pray, act with integrity, and strive to uphold the natural laws that God has set in motion for a better world.

Name: Allevamento Ca' San Giorgio (CSG)
Description:
“Allevamento Ca’ San Giorgio” is a professional jumping horse breeding farm since 1993. The horses are registered with the affix "di Ca' San Giorgio" in Italy or "C'SG" and "CSG" in Holland and France. 
The main goal to achieve is always been breeding and selling top quality horses able to perform at the highest standard.
For this reason Ca' San Giorgio has carefully selected prestigious broodmares from the best European genetic lines. They were chosen on the basis of their model, their locomotion, their direct and maternal line sport attitude.
From the breeding cross of these broodmares with international Top Sires are born horses who earned a lot of breeding and sporting awards in jumping field: Italian Champions of Free Jumping, of 4 years oldand  7 years old; 2nd and 3rd in France in the 5 and 6-year old; European junior record in Puissance, approuved stallions in Holland, France, Italy and Poland.
Ca 'San Giorgio, thanks to his own careful selection and his prestigious results can now be considered among the best breeding farms in Europe.
Nowadays C'SG horses are presents in England, France, Italy, The Netherland, Germany, Spain, Mexico and Brasil.
Ca’ San Giorgio current aim, confident in his own production and quality, is to promote and sell quality horses who can make the difference in the global market.

Name: Buitengewone Varkens
Description:
Buitengewone Varkens – Animals with Added Value

At Buitengewone Varkens, we believe in meat with a story. We are here for everyone seeking truly good meat, with respect for animals, nature, and the food chain. Our pigs play an active role in nature management and are raised in an environment that guarantees the highest level of animal welfare.

Our Approach
Owners Cas den Boer and Josse Haarhuis, together with a dedicated team, have established a transparent and sustainable approach. Across 25 locations throughout the Netherlands, we collaborate with feed producer Nijsen to ensure our pigs are fed 100% circularly. This means our outdoor pigs forage for much of their own food, supplemented by rescued products from the human food chain. No extra farmland needed, and significantly less food waste.

Animal Welfare
Our pigs are born on small-scale farms with 35 times more space than organic pigs. The sows build their own nests and display fully natural behavior. The result? Breeds like Berkshire, Bonte Bentheimer, and Duroc, which grow slowly and produce beautifully marbled meat. Animal welfare is central, even though we don't carry an organic label due to the feed we use.

Fair Pricing
Good meat comes at a price, as we account for animal welfare and climate impact. However, we keep our prices affordable by selling directly to the hospitality industry and consumers, without using distribution centers or supermarkets. From daily meat products to charcuterie, you'll find it all at Buitengewone Varkens. We're also happy to create custom packages for you.

Name: Green Economy Partnership
Description:
State of the Green Economy with Forestry by 2050

Green Economy leads the way in developing and restoring the forestry for carbon capture and ecosystem services in the world.

The Green Economy is the first carbon elimination standard for engineered carbon removal methods in the voluntary carbon industry. We want to mobilize the world to reverse climate change by removing its carbon emissions.

As per Paris agreement offsets are not enough to achieve their goals all alone. The Oxford Principles for Net Zero Aligned Carbon Offsetting and other international initiatives are calling for companies to include Carbon Dioxide Removal (CDR) as part of their net zero strategy. We identify carbon removal suppliers from various methodologies.

We are securing the rights to the first forestry to launch a campaign to start the carbon ecosystem at a jurisdictional level.

Acreditamos na integração lavoura-pecuária-floresta e no potencial de áreas degradadas para o reflorestamento, transformando passivos ambientais em ativos econômicos.

Name: EQAsce Education & Qualification Alliance
Description:
Wir sind eine im Jahr 2015 gegründete Europäische Genossenschaft, die sich in den letzten Jahren zur ersten auf land- und forstwirtschaftliche Betriebe zentrierte Plattformgenossenschaft entwickelt hat. Die Dienstleistungen der EQA-Plattformgenossenschaft sind darauf ausgerichtet, mehr Nachhaltigkeit und Effizienz in die Landwirtschaft zu bringen. Berücksichtig werden dabei die komplexen Anforderungen von Gesellschaft und Marktpartnern bezogen auf den Wandel fast aller Betriebszweige und -formen. Hierbei unterstützen unsere maßgeschneiderten Service -Angebote  eine zukunftsorientierte Qualifikation, Personen- und System- Zertifizierung sowie die  digitale Transformation in der Branche. Dabei stellen wir die webbasierte Kommunikation und einen verbesserten Dialog sicher:

– zwischen landwirtschaftlichen Betriebe  und ihren Marktpartnern in unterschiedlichen  Wertschöpfungsketten
– zwischen landwirtschaftlichen Betrieben und ihren öffentlichen und privaten Dienstleistern und
– zwischen Praxis und Wissenschaft

Engagierte landwirtschaftliche Betriebe im EQA- Team sind der Überzeugung, dass mit unseren Serviceleistungen „Mehr mit Weniger“-  also nachhaltiges Wirtschaften möglich wird. Dies bedeutet wir wollen im genossenschaftlichen Verbund die Transformation wagen, produktiver werden  bei  gleichzeitig geringerem Ressourcen-Verbrauch . Mit einem auf die Zukunft gewandtem  integrierten Management- Systemen sollen die Voraussetzungen hierfür geschaffen werden.

Name: Forests To Fortune;  trees as tradable assets.
Description:
Anyone can now invest in tropical hardwood trees as green assets.

Las Azucenas is an expertly managed reforestation farm comprising 10,000 planted  tropical hardwood trees of high economic value. There are three types of prized hardwoods on the farm: mahogany (Swietenia macrophylla King), cedar (Cedrela odorata L.) and ciricote (Cordia dodecandra Dc.). Hardwoods in other parts of the world take 80 to 100 years to reach maturity. In the Petén region of northern Guatemala, well-cared-for hardwoods achieve maturity in an average of 18 years. The combination of ideal soil, humid climate and rainfall provides optimal conditions for trees to grow rapidly and thrive. 

Las Azucenas also bodes well for its human counterparts, generating 100 seasonal jobs per year for a period of 18 years, and maintaining a permanent core technical team charged with designing and developing the treescape and nurturing and caring for the trees full-time.  Having this core technical team onsite is critical, as high-value trees left to grow in the wild would be vulnerable to premature chopping and at risk of fires caused by human activity.

We extend a warm invitation to you to become more familiar with the Las Azucenas project and consider becoming an owner of your own prized hardwood tree. The team at Los Santos, led by Las Azucenas owner Javier García Esquivel, has effectively democratized environmental impact reforestation projects by generating a sustainable model that accounts for all project resource requirements and establishes the units required to reach equilibrium while designing it as a viable proposition for a community of investors to consider. Unlike other timber investment projects, which are accessible to only a select few, this one allows individuals to purchase as few hardwoods as they wish or can afford, even just one tree. 

Anyone can now invest in the cultivation one or more trees from anywhere in the world.   Learn more at goodalways.com

Name: Giovanni Farm
Description:
Welcome to Giovanni Farm, a verdant haven where the artistry of agriculture unfolds across fields, pastures, and orchards. Nestled in the embrace of nature, our farm stands as a testament to the seamless integration of general farming, ranching, and the cultivation of succulent fruits.

In the heart of our fields, a patchwork of crops flourishes under the sun's nurturing glow. From the organic tubers to the vibrant hues of seasonal vegetables, our commitment to sustainable and responsible farming practices is evident. At Giovanni Farm, we harmonize traditional wisdom with modern techniques, ensuring a bountiful harvest that not only sustains but enriches the land.

Venture into our ranching operations, where the well-being of our livestock is paramount. Sprawling pastures provide a natural haven for contented animals, from free-ranging poultry to the gentle graze of our grass-fed cattle. Ethical ranching practices guide us as we strive to create a symbiotic relationship between the land and its inhabitants, resulting in high-quality, humane products.

Stroll through our nascent orchard, where the air is refreshing. Giovanni Farm takes pride in cultivating two varieties of fruit trees; avocados and bananas.  Our commitment to fruit farming extends beyond mere cultivation; it's a dedication to nurturing the flavors of the land and sharing the bounty with those who appreciate the pure, natural goodness that nature provides.

At Giovanni Farm, we view agriculture as a harmonious dance, where the rhythm of the seasons guides our every step. Our integrated approach to general farming, ranching, and fruit cultivation is a celebration of the interconnectedness of these disciplines. Join us on this journey as we cultivate not just crops, livestock, and fruits, but a legacy of sustainable farming that honors the land and its abundance.
