Naszą misją jest zapewnienie wysokiej jakości, przystępnych cenowo produktów, które będą poprawiały zdrowie i dobrostan zwierząt.

Nasza firma stawia na profilaktykę i dobrostan zwierząt, dlatego wszystkie nasze produkty powstają na bazie najnowszej wiedzy i technologii. Od lat skutecznie wspieramy hodowców w polepszaniu produkcyjności i zdrowotności zwierząt gospodarskich oraz wspieraniu zdrowia zwierząt towarzyszących. 

Jakość naszych produktów, solidność i elastyczność w działaniu przekonują naszych klientów do długoterminowej współpracy z nami. Wszystko to sprawia, że nieprzerwanie rośnie zapotrzebowanie na nasze produkty zarówno w Polsce, jak i za granicą.

Nasz cel to zagwarantowanie naszym klientom wzrostu wydajności produkcji  przy znaczącej poprawie jej opłacalności.

Name: Liberty Agroecological Ventures & Innovation Park
Description:
LAVIPark es propietaria de Ea. La Juanita, un establecimiento agrícola-ganadero desarrollado sobre 3.200 Hás en el Noreste de Uruguay. El principal objetivo productivo se define como Ganadería Intensiva de Ciclo Completo. 
La meta es producir 250kg de carne/hectárea/año. 
Estamos llevando a cabo inversiones en infraestructura que nos permitirán alcanzar los niveles de productividad exigidos por el Proyecto, a saber:
a) Transferencia de Forraje: La estabilidad alimentaria del ganado debe ser garantizada para independizarnos lo mas posible de la variabilidad climática. 
Para ello cultivamos forrajes durante el verano y lo transferimos a las demás estaciones mediante silos y rollos. Utilizamos riego por pivotes sobre un área de 400Has (cuatro pivots móviles de 50 Has cada uno) donde hacemos maíz, soja, y sorgo, rotando con pasturas. Hemos construido una represa de cerca de 2 millones de m3 (1,5 millones de m3 útiles) que nos permite regar el área indicada. 
b) Bebida para el ganado: Consideramos esencial la calidad del agua de bebida que se ofrece al ganado. Para ello hemos realizado  perforaciones para encontrar y almacenar agua subterránea que acumulamos en tanques australianos y que distribuimos, mediante cañerías enterradas a 40 cm, a los bebederos que instalamos en cada potrero.
Location: Paraje Julio Maria Sanz, Treinta Y Tres

Lifeworks Global works across the areas of sustainable agriculture; climate change mitigation and adaptation; regenerative agriculture; and forests and landscape restoration. Name: ARABLE EARTH PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
ARABLE EARTH PRIVATE LIMITED is a Hyderabad-based startup committed to addressing environmental challenges such as rising CO₂ levels, greenhouse gas emissions, and soil degradation. The company is pioneering sustainable solutions through the production of Biochar, a carbon-rich material derived from bamboo using advanced pyrolysis technology. With a vision to combat climate change and promote regenerative agriculture, ARABLE EARTH is actively encouraging bamboo cultivation under a buy-back agreement and sourcing bamboo from the Telangana government.
Biochar is a climate-positive material with multiple environmental and agricultural benefits:
1.	Carbon Sequestration – Locks carbon in the soil for centuries, preventing CO₂ emissions.
2.	GHG Reduction – Lowers methane (CH₄) and nitrous oxide (N₂O) emissions.
3.	Soil Enhancement – Boosts fertility, moisture retention, and microbial activity.
4.	Waste Management – Converts agricultural waste into a valuable resource.
5.	Water Retention – Increases soil water-holding capacity, aiding drought-prone areas.
BIOCHAR PRODUCTION & INFRASTRUCTURE
The company is setting up a cutting-edge Pyrolysis unit designed to process 409 tons of bamboo per day, yielding approximately 109 tons of Biochar. This large-scale operation is expected to commence production in 2026, positioning ARABLE EARTH as a key player in India's carbon sequestration and soil enrichment initiatives

Hoewel de voeders grotendeels in Nederland worden afgenomen, heeft Tentego de laatste jaren het aandeel op de internationale markt aanzienlijk vergroot. Deze omzet toename en de continue verbetering in de productietechniek heeft tot gevolg dat er doorlopend gezocht wordt naar nieuwe technieken om de productiecapaciteit te optimaliseren en uit te breiden.

Vanwege de opkomst van het ruwvoer en de overname en uitbreiding van de Alpuro fabriek binnen de VanDrie Group, is het mengvoerprogramma een belangrijk onderdeel van het verkoopassortiment geworden. 

Bij Tentego staat het leveren van topkwaliteit en een goede samenwerking met de afnemers voorop. Naast de producten met een hoog rendement, biedt Tentego deskundig advies om te komen tot een optimaal resultaat. Door aan dit principe vast te houden wint Tentego het vertrouwen van steeds meer veehouders.

Tentego staat voor:

Constant hoge kwaliteit
Service & Advisering
Innovatie

Name: Pilgrim Farms Cattle Company
Description:
At Pilgrim Farms, we believe in raising cattle the right way – with a passion for ethical farming, sustainable practices, and a dedication to delivering premium, locally sourced beef.  

From our farm to your table, all of our beef is 100% grass-fed - providing top-notch nutrients, and high-quality flavor for you and your family to enjoy.  

We are passionate about the health of our soil and being wise stewards of what God has provided us. We raise our cows and farm with regenerative practices including rotational grazing, cover cropping, and revitalizing microbial soil health and biodiversity. 

From our lush pastures in Pennsylvania to the scenic landscapes of West Virginia, our journey is one of pride, craftsmanship, and a genuine love for providing you with the finest, farm-to-table beef experience.

La producción ganadera en nuestro país se distingue por una sólida tradición y una trayectoria reconocida a lo largo de décadas.
Hoy la ganadería se reinventa y se posiciona hacia un futuro prometedor. 

La excelencia de nuestras haciendas y la experiencia acumulada en el sector abren un abanico de posibilidades para su desarrollo y competitividad.

El propósito principal de la Expo Ganadera es crear un espacio especializado e innovador que reúna a todos los actores del sector, desde los productores tradicionales hasta las nuevas generaciones de emprendedores.

Name: Blodgett Urban Garden (BUG)
Description:
Blodgett Urban Gardens (BUG) is a 2.3- acre community garden located in the historic Third Ward – less than one mile southeast of downtown Houston, TX. Within its boundaries is Cuney Homes, a public housing development, and two of the City’s universities – Texas Southern University, an historically black university (HBCU) and the University of Houston.  

The garden’s presence in the community is the result of efforts by Texas Southern University students and residents who were concerned that the community in which they lived and studied had been designated a food desert. Since 2012, BUG has served the community through its mission – to provide access to fresh produce, to educate the community about gardening and good nutrition, and to create a safe gathering place. In 2020, BUG expanded during the height of the COVID-19 pandemic to help meet the increased food insecurity demand exacerbated by additional grocery store closures surrounding Third Ward, higher food prices, lack of transportation to healthy food options.  Currently, BUG boasts over 90 beds of fresh fruits and vegetables growing throughout a given season and offers produce during the weekly Saturday Farmer’s Market at a cost of donations only.  Through volunteers, donations and sponsors like you, BUG continues to provide access to fresh produce.

Name: Agrotechnika LLC
Description:
All products of our company are manufactured under the Agrokorm trademark. The enterprise has implemented an integrated quality and safety management system for finished feeds, concentrates, premixes and blends. The production facilities of «Agrotekhnika» LLC are certified in accordance with the requirements of international quality and safety standards ISO 9001: 2015 and ISO 22000: 2007 management system in the field of food and food safety.
For the production of quality products, the company uses grain crops grown in ecologically clean areas of the Volyn, Rivne and Lviv regions.

«Agrotekhnika» LLC produces its own protein and oil raw materials by processing soybean, rapeseed and sunflower seeds at its own factories. The company purchases amino acids, vitamins, macro- and microelements that are necessary for animals and poultry for normal life and development from leading European companies only under direct contracts.

LLC «Agrotekhnika» cares about the quality of its products, therefore, having a powerful production laboratory equipped with modern European equipment, it controls the entire technological process from the receipt of raw materials to the release of finished products.

Our company, combining world experience, European technology and modern equipment, has developed formulations of feed, concentrates, premixes and blends that allow our customers to get the best results when raising farm animals and poultry.

Hoje gerimos 15 empresas em sectores variados da economia.

Conscientes que “um Kwanza é um Kwanza”, a Diside, compromete-se junto das empresas que gere e dos seus parceiros, a tornar as mesmas exequíveis e competitivas, garantido solidez, funcionamento e contribuindo para o desenvolvimento sócio-económico de Angola.

Sempre com a missão de respeitar os princípios de desenvolvimento económico, social e ambiental, a Diside assenta o seu crescimento com visão empresarial, responsabilidade, diligência, criatividade e inovação, demarcando-se pela excelência, quer ao nível da gestão, quer dos produtos e serviços. Name: Dutch Canary
Description: We welcome you to our finca on Gran Canaria. It’s locally know as ‘La Hoyatilla’ which can be best translated to ‘The Dimple’. This name is based on the finca’s comfortable and sheltered position on our mountain. The finca is surrounded by mountains that are almost barren. Once, they were covered by extensive pine forests. Cut down by mankind to fuel the growing rum production, it created space and opportunity for extensive agriculture. But during the last decades, more and more people exchanged the countryside and farm life for opportunities in Las Palmas or on the Spanish mainland, leaving behind abandoned and degrading terraces to remember us of those days. Barren, unused, lacking biodiversity and water, the mountains deteriorate quickly. We want to do something about that and change the tide on our mountain. We want to return the mountain to a natural state where it can provide its own water and fertility. This will make it flourish once again.
Location: Gáldar, Las Palmas de Gran Canaria

Name: Florida Cow Culture Preservation Committee
Description:
The Florida Cow Culture Preservation Committee is a volunteer group of men and women brought together by our desire to preserve Florida’s Cow Culture and its Cow Hunter and Cracker Heritage.

The Florida Cow Culture Preservation Committee (FCCPC) was formed in 1993. Under the leadership of Chairman Doyle Conner, Jr, the committee planned and held The Great Florida Cattle Drive ’95 as part of Florida’s year-long celebration of the state’s 150th birthday.

Subsequent cattle drives were held in 2006 and 2016. The first Reunion Campout Ride was held in 2017 and will continue annually until the Great Florida Cattle Drive of 2022.

In addition to the cattle drives and reunion rides, the FCCPC works diligently to celebrate the unique role cattle has played in Florida’s history and educate people around the world about Florida’s rich heritage as a cattle state.

Ours is a diverse and inclusive group of folks from all different backgrounds. We come from every county in the state and represent all walks of life. Ranchers, farmers, working cowboys, educators, historians, professionals, blue-collar workers, youngsters, retirees, students, land and wildlife managers, and law enforcement – we all have a role to play in this endeavor.

With a focus on quality, sustainability, and safety, we ensure that every product—from catfish to plantain, rice, goat, and poultry—is cultivated, handled, and processed to the highest standards. Our drying techniques and farm-to-table approach enable us to deliver products that are nutritious, hygienic, and aligned with global agricultural expectations.

Our diverse product portfolio includes:

Seafood: Catfish, prawns, crab, fresh fish, and snail

Livestock: Goat, grasscutter, antelope, gazelle

Grains: Rice

Plants: Plantain

Poultry: Chicken and turkey


Operating across Ogun, Lagos, and Port Harcourt, we pride ourselves on being a reliable partner for wholesalers, retailers, manufacturers, and hospitality businesses seeking steady access to high-quality agricultural products.

At FOSS Farms and Resorts, we don’t just supply food—we cultivate wellness, ensuring every product reflects our promise: From Soil to Plate, Naturally.

Description:
A Vigomarito, nel comune di Menconico in provincia di Pavia, ha preso forma Vigo Farm, che è di fatto la casa che il nonno paterno di Laura costruì con le proprie mani nel primo dopoguerra; è facile capire quindi quanto valore hanno intrinsecamente tutti gli edifici e le terre che stiamo “recuperando” dopo anni si semi-abbandono.

Vigo Farm si trova a circa 750 metri sul livello del mare a mezza costa sotto il Monte Penice, confina con il Parco dell’Alpe, a pochi chilometri da Varzi, famosa per la produzione del salame crudo di maiale, e da Bobbio, celebre città d’arte, entrambi centri storici che portano una grande affluenza di turisti e villeggianti.

Alleviamo capi miglioratori razziali di Pecora Bergamasca Gigante in un ambiente semi-brado, tutti i nostri capi sono iscritti nel Libro Genealogico di razza.
Selezioniamo gli animali anche in veste di Gruppo di Monta per Regione Lombardia sul Piano Scrapie per il genotipo ARR/ARR resistente.

Parallelamente al lavoro di selezione ovina stiamo portando avanti un progetto inerente i cani da bestiame, Conduttori e Custodi, con i quali abbiamo intrapreso un lavoro di riproduzione e selezione per sviluppare e preservare il loro naturale istinto alla pastorizia.

Name: PT Harvest Season Indonesia
Description:
Supplying Superior Palm Kernel Expeller to Distributors and Breeders while Exceeding Sucofindo’s Rigorous Quality Standards and Precise Analysis.

Palm Kernel Expeller is a valuable side product agriculture derived from the palm kernel processing industry. Abundant in protein, fat, crude fiber, and essential minerals, it stands as a testament to nature’s ingenuity.

With its moisture content typically below 10% and ash content capped at 6%, Palm Oil Cake boasts an impressive nutritional profile. Expect a minimum of 16% crude protein, a maximum of 12% crude fat, and a maximum of 14% crude fiber. Offering a minimum of 4 kcal of Gross Energy (GE) per unit, it becomes a vital source of cellulose, protein, fat, arabinoxylan, glucuronoxylan, and various minerals.

Versatile and adaptable, Palm Kernel Expeller serves as a key feed ingredient, providing a sustainable source of protein and energy for livestock of plant origin. Its applications extend to the nourishment of dairy cows, beef cattle, goats, sheep, poultry, and even aquatic life, such as fish.

Harnessing the power of Palm Kernel Expeller unlocks a myriad of possibilities, bridging the gap between sustainable agriculture and thriving livestock industries. Experience the transformative potential of this natural marvel, nurturing livestock while promoting environmental stewardship.

Name: Mel Melosa
Description:
Somos una familia perteneciente a la aldea de Trabado, un pequeño paraíso situado en pleno corazón de la Reserva de la Biosfera de Os Ancares lucenses, en la Galicia más oriental.

Con la idea de restaurar un pequeño cortín del que disponía la familia, ya que nuestros antepasados disponían de “trobos” para producir miel de autoconsumo y los protegían del oso mediante esta estructura de piedra, y de continuar con la tradición apícola, decidimos arrancar el proyecto de Mel Melosa en 2018 con 6 colmenas.
Aunque no ha sido fácil compartir el terreno, con grandes competidores como el oso, poco a poco hemos ido creciendo hasta disponer actualmente de 160 colmenas.

Nuestro propósito no es producir grandes cantidades de miel y dedicarnos laboralmente a la apicultura, si no que nos dedicamos a ella por verdadera pasión por las abejas y la naturaleza, produciendo pequeñas cantidades de miel, pero de una excelente calidad, garantizando la máxima profesionalidad en todos los procesos y el respeto con el medioambiente, y hacer llegar el producto directamente desde la colmena al consumidor final, sin intermediarios que puedan interferir en la calidad o en el precio del producto.

Name: Miljøfluen - Biologisk fluebekæmpelse til landbruget
Description:
Miljøfluen producerer biologisk fluebekæmpelse (nyttedyr) til svine- og kvægstalde og har gjort det siden 1993. Vi specialiserer os i at opfostre gyllefluer og snyltehvepse, som er naturlige fjender af andre og mere generende fluer - f.eks. stuefluer og stikfluer.

Stalde er ofte yndede beboelsessteder for fluer og landbrugsdyr kan være meget plaget af fluer, når de befinder sig i stalden. Især stikfluen kan være til gene, da den svirrer om dyrene og stikker dem for at suge blod. Ved at tilføre gyllefluer og snyltehvepse til svine- og kvægstalde mindskes mængden af generende fluer markant - uden brug af kemi (biocider).

Gyllefluer og snyltehvepse fra Miljøfluen pakkes på larve/puppestadiet i perforerede poser eller lufttætte beholdere og sendes med posten direkte til stalden, hvor posen eller beholderen blot placeres i nærheden af staldens problemområder. Efter kort tid klækker nyttedyrene og finder selv ud i stalden for at bekæmpe fluer. 

Igennem årene har Miljøfluen løbende udviklet løsninger til forskellige staldforhold- og typer og vi følger med udviklingen i landbrugssektoren.

Miljøfluens hovedformål er at være landbrugets førende samarbejdspartner, når det gælder fluebekæmpelse, og har et mangeårigt samarbejde med et bredt forhandlernet i Danmark. 

Derudover leverer vi gyllefluer og snyltehvepse til store dele af Norden og Europa.

	•	Luxury Crafted: Michelin-standard farm-to-table hospitality and premium export goods.
	•	Globally Scalable: Modular systems ready for replication across Africa, Asia, and beyond.

By 2030, Lumiere aims to lead the rise of sustainable agri-luxury as a global economic and ecological force — merging ethical farming, luxury experiences, and strategic investment into a new era of global development.

La Asociación Akaushi Mexicana, AC fue fundada el 30 de Agosto del 2019, con el objetivo de organizar a los ganaderos interesados en esta raza originaria del Japón, que se distingue geneticamente en la calidad de su carne, una de sus funciones es formar una alianza para apoyar a los socios tanto en la comercialización del Ganado como en su Carne.

Actualmente se ofrece Ganado, Semen, Embriones y Productos Cárnicos certificados por el USDA, por la American Akaushi Association (AKA) y la Asociación Akaushi Mexicana, AC, logrando con esto el hacer llegar a la mesa de nuestros clientes un producto con los más altos estándares avalados por la autoridad competente, con el cuidado a detalle de la trazabilidad genética, lo cual en esta raza hace diferencia por su linaje y especificaciones de origen.

Basándonos en estos tres principios básicos; buena raza, buena alimentación y buena calidad, da como resultado un sabroso marmoleo que humecta la carne haciéndola irresistible para el paladar más exigente.

Name: Spazio Natura
Description:
Pet shop per animali, cani, gatti, uccelli, pesci, rettili, coralli, accessori, mangimi, acquari. Svolgiamo un’ attività di IMPORT EXPORT di ANIMALI, ATTREZZATURE e MANGIMI per il loro mantenimento. Trattiamo animali di qualunque specie reperibile sul mercato, principalmente di allevamenti e legalmente acquisibili. Esperti in acquariologia, ittiopatologia, studio e realizzazione di microambienti, ecostistemi marini, d'acqua dolce, tropicali, mediterranei, terrari, paludari.
La nostra storia nasce ufficialmente nel 1988 con Arte Natura sotto la guida del Biologo Dr. Mario Reina per poi essere nel 1994 Spazio Natura, ma in realtà lo spirito e l’amore che abbiamo nei confronti degli animali ci è stato dato dalla nascita. La nostra FILOSOFIA è di portare la conoscenza degli animali alla portata di tutti così che possiamo apprezzarne le qualità e possiamo capire che fanno parte di noi, perché vivono insieme a noi.
La NOSTRA MISSIONE è di sensibilizzare con la nostra conoscenza diretta e con il possesso di un animale le generazioni future così che l’uomo possa convivere con gli animali e non relegarli solo in parchi nazionali o in zone protette.
Il NOSTRO SOGNO è che in futuro l’uomo viva a stretto contatto con gli animali, come fece anche l'uomo dell’età della pietra. Vogliamo portare la gente a possedere un animale in modo che noi tutti possiamo diventare consapevoli dell'importanza del patrimonio genetico che stiamo gestendo.

Name: Nabahya Food Institute
Description:
Nabahya Food Institute (NFI) is an organization based in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) to bring local farmers work in cooperatives, mitigating the cycle of poverty, starvation and climate change while promoting access to clean Energy and Resilient Food Systems with commitment to tackling the dual challenge of increasing food production and protecting natural resources and the environment. NFI is a grant award winner for the Water and Energy for Food Grand Challenge for Development (WE4F). WE4F is an international initiative jointly supported by the German Federal Ministry for Economic Cooperation and Development, the European Union, the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Government of the Netherlands, the Norwegian Agency for Development Cooperation (Norad), the Swedish International Development Cooperation Agency (Sida), and the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID). 
NFI is also a grant award winner of the TerraFund for AFR100 Landscapes Restoration Champions, a program jointly run by World Resources Institute, One Tree Planted and Realize Impact. 
NFI is nominated among 48 best world initiatives in sustainability by the Food Planet Prize.

Name: Dries Visser Safaris
Description:
Dries Visser Safaris was established in 1990, after Dries Visser Sr had successfully developed one of the most spectacular Private Game Ranches in Thabazimbi, South Africa – Citadel. 

Today Dries Visser Jr - who grew up on the hunting reserve and gained experience from an early age hunting with his father – is the main driving force behind this safari. 

Dries Visser Safaris has specialized in Bow Hunting since 1995.  For almost 15 years they have catered for hundreds of bowhunters, and fast became one or if not the largest bowhunting outfitter in South Africa. 

Striving to offer more to their hunters, they purchased their own game ranch in Namibia.  This ranch has not been hunted for a number of years, making the available trophies second to none! 

Dries Visser Safaris have also been hunting in Mozambique in the Coutada 10 area for the last three years.  The bush and the wildlife are as they were many years ago, Elephant, Hippo and crocodiles are among the many species to be found in multitudes. 

Today Dries Visser Safaris is proud to be a respected member of the Professional Hunters Association of South Africa (PHASA), Safari Club International and Dallas Safaris Club.   Clients hunting with Dries Visser Safaris can be sure of a legal and ethical safari.

Es un sistema de identificación animal a través de la huella del morro. Name: Agrícola Ganadera Hermanos López S.L.
Description:
Agrícola Ganadera Hermanos López SL es una empresa familiar con sede en Talavera de la Reina (Toledo), dedicada desde 1969 a la ganadería porcina en ciclo cerrado. Con una estructura consolidada de cuatro granjas propias y 2.500 madres reproductoras, trabajamos con un enfoque integral que abarca desde la fabricación de pienso hasta la comercialización de animales. Esto nos permite garantizar una trazabilidad total y el máximo control sanitario y nutricional en todas las fases del proceso productivo.

La gerencia está actualmente en manos de Ester, Roberto y Eugenia López, segunda generación al frente de un proyecto que combina la tradición ganadera con la innovación tecnológica y un fuerte compromiso social. Nos diferencia un modelo de producción porcina en ciclo cerrado, que asegura el control completo desde la genética hasta el engorde y la salida a matadero. Contamos con fábrica de pienso propia, formulaciones adaptadas a cada fase y un seguimiento técnico-nutricional de precisión.

Todas nuestras granjas están certificadas al 100 % en bienestar animal, y aplicamos principios de economía circular para la gestión sostenible de estiércoles y su aprovechamiento agronómico. La trazabilidad rigurosa de piensos, animales y datos productivos nos permite tomar decisiones informadas y mejorar continuamente. Apostamos por la eficiencia energética y el uso de energías renovables en nuestras instalaciones, así como por el desarrollo rural, la generación de empleo local y políticas activas de igualdad de género y conciliación laboral.

Nuestro propósito es claro: ofrecer una producción ganadera responsable, eficiente y respetuosa con el entorno, con la sostenibilidad y la innovación como pilares fundamentales de futuro.
Location: Talavera de la Reina, Castile-La Mancha

Name: Larval
Description:
At Larval, we're transforming animal nutrition with sustainable insect protein. Our mission? To address the environmental issues associated with traditional animal feed, specifically the deforestation associated with soybean meal.

Why insect protein?

Efficiency: A tiny area of land can produce as much protein as a huge soybean field.
Nutritional superiority: Insects are a natural part of an animal's diet

 Our Process:
 Circular Model: We use food waste from local suppliers to feed our insects
 Sustainable Production: Reduces waste and increases sustainability
 High Quality Feed: Superior nutritional value that improves the welfare of the animals
 Added Value: Producing organic fertilizer as a byproduct

Join us in revolutionizing the food chain for a sustainable future. Larval is more than a company - it is a movement towards efficient, environmentally friendly agriculture.

As nosas áreas de actuación inclúen:

• Nutrición animal: Fabricamos pensos personalizados para cada explotación, garantindo a trazabilidade e a calidade de cada ingrediente para obter un produto natural e saudable.

• Veterinaria e saúde animal: Ofrecemos servizos especializados en calidade do leite, reprodución, e prevención sanitaria para mellorar a produtividade e saúde dos nosos animais.

• Certificación e asesoramento técnico: Apoio agronómico e técnico para optimizar a xestión das explotacións, asegurar a súa viabilidade e adaptarse aos estándares de calidade e sostibilidade.

• Sostibilidade e compromiso social: Comprometémonos coa conservación do medio e a revitalización do rural galego, impulsando prácticas agrícolas que reduzan a pegada ambiental e aseguren un futuro próspero para as novas xeracións.

En Central de Frades, cremos na forza da unión e o traballo conxunto. Máis de 60 anos despois, seguimos traballando coa mesma ética, responsabilidade e dedicación que nos viu nacer, para contribuír ao benestar das persoas que viven do campo e á calidade dos produtos que chegan aos fogares.

Taki system pozwala na efektywne zarządzanie i opiekę nad ulami.
Umożliwia śledzenie temperatury, wilgotności i poziomu hałasu w ulu, co pomaga w wykrywaniu wczesnych oznak problemów zdrowotnych i środowiskowych. 

Dzięki zebranym danym można nie tylko mieć dostęp w sposób bieżący i bezprzewodowy do informacji na temat tego, co się dzieje w pasiece, ale też analizować i przewidywać zagrożenia. 

Projekt został wyróżniony w Międzyuczelnianym, Ogólnopolskim Konkursie Młodych Mistrzów organizowanym przez Radę Programową Forum Teleinformatyki.

Name: Iedere Boer Een Bos
Description:
Iedere boer een bos

Van ontwerp naar uitvoering. Van idee naar systeem.

Er worden steeds meer voedselbossen aangelegd. Maar wat daarna komt – het echte werk – blijft vaak liggen. Het beheer. De zorg. Het op gang brengen van een levend systeem dat tijd, kennis en inzet vraagt. Precies dat is wat voedselbossen kwetsbaar maakt: ze beginnen vol energie, maar lopen vast voordat ze echt iets opleveren.

Wij willen dat anders doen.

Iedere boer een bos bouwt aan een professioneel beheermodel voor voedselbossen op agrarische grond. Wij nemen de kritieke eerste tien jaar voor onze rekening – de periode waarin het voedselbos vooral vraagt, maar nog weinig teruggeeft. Zo maken we het mogelijk voor boeren om te verduurzamen zonder hun bedrijf op het spel te zetten.

We werken samen met boeren, niet over hun hoofden heen. Zij blijven eigenaar van hun grond. Wij doen het werk. En samen bouwen we aan een systeem dat wél toekomst heeft.

Dit is geen adviesbureau. Geen subsidiegedreven project. Dit is uitvoerend werk, gebaseerd op ervaring in het veld, met de blik op schaal en impact.

We maken van het voedselbos een serieus onderdeel van het boerenbedrijf.

En dat begint met goed beheer.

Name: Green Farmer Co-Op Limited
Description:
Our organization fosters an environment of cooperation between farmers, scientists, entrepreneurs, regulatory agencies, traditional financial institutions and technology solution providers to accomplish our mission. TGF Co-Operative welcomes new members, including farmers and circular Bio-Economy professionals to join. 

It is a collaborative community led by Farmers and Bio-Economy professionals developing practical and compliant solutions in the new Circular Bio-Economy. TGF is laying the groundwork for farmers to develop practical solutions to thrive in the new Circular Bio-Economy.

The Co-Operative aims to produce high-quality duckweed for use as animal feed and for the extraction of valuable bioactive compounds. Through our various partnerships, TGF is positioning itself to become a leader in the cultivation and processing of duckweed as a cash crop in Europe. Membership of the cooperative offers a unique opportunity for members to participate in a growing industry with a high potential for growth and profitability.

Duckweed is an alternative protein source for agri-food application. Preliminary investigation has demonstrated that amino acid profile of duckweed is comparable to those of land based pulses particularly suitable for agri-food applications. Duckweeds evolved to take advantage of the minerals released by decaying organic materials in water. Contaminated waters that are high in P and K and an Ammonia source will suit duckweed cultivation. Researchers have shown duckweed cultivation effective in removing Nitrogen and Phosphorus from animal manure waste water.

The Green Farmer Co-Operative Society Limited (TGF) is registered under the Industrial and Provident Societies Acts, 1893 to 2021.

Name: Associació de Dones del Món Rural
Description:
Som dones rurals de Catalunya, principalment ramaderes i pageses, amb la fi de visibilitzar la nostra feina i millorar la igualtat d’oportunitats. 

Només el 20% de dones es dediquen professionalment al sector primari, tot i que gairebé un milió de dones viuen en zones rurals. És molt important i necessari que les dones estiguin presents al món rural i per descomptat, que tinguin veu a tots els espais de decisió i de debat del sector. 

Des de fa segles, la figura de la dona a pagès s’ha subordinat a realitzar tasques associades a la família, la pagesia i el camp, quedant invisibilitzades tot i realitzar gran part del treball en els sistemes productius. La feina, l’experiència i el saber femení s’ha anat silenciant al llarg de diversos anys. 

Des del Grup Dones del Món Rural volem posar de relleu el gran i valuós paper que tenen totes les dones de Catalunya en el desenvolupament econòmic, rural, local i territorial. L’apoderament de la dona al món és possible, la igualtat de gènere i d’oportunitats és assolible i millorar la posició de la dona en aquest sector és aconseguible. 

Som dones del món rural.

Name: Davidova ekologická včelí farma
Description:
100% PŘÍRODNÍ — 100% RAW

V podstatě necháváme matku přírodu, sezónní cykly, symbiotické vztahy a mikroklima, aby kultivovali základ našich produktů. Naší úlohou je představit je světu v jejich nejvyšší a nefalšované podobě s co nejmenšími lidskými zásahy a nedostatky.

Náš raw med je vyráběný na jižní Moravě v České republice ekologicky chovanými včelami. Je to krásný a vzácný zdroj s výrazně vyššími hladinami enzymů a antibakteriálními vlastnostmi, než jaké se nacházejí v jiných medech.

Raw med, neboli med v syrovém stavu, je v poslední době stále populárnější. Tento druh medu je zpracováván minimálně a zachovává tak všechny přírodní látky, které jsou v něm obsaženy. V raw medu jsou stále přítomné enzymy, vitamíny, minerály a další prospěšné látky. Jeho konzumace může přinést mnoho zdravotních výhod, včetně podpory imunitního systému, zlepšení trávení a poskytnutí antioxidantů.

Felix y Gregorio Serrano junto a Carlos Teruel y Luis Magliano trabajaban juntos en una industria avícola de renombre, con fuerte presencia en Córdoba, y el NOA. Con la intención de proveer maíz a las granjas avícolas comenzaron a desarrollar agricultura sobre campos arrendados. Más adelante, y mediante alianzas con otros productores, sumaron la actividad ganadera e incluso una planta de procesamiento de soja, que terminó por dar nombre a OLEOS DEL CENTRO.

Name: Valley Feed & Supply Company
Description:
Established in the “Roaring Twenties”, Valley Feed is a family owned feed and supply business with it's core market in Northeast Kansas. The business is well respected in its local community and enjoys a long standing relationship with many businesses including local 4-H, local chambers of commerce, city and rotary groups, and large animal production facilities. 

Valley Feed's diverse customer base is fueled by it's wide feed selection that is produced on-site in a fully equipped milling and grain storage facility.  Having full milling and grain processing capabilities allows Valley Feed to focus on producing over 50 floor stocked feeds from finch to rabbit, chicken, ratite, horse, cattle and many other species.  

The mill also produces highly specialized, proprietary rations for unique niche markets.  Customers can trust that the daily focus of our entire team is on quality and consistency. We all participate in ongoing quality improvements whether it’s from our farm, processing, packaging or administrative team.

Valley Feed has also gained popularity among regional birding enthusiasts, producing wide selection of wild bird feed and backyard critter mixes.  Ingredients not grown locally are sourced from producers throughout a range of states to obtain the best quality warm/cold season cereal, oil seed, and pulse grains.

Outside of it's core business function, Valley Feed, also provides a variety of services including; feed deliveries, feeding nutrition and advice, and custom ration development.  Attached to the mill is a fully-equipped retail store containing pet food, veterinary supplies, bird feed/feeders, lawn and garden seed, fertilizers and chemicals and a variety of home/lawn/garden decor.

This local firm is recognized for its community efforts donating to local charities, and takes great pride in the presentation of its facilities

Name: Ruralmente.pe
Description:
Los territorios rurales enfrentan una oferta limitada de servicios técnicos, educativos y digitales adaptados a sus realidades. Esta brecha persiste por la falta de articulación entre actores clave, y por narrativas que relegan lo rural en las políticas públicas, sin visibilizar su valor ni su potencial transformador.
Ruralmente es una consultora agroambiental con enfoque educativo y territorial que articula conocimiento técnico, actores locales y oportunidades de desarrollo sostenible. Ofrecemos servicios a medida en diagnóstico territorial, gestión ambiental, formación especializada y diseño de proyectos con impacto social, aplicando metodologías participativas para el mapeo de procesos y la implementación de indicadores adaptados al contexto rural. Trabajamos con diversos actores de la cadena agroalimentaria y del ecosistema de sostenibilidad, actuando como puente entre sectores para revalorizar lo rural como espacio estratégico, innovador y lleno de posibilidades.

Name: Egg Serenity Farm
Description:
About Us:

Egg Serenity Farm is a newly established poultry farm dedicated to providing the highest quality, ethically-sourced eggs. We believe that happy hens lay the most delicious and nutritious eggs, which is why we prioritize their well-being and natural instincts.

Our Commitment:

- Animal welfare: We believe in humane treatment of our hens, providing them with ample space, natural sunlight, and a stress-free environment.
- Sustainable practices: We are committed to environmentally conscious farming practices that minimize our impact and promote healthy soil.
- Quality eggs: Our hens are fed a balanced diet for optimal health, resulting in eggs rich in flavor, vitamins, and antioxidants.
- Community focus: We are passionate about connecting with our local community, offering farm tours and educational opportunities about ethical egg production.

Products:

Fresh, farm-laid chicken eggs from a variety of heritage breeds, known for their unique flavors and vibrant colors.

Coming Soon: Compost enriched with chicken manure, perfect for boosting garden health.

Looking Forward:

Egg Serenity Farm is committed to continuously growing and evolving. We are dedicated to providing exceptional quality eggs while promoting ethical farming practices and fostering a connection with our local community.

Description:
Ribbonwire Ranch is a family-owned operation on historic Texas Panhandle land, once part of the legendary XIT Ranch. We are dedicated to producing premium organic beef with a focus on sustainability, land conservation, and animal welfare. 

Founded in 2008, Ribbonwire Ranch is owned and operated by Doug Lathem and Chad Schoonover, along with their wives and children. Our cattle are raised on our ranch from birth to finish, meaning every beef stick comes exclusively from our herd. Nourished by native prairie grasses and feed grown right on our ranch, our Angus cattle produce the highest quality organic beef on the market today.

At Ribbonwire Ranch, we believe in a program with no smoke and mirrors, a consumer can feel confident in what they are buying. Our organic beef sticks aren’t just a product, they’re part of a story as unique as their flavor.

Name: FarmLife Health Services Ltd
Description:
"When I was a child, my aunt Esther was the backbone of our family’s prosperity. Her farm would produce bountiful harvests, and food was never scarce. But in recent years, she started calling me frequently, sometimes in tears. Her once-thriving farm now faced challenges—low yields, unpredictable markets, and mounting frustrations. She felt defeated, and seeing her struggle weighed heavily on me."
This is the personal life story of Yegon Philemon, CEO and Co-Founder of FarmLife Health Services Ltd.
"Aunt Esther’s struggles became personal to me, and they inspired me to take action. In 2020, I co-founded FarmLife Health Services Ltd. to address the systemic challenges that small-scale farmers, like my aunt, face daily."
Through our work, we’ve identified key challenges affecting farmers: soil erosion, biodiversity loss, biomass depletion due to deforestation, and lack of access to competitive markets. These barriers not only threaten food security but also leave farmers vulnerable to economic hardships.
At FarmLife, we are committed to restoration and climate-smart agriculture. We work hand-in-hand with smallholder farmers to promote sustainable farming practices. Our main focus is agroforestry by planting fruit trees- avocados and nuts, apiculture, alongside Milk Value Addition to enhance productivity and diversify income streams.
But we don’t stop there. To ensure sustainable impact, we organize farmers into groups and cooperatives, encouraging collective savings. These pooled funds empower farmers to borrow for farm activities such as purchasing certified inputs, improving farm management, and boosting production. This approach reduces reliance on high-interest loans from informal lenders and microfinance institutions, providing farmers with financial independence and stability.
We focuses on impacting women, youth, and marginalized groups by training 80,000+ farmers on sustainable practices. We reduce post-harvest losses, secure premium markets, and improve lives.

Name: Polskie Zrzeszenie Producentów Bydła Mięsnego
Description:
Polskie Zrzeszenie Producentów Bydła Mięsnego jest organizacją branżową rolników powstałą w 2005 roku, której jednym z głównych celów jest reprezentowanie interesów producentów bydła mięsnego.
Intencją działań podejmowanych przez Polskie Zrzeszenie Producentów Bydła Mięsnego jest wspieranie działań producentów w kierunku zwiększania produkcji, uzyskiwania jednolitych, wysokiej jakości partii żywca wołowego, przy jednoczesnym zwiększaniu uzyskiwanych zysków.
PZPBM zajmuje się bieżącą analizą i definiowaniem problemów środowiska producentów żywca wołowego i wołowiny kulinarnej podejmując szeroko zakrojone działania mające na celu ich rozwiązywanie w tym działania obejmujące integracje pozioma ale także integracje pionową w całym łańcuchu dostaw.
Zrzeszenie działa w przestrzeni międzynarodowej poprzez zabieganie o rynki zbytu na polską wołowinę  poza granicami RP oraz na polu współpracy z europejskimi rolniczymi organizacjami branżowymi, jednostkami badawczo-rozwojowymi.
Do osiągnięć Polskiego Zrzeszenia Producentów Bydła Mięsnego, bez wątpienia, zaliczyć należy opracowanie Systemu QMP, który w 2008 roku decyzją Ministerstwa Rolnictwa i Rozwoju Wsi uznany został za oficjalny krajowy system jakości mięsa wołowego oraz objęty wsparciem w ramach Programu Rozwoju Obszarów Wiejskich 2007-2013 oraz 2014 -2020.
Polskie Zrzeszenie Producentów Bydła Mięsnego jest koordynatorem klastra wołowiny. Biorąc sobie za cel zwiększanie poziomu innowacyjności polskiego sektora wołowiny, Polskie Zrzeszenie Producentów Bydła Mięsnego, wraz ze Szkołą Główną Gospodarstwa Wiejskiego oraz Uniwersytetem Warmińsko-Mazurskim w ramach konsorcjum naukowo-przemysłowego opracowało oraz zrealizowało sześcioletni projekt badawczy „Optymalizacja produkcji wołowiny w Polsce, zgodnie ze strategią „od widelca do zagrody", którego celem było stworzenie nowoczesnych rozwiązań w zakresie optymalizacji procesu produkcyjnego i dystrybucji oraz wzrostu popytu na mięso wołowe.

Name: Grupo Luvre Oficial
Description:
A história do GRUPO LUVRE é uma extensão da vida de Pedro Ciriello, empreendedor que começou sua história nos campos de cultivo de café no interior de São Paulo, região onde nasceu. Ainda jovem mudou-se para a capital paulista, período em que trabalhou para grandes corporações e grupos financeiros. Em 1981 fundou a Luvre Corretora de Seguros, sua primeira empresa, que devido ao perfil Inovador e arrojado nos negócios sua corretora se destacou logo nos primeiros anos entre as maiores empresas do setor de seguros no ABC Paulista. 

Em 2014 o GRUPO LUVRE completa 33 anos de operação e hoje é uma Holding com investimentos focados na área do agronegócio. Atualmente as empresas do grupo são consideradas referências no setor que atuam, como a Tropical Flora Reflorestadora, empresa que trouxe em sua fundação o desafio de realizar o plantio de árvores nativas e a produção sustentável de madeira nobre.

Desde o início de suas atividades a Tropical Flora sempre focou nas alianças estratégicas e parcerias tecnológicas com instituições de pesquisa nacionais e internacionais, planejando e executando estudos de campo e produzindo o conhecimento necessário para o sucesso na produção comercial de madeiras tropicais nobres, atuando principalmente nas áreas de nutrição, adubação, melhoramento genético, manejo de pragas e prospecção de novas espécies. Tais alianças estão firmadas com instituições governamentais e algumas das mais conceituadas universidades do país e do exterior, que atestam os projetos da empresa como fundamentais para o desenvolvimento do setor florestal Brasileiro. Essa mudança de paradigmas criou um novo caminho no setor florestal e em pouco tempo fez da Tropical Flora uma referência no mercado.

Atualmente o Grupo Luvre aplica seu modelo sustentável na produção de outras espécies de madeira nobre além do Guanandi, como os Mognos Brasileiro e Africano, a Teca, o Jequitibá Rosa, o Louro Freijó, entre outras.

Name: HUITRES GIGAS MEDULI
Description:
LES HUITRES GIGAS MEDULI

Production exclusive de la Ferme Eau Médoc, les huîtres Gigas Meduli sont des huîtres spéciales de caractère,
affinées suivant un cahier des charges exigeant dans nos marais médocains.
Charnues, croquantes et subtilement iodées, elles expriment les saveurs uniques du mariage des eaux de
l'estuaire de la Gironde et du terroir médocain.

------------------------------------------------------------
 
LA FERME EAU MEDOC 

La Ferme aquacole Earl Eau Médoc a été créée en 1989 par Bertrand Iung. 
Bâtie sur d'anciens polders médocains, la Ferme Eau Médoc représente 17 hectares de bassins en eau, qui sont entretenus et valorisés toute l'année grâce à la production de Gambas, de coquillages et à l'affinage d'huîtres spéciales, les Gigas Meduli.  
La Ferme Eau Médoc poursuit depuis sa création plusieurs engagements : 
- l'équilibre  : préserver l'écosystème grâce à des modes de production extensifs 
- la qualité : respecter des cahiers des charges de production exigeants pour offrir des produits à forte saveur ajoutée
- l'humain : la Ferme Eau Médoc est une entreprise familiale, fondée et développée par des gens passionnés. 
La commercialisation des produits se fait en direct depuis 1989 pour privilégier le contact avec les consommateurs. 
Pour la distribution de ses huîtres spéciales Gigas Meduli, La Ferme Eau Médoc développe également les collaborations avec des restaurateurs et établissements de qualité, dans le Médoc, en Nouvelle Aquitaine et en France.

Name: AM Agro S.A.

Nossa tradição de mais de 60 anos de silvicultura tem como característica principal a produção florestal dentro das melhores práticas sustentáveis e em total harmonia com o meio ambiente.

Aproveitando nossa localização privilegiada, nas margens das Rodovias Anhanguera e Bandeirantes, contamos com toda a infraestrutura para a extração, remoção e logística de transporte da madeira para atender os mais diversificados consumidores. Somos especializados no fornecimento de madeira de Eucaliptos utilizada como matéria prima na produção de perfis e aglomerados, energia de caldeira, pequenos consumidores e para uso doméstico – fornos e lareiras.

Name: Lone Pine Farm & Studio
Description:
Lone Pine Farm & Studio is dedicated to reimagining the place of agriculture within the community, realigning its impact on nature, and inciting a deep connection between individuals and the world they inhabit.  By integrating contemporary growing techniques with adaptive and scalable design processes, Lone Pine promotes year-round productivity and longevity for a range of sites and climates.

Collaboration and consultation with our creative network of thinkers will guide all project phases, delivering careful solutions and thoughtful support which enhance the output and efficiency of growing spaces, while building a long-term capacity to navigate economic and climatic variables.

Founded in 2010, Lone Pine Farm & Studio is committed to creating a vision for new and existing commercial agricultural spaces, homesteads, and institutions. We specialize in regenerative, organic growing practices and employ scalable, affordable technology to ensure productive working landscapes year after year.

Lone Pine has managed projects in the Northeast and Pacific Northwest as well as the West Coast of Mexico. Based in western Massachusetts, Lone Pine has been serving the Berkshires, Pioneer Valley, and Hudson River Valley since 2018.

Name: Nhavambe Bush Retreat
Description:
Nhavambe Bush Retreat é uma farma turística única e diversificada, localizada em 3 de Fevereiro, distrito da Manhiça, Maputo. Nosso retiro oferece uma experiência autêntica e inesquecível, combinando agricultura sustentável e turismo.

Nosso principal foco é a produção de uma variedade de animais, incluindo gado bovino, caprino, ovino, suíno, avestruzes, galinhas, patos, gansos, coelhos e tilápias. Nosso compromisso com a sustentabilidade é evidente em nossas práticas agrícolas, que incluem a produção de capim-elefante em nossas machambas.

Além disso, operamos uma fábrica de ração no local para garantir que nossos animais recebam nutrição de alta qualidade, contribuindo para a saúde e o bem-estar geral do rebanho.

Para os visitantes que desejam prolongar a sua estadia, oferecemos quartos de hospedagem confortáveis e acolhedores. Nossos hóspedes podem relaxar e desfrutar de nossos locais de lazer, enquanto apreciam a beleza natural e a tranquilidade do retiro.

Venha para o Nhavambe Bush Retreat para uma experiência agrícola autêntica e um refúgio tranquilo da agitação da vida urbana.

Name: Progan - Productores Ganaderos del Uruguay
Description:
PROGAN es una Cooperativa de Productores Ganaderos fundada en 2004 con el propósito de integrar y fortalecer la cadena cárnica uruguaya. Reúne a más de 400 socios de distintos departamentos del país que trabajan de forma asociativa para mejorar la comercialización, la productividad y la sustentabilidad de sus sistemas ganaderos.

A través de distintos planes de desarrollo —como pasturas, fosforita, retención de semovientes, suplementación y genética—, PROGAN promueve la mejora continua de los establecimientos y fomenta la adopción de prácticas responsables y eficientes.

Además, impulsa programas de comercialización diferenciada que premian la calidad, la trazabilidad y el manejo sostenible de los animales, generando valor agregado para los productores y contribuyendo al posicionamiento de la carne uruguaya en los mercados más exigentes.

Desde hace más de dos décadas, PROGAN reafirma su compromiso con el desarrollo del sector ganadero nacional, impulsando la cooperación, la innovación y la producción de calidad.

Description: We use IoT's technology to gather data on the cattles and their environment states with the help of sensors inside devices deployed within their living space and the cattles' necklaces, these informations are delivered to the cloud by using a hardware gateway. ✓ Thriving Ecosystems: Restore biodiversity & ecosystem services at landscape level.

Name: FMC - Gestão na Agropecuária
Description:
Nosso propósito é TRANSFORMAR SUA FAZENDA EM UMA EMPRESA MAIS LUCRATIVA.

Essa transformação ocorre quando ajudamos o proprietário a implementar uma GESTÃO PARA RESULTADO na sua fazenda.  

Nosso trabalho consiste em avaliar as estratégias que os proprietários já possuem para o seu negócio com seus Pontos Fortes e de melhoria, com essa análise elaboramos as melhores soluções de gestão para o negócio. 

Com essa abordagem apoiaremos os gestores na análise do melhor cenário visão para a sua empresa,  levando em consideração o melhor tipo de exploração, investimentos, fluxo de caixa projetado e ações operacionais de melhoria da fazenda. 

Fúlvio Mendes com formação em Veterinária e MBA em Gestão Empresarial (FGV) tem experiência "dentro e fora da porteira" como consultor em projetos de gestão desde 2001 em grandes propriedades rurais no Mato Grosso, Tocantins, Goiás, Pará e Maranhão.

Name: Sunart Fields
Description:
Sunart Fields is a 120 acre uplands farm based in the High Peak, Derbyshire, working to restore a healthy balance with nature. Until 2019 the land was operated as an active dairy farm, and 100 years prior to that was coal mined.

We now manage the land in a restorative way, creating the conditions that will allow nature to thrive. We are doing so as part of Defra's SFI Pilot and Natural England's Biodiversity Net Gain Credits Scheme Pilot.

Name: Project MAARA
Description:
MAARA, founded by Dace and Robert in 2020, is an initiative dedicated to reshaping lifestyles and cultivating sustainability. Leaving the city life behind, we jumped into this adventure by buying 30 hectares of land with forests, waterfalls and grazelands, surrounded by the mountain stretches of the National Park of Três Picos, close to Nova Friburgo in Rio de Janeiro state. 

Our project has converted a conventional farm in a sustainable permaculture haven. Projects implemented include setting up all soft and hard infrastructure, building of an ecological sewage system, establishing an agroforest with focus on coffee, fruit, wood and nut production, partly with CO2 compensation. Additionally, we've undertaken bio-construction, created a natural pool, manage a volunteer community, and initiated an eco-pedagogic project with local schools to raise awareness about sustainable practices.

MAARA is more than a cultivation initiative; it aspires to be a reference and permaculture playground for like-minded individuals. The goal is to foster collaborative learning, share experiences, produce sustainable food, and enhance land fertility, productivity, and biodiversity. Rooted in principles of harmony and respect for nature and the local community, MAARA seeks to catalyse positive change, aspiring to be a beacon of inspiration for those passionate about creating a sustainable future.

We welcome volunteers from around the world, providing an opportunity to learn about permaculture, agroforest management, organic gardening, soil regeneration, composting, the importance of bees and other insects, as well as enjoying nutritious vegetarian meals and community living. Nestled in a comfortable farmhouse amid breath-taking mountainous scenery near Rio de Janeiro, it's the perfect setting to embark on a journey of discovery. Explore our website for the various possibilities.

Name: mOrganic Holdings, LLC.
Description:
mOrganic Holdings, LLC operates at the intersection of capital markets and sustainability, specializing in the superfood and BeeGenerative agribusiness sectors.

The core of our business is the mOrganic 3-Tree Agroforestry System. This innovative model functions as an impact investment vehicle explicitly designed to shift the financial risks and management burdens associated with the regenerative agriculture transition from individual farmers onto long-term, supportive investors.

We strategically integrate diverse components—including superfoods, leafy greens, aquaponics, and timber trees—alongside BeeGenerative animal and crop farming systems. This integration within the 3-Tree Agroforestry framework is engineered to achieve multiple ecological and financial objectives: improving soil health, maximizing carbon sequestration, minimizing soil erosion and water pollution, significantly enhancing biodiversity and crop pollination rates, and improving profitability.

The system is structured to deliver meaningful financial and nature-related returns for all stakeholders when constructed correctly. mOrganic Holdings, LLC and its 3-Tree Agroforestry System serve as a vital hub for project management/advisory services, financing, research, and collaborative growth within the regenerative agriculture community.

Name: ASSAF. ESPAÑA
Description:
Created in April of 2002, it manages the Program of Genetic Improvement of the race, carrying out a constant improvement in the farms belonging to the association.

After the official recognition of the Assaf in 2003 as a race of third countries adapted in Spain, in 2005 the Regulation of the Stud Book of the Assaf breed is approved. In that same year it officially recognizes Assafe as collaborating entity for the conduct of the same.

Its objectives are:

- To watch over the purity of the race, being responsible for the genealogical book.

- Manage the program of Selection and Genetic Improvement, which translates into a process of continuous advancement in the farms belonging to the association.

- Promote the spread and expansion of the Race throughout the national and international territory. To this end, it is present in the most important events held in the livestock sector.

To achieve all its objectives, ASSAF.E works in close collaboration with different organizations:

- Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock of the Junta de Castilla y León

- National Institute of Agricultural and Food Research and Technology, INIA, which performs and certifies the genetic evaluations of each herd

- Laboratory of Molecular Genetics Xenética Fontao (Lugo), which carries out the tests of filiation (DNA)
- Laboratory of Molecular Genetics Laboratory of Applied Research (Córdoba), which carries out the tests of filiation (DNA)

- Official Dairy Control Center UAGCYL, which carries out monthly checks on dairy production

- Center for Selection and Genetic Improvement of Sheep and Goats of Castilla y León, OVIGÉN

- Center for Animal Selection and Reproduction of Leon, CENSYRA

- Madrilean Institute for Rural, Agricultural and Food Research and Development, iMiDRA

- Provincial Council of Zamora

- Provincial Council of Salamanca

- Diputación Provincia de León
It is integrated in FEAGAS (Spanish Federation of Associations of Selected Cattle).

Name: ECOTRUEQUE standard
Description:
The ECOTRUEQUE standard is a concept of environmental and social recovery that achieves carbon neutrality for products and companies using a new way of doing a circular economy using natural methods for its recovery and with security and transparency parameters for our clients all over the planet.

El estándar ECOTRUEQUE es un concepto de recuperación ambiental y social que logra la neutralidad en carbono de productos y empresas utilizando una nueva forma de hacer economía circular utilizando métodos naturales para su recuperación y con parámetros de seguridad y transparencia para nuestros clientes en todo el planeta.

We make a circular economy between companies that produce plastic waste and others that we turn into useful products in agriculture, exchanging these products for a space of land to grow trees that recover the environment and as a source of income for the future of the workers involved.

Hacemos economía circular entre empresas que producen residuos plásticos y otras que convertimos en productos útiles en la agricultura, intercambiando estos productos por un espacio de tierra para cultivar árboles que recuperen el medio ambiente y como fuente de ingresos para el futuro de los trabajadores involucrados.

The ECOTRUEQUE standard begins with several allies that help us generate the credibility of our work. We started in Ecuador certifying new bamboo plantations that capture carbon dioxide to achieve carbon neutrality of agricultural products for export with KIWA as certifier of our standardized processes.

El estándar ECOTRUEQUE comienza con varios aliados que nos ayudan a generar la credibilidad de nuestro trabajo. Iniciamos en Ecuador certificando nuevas plantaciones de bambú que capturan dióxido de carbono para lograr la neutralidad de carbono de los productos agrícolas de exportación con KIWA como certificadora de nuestros procesos estandarizados.

Name: M2 Soluções Agrícolas
Description:
Seja bem-vindo à página oficial da M2 Soluções Agrícolas no LinkedIn! Somos uma empresa focada em soluções agrícolas inovadoras, especializada na prestação de serviços utilizando drones para atender às necessidades específicas dos agricultores modernos.

Quem Somos:
Na M2, combinamos paixão pela agricultura com expertise em tecnologia para oferecer soluções sob medida que impulsionam a produtividade, reduzem os custos e promovem a sustentabilidade no setor agrícola.

Nossos Serviços:

- Pulverização com Drones: Utilizamos drones de última geração para aplicar defensivos agrícolas com precisão milimétrica, reduzindo o desperdício e aumentando a eficiência.
- Mapeamento Aéreo: Realizamos mapeamentos aéreos de alta resolução para monitoramento de culturas, detecção de doenças, análise de saúde vegetal e muito mais.
- Dispersão de sementes: Usamos drones para fazer a distribuição de sementes de pastagens e de reflorestamento para a restauração de ecossistemas naturais e o manejo de áreas agrícolas.
- Liberação de Agentes Biológicos: Oferecemos serviços de liberação controlada de agentes marcrobiológicos, como Cotesia flavipes, Trichogramma galloi e Telenomus podisi, para o controle natural de pragas agrícolas.

Nosso Compromisso:

- Qualidade: Comprometemo-nos a oferecer serviços da mais alta qualidade, utilizando tecnologia de ponta e melhores práticas agrícolas.
- Inovação: Estamos constantemente buscando novas soluções e tecnologias para atender às necessidades em evolução dos agricultores e impulsionar o progresso no campo.

POLÍTICA DE CALIDAD

SERVIFARMS, basa su competitividad empresarial en un concepto global de calidad tanto de productos como de gestión. 

La calidad es el factor diferencial que distingue nuestros productos y servicios en el mercado, es la clave del nivel de excelencia que nos imponemos tanto en las relaciones externas como internas.

Name: Heritage Reforestation Inc.
Description:
Heritage Reforestation Inc. is a leading tree planting company in Canada, providing services to Commercial Forest Managers, Private Land Owners, Crown Corporations, Saw Mills, Municipalities, Government Agencies, Commercial Landscaping, Mining Companies, Oil & Gas Companies, Forest License Holders and Conservation Authorities. We are passionate about tree planting and committed to restoring and protecting forests. We employ over 200 tree planters every season and have planted over 10 million trees since our inception.

We are a team of experienced and dedicated professionals who are committed to providing our clients with the highest quality tree planting services. We use state-of-the-art equipment and techniques to ensure that our trees are planted correctly and that they have the best chance of survival.

We are also committed to sustainability and environmental stewardship. We plant a variety of tree species that are native to the region and that are adapted to the local climate. We also use organic fertilizers and pesticides to minimize our environmental impact.

If you are looking for a company that is passionate about tree planting and committed to sustainability, then Heritage Reforestation Inc. is the company for you. Whether you are a Forest Manager, Private Land Owner, Municipality or Government Agency, Mine Operator, Oil and Gas Company, Saw Mill, Forest License Holder or Conservation Authority, no job is too big or small for us. We will take a look at your project and give you a price, free of charge. Contact us today to learn more about our services.

Name: NWNY Dairy, Livestock and Field Crops Team
Description: The NWNY Dairy, Livestock and Field Crops Team is one of the outstanding regional agricultural Cornell Cooperative Extension programs in New York, serving a 9-county region in the western part of the state. The team is part of the Cornell College of Agriculture & Life Sciences' Pro-Dairy program outreach. Educational programs and individual assistance cover a wide area of best management practices and as well as dairy farm business. For dairy farms, a bilingual dairy specialist provides producers with employee training and human resource facilitation in Spanish. Educational and support venues range from on individual farm management team meetings and troubleshooting to multi-day classroom and hands-on training and from ongoing farmer group discussion meetings to thematic day long symposia.

Name: The Christieville House
Description:
Industrial agriculture reached its limit a long time ago. Many recognized it, and so have we. 

The design, implementation and operation of new sustainable systems specific to local requirements and attributes are more than ever required. 

We are doing our part by converting farmlands into orchards. 

By doing so, growing permanent crops reduces soil interventions, significantly captures and stores carbon in the soil and their out-of-soil structures, and produces high-value fruits for both the fresh and the transformation markets. 

We do all this while supporting a circular model, sustainable by design and in harmony with local communities of farmers, entrepreneurs and citizens. And all of this, with the generations to come in mind.

Walking or cycling the many hills surrounding our orchards every fall, you'll experience a set of tangible initiatives designed to save our living habitat by sequestering over 50 tons of carbon per hectare, year after year, while providing quality fruits to regional markets.

Name: Delfos Agroconsulting
Description:
En Delfos Agroconsulting somos un equipo multidisciplinario de profesionales especialistas en el sector agroindustrial, con la capacidad de generar soluciones para el desarrollo de negocios dentro del mismo. Contamos con experiencia en desarrollo de negocios dentro del sector apícola, avícola, porcino, cannábico, agrícola, ganadero, silvícola, piscícola, hortícola y frutícola, como así también en la construcción y obras civiles. Desarrollamos mercados para negocios en todos los eslabones de la cadena agroindustrial, de la semilla al plato.

Llevamos muchos años trabajando en el sector de los agronegocios con especial atención en el sector cannábico, el cual creció considerablemente en los últimos 10 años y tiene una proyección de crecimiento muy importante con la incorporación de nuevos marcos legales favorables en diferentes países. Tenemos la capacidad de formar equipos de venta y técnicos, desarrollar nuevos productos y nuevos mercados como así también en la confección de estrategias basadas en la experiencia y en la coyuntura del sector. Nuestra MISIÓN es la de ser los socios estratégicos de las empresas agroindustriales para que estas logren sus objetivos de la forma más eficiente, con la ventaja que otorga una amplia experiencia en el sector. Así mismo nuestra VISIÓN es la de profesionalizar al sector agroindustrial, creando nuevas oportunidades de negocio a través de la innovación y el desarrollo de proyectos de integración con especial cuidado en la discreción.

Name: Kopakker
Description:
Kopakker | Van vitale bodem naar waardevolle ketens

Kopakker helpt boeren, bedrijven en ketenpartners om de voordelen van vitale bodems om te zetten in marktwaarde. Wij geloven dat gezonde bodems de basis vormen voor duurzame en voedzamere voedselketens. Door bodemgezondheid te koppelen aan product- en marktproposities creëren wij tastbare meerwaarde voor consumenten, boeren en het milieu.

Met onze bewezen aanpak ontwerpen we marktproposities (PMC's) en ontwikkelen we Minimum Viable Products (MVP's) die duurzame ketens mogelijk maken. We brengen bodemvitaliteit, CO₂-vastlegging, lagere emissies en verminderde watervervuiling samen in innovatieve producten die consumenten waarderen en boeren belonen. Ons werk richt zich op praktische opschaling, samenwerking met ketenpartners, en het ontwikkelen van strategieën die zowel economische als maatschappelijke impact hebben.

Samen bouwen we toekomstbestendige voedselketens die van bodemgezondheid profiteren. Bij Kopakker zetten we visie om in realiteit, van strategisch ontwerp tot uitvoering. Klaar om waarde te creëren uit vitale bodems? Ontdek samen met ons de kansen in uw keten.

Daardoor is de vraag naar duurzaam voedsel en dus ook naar duurzame eieren sterk gegroeid de laatste jaren. Wij, Styn Claessens en Peter Janssen, willen die marktvraag beantwoorden. We zijn twee jonge agrarische ondernemers uit het Limburgse Ysselsteyn. We zijn opgegroeid op de pluimveehouderijen van onze ouders en kennen de sector dus door en door. We zetten die bedrijven voort met oog voor de veranderende markt. We weten dat het produceren en vermarkten van duurzame eieren uitdagingen met zich meebrengt en daarom werken we samen om er een succes van te maken. Zo is Yverde ontstaan; Ysselsteynse (Y) “groene” (verde) eieren.

Name: Upfarming.nl
Description:
-English below

Upfarming is een onafhankelijke non-profitorganisatie die de transitie naar een regeneratief voedselsysteem versnelt.

Wij zijn wetenschappers, boeren, ontwerpers en veranderaars. Onze wortels liggen diep in CO₂L Farming—een toonaangevend netwerk van de meest vooruitstrevende regeneratieve praktijkmensen en adviseurs van Nederland.

Na meer dan een halve eeuw voorop te hebben gelopen in landbouwinnovatie, staat Nederland voor grote uitdagingen. Maar juist deze uitdagingen bieden een kans om een grote sprong voorwaarts te maken. Dit is hét moment om voedselsystemen te bouwen op basis van diepgaande samenwerking met de intelligente processen van de natuur. 

Upfarming versnelt deze transitie met diverse initiatieven: van het ontwikkelen van kennis en tools voor boeren tot het opleiden van de volgende generatie adviseurs. Van het verkennen van alternatieve toekomsten met tot het adviseren over toekomstbestendig beleid.

Wij staan open voor samenwerking met iedereen die deze visie deelt, neem contact op!

------- 
Upfarming is an independent non-profit accelerating the shift toward a regenerative food system.

We are scientists, farmers, designers, and changemakers. Our roots run deep in CO₂L Farming—a pioneering network of the Netherlands’ most advanced regenerative practitioners and advisors. 

After leading agricultural progress for over half a century, the Netherlands faces urgent challenges—yet these challenges present a great opportunity to leap forward into the future of farming. The time is now to build food systems based on deep collaboration with nature’s intelligent processes. 

Upfarming catalyses the shift through a broad range of initiatives: from developing knowledge and tools for farmers to training the next generation of advisors. From envisioning alternative futures with stakeholders, to advising on future friendly policy making.  

We are open to exploring collaboration with anyone who shares this vision. Feel free to reach out!

Name: Fazenda do Chico
Description:
A Fazenda do Chico, fundada e dirigida por Francisco Rafael Gonçalves, advogado de formação e pecuarista  de nascimento e vocação,   nasceu  em razão de sua forte crença na necessidade de melhorar  e aumentar a produção leiteira nacional. 

As atividades  da Fazenda do Chico se desenvolvem no Sul de Minas Gerais – maior bacia leiteira do País – em propriedades nos municípios de Pouso Alegre e Silvianópolis.  Através de um trabalho sério e competente, vem se tornando referência na seleção e melhoramento das raças Gir Leiteiro  e Girolando,  direcionando todos seus esforços e recursos   para a  produção de animais  geneticamente superiores, visando o aumento da produção de leite com animais puros ou resultado de cruzamentos adaptados à realidade do Brasil. 

Para isso, a Fazenda do Chico vem selecionando ao longo dos últimos anos animais  procedentes dos melhores criatórios do País, formando assim um rebanho de doadoras 100% livro fechado, total controle oficial de famílias consagradas no mercado, utilizando o sistema de Fertilização In Vitro (FIV) e os melhores touros Gir e Holandeses da atualidade para multiplicação desta genética. 

Com essa vontade e engajamento de toda equipe da Fazenda do Chico é que queremos tornar nossos grandes projetos em realidade e atingir cada vez mais nosso principal objetivo: oferecer animais leiteiros de excelente genética a todos os produtores de leite deste país.

ESCRIBE UN COMENTARIOVER MÁS

CRÍA DE CABALLOS ÚNICOS Y ESPECIALES

La Yeguada Monte Alegre es una empresa familiar que se dedica a la cría y selección de caballos Appaloosa únicos y exclusivos en España.

 
Nuestra Yeguada tiene el fin es crear un caballo funcional , versátil de un manto y color personal e irrepetible cargado de personalidad. Destinado principalmente a las disciplinas de Doma Clásica, Equitación de Trabajo , Western y Baroque Show , registrados como CDE , caballo de Deporte Español -  El Caballo Monte Alegre.


 Para ello usamos nuestra propia alquimia de varias sangres - razas, capas y orígenes entre nuestras yeguas y sementales. 


Lusitano y Pura Raza Español : Pura Sangre Lusitano PSL y PRE. De capa diluida - dilución crema, Isabelino, Champagne , Caballo Bayo y Caballo Palomino , de morfología barroca y clásica, que aportan funcionalidad y belleza ibérica con sus perfiles acarnerados - racial , movimientos elásticos y densidad de cola y crin abundante. En concreto nuestro palomino, al que vulgarmente llaman caballo perla .


Appaloosa y Paint Horse : Caballo Appaloosa Americano Aphc de las exclusivas capas : Sorrel , Varnish, Few spots, Peacock , Leopardo , Grupa Nevada - Snow cap y Spotted Blanket . Paint Horse - Tobiano de líneas funcionales Europeas de Salto , centroeuropeas y de Pinto Barroco . Que les aportan la capa tan personal que nos distingue y las aptitudes deportivas y super funcionales que perseguimos . 


Quarter Horse : Cuarto de Milla , Pintaloosa, que le aportan esa grupa excelsa y estructuras muscuolosas y compactas que les da fuerza y potencia punta, buscando la genética Blanco Dominante - Dominant White .



Aparte de nuestro programa de cría y selección de caballos, también actuamos como broker de caballos internacionales, de exportación e importación. 


Poniendo a disposición de nuestra cartera global de clientes caballos de muchísima calidad contrastada. Desde Potros sin domar con mucha proyección a caballos muy domados y bien montados para distintas disciplinas…Todos ellos probados y testados en nuestra casa bajo el denominador común de la montabilidad, nobleza y buen carácter.

Name: Grassland Analysis
Description:
Grassland Analysis es una plataforma de análisis y acompañamiento técnico orientada a la regeneración de suelos, praderas y sistemas productivos en Chile y América Latina.
Nuestro trabajo se basa en la integración de datos, ciencia del suelo y lectura sistémica del territorio, entendiendo que la sustentabilidad no es suficiente si no contribuye a restaurar la vida, la funcionalidad ecológica y la productividad de los ecosistemas.
Acompañamos a productores, empresas e instituciones en la toma de decisiones informadas, utilizando indicadores físicos, químicos y biológicos del suelo, análisis productivos de praderas, lectura del manejo animal y evaluación de procesos de regeneración y degradación.
Grassland Analysis no ofrece recetas universales ni soluciones estandarizadas.
Trabajamos desde el territorio real, combinando evidencia científica, experiencia práctica y comprensión humana de los sistemas productivos.
Creemos que regenerar es un proceso técnico, económico y ético, y que solo a través de datos con sentido, acción concreta y compromiso con las personas es posible construir sistemas productivos verdaderamente sostenibles en el tiempo.

Name: Midt- og østjyske landboforeninger
Description:
Vi er 8 landbrugsforeninger, der dækker over kommunerne Aarhus, Viborg, Skanderborg, Randers, Silkeborg, Skive, Favrskov, Vejle, Fredericia, Horsens, Odder, Hedensted og Samsø. Vi er desuden forbundet med landboforeningen Centrovice, der dækker hele Fyn.

Vi laver lokalpolitisk arbejde. For eksempel har vi etableret klimapartnerskaber med alle kommunerne, og vi går ind i lokale sager, der har betydning for nærområderne.

Vi vil gerne den gode relation mellem by og land. Vi arbejder for natur, klima og biodiversitet, samtidig med vi konstant producerer danske fødevarer smartere, renere og mere klimaeffektivt. 

Landbruget producerer eller står bag alle dine fødevarer: Lige fra mælken, gulerødderne, æggene, müslien, grillpølsen og rugbrødet til øllen, du nyder på festival. Vi laver både den røde bøf og plantebøffen.

Vi leverer også halm til fjernvarme, juletræet juleaften, biomasse til biogas, så vi kan blive mere selvforsynende i Danmark - og meget meget mere. Det vil vi gerne arbejde for at bevare - for dansk landbrug er under pres.

Har du lyst til at støtte vores arbejde? Så kontakt sekretær Lise Jensen på lje@velas.dk

Name: Ganadería Jamaica
Description:
Hacienda ubicada en el Departamento de Risaralda en Colombia. Dedicada a la ganadería Gyr y Gyrolando.
Bovinos de Leche – Doble Propósito

Origen: La raza Girolando es el resultado del cruce de las razas Gir y Holstein. Es una raza bastante reconocida por la rusticidad heredada del Gir y por la producción lechera proveniente del Holstein. Es responsable por el 80% de la producción de leche en Brasil, siendo este el principal factor de elección de esta raza para la exportación. Pasó por diversos grados de sangre, pero se ha estandarizado en el siguiente patrón racial: 5/8 Holstein + 3/8 Gir que la convierten en un raza bovina lechera muy productiva, perfecta para climas cálidos.

Name: FDM Lohmann Tierzucht
Description:
The right hen for every management – the right egg for every market. With this claim, LOHMANN TIERZUCHT has, until this very day, achieved excellent breeding results and has become the global leader in the production of parent stocks and laying hens in the last six decades.

This success is based on systematic research and development, intensive veterinary care and constant dialogue with customers. This results in highly efficient layers of a robust quality as well as excellent egg mass and outstanding shell quality – i.e. features which give LOHMANN TIERZUCHT breeders a competitive edge throughout the world.

LOHMANN TIERZUCHT consistently sets high standards in quality, innovation and service and employs around 200 people at its sites around the world. With excellent customer service and the provision of the right hens for new growing markets LOHMANN TIERZUCHT is also ideally equipped for the future.

Breeding alone is not enough without intensive veterinary assistance. With its veterinary laboratory – one of the most modern of all – LOHMANN TIERZUCHT has created a globally unique range of services in this area. This exemplary customer service, top breeding expertise, an unstoppable drive to innovate and close co-operation with customers underline the company’s philosophy: breeding for success … together
