Name: Topigs Norsvin Belgium
Description:
Topigs Norsvin staat bekend om de innovatieve werkwijze bij het toepassen van nieuwe technologie en heeft een constante focus op kosteneffectieve varkens(vlees)productie. Onderzoek, innovatie en het snel doorgeven van genetische vooruitgang zijn de hoekstenen van onze organisatie.

Constante en aanzienlijke productverbetering maakt het onze klanten mogelijk om duidelijk verbeterde toegevoegde waarde te creëren.

Het fokprogramma van Topigs Norsvin is uniek. De combinatie van grootschalige fenotypering, het op grote schaal inzetten van CT-scan technologie bij de selectie van beren, een wereldwijde kernfokkerij, genomic selection en het verzamelen van praktijkgegevens zorgt voor een duidelijke versnelling van de genetische vooruitgang en dat resulteert in innovatieve producten en oplossingen met voordelen voor de hele varkensproductiekolom.

Topigs Norsvin is méér dan de beste genetica, passend bij de behoeften van de varkenshouderij en de verwaarding van varkensvlees. We staan ook voor de beste kennis en beste ondersteuning. Onze specialisten helpen varkenshouders het maximale uit onze genetica te halen.

Topigs Norsvin België hanteert al decennia lang de modernste maatstaven voor kwaliteit op gebied van product, management en organisatie. Klanttevredenheid en rekening houden met behoeften van de klant zorgen voor constante verbetering.

Nauwe samenwerking met onze partners zorgt voor een efficiënt productieproces en een aanbod met een zo hoog mogelijke prijs/kwaliteit verhouding.

Em virtude do aumento da demanda, a empresa montou sua primeira filial

Com o transcorrer do tempo, tendo a empresa que utilizar de terceirizados para
o refino, blendagem, branqueamento, clarificação, industrialização, fabricação
e preparação do sebo, a CRV AGROPECUÁRIA, resolveu investir em mais 2 filiais.

No ano de 2019 (unidade Aparecida de Goiânia - GO e unidade Palmas - TO) com
a finalidade de agroindústria com a fabricação de Sebo bovino, fabricação de óleos
e gorduras de origem animal e vegetal, fabricação de margarina e outras gorduras
vegetais e de óleos não comestíveis de animais e fabricação de sabões
e detergentes sintéticos e assim melhor utilizar o produto "sebo bovino"
e atender o mercado consumidor e clientes.

Nosso objetivo

Ajudar o Brasil a crescer com a geração de empregos e rendas com a comercialização, preparação, "blendagem", "branqueamento", clarificação, industrialização e fabricação de produtos e subprodutos de abate de animais (bovino, suíno, aves e peixes) tais como sebo, óleos, gorduras e também de origem vegetal.

Name: CV Johnson Farm
Description: CV Johnson Farm adalah perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang Peternakan Ayam Petelur sejak tahun 1984, berlokasi di Kabupaten Bandung, Jawa Barat. Johnson Farm selalu memberikan pelayanan yang terbaik sesuai dengan komitmen untuk selalu maju dan tidak berhenti untuk melakukan peningkatan kualitas dan layanan. Saat ini Johnson Farm telah memiliki 200 ribu ekor ayam dengan dikelola oleh 150 orang pekerja dan tenaga-tenaga yang berpengalaman di bidangnya. Johnson Farm memiliki visi untuk menjadi peternakan ayam petelur yang terpercaya bagi pihak terkait dan menjadi benchmark bagi peternakan-peternakan lain di seluruh Indonesia dengan prinsip continuous improvement.

Name: Daai
Description:
“Daai” is the Sanskrit word for the female traditional folk healers of ancient India. 

Each season, Daai formulates a curated collection of herbal infusions for holistic health, focused on anti-aging and longevity. These are handmade in small-batches by indigenous folk healers of the Himalayas. 

As a cultivator and processor of high-altitude medicinal plants, Daai is dedicated to preserving the indigenous biodiversity of the Uttarakhand Himalayas. 

Through the utilisation of ancient natural farming practices, we play our role in promoting natural farming, and biodiversity conservation for the long-term sustainability for the planet.

Name: Apiculteurs en Provence
Description:
Collectif d’apiculteurs actif en Région Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur. 

Nous sommes 3 600 apiculteurs provençaux qui exploitent près de 163 000 ruches dans la région Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur. Ambassadeurs passionnés, nous réalisons 60 % de la distribution de miel en vente directe.
 
La production régionale en miel avoisine les 2 500 tonnes par an. Celle de miel de lavande représente en année normale plus de la moitié de la production totale. 
IGP Miel de Provence et 2 Labels Rouges, l’apiculture provençale est la 1ère filière apicole de France en termes de signes de qualité.

L’apiculture provençale s’appuie sur une filière très dynamique et structurée autour de trois acteurs majeurs : 

•	L’Association pour le Développement de l’Apiculture Provençale (ADAPI), structure de développement technique et économique de la région (http://adapi.adafrance.org/) 
•	Le Syndicat des miels de Provence et des Alpes du Sud assure la gestion de la démarche qualité IGP/label rouge miel de Provence (www.miels-de-provence.com)  
•	La Coopérative Provence Miel (http://provence-miel.com) qui garantit une commercialisation éthique et raisonnée.

Name: Silva Futures
Description:
Silva Futures restores abandoned forest ecosystems.
We buy and revive stumpage and abandoned agricultural land suitable for forestry.
We plant trees and take care of early maintenance.
We offer young 10-15 years old forests, which do not require maintenance investments.
Benefits:
	• Investment backed by real property
	• Forest available to non-foresters
	• Solving the most challenging works of forestry
	• Direct carbon impact
	• High quality forests absorb and maintain 2x more CO2 than unmanaged forests.
Managed forests' wood is up to 2.5x more valuable and retains CO2 for many generations as material, whilst low quality wood ends up as chips or paper, but even decomposing emits carbon-dioxide.

Name: Voedselbos op de Beek (onderdeel van Agroforestry Breda)
Description:
Wij zijn Johan Hagenaars en Lisenka Schalk. Vanuit onze liefde voor het buitenleven en de natuur zijn wij met dit agroforestry project gestart. We nemen jullie mee op onze reis om de verschillende onderdelen van agroforestry te realiseren. Zo gaan we rijenteelt (alley cropping) en een bosweide met hoogstam fruitbomen aanleggen met vee en natuur niet te vergeten een echt voedselbos
Daarnaast hebben we een agroforestry kwekerij opgezet en kweken we planten en bomen voor voedselbossen, forest gardens en agroforestry projecten. Dit betekent dat we hoofdzakelijk eetbare planten kweken. Hierbij kan je denken aan diverse fruitbomen, struiken en allerlei ander planten die eetbaar zijn.

Name: Rohtas Agro & Livestock Farms
Description:
Rohtas Agro and Livestock Farms are dedicated to promoting sustainable agriculture practices and responsible livestock management. Located in the heart of Jhelum, our farms are committed to delivering high-quality agricultural produce.
Enhancing Agricultural Productivity and Livestock Management: Our Agro and Livestock Farms.

At , Rohtas Agro and Livestock Farms we take pride in our commitment to sustainable agriculture and responsible livestock management. Our agro and livestock farms serve as the foundation of our operations, enabling us to provide high-quality agricultural produce and livestock products to meet the growing demands of consumers. With a strong focus on innovation, animal welfare, and environmental stewardship, our farms are at the forefront of driving positive change in the agricultural industry.
Agro Farms: Cultivating Sustainable Agriculture
Our agro farms are dedicated to sustainable agriculture practices that prioritize long-term productivity, environmental health, and consumer well-being. We employ cutting-edge techniques to minimize the use of synthetic inputs, such as pesticides and chemical fertilizers, and promote organic and natural alternatives. Through agroecology, precision farming, and integrated pest management, we ensure the preservation of soil fertility, conservation of water resources, and enhancement of biodiversity.
Crop Diversity for Nutritional Excellence
At our agro farms, we cultivate a diverse range of crops to offer our customers a wide variety of high-quality agricultural produce. From nutritious fruits and vegetables to staple grains and cash crops, we understand the importance of a balanced diet. By embracing crop rotation and avoiding monocultures, we reduce the risk of pest outbreaks and disease susceptibility, enhancing the overall resilience of our farms and ensuring a consistent supply of fresh, healthy produce.

Description:

Name: PRAVDA Farms
Description:
PRAVDA Farms is a sibling-led social enterprise rooted in a small family farm in Central Ghana now reimagined for a regenerative and climate-resilient future. What began in 2020 as a modest poultry and subsistence venture founded by our father has evolved into a cross-continental effort linking rural Ghana and Manitoba, Canada.

We’re designing farming systems that work with nature, not against it. Guided by ancestral wisdom and grounded in science, our model integrates hydroponics, poultry, aquaculture, biogas, and solar energy into circular, closed-loop ecosystems that restore land, build local capacity, and feed communities sustainably.

At PRAVDA Farms, we believe resilience grows where knowledge is shared and communities lead. Youth and women are at the heart of our vision for food systems that are inclusive, regenerative, and future-ready.

Our next chapter, Pravda AgriFutures Inc., expands this vision into scalable programs for training, applied research, and regenerative innovation; helping communities everywhere grow food systems that heal both people and planet.

We’re not just cultivating crops. We’re growing futures, one closed-loop system at a time.

Name: NAVCHETNA AGRO CENTER PRODUCER COMPANY LIMITED
Description: Navchetna Agro Center Producer Company Limited, based in Mirzapur, Uttar Pradesh, is a pioneering Farmer Producer Organization (FPO) supported by NABARD. With a dedicated focus on sustainable agriculture, organic farming, vermicomposting, and agroforestry, Navchetna empowers over 3,000 local farmers, particularly tribal and women farmers, across Eastern Uttar Pradesh. Notable initiatives include a state-of-the-art vermicomposting unit, crop diversification, capacity building, and solar installations. Led by CEO Mr. Mukesh Pandey, Navchetna is a beacon of agricultural innovation, exporting vermicompost globally, and promoting self-reliance with its seed processing and infrastructure units. It stands as a model for rural development and sustainable farming practices.

Name: EcoGroundTech
Description:
Somos uma empresa familiar que transforma tradição em inovação. Atuamos no desenvolvimento de soluções agrícolas sustentáveis e tecnologicamente avançadas, com foco no cultivo do cânhamo e outras plantas de interesse farmacêutico. Nosso compromisso é com um futuro mais verde, inteligente e regenerativo.

Assumimos a missão de transformar a terra cultivada há gerações por nossa família em um laboratório de inovação sustentável, unindo saberes ancestrais à agricultura de precisão, sensoriamento de solo e automação inteligente.

Visamos explorar todo o potencial da terra— desenvolvendo o potencial industrial e preservando o meio ambiente — com tecnologia de ponta, gerando impacto positivo no Brasil e no mundo.

Nossos Valores
Inovação com raízes – Valorizamos o conhecimento tradicional aliado à ciência e à tecnologia.
Sustentabilidade integral – Buscamos impactar positivamente o meio ambiente e a sociedade.
Excelência e qualidade – Operamos com rigor técnico e foco nos mais altos padrões regulatórios.
Diversidade e bem-estar – Respeitamos a biodiversidade e promovemos saúde em todas as dimensões.
Responsabilidade social – Geramos empregos, movimentamos a economia e promovemos o desenvolvimento local.

Objetivos Estratégicos

Implantar uma operação moderna, com baixo impacto ambiental
Desenvolver fitoterápicos com valor agregado para o setor farmacêutico
Criar eco-florestas inteligentes e regenerativa
Garantir conformidade regulatória e padrões internacionais de qualidade
Atuar no mercado nacional e internacional com visão sustentável e inovação contínua

Diferenciais da Nossa Proposta

União entre tradição agrícola e alta tecnologia
Aplicação de automação e sensoriamento no campo
Foco em pesquisa e desenvolvimento
Acesso a mercados em crescimento
Compromisso com a economia verde e o impacto positivo

Name: Rain Shadow Ranch
Description:
Rain Shadow Ranch is a reservation-only, seasonal flower field and photography venue in Port Orchard, WA. We specialize in cultivating flower varieties that have a long vase life, strong stems, and are beautiful to all the senses.

From spring to autumn, purchase fresh flower bunches, market bouquets, and wholesale florals. For ongoing beauty in your home or for a very special gift, buy our six- and four-week seasonal bouquet subscriptions (aka CSA). These items are limited to pick-up and local delivery. 

In the hot summer months,  join us in picking fresh from the field. Times and dates are regularly updated for Pick-Your-Own and based upon our volume of blooms and vegetables. 

Dried flowers and handcrafted goods are available online throughout the year. Dahlia bulbs are on sale in the early spring months. All can be standard shipped.

Thanks for supporting our local, small business, and we hope to see you soon at Rain Shadow Ranch.

Name: fecoagroleiteminas
Description:
Defesa, valorização e fortalecimento do cooperativismo agropecuário e de leite em Minas Gerais. Esses objetivos nortearam a criação da Fecoagro Leite Minas, iniciativa inédita no Estado, que vem buscando, desde seu primeiro ano de atuação, realizar um trabalho baseado nos princípios e valores cooperativistas de equidade, democracia e intercooperação.

A Federação surgiu da inquietação de dirigentes e executivos de cooperativas do setor em relação à situação do leite em Minas Gerais e no Brasil. Os altos custos, a queda dos preços e a importação desregrada do produto do Uruguai foram grandes impulsionadores da mobilização do grupo. “O principal motivador foi a dificuldade que as cooperativas vêm enfrentando nos últimos anos, principalmente aquelas que atuam no mercado de leite. Assim, a Fecoagro Leite Minas já nasce com foco no fortalecimento dessas organizações”, afirma o Presidente da entidade, Vasco Praça Filho.

Com 203 cooperativas do ramo agropecuário no Estado, sendo 88 de leite, e aproximadamente 10 mil associados em cooperativas, a Fecoagro Leite Minas vislumbra um amplo contingente de atuação. Atualmente, a organização possui 31 filiadas e o foco é crescer cada vez mais. “A fim de manter o engajamento, fazemos um trabalho que envolve todas as filiadas, mostrando que juntas somos mais fortes. Para conseguir novas ingressantes, fazemos visitas, explicamos o objetivo da Federação e convidamos para as reuniões. Como os encontros são itinerantes, os presidentes acabam sentindo que fazem parte do processo e desenvolvem uma relação de pertencimento e de interesse em fazer parte do grupo”, explica o Presidente da Fecoagro Leite Minas, Vasco Praça Filho.

Name: StoutAgri
Description:
StoutAgri is a professional livestock equipment manufacturer based in China. We are dedicated to producing high - quality and cost - effective livestock equipment for global customers. Our product range covers drinking systems, feeding systems, flooring systems, climate control systems, and related feeding system accessories, suitable for poultry, pigs, cattle, sheep, and more.

StoutAgri has injection - molding and metal - manufacturing workshops, equipped with advanced livestock equipment manufacturing machinery. With a diverse product portfolio, we can meet the varied needs of different customers. Besides offering our own products, we actively accommodate customized requirements, capable of manufacturing based on customers' drawings or samples. Our experienced technical team provides a complete service cycle, from product R & D, standardized production, packaging design to final delivery.

Product quality is the cornerstone of our company. To ensure that all products meet the required standards, they are 100% inspected before shipment. Our production management strictly adheres to the ISO9001 management system standard. Our workers are rigorously trained, and all equipment undergoes regular maintenance and upgrades, guaranteeing the delivery of qualified products to customers.

With nearly a decade of experience in overseas sales, we have collaborated with customers from all over the world, including North America, South America, Europe, Africa, Asia, and the Middle East. Boasting rich export experience, we can offer fast delivery and transportation solutions.

We look forward to partnering with more customers worldwide.

Name: Terrafrica-Tech
Description:
Les Sociétés et Cultures d'aujourd'hui sont en en pleine transformation mais malheureusement les changements climatiques et contraintes environnementales mettent en péril de nombreuses communautés à travers le monde.

Nous sommes deux entrepreneurs du vivant franco-italiens avec un parcours multisectoriel structuré autour de l'impact et de la valeur ajoutée de "Projets Green" orientés vers les enjeux de financement de la transition écologique et sociale.

Terrafrica-Tech accompagne les investisseurs à impact désireux de soutenir des projets ESG (finance verte/Investissements responsables/Green impact investing) et les solutions basées sur la nature pour la planète.

Notre mission découle de l'urgente nécessité de lutter contre les effets du changement climatique et de l'inconscience des hommes sur l'appauvrissement des ressources et sur la dégradation des terres en favorisant le financement de projets à impact (ESG / NBS) afin de préserver la biodiversité et de compenser les émissions carbones.

Terrafrica-Tech organise son travail en 3 axes interconnectés :
- la création de partenariats à impact (entreprises à mission, solutions basées sur la nature "NBS", Tech4good)
- la gestion des connaissances utiles à réaliser des investissements responsables
- la coopération nationale, sous-régionale et régionale en identifiant les obstacles et les goulots d'étranglement à l'augmentation des investissements et développent des investissements GDT (gestion durable des terres) 

Le tout en reconnectant les cultures afin de redonner du sens à l'intelligence collective et au multilatéralisme (soft skills, soft power)

Actions :
- Catalyseur, auditeur et accompagnateur de projets à impact liés à la transition agroécologique en France et à l'international & Financement durable et Investissements responsables (ESG, NBS, etc.)
- Conseiller en investissement agricole (étude de marché & étude d'impact par filière, accompagnement sur l'acquisition et la valorisation de foncier agricole)

Name: Rø Jordbrug
Description:
Vi flyttede til solskinsøen efteråret 2018, i vores jagt på et meningsfuldt hverdagsliv, med tid og fordybelse. Fordi vi gerne vil leve bevidst og med hjerterne forrest. Vi fandt vores plads, hvorfra vi dagligt eksperimenterer, udvikler os, prøver os frem og lærer nyt, og ikke mindst bruger en stor del af vores dag udenfor. Fordi vi virkelig tror på den synergi der opstår, ved at tilbringe sin tid i smuk natur.



Vi driver et lille jordbrug, og visionerne rager højt, vi vil skabe mere liv. Mere liv i jorden og mere liv mellem mennesker. Gården og jordbruget danner rammerne for forskellige arrangementer og oplevelser, vi vil gerne inspirerer og vise hvilke veje der også kan betrædes i jagten på at skabe balancen.  

Vi tror på, at kort vej fra jord til bord i forhold til produktionen af fødevarer er vejen frem.

Vi drømmer og skaber undervejs. Og bringer unikke minder til de folk som deltager i vores middagen på marken, eller kommer som gæster til vores glampingtelte.

Name: Wiersema Wagyu
Description:
Kom eens kennismaken met ons duurzame Wagyuvlees. Onze koeien groeien op in een familiekudde en worden op duurzame manier gehouden.

Wagyuvlees staat bekend als het kaviaar onder het vlees. Veel geroemd om de smaaksensatie. Daarnaast is het gezond vlees. Onze koeien worden grotendeels gras gevoerd en het vlees bevat veel Omega 3 en Omega 6. Het vlees is cholesterol arm en bevat wel 30% meer onverzadigde vetzuren dan ander rundvlees.

Wij streven elke dag naar de beste kwaliteit van onze Wagyu’s. Het mooiste vlees is een combinatie van genetica, voer en tijd. Daarom werken wij met unieke stieren uit o.a. Australië.

Naast gras en hooi voeren wij GMO-vrij en Circulair voer. Er is geen hectare landbouwgrond gebruikt voor dit voer en alles komt uit reststromen van menselijke consumptie.

Wist u dat de dooradering van de Wagyu pas na 36 maanden volledig ontwikkeld is? Daarom slachten wij de dieren nooit voor die tijd. Ze groeien rustig op in de kudde en worden dus ook minimaal 3 jaar oud.

Name: Agriculture Advocates, LLC
Description:
At Agriculture Advocates LLC, we are committed to supporting U.S. agriculture and farmers. Founded by a team of former diplomatic and trade policy professionals and scientists, we are dedicated to helping the U.S. agricultural community navigate today’s rapidly changing global economic and trade landscape.

Our team brings decades of experience shaping U.S. agricultural trade policy, building public-private coalitions, and engaging with foreign governments and multilateral institutions. From expanding market access to enhancing trade negotiations to executing global competitiveness strategies, we understand how policy and diplomacy shape opportunities for U.S. producers.

We work alongside industry associations, agribusinesses, and state and federal partners to strengthen U.S. agriculture’s position in international markets. Through strategic analysis, advocacy, and relationship building, Agriculture Advocates LLC ensures that America’s farmers and agribusinesses remain globally competitive and well-represented.

Our Services Include:
--Coalition and stakeholder partnership development
--Trade diplomacy and institutional relations
--International market analysis and engagement
--Agricultural trade and policy strategy
--Strategic communications and advocacy

Together, we advance the success of U.S. agriculture at home and abroad.

Prioridad Lechera, distribuidor oficial México de los productos Priority IAC, Inc.; empresa especializada en productos que contienen Smart Bacteria -bacterias inteligentes-, tecnologías innovadoras que se compaginan con programas nutrimentales especializados.

Su equipo de expertos de servicio técnico trabajan para asesorar a los productores para cuidar la salud de sus animales y maximizar su producción y resultados.

Name: İSTAR İstanbul Tarımsal Ürünler İşletme Kooperatifi
Description:
İnsan olarak hepimiz her gün mecburen bir şeyler yiyor, içiyoruz. Metropol hayatının içerisinde, hızlı dönen çarklar pek çok insanın gün içinde yediği gıdaların kalitesine ve orijinalliğine dikkat etmesine fırsat vermiyor. 

Ekonomik koşullar, çiftçi ile manav, kasap, bakkal arasında ticaretin maliyetini katlayarak büyüten tüccarlar, bazen de fırsatçılar,  hilekarlar.. Bizi Günlük gıda ihtiyacımızın karambolde gerçekleşmesine mahkum ediyorlar. 

Piyasada satılan pek çok ürün, içerisine katılan çeşitli katkı malzemeleri ile sanki orijinal ve lezzetliymiş gibi görünürken aslında çeşitli hileler ile gerçeğini taklit eden kopya ürünlerin piyasada dolaşmasına sebep oluyor. Kaşar peyniri görünümlü patatesli karışımlar, Dondurma gibi görünen makarna tozları, Fıstıklı baklavada görücüye çıkan bezelyeler, içinde süt bulunamayan sütlü ürünler… Bu kopya ürünler, hem sağlığımızı tehdit ediyor hem de algılarımız ile oynayıp toplumsal moralimizi bozuyorlar.

İstanbul’da orijinalliği ve yöreselliğinden şüphe duyulmayan ürünlerin makul fiyatlarla satışa sunulduğu yeni bir işletmecilik anlayışına ihtiyaç olduğu için İsTar Kooperatifini kurduk. 

Amacımız, İstanbul’da yaşayan kent insanlarından, orijinal, geleneksel ve yöresel ürün satın almak isteyenlerin gönül rahatlığıyla ve makul piyasa şartlarında alış veriş yapabilmesini sağlamak

İstanbul’un her yerinden bireysel ve kurumsal siparişler alarak, müşterinin adresine orijinalliği tartışmasız olan, temsil ettiğimiz tüm üretici kooperatiflerin yöresel ürünlerinin tanıtımını, pazarlamasını, satışını ve müşteri adresine teslim edilmesinin sorumluluğu ile hareket ediyoruz.

İsTar, bu ihtiyacı karşılamak için tarafımızca kurulması planlanan fiziki ve sanal, bireysel ve kurumsal, toptan ve perakende niteliklere sahip bir orijinal yöresel ürün tedarik, satış ve teslimat projesidir

Además, la inclusión de las TIC permitirá mejorar la gestión de la ganadería.
El consorcio está integrado por COVAP, Keyter Technologies, Universidad de Córdoba, Cooperativas Agro-alimentarias de Andalucía y CETEMET.
Proyecto financiado a través de los Fondos Europeos Agrícolas de Desarrollo Rural (FEADER) y cofinanciado por la Consejería de Agricultura, Pesca, Agua y Desarrollo Rural de la Junta de Andalucía en la convocatoria para el Funcionamiento de Grupos Operativos Regionales de la Asociación Europea de Innovación en Materia de Productividad y Sostenibilidad Agrícola (EIP AGRI) de 2022.

O controle da vegetação espontânea através do seu corte e manutenção, bem como a recolha, triagem e encaminhamento dos resíduos para tratamento ou para a produção de biomassa agrícola ou compostagem permite a valorização energética dos recursos biológicos e territoriais.
A aquisição progressiva do conhecimento e experiência das nossas equipas, permite-nos selecionar os melhores equipamentos técnicos e aplicar as melhores técnicas, de acordo com as condições do terreno e do estado da vegetação, tendo sempre por objetivo a satisfação do Cliente e o respeito pela floresta.

Abate de todo o tipo árvores de em todo o país.
Limpeza de espaços florestais.

Execução e manutenção de jardins, bem como a instalação de sistema de rega automática.

Execução de aceiros florestais em incêndios com profissionais qualificados.

Name: Oerwroeters
Description:
Oerwroeters is opgericht door Coen Landheer, een ervaren dierverzorger en expert in diergedrag, en ontstaan uit een passie voor dierwelzijn en de natuur. Bij Oerwroeters staat de natuurlijke zorg voor onze varkens centraal, waarbij ze het hele jaar door buiten leven. De varkens zijn niet alleen onze dieren, maar ook onze medewerkers in het groen. Ze kunnen ingehuurd worden voor diverse vormen van natuurlijk landschapsbeheer. Denk aan het omploegen van een akker, voorbereiden van de grond voor een moestuin en het verwijderen van onkruid en ongewenste beplanting zoals japanse duizendknoop of berenklauw.

Ons streven naar een dierwaardig leven voor onze varkens resulteert in puur en kwalitatief hoogwaardig varkensvlees. Bovendien willen we onze passie en kennis delen door middel van educatieve activiteiten, waarbij jong en oud meer kan leren over deze fantastische dieren, natuurbeheer met varkens en de productie van natuurvlees.

Door natuurlijke varkenshouderij, duurzaam landschapsbeheer, de productie van kwaliteitsvlees en educatie samen te brengen, willen wij een bijdrage leveren aan een duurzamere toekomst, met de hulp van onze  varkens.

Name: Jagcroft
Description:
Welcome to Jagcroft, a company that offers a wide range of  farm  fresh produce to local businesses and customers. Our objectives are to be a direct and indirect distributor of sustainable farming in a desirable environment, solving food insecurity for the local community and the world at Large. As a company, we have developed products and services, that will communicate the true value of our produce without compromise.

Our target market are local consumers and businesses that seek to have fresh grown produces year round, with the need for importing, without pesticides and nutritious for your health.

We are  your number one source for all  Agricultural needs  and edible Oils,  Soap and high quality, non GMO Peanut butter. Founded in 2022 under the  name Ebenezer Morning Joy, Jagcroft  has come a long way from its humble beginnings in Lusaka Zambia . We hope you enjoy our products as much as we enjoy offering them to you. If you have any questions or comments, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Visit www.jagcroft.com to learn more!

Name: Réseau GaïaNA
Description:

L'association est un réseau professionnel de femmes, qui accueillent toutes celles travaillant dans les secteurs agricole , agroalimentaire , alimentaire, forêt  et pêche . 

Notre objectif ? Booster la confiance en soi pour renforcer l'envie d'agir, échanger sur nos problématiques et nos expériences, créer une bulle d'écoute et de bienveillance. 

Et aussi: sensibiliser la gouvernance agricole aux problèmes de mixité et de sexisme. 

Vous vous reconnaissez dans ce constat ? Rejoignez-nous !

Name: Del Plata Beef
Description:
A principios del año 2004 surgió la iniciativa de valorizar y difundir la producción ganadera
del Río de la Plata. Para cumplir este objetivo, creamos una unidad de negocios ganadera
de ciclo completo y la marca comercial Del Plata Beef (DPB), para ofrecerle al mundo lo
mejor de las carne de esta próspera y región sudamericana.

Para consolidar nuestro objetivo, nos reunimos con los mejores productores de hacienda
rioplatenses, con la firme convicción de poner a disposición del mercado carne de gran
calidad, no solo como materia prima sino también como resultado de un cuidadoso proceso
productivo que hace esto posible.

Como productores de Angus estamos dedicados al sector del agronegocio ganadero de la
Argentina y del Uruguay, trabajamos sobre la base de un interés común, que es agregar
valor a la carne a través de la marca.

Plata, sino también la cultura ganadera y gaucha, el ADN de los pueblos marcado por el
amor al campo y a la tradición, al fuego y a la carne. Esa es nuestra misma pasión.

1985 ve 2000 yılları arasından Massey Ferguson ve Uzel traktör satışına yönelik olarak hizmete başlamış ve Polat Traktör ve Tarım Makinaları Ürünleri San. Ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. olarak 2009 yılında Massey Ferguson ŞANLIURFA bayiliğini almıştır. 2009 yılından itibaren Agco-Massey Ferguson Bayiliği ile tarımsal kalkınmaya desteğini 38 yıldır sürdürmektedir.

     Tarım üretiminde çiftçilerimizin verimli sonuçlar elde etmesi amacıyla Massey Ferguson mühendisliğini ve uzmanlığını kullanarak gerekli desteği sunmayı hedefliyoruz. Traktör, Biçerdöverler, Malzeme İşleme, Balya Makineleri ve Yem Hasat Makineleri satışı ve sonrası destek ve teknik bakım onarım konularında çiftçilerimizin ihtiyaç duyduğu her türlü desteği uzman kadromuzla sunmaya devam edeceğiz. Yüksek kalite ve teknolojik donanıma sahip ürünleri doğru zamanda paydaş memnuniyetinde sürdürülebilirliği sağlamak, tarım sektöründe etkin ve düzenleyici rol almak.

       POLAT TRAKTÖR çalışanları kalite yönetim sistemine tam kadro olarak inanır ve gereklerini yerine getiririz. Biliriz ki; hizmet verdiğimiz pazarlardaki üstünlüğümüzü korumak ve yeni yatırımlar yapacağımız pazarlardaki lider pozisyonumuzu tesis etmek için kalite yönetim sistemi gereklerine uymak bir ön şarttır. Bu kapsamda, müşterilerimizin beklentileri ve pazar şartları doğrultusunda gerektiği gibi değişebilen, tutarlı çözümlere hızlıca ulaşabilen, kendini geliştirmek için önüne zor hedefler koyabilen büyük kaliteli sonuçlar ortaya çıkaracağını biliriz. Polat Traktör Teknik Servis yöneticileri; liderlik ve toplam kalite yönetimi anlayışları sayesinde, çalışanları teşvik ederek, sürekli gelişimin devam etmesi ve önemli hedeflerin tutturulması konularındaki sorumluluklarını yerine getirirler. 

       Polat Traktör ve Tarım Makinaları Ürünleri San. Ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. kuruluşundan günümüze kadar traktör sektöründeki uzmanlığını müşterilerine yansıtarak sorunsuz hizmet sunmayı hedeflemiştir.

Name: Star B Wagyu
Description:
At Star B Wagyu, we love juicy, tender, melt in your mouth beef. That is our passion. We are driven to go the extra mile to produce premium quality, all- natural, hormone free, USDA inspected Wagyu beef.

It starts with the genetics. We use Red Angus females with great dispositions who produce good milk and care for their calves. Then we bring in purebred Akaushi sires with high marbling and carcass traits. This gives us the perfect foundation to build upon.

Next comes the feeding regimen, and with it, patience. You don’t get the tender, marbled beef we are after in 18 - 21 months like the commercial feedlots do. Ours are fed the right way, babied along, with just the right nutrition at just the right time. No added hormones to boost them along- we just let nature take its course, and what a beautiful result!

When our cattle finally reach their final target size, they have their “one bad day” and trust me, they don’t even know it’s coming. They are processed at a USDA inspected facility, dry aged to perfection, then packaged to our meticulous specifications. The meat is stored in our freezers awaiting shipment to your door.

El pertenecer a Cooperativas Agro-alimentarias Principado de Asturias da la oportunidad de formar parte de Cooperativas Agro-alimentarias de España, entidad que representa a casi 3.000 empresas cooperativas y SAT y además de un millón de socios en prácticamente todos los subsectores agroalimentarios. También estamos representados en el COGECA, que es el órgano de representación de las cooperativas a nivel europeo y en el que están representadas más de 22.000 cooperativas, con más de 7 millones de socios y socias y emplean a más de 600.000 personas.

Con ese respaldo y esa fuerza, y mediante la representación que ostentamos dentro los diferentes organismos e instituciones del Principado de Asturias (Comité de Seguimiento del PDR, Consejo Asturiano de la Economía Social, Grupos de Desarrollo Local, Grupos de Trabajo sectoriales, SERIDA, Consejo Forestal, Consejo Agroalimentario Principado de Asturias, etc.) defendemos un modelo cooperativo de futuro, como fórmula empresarial que permite la defensa de los intereses de los agricultores/as y ganadero/as socios de nuestras cooperativas y SAT.

Name: DEPURGAN. Depuración de purines ganaderos
Description:
DEPURGAN es un sistema de tratamiento de purines de EUROGAN, situado en Ejea de los Caballeros, Zaragoza.
El objetivo es llegar a tratar 20m3 a la hora de purín y reducir los principales componentes del purín que suponen un riesgo medioambiental. Tales como el nitrógeno, fósforo, materia orgánica y metales pesados.

Esto se consigue mediante una sucesión de tratamientos físicos-químicos. En nuestro caso estos tratamientos son la homogeneización, separación sólido-líquido mediante la centrifugación, coagulación-floculación y una última separación sólido-líquido mediante electrocoagulación.

Con esto se consiguen dos residuos uno sólido y otro líquido. Con el residuo sólido el objetivo es producir pellets, con una mezcla equitativa de purín y madera de pino. Y con el residuo líquido fertilizantes.

Por un lado, un estudio optimo de su INSTALACIÓN, segundo, la incorporación al sistema de un buen emisor o TRANSMISOR DE CALOR en el lugar de reposo de los lechones, y tercero, el del CONTROL TOTAL del sistema a través de un regulador que gestione todas las variables que intervienen en que un lechón se mantenga acostado en la placa entre toma y toma de la madre el mayor tiempo posible, evitando al máximo el riesgo de aplastamientos e incrementando de forma paralela el peso del lechón al destete.

Name: SIPOC - The Italian Syndicate of Meat Ovines Producers
Description:
SIPOC is the Italian Syndicate of Meat Ovines Producers

SIPOC is syndicate part of FederFauna Confederation, to the support of all Italian sheepmeat breeders. SIPOC is an authoritative voice that brings the claims of the sheep meat sector to the national institutional and commercial offices.

In the sheepmeat sector, cumbersome bureaucracy, unsuccessful consultancy, complex documents, legal disputes are on the agenda, SIPOC has arisen to address and resolve all these situations.

Our interest is to give voice, body and unity to all those realities that have actually given life to the sheep meat production sector for decades. This sector is having a driving force thanks to the constant increase in demand for raw materials, but this push forward is often dissipated and absorbed by the many (too many) organizational and bureaucratic hindrances.

Today, just to ride the surge in demand from the global and nationale market, the time has come to join forces, now more than ever it is essential to create "critical mass" to impact the national market and influence it. Having a solid national supply chain alongside an authoritative voice who can take a position in institutional and commercial offices to advocate the rights of all people who live and work in the tough sheepmeat sector is now essential.

If you have decided to face this system that ignores our specific needs and rights, sign up for SIPOC, and we will give you all the support and tools you need!

Chez BOA, nous croyons que chaque entreprise peut jouer un rôle crucial dans la protection de notre planète. Name: Editora Comunnicar
Description:
Somos uma editora de livros que presta muito mais atenção em você.
Diferente das editoras comerciais, a Comunnicar surgiu em definitivo com a possibilidade de impressão de pequena tiragem e sob demanda.
Usou do seu conhecimento em prestação de serviços à outras editoras e começou a trabalhar diretamente com o autor, isso ocorreu na virada do século XXI.
Aqui quem decide sob o conteúdo da obra é você.
Além da seleção rigorosa que você é submetido nas editoras comerciais, são eles que decidem como sua capa vai ficar, sobre o título do livro, quantas imagens irão entrar e etc. Geralmente isso é feito por profissionais que entendem do assunto. Na prática muitos autores ficam instatisfeitos.
Outro ponto negativo é que você é apenas mais um entre vários, ou seja, dedicação, tempo e energia limitados a você.
O processo de comercialização e marketing que nem sempre é mais eficiente, também fica a cargo do editor. Ou seja você fica sabendo de uma livraria que gostaria de ter os seus livros, mas o vendedor pode nunca passar por lá. Ainda tem a falta de controle na divulgação.
Prestador de serviço não escolhe você é você que seleciona.
Na nossa Editora os serviços oferecidos são limitados apenas na possibilidade do autor pagar, não pela disposição ou tempo do profissional. Os prazos são determinados, o que você resolver colocar na obra sai impresso.

Name: Treebos
Description:
Treebos manages standardized rural units prepared for organic food production, applying the concepts of crowdfunding to sustainable agriculture. We call these areas "Orchards of the Future".
 
It works like this: on our website  you can choose one of our Orchards closest to you, and the kind of fruit you’d want to grow. Treebos will plant the tree for you, will take care of your tree, and you can keep track of its growth over the internet. When your tree starts producing, you will receive part of the harvest at your home, and with the surplus, you can decide to give it to someone else, donate it to charity, or Treebos can sell it and give you the profit. 
 
The Treebos proposal changes your role in the food production chain. With Treebos, you will no longer be only a consumer, but also a true food producer, allowing you to contribute to the increasing world food needs, generating employment and sustainability, in a fun and engaging way.

Our Vision:
Nurturing communities, through nurturing gardens.

Our Mission:
The Campus Community Garden is dedicated to building healthy, interactive urban communities through the collective production of locally grown, organic food. Drawing on the varied expertise at the University and within the local community, this garden emphasizes education and sustainability.

In 1998, McKinney Land and Cattle Company, LLC was formed and our beef business expanded. Our family moved to a ranch and also obtained area leases to raise more beef. Currently, we specialize in Angus grass-fed and grain-finished steers. McKinney Land and Cattle Company involves our entire family. Name: JAB Farm & Nursery
Description:
Operating with sustainable and regenerative practices in mind JAB Farm & Nursery seeks to change the way we look at feeding our communities. 

While we build out our longterm infrastructure and get fully organized here are a few of the highlights about our farm currently. We have an apiary made up of three active hives. Accompanied by native pollinators, our busy bee hives service rolling acres of berry fields, wildflower meadows and gardens. Our fields include 9 varieties of haskap berry growing alongside some raspberry, blueberry and strawberry that allow our fields to produce a seemingly endless stream of blooms that culminates in the fall when our saffron harvest takes place. This season we've also added hazelnuts to the farm with nearly 100 young orchard trees going into the fields, we can't wait for them to start producing!  

As well, our farm includes a greenhouse and soon a full market garden designed to provide fresh produce and nursery seedlings to our community. Our indoor grow rooms cultivate a variety of mushrooms that we produce both fresh and dehydrated.

Stay tuned and follow along as we continue to expand and build out. Website coming soon!

Name: Pomponio Ranch, LLC
Description:
We breed, raise, and train world class show jumping horses from our champion stallions and mares. Our top stallions, chosen from proven and highly desirable European bloodlines, have outstanding careers in International Jumping competitions at heights of 1.50 meters or higher. In addition, our mares have also had successful jumping careers and many have achieved the “Elite” status from the Belgian Warmblood Society.about-side-photo-500

We have produced two Champions of the International Jumper Four-Year Old Futurity. Our other young horses can be seen competing successfully at 1.0–1.30 meters at shows around California.

Located in a peaceful, scenic valley between San Gregorio and Pescadero, our horses graze on lush grasses, watered by our abundant springs and reservoir. That’s unusual here in California! Surrounded by sheep, cows, and families with kids, our horses are calm and gentle in nature. Our foals grow up on green pastures and are handled in a quiet manner from birth. We have veterinarian-supervised feeding programs for optimal nutrition so that their skeletal and muscular structure develop at the best rate for soundness and longevity. Shortly after they are started under saddle, they are ridden both in our new, state-of-the-art ring and all over the ranch to develop both physically and mentally. Our goal is to breed and sell top quality American bred horses, advancing the future of the international show jumping sport.

Name: Fattoria La Frisona
Description:
Fattoria la Frisona, nome derivante dalla razza bovina allevata sin dalle origini, è oggi alla terza generazione. 
Le sue origini risalgono al 1934 quando nonno Antonio Colagiacomo all’età di 26 anni con nonna Emma iniziarono ad allevare bovini di razza Frisona per la produzione di latte che poi veniva messo in brocche e trasportato con la vignarola (tipico carretto del tempo). Il latte prodotto veniva trasformato in formaggi e ricotta e venduto nei paesi limitrofi. Negli anni ’60 i nonni con l’aiuto dei due figli maschi, ormai adolescenti, compravano il primo terreno sul quale costruivano casa e la prima vera stalla in muratura che poteva ospitare gli animali in stabulazione fissa in n. di 40 posti. Negli ’70, quando ancora il latte poteva essere venduto “crudo” e non pastorizzato, i due fratelli decisero di aprire una latteria in paese. Con l’introduzione del divieto di vendita di latte crudo, la latteria in seguito si trasformò in bar, mentre proseguirono ad ampliare l’attività di allevamento dei bovini. Negli anni lavorando la passione per questi docili animali è cresciuta sempre di più ed ha spinto anche i nipoti ad ampliare le conoscenze e l’attività.Oggi, alla terza generazione, Fattoria la Frisona torna a vendere il latte di alta qualità direttamente al consumatore avendo integrato l’allevamento con un impianto di pastorizzazione ed imbottigliamento, chiudendo così la filiera del latte.

Name: Herenboeren Hoeksche Waard
Description:
Een Herenboerderij is een duurzaam opererend, kleinschalig coöperatief gemengd bedrijf. Het is ongeveer 20 hectare groot en brengt in beginsel voedsel voort. Maar zoveel mensen, zoveel wensen en dus werkt elke Herenboerderij uiteindelijk net een tikkie anders. Toch is er wel een rode lijn te ontdekken in de manier waarop een Herenboerderij draait.

De boerderij verbouwt een grote variatie aan groente, fruit en vlees. De huishoudens halen wekelijks zelf het vers geoogste eten op bij de boerderij. We eten het hele jaar door van onze eigen grond en verbouwen alles zo biologisch en natuur-inclusief mogelijk. Zo zijn we goed voor het land, onszelf en de biodiversiteit in de omgeving!

Een enthousiaste groep van 5 kartrekkers is vastbesloten een Herenboerderij in de Hoeksche Waard te realiseren. De coöperatie Herenboeren Hoeksche Waard is opgericht, de ledenwerving is in volle gang en de zoektocht naar grond begint zijn vruchten af te werpen. Geïnteresseerd? Bezoek onze website!

Name: Phylize
Description:
Modern ve endüstriyel yetiştiriciliğe karşı değiliz, sadece geleneksel yetiştiriciliği modernleştiriyoruz. 

Bu fikirden yola çıkarak herkesin taze gıdaya erişimini destekleyecek süper gıdaya odaklandık; Mikro yeşillikler... Modern yaşamın bir sonucu olarak doğal gıdalar yerini  endüstriyel gıdalar ve takviye edici gıdalara bıraktı. Oldukça yüksek maliyetlere sahip takviye edici gıdalara bir alternatif olarak, şık tasarımı ve kolay kullanımı ile yetiştiriciliği sevdirecek, evlerinizde ve işyerlerinizde kendi mikro yeşilliklerinizi yetiştirebilmenizi sağlayan Phylize Mikro Yeşillik Yetiştirme Kiti ile çok yakında sizlerleyiz.

Kendi sağlığınızı yetiştirin...

Mikro yeşillikler, sağlık için önemli vitamin ve mineraller içerir, ancak geniş kitleler tarafından bilinmeyen ve tüketilmeyen bir niş üründür. Phylize, sağlıklı mikro yeşillik yetiştirmeyi kolaylaştıran bir üründür. Zaman ve kaynak tasarrufu sağlayarak manuel ekim süreçlerini azaltır. Aşırı tohum kullanımını önler, suyu verimli kullanır ve doğal gübre içerir. 4 tohum yatağı ile çeşitlilik sunar ve abonelik sistemiyle kullanıcıları destekler. Estetik tasarımı ev dekorasyonuna uyum sağlar, mikro yeşilliklerin büyümesiyle ortama şıklık katar. 

Yakın zamanda başta Amerika Birleşik Devletleri ve Avrupa’da yaygınlaşan mikro yeşillik üretimi ve tüketimi alışkanlığını, Türkiye’ye kazandırmak ve sağlıklı yaşama katkı sağlamak istiyoruz. Gelecekte detaylarını paylaşacağımız 2. ürünümüz "Phylize Fuzz" modelimizle dünyanın en büyük kitlesel fonlama platformu Kickstarter’da yerimizi alacağız.

Description:
GT Moringa Ltd. is a venture based in Bangladesh, devoted to providing its customers with completely natural products and utmost satisfaction. Here, we are all about ensuring we deliver to you the finest quality plant-based products, especially Moringa.

‘Bringing Businesses and Community Together with Moringa’, GT Moringa Limited is committed to realizing this goal. This initiative is not only a business but also a social movement. Rajib Parvez Raju's more than six years of empirical knowledge and social research on economic emancipation through social entrepreneurship in Moringa cultivation and marketing has been combined with fit and healthy living through Moringa.

To make this goal a reality, GTML has set up producer groups for community farming, contract farming and homestead cultivation of Moringa in 20 districts of Bangladesh. A model of Moringa cultivation and processing has been developed under the supervision of a team of skilled and trained workers. Moringa leaves are producing food for humans and cattle. Besides, with the aim of creating a growing market for the product and building an important position for it, the production of various types of by-products from Moringa leaves is ongoing.

Name: VOGDAYA FARMS
Description:
" Cultivating Prosperity, Nourishing Futures 

Welcome to VOGDAYA Farms – your local source of diverse agricultural excellence nestled in the heart of Mpatasie-Trede, Ashanti, Ghana. Spanning lush 10 acres, we're more than a farm; we're a thriving ecosystem of livestock, poultry, aquaculture, and bountiful vegetables.


 Seizing Opportunity: As COVID-19 reshaped horizons, we recognized an unmet need – fortified local food production. With insights and determination, VOGDAYA Farms emerged, redefining the local supply chain and nourishing communities.

 Growing Together: Since our March 2020 inception, we've evolved – now  combining diverse production of aquaculture, horticulture and food processing. A synergy of flavors and well-being in one space.

 Powering Collaborations: We're not just farmers; we're partners. Aligning with like-minded souls, we're forging pathways towards a resilient agricultural future. Together, we're sowing seeds of prosperity, ensuring food security, and nurturing tomorrow's bounty.

 Seizing the Moment: Our landscape is rich with possibilities:

1 Livestock market: Riding the surge in demand for quality livestock, we're poised to providing nourishment that resonates.

2 Kumasi Connection: With Kumasi's bustling retail network, our farm-to-table journey finds a swift route, enriching households across the city.

3 Broiler Brilliance: In a region hungry for quality broilers, we spread our wings, catering to restaurants, hotels, schools, and beyond – with an eye on export.

 Grown for Good: VOGDAYA Farms – a growing legacy of quality, sustainability, and shared success. With every harvest, we're sowing the seeds of a thriving agricultural landscape, ensuring a brighter future for all.

Join us on this vibrant journey. Together, we're cultivating prosperity, nourishing futures, and redefining agricultural excellence.

Name: PREVPA Grupo Operativo
Description:
El Grupo Operativo de prevención frente a la Peste Porcina Africana en España trabaja en transferir herramientas innovadoras para preparar y formar al sector porcino y al subsector cinegético en España frente a la PPA. 

Los objetivos específicos del proyecto son:

- Contribuir a una eficaz estrategia de gestión de las poblaciones de jabalíes en España.
- Preparar el sector de la ganadería porcina para reducir el riesgo en las ganaderías asociado al jabalí.
- Mejorar la capacidad de compartir datos y conocimientos entre los sectores implicados en la preparación de la respuesta frente a la PPA.

Los socios del Proyecto son el Instituto de Investigación en Recursos Cinegéticos (IREC); la Asociación Interprofesional del Cerdo Ibérico (ASICI); la Asociación Agraria de Jóvenes Agricultores (ASAJA); la Asociación Interprofesional de la Carne de Caza (ASICCAZA); la Organización Interprofesional Agroalimentaria del Porcino de Capa Blanca (INTERPORC); la Fundación Artemisan; la Real Federación Española de Caza (RFEC) y la Asociación de Propietarios y Titulares para la Gestión Cinegética y Conservación del Medio Ambiente en Extremadura (APROCA Extremadura).

Analizamos la producción primaria de carne y leche bovina en Colombia, solucionando todos los aspectos relacionados con los requisitos sanitarios y de inocuidad establecidos por el gobierno nacional, logrando que las explotaciones ganaderas obtengan su certificación oficial.

Somos expertos en:

1. Programas de implementación de BPG.

2. Consultorías y  auditorías para la implementación y certificación oficial en BPG.

3. Capacitación en BPG de profesionales, técnicos, ganaderos y/o administradores de explotaciones ganaderas. 

4. Talleres de implementación en BPG dirigidos a ganaderos, técnicos y/o profesionales.

5. Giras técnicas en BPG dirigidos a ganaderos, técnicos y/o profesionales.

6. Elaboración de procedimientos para la implementación de las BPG.

7. Elaboración de procedimientos operativos estandarizados (POES) de saneamiento.

Son objectif : recréer, sur l’ensemble du domaine du Château du Launay, d’une surface de 400 hectares, un écosystème aussi bien forestier qu’agricole.

Naast de agrarische activiteiten worden er activiteiten georganiseerd om de verbinding tussen de omwonenden onderling en hun verbinding met voedsel te versterken. Je kunt hierbij denken aan gezamenlijke maaltijden, workshops en seizoensfeesten.  

De Wickevoorter Stadsboeren zoekt mensen die mee willen doen om ons unieke initiatief verder te ontwikkelen. Concreet hebben we nu 1 hectare groenteteelt (zelfoogsttuin), 600m2 plukbloementuin, ruim een halve hectare fruitgaard (aardbeien, bessenstruiken en bomen), kippen en varkens en een boerderijwinkel.

Name: LUSOPRESS.tv
Description:
A Lusopress.TV é um meio de comunicação que tem como objectivo promover e fomentar a língua portuguesa através da elaboração de conteúdos informativos e de entretenimento.

Numa atitude inovadora e independente a Lusopress.TV apresenta-se como uma alternativa para os cerca de 5 milhões de falantes da língua portuguesa espalhados por todo o mundo.

A Lusopress.TV aposta numa informação isenta, cuidada e reúne uma equipa de profissionais experientes nas mais diversas áreas.

Atendendo às exigências do público lusófono a Lusopress.TV preparou uma grelha de programação generalista capaz de chegar a todas as faixas etárias.

Destacam-se as áreas da política, economia, sociedade, desporto, cultura e ainda um espaço para os mais novos, para que cedo comecem a ter contacto com a língua portuguesa.

Aqui também há um espaço dedicado às comunidades, um espaço onde os portugueses residentes no estrangeiro podem partilhar as vivências que têm no país de acolhimento. A ideia é mostrar a boa integração da comunidade portuguesa, nas mais diversas áreas, nos países onde residem.

Segundo o Observatório da Emigração, Portugal tem emigrantes em 140 dos 190 países do mundo, sendo a França a nação que concentra mais portugueses. Foi para responder a esta “comunidade dispersa “ que nasceu o projecto Lusopress.TV, porque acreditamos que a Internet é um meio de comunicação, por excelência, capaz de chegar a todos. 

A Lusopress.TV tem a sua redacção central em Paris e conta num futuro próximo com uma rede de correspondentes, sedeados nos países da Comunidade de Língua Portuguesa. Para o efeito serão levadas a cabo algumas parcerias com meios de comunicação social espalhados pela diáspora.

Name: Hvidkilde Gods
Description:
Hvidkilde Gods ejes i dag af Carl Johan greve Ahlefeldt-Laurvig-Lehn. Han har ejet det siden 2018, hvor han overtog det fra sin far Christian greve Ahlefeldt-Laurvig-Lehn. Godset som virksomhed består af flere driftsgrene og en masse andre aktiviteter, som kommer befolkningen på Sydfyn og gæster og turister omkring Hvidkilde til gode.

Hvidkilde Gods’ historie strækker sig tilbage til 1300-tallet og er i dag en moderne virksomhed med godt 30 ansatte, der driver ca. 1.750 hektar skovbrug, 1.250 hektar landbrug og mere end 70 udlejningsejendomme omkring godset, samt nogle erhvervslejemål. Hertil kommer jagtudlejning, grusgrav, solceller, mountainbike track og events i godsets riddersal.

Godset spiller en væsentlig rolle i lokalsamfundet og har desuden en stor berøringsflade til en lang række andre interessenter, heriblandt politikere og organisationer.

Hvidkilde er på mange måder mere end en arbejdsplads. De historiske bygninger, den smukke beliggenhed og de stolte traditioner udgør en både forpligtende og fascinerende ramme om en spændende hverdag, hvor det falder naturligt som medarbejder at engagere sig og tage ansvar.

Name: Spice Creek
Description:
Spice Creek Farm is a Black-led agricultural enterprise in Brandywine, Maryland, dedicated to regenerative farming, food sovereignty, and land stewardship. Rooted in the Black Agrarian Corridor, we are reclaiming land, restoring traditional agricultural practices, and building a community-driven food system that prioritizes sustainability and equity.

Our farm integrates diverse soil health practices, including cover cropping, conservation tillage, and on-farm composting, to enhance soil fertility and reduce reliance on external inputs. We specialize in nutrient-dense vegetable production and pasture-raised poultry while implementing conservation strategies to restore ecosystem balance.

Beyond food production, Spice Creek serves as a hub for agricultural education and workforce development. Through hands-on training, workshops, and partnerships with regional farming networks, we equip the next generation of land stewards with the skills and knowledge to build sustainable farm businesses.

Our work extends beyond our fields. We actively collaborate with neighboring farms, agricultural organizations, and policymakers to promote land access, food justice, and environmental resilience. By fostering strong local food systems, we are strengthening the economic and ecological future of Southern Maryland.

At Spice Creek, we believe that farming is an act of reclamation, resistance, and resilience. By investing in soil health and sustainable land management, we are creating a thriving model of regenerative agriculture—one that nourishes both people and the planet for generations to come.

Akkervarkens lopen het hele jaar door buiten. Hier doen ze nuttig werk. Ze eten onkruid met wortel en al op, creëren nieuwe open plekken in het bos of eten de restanten van een oogst op. Ze doen wat een varken graag doet; wroeten in de grond.

We hebben de gehele levensloop van onze Akkervarkens in eigen beheer. Van geboorte tot aan de slacht. Hierdoor kunnen wij een dierwaardig bestaan en vlees van constante goede kwaliteit garanderen.

Wij verhuren onze dieren voor klussen in de natuur aan particulieren, boeren en gemeentes. 

Daarnaast geven wij rondleidingen bij ons op de boerderij en lezingen op locatie. 
De voormalige stallen zijn verbouwd tot groepsruimtes voor o.a.  vergaderingen en recreatie zoals bedrijfsuitjes.

Wij zijn een middel groot familiebedrijf dat gefocust is op dier en welzijn binnen de veehouderij. Het is onze visie dat met oplettende zorg en detail voor aandacht het dier gezond laten opgroeien.  Zodat we een hoge kwaliteit en voedsel veilig vlees kunnen leveren aan de slachterij en aan de consument.

Door met gezond boerenverstand te kijken binnen het bedrijf, is het doel om het management zo basaal mogelijk te houden. Waarom moeilijk doen als het makkelijk kan? De basis willen we toegepast hebben voordat er grote veranderingen doorgevoerd worden. Vanuit een sterke ruggengraat (duidelijke basis) kun je het bedrijf hogerop brengen.

Personeel staat hoog in het vaandel. We vinden het belangrijk dat ze betrokken worden bij beslissingen en dat ze inbreng hebben om bedrijfsprocessen te verbeteren.

Name: TumiVale Ltd.
Description:
At Tumivale, we are committed to producing premium-quality rabbit meat through sustainable, humane, and innovative farming practices in Ghana. Our mission is to provide healthy, high-protein meat to local consumers while developing strong export partnerships that meet the strictest international standards.

Located in a purpose-built, modern facility, we prioritize animal welfare, biosecurity, and environmental responsibility. Every stage of our process — from breeding and feeding to veterinary care and processing — is designed to ensure the highest quality meat and traceability for our customers.

Our Products and Services:

• Fresh, locally farmed rabbit meat – supplied to restaurants, hotels, supermarkets, and households.

• Processed and packaged cuts – prepared to meet both local and international market requirements.

• Export-ready supply – compliant with food safety, veterinary, and packaging standards for international trade.

• Breeding stock and farmer support – providing healthy, well-documented rabbits to new and existing farms.

By combining modern farming technology with deep respect for traditional agriculture, Tumivale Rabbit Farming is helping diversify protein sources in Ghana, create jobs in rural communities, and position rabbit meat as a healthy, sustainable choice for the future.

Our vision is to become West Africa’s most trusted and innovative rabbit meat supplier, known for quality, reliability, and ethical farming. Whether you are a local chef, a health-conscious consumer, or an international importer, Tumivale is your partner for premium rabbit products you can trust.

Name: Desert Mountain Grass-Fed Beef
Description:
We're a cooperative of small family ranches, working together to restore our lands & ecosystems while tenderly caring for our cattle from birth to finish. ll Desert Mountain families practice low-stress livestock handling. There is no ranch so large in our co-op that family members and trusted ranch hands don’t directly oversee our cattle’s health and well-being. Our cattle are 100% rancher-owned from birth to harvest.

Desert Mountain Grass-Fed Beef was created by family ranchers to raise high-quality, 100% grass-fed beef. The original founding families are Wilsey ranch from Marsing, Idaho, and Howard ranches from Hammett, Idaho. Today, Desert Mountain has grown into a co-operative of more than 10 ranching and farming families across the Inland Northwest.

We raise a breed of cattle of Japanese origin called Akaushi. Some people call it “red wagyu.” We call it perfect. Akaushi Genetics provide the marbling that our customers want in their beef. Using Akaushi cattle is part of what sets us apart from other grass-fed producers. That’s why you find it in so many of the best grocery stores across the West.

Name: Land & Livestock International, Inc.
Description:
We are an agribusiness management firm providing educational, consulting and management  services to the range livestock industry.

We provide ecologically and financially sustainable land management that will enhance natural processes,  increase profits and steadily build wealth.

Our approach to land management is a circular and never ending process of planning, implementation, monitoring, controlling, correcting unfavorable variances and re-planning. We view the land, the livestock, the people and the money as one. 

Our approach is comprehensive and adaptive. We take into account changing circumstances such as drought, herd size and seasonal fluctuations in weather.

We use an objective method of setting priorities that ensures profits are maximized, a positive cash flow is maintained, debt crises are avoided, wealth is continually built while the land is improves.

Ecosystems are complex. Therefore, we do not advocate forcing the land to fit our demands with strong armed, high energy consumptive, methods. We adapt our methods to the environment.

We do not manage for any particular species. We manage for the health of the ecosystem as a whole. The biodiversity created in the process increases the populations of all living creatures from soil microbes to insects to birds (including game birds like dove, quail, ducks and geese).

Consider all of this together and you can see why we can say, with confidence, that converting from conventional management practices to our method can increase your rangeland carrying capacity fourfold and your profits by up to 300%.

Browse our site at www.landandlivestockinternational.com and give us a call.

Name: CIVAM de l'Oasis
Description:
Le CIVAM de l’Oasis est une association de développement agricole et rural issue de l’éducation populaire, adhérente aux valeurs du Réseau CIVAM, et qui développe une expertise depuis 2008 sur les interactions entre agronomie et biodiversité en zone de grandes cultures. Nous travaillons principalement en Champagne crayeuse, et plus précisément sur les départements de la Marne et de l’Aube.

Notre association est un lieu de rencontre pour ceux qui veulent réconcilier l’agronomie et la biodiversité, dans un objectif de construction d’agrosystèmes cohérents et résilients. C’est également un lieu de débats entre citoyens et agriculteurs, afin de contribuer à des campagnes vivantes et solidaires.

Nous appuyons notre accompagnement sur des connaissances obtenues grâce aux applications de terrain, auprès de groupes d’agriculteurs.rices engagé.e.s dans des réflexions de changements de systèmes en lien avec divers partenaires. L’objet de notre association est d’accompagner ces fermes vers une meilleure résilience des systèmes de production et une autonomie décisionnelle, par le développement d’échanges de pratiques visant l’équilibre biologique des agrosystèmes, la diminution de leur dépendance aux intrants, le renforcement de leur ancrage territorial.

Nous sommes également en train d’approfondir notre accompagnement sur de nouveaux enjeux, et, à ce titre, nous animons un groupe de femmes en non-mixité choisie depuis 2023.

Name: Dykhoeve
Description:
Op de Dykhoeve lopen de dieren, zoals het zou moeten, lekker buiten. Het ideaal van Dykhoeve is een landbouwsysteem te ontwikkelen dat volledig samenwerkt met de natuur. Een systeem dat voedsel van hoge kwaliteit levert en economisch perspectief biedt voor de toekomst.

De varkens wroeten zelf hun kostje bij elkaar en hebben alle ruimte om te ravotten en rond te scharrelen. De Dykhoeve heeft twee soorten runderen: de blonde d’Aquitaine en een kruising van de blonde d’Aquitaine met het oeroude Hollandse runderras Maas Rijn IJssel. Grote dieren die heerlijk vlees geven. Het vlees heeft een fijne vleesdraad met weinig vet aanzet is mooi gemarmerd en geeft een boterzachte biefstuk.

De varkens (50 Duroc’s en 25 Piétrain’s) leven op 3 hectare in 3 verschillende groepen en hebben dus alle ruimte. Ze eten de hele dag door van het kruidenrijke gras. Voor de extra energie krijgen ze luzerne, mais, raapschroot en geplette tarwe. Alles van lokale boeren.

Onze manier van werken zorgt voor weinig transportbewegingen. Ook de mest hoeft niet te worden afgevoerd. Dat blijft op het land, natuurlijk verdeeld en zonder stikstofuitstoot.

De winkel is op woensdag en vrijdag geopend van 15.00 tot 18.00 en op zaterdag van 10.00 tot 16.00 uur.

Je bent van harte uitgenodigd om een kijkje te komen nemen.

Name: VisuInnovation
Description:
We stand out for our pioneering use of drone technology to optimize agriculture, with a focus on precision viticulture. Initially targeting vineyards, we offer various solutions, from drone sales to personalized services, with specialized pilots operating drones in both traditional and mechanized vineyards. As exclusive distributors of the European company "ABZ Innovation," we ensure the quality and reliability of our products, meeting stringent European certifications. Additionally, we are expanding our operations to the agroforestry market, providing innovative solutions for sustainable forest management.

We have also established a strategic partnership with a vocational school, subsidized by a Municipal Chamber, to offer specialized training in drone operation, focusing on vineyards that are difficult to access. Our mission is to drive innovation in agriculture by providing advanced solutions that reduce the use of chemicals, protect the environment, and streamline work processes. We have a talented and diverse team, composed of experts in aviation, marketing, information technology, and leadership, all committed to transforming the agricultural industry.

We aim to foster innovation and lead the way towards a more efficient and environmentally responsible agriculture sector. In parallel, we are associated with projects utilizing drones for other purposes, ranging from goods transportation to ensuring the safety of people and property.

info@visuinnovation.com

Name: Heavenly Horse Haven, Inc.
Description:
Heavenly Horse Haven is non-profit horse and farm animal rescue.  We specialize in unwanted, neglected and abused horses and other farm animals.  Our goal is to rehabilitate, retrain and find each animal a new and loving "forever" home.  We educate potential new owners on the care and feeding and other special needs and financial responsibilities of animal ownership.

Although operation began several years prior, Heavenly Horse Haven was incorporated in 2008 and maintains a 501(c)(3) public charity status.  We are an all volunteer organization currently with no employees.  Because of this very dedicated group of volunteers, we are able to take-in, care for, retrain and rehabilitate these animals at minimum cost with a high level of care until their "forever" home is found.

We work with our local community, individuals, animal owners, animal organizations, animal control and other government agencies to help achieve our goals.

For additional information, please contact Gina at (951) 551-3561.

Amacı ve misyonu, ileri teknoloji tarım aletleri kullanarak hem yurt içinde hem de yurt dışında kaliteli yaban mersini üretmek ve satmaktır. Name: AVF-SN
Description:
AVF-Sénégal est une association de producteurs/trices agricoles créée le 20 Septembre 2020, reconnue par l’état du Sénégal le 25 Mars 2021. (N° enregistrement : 2020 GRSL/AA/PMB du 23 Mars 2021). Ses membres se sont engagés à pratiquer une agriculture écologique, durable, régénérative pour préserver/restaurer leurs bases productives agricoles à travers l’agroforesterie par les arbres fertilitaires. AVF-Sn par le paquet technique qu’elle diffuse cherche à restaurer la vie dans les sols et les écosystèmes naturels en associant toutes cultures végétales avec des espèces d’arbres dits fertilitaires à croissance rapide.
L’objectif visé par AVF est de progresser à un rythme annuel d’environs 200 000 arbres plantés par hectare/an toutes espèces confondues (haies vives, brises vents, arbres fertilitaires, arbres fruitiers) soit 200 ha.

L’initiateur d’AVF-Sénégal est Mansour Ndiaye, Expert Agroforestier. C’est lui qui a été à l’origine de l’introduction au Sénégal du système agroforestier portant sur l’utilisation d’arbres dits ‘fertilitaires’ à travers l’ONG APAF Sénégal (Association pour la Promotion des Arbres Fertilitaires, de l’Agroforesterie et de la foresterie), qu’il avait lui-même fondée en 2014 et dont il fut le directeur exécutif jusqu’en Octobre 2020. Depuis 2013, grâce à la vision de M. Ndiaye, l’ONG #APAF est intervenue dans plusieurs régions du Sénégal pour faire la promotion de l’agroforesterie par les Arbres Fertilitaires en milieu rural. Après 7 ans de service, il quitta APAF Sénégal pour créer avec un groupe de producteurs agricoles de la vallée du fleuve Sénégal l’association Afrique Verte et Fertile-Sénégal (AVF-SN) dont il est le Directeur exécutif. AVF-Sn est membre de la Plateforme Panafricaine d’organisations nationales du même nom qui poursuivent les mêmes missions et objectifs au Togo, Mali, Burkina Faso’.

Name: PSG Móveis
Description:
A PSG  Indústria de Moveis Ltda foi fundada em 16 de julho de 2002. Desde lá, sempre esteve voltada para o mercado mobiliário. Teve origem no trabalho e sonho de um grupo de pessoas focadas no segmento residencial de renda média e média alta. Após mais de 12 anos, hoje a empresa se encontra em um parque industrial próprio com mais de 3.500m². O crescimento paulatino e sempre calculado em curvas de ascensão moderadas se relaciona claramente à origem do capital da empresa.  Esta característica sempre foi, em si, uma situação desafiadora para os paradigmas de excelência estabelecidos pela empresa. Para manter-se no primeiro time – aquele que estabelece (e pratica) os padrões éticos e de qualidade mais altos do mercado, para isto só há uma saída: é preciso se esforçar mais, saltar mais longe, acordar mais cedo e tratar de ser melhor a cada dia. Ao longo deste tempo, a PSG vem atendendo a demanda crescente de mobiliário de excelente acabamento, e com uma concepção inteligente. Atuando no comercio Varejista e Corporativo, a PSG executa a criação, desenvolvimento, comercialização e a produção dos seus produtos. Nossos produtos conjugam qualidade e design, perfeita expressão dos valores que agregamos em nosso trabalho. Através da inovação buscamos oferecer ao mercado valores justos e contínua excelência.
Em 2018 ao fim de dar continuidade aos anos de tradição a empresa se adaptou a um novo sistema mercadológico, mais atual e prestativo.
Location: Bento Gonçalves, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Agromada cooperative
Description:
Agromada cooperative is serving grains, vegetable and fruit farmers in Ukraine 

Cooperative Services.  Building growth. Building strong communities.

Whether it’s crop nutrients or other inputs to achieve optimal yields, or grain marketing and agribusiness services that help capture economic value, Agromada cooperative is helping farmers succeed. 

By providing services, such as collecting, storing, processing and selling the harvest, Agromada closes the gap between producers on the one hand, and consumers and the processing industry on the other. Thanks to our extensive storage and transport resources, we can act as a buffer to bridge the time lags between seasonal production subject to environmental influences and ongoing, demand-oriented consumption.

Agromada cooperative foster extensive direct partnerships with farmers growing grains, vegetables and fruits and support them in all stages, from sowing the seed and crop protection through to the harvest. Naturally this also applies to farms with animal husbandry where we supply optimally mixed feedstuff and advice on animal health.

Farmers need Agromada cooperative to provide the services and functions they would have a hard time doing themselves. Our cooperative services include functions like building facilities to handle grain, developing domestic and international markets for commodities, providing a reliable supply of inputs, and sharing the product expertise producers need to raise crops and livestock. Agromada cooperative serve as business advisors, providing the input to help us make decisions based on the  needs of local grains, vegetable and fruit producers. With our cooperative support Agromada members gain size, scale and speed in an ever-changing global economy.

Name: Floriazoris

Description:
La plataforma de monitorización de ganado bovino es una herramienta tecnológica diseñada para ayudar a los ganaderos a supervisar y gestionar su ganado de manera eficiente. Utiliza dispositivos de seguimiento colocados en el ganado para recopilar datos en tiempo real sobre su ubicación, movimiento, salud y producción de leche. Esta información se puede acceder a través de una aplicación móvil o una plataforma web, lo que permite a los ganaderos monitorizar su ganado desde cualquier lugar y en cualquier momento.

Además, la plataforma también proporciona alertas automatizadas para cualquier problema de salud o comportamiento anormal detectado en el ganado, lo que permite a los ganaderos tomar medidas rápidas para abordar cualquier problema. En resumen, la plataforma de monitorización de ganado bovino permite una mayor eficiencia, reducción de costos y una mejor calidad de vida del ganado.

Name: Progetto DIVA
Description:
Il Dipartimento di Scienze e Politiche Ambientali (ESP) dell'Università degli Studi di Milano e l'ARAL, Associazione Regionale Allevatori Lombardia, si sono uniti per dar vita al progetto DIVA. 
Gli allevamenti intensivi stanno affrontando sfide importanti in cui tecnologia e digitalizzazione giocano un ruolo fondamentale per migliorare la gestione quotidiana degli allevamenti, il benessere animale, la sostenibilità ambientale e la qualità delle produzioni.
Il progetto ha individuato strumenti avanzati di Precision Livestock Farming che, con un'installazione estremamente semplice, possono monitorare costantemente la salute degli animali in allevamenti avicoli, suinicoli e bovini. Si tratta in particolare di nasi elettronici per l'individuazione precoce delle enteropatiti, microfoni per il rilevamento delle patologie respiratorie e soluzioni di intelligenza artificiale per la previsione dell'insorgenza di malattie nei bovini.
Una maggiore diffusione di questi strumenti può contribuire a ridurre l'uso di antibiotici negli allevamenti e a migliorarne le performance produttive, il benessere animale e, allo stesso tempo, risponde alle crescenti richieste di trasparenza e tracciabilità alimentare da parte dei consumatori.

Il progetto DIVA è finanziato con l'ntervento SRH05 nel Complemento per lo Sviluppo Rurale 2023-2027 di Regione Lombardia, al fine di promuovere l’adozione di tecnologie di zootecnia di precisione (PLF) in allevamenti di polli da carne, suini e bovini, attraverso attività dimostrative e informative. 
Il sostegno finanziario ricevuto è pari a 192.120,20 euro di spesa pubblica totale (di cui 78.192,9 € di cofinanziamento dell’Unione Europea; 79.749,1 € di cofinanziamento nazionale; 34.178,2 € di cofinanziamento regionale). 
Per informazioni sulle opportunità di finanziamento, visita il sito dedicato al FEASR di Regione Lombardia https://bit.ly/FEASRLomb e della Commissione Europea https://bit.ly/UE-rural-dev.

Name: Corner House Farm
Description:
This is a private horse farm where instruction is given in horse riding and horse care Louise Jordan-Beam, BHSAI 

Louise is a  British Horse Society registered Assistant Instructor, (BHSAI),  who moved to the United States in 1992, and now lives with her  husband and 2 sons on their 25 acres horse farm in  Douglassville, PA. 

She brought all  this knowledge and experience to the US and starting teaching  and helping out at her local pony club, Berks Pony Club.  She  was the secretary, wrote and published the monthly newsletter,  was the show jumping and dressage coach with much success, and  eventually the District Commissioner.  She was also an examiner  for the regional Pony Club. 

Whilst doing this  Louise had 2 children, opened her own training facility and  competed on her own horse - only having time for one horse! 

Now Louise has 6  horses and ponies used for lessons and competing, and teaches at  her farm, Corner House Farm, and travels to teach as well.   Corner House Farm has a full size dressage arena, stadium jumps  and a low level cross country course, all of which are available  for hire to individuals and for clinics. 

She also invented  an all in one halter lead shank called the Emergency Halterlead,  which fits dogs all the way up to heavy horses and acts like a  control halter with a lead shank and is able to fit in your  pocket. 

Louise teaches to  British Horse Society standards whether in riding or horse care  with safety being the most important subject.  She approached  the BHS to see if she could teach their Horse Owners course in  the United Sates and was the first registered BHS instructor  given permission to do so.  She opened the door for others to  help spread the BHS standards in the US. 

She also writes books for children about one of her ponies.  There are 3 books currently.
