The main motto of the Congress is the "Nature & Innovation with due respect” for the global meat industry. 

The scientific program includes 10 plenary and parallel sessions, where 31 national and international speakers, worldwide recognized, will share their knowledge in different topics such as: 60 years of ICoMST´s congresses, trends in meat science and technology, meat and sustainability, consumer preferences and perceptions, meat quality, meat safety, meat processing and packaging, meat nutritive value and human health, animal welfare, meat biochemistry, genetics and meat quality, hot topics, etc. In addition, 24 short oral presentations will be performed from the selected papers presented to the Congress´s proceedings.

Name: Imperial Stock Ranch
Description:
The Imperial Stock Ranch, located in north central Oregon, has been operating continuously since 1871. The Imperial Stock Ranch has continuously produced sheep, cattle, grains and hay throughout its history.

In 1999, with wool processing and manufacturing facilities within the region closing, and long time domestic customers shifting to off-shore sources, the Imperial Stock Ranch's 142-year history raising sheep was seriously threatened. In an effort to keep sheep on the landscape, the Imperial Stock ranch introduced Imperial Yarn, its own line of 100% wool yarns in 2000. In addition to providing yarn for hand knitters, Imperial Stock Ranch has recently developed 100% domestic wool yarn for a number of global apparel brands.

The current ranch is approximately 32,000 acres or about 50 square miles. Production continues in all four commodities established in the early years, and continued throughout the ranch’s history: sheep, cattle, grains and hay. One of the last preserved examples of the large stock ranch empires that dotted the American West in the early 1990s, the Imperial Stock Ranch Headquarters Complex was designated a National Historic District in 1993.

Description:
Rede do Campo – Cantinho da Roça

Fundada em 1991 em Lavras (MG), a Rede do Campo – Cantinho da Roça nasceu do espírito empreendedor de André Luis Chalfoun de Souza, que começou produzindo e vendendo queijos, doces e quitandas. Com mais de 30 anos de história, a empresa é sócia-fundadora da Rede do Campo, primeira rede associativista do ramo agropecuário no sul de Minas, que hoje conta com mais de 50 lojas e um centro de distribuição em Alfenas.

 Agrícola – sementes, adubos, defensivos, insumos e organominerais da marca própria DOCAMPO.

 Pesca e utilidades gerais – ampla linha de produtos para lazer e vida no campo.

Além de produtos, oferecemos soluções, serviços e parcerias que fortalecem a vida no campo e na cidade. Nossa missão é ser o braço direito do produtor e do cliente urbano, sempre com foco em qualidade, preço justo e compromisso socioeconômico.

Visão: Ser a principal referência como grupo parceiro de clientes em Lavras e região até 2026.

Name: Island Guest Ranch
Description: Island Guest Ranch is a division of Island Ranch and Cattle Company, which was established in Oklahoma with the Oklahoma land runs of 1889 and 1893. It consists of 5000 acres in northwest Oklahoma, located on what was once an actual island in the Cimarron River. During your stay, you can horseback ride through beautiful Oklahoma terrain, fish, swim, hike, trap shoot or even get a lesson in roping! In the evening, you might enjoy a rodeo, a Native American powwow or country and western dancing. The ranch is abundant with varied types of wildlife and differing landscapes that represent the true beauty of Oklahoma.  The White family is a 5th generation ranching family spanning more than a hundred years of Oklahoma history. The ranch has its origins in the famous Oklahoma Land Runs when the Cherokee Outlet was divided into large cattle leases. Carl's grandfather was a wagon freighter and drover who, in the 1880's, transported goods from Kansas to Fort Supply and then south through Indian Territory to Fort Reno. Many nights he would camp on the islands in the Cimarron River. Game was plentiful and there was abundant feed and water for his team. As the years progressed, he came to know the islands quite well and when the U.S. Government decided to open the Cherokee land for settlement in 1893, Carl's grandfather knew the land he would "run for". Almost 100 years later, the ranch opened its doors to guests as a premier Oklahoma travel destination.

Ils vivent sur des parcelles de 10 à 15 hectares en totale liberté et en toute sécurité. La conjugaison des conditions climatiques, des reliefs et de l’environnement végétal, contribuent à la bonne santé et à la robustesse de l’ensemble de l’élevage. L’élevage compte actuellement une centaine de juments poulinières, ainsi qu’une dizaine d’étalons ayant sailli ou saillissant actuellement, et réservés uniquement aux juments de l’élevage. La plupart des jeunes juments poulinent une à deux fois avant d’être mises au travail.

Name: Biovisión Chile
Description:
Biovisión Chile es una empresa de base tecnológica dedicada a transformar el agro latinoamericano mediante soluciones integradas de ingeniería, datos y automatización.
Nos especializamos en apoyar proyectos de inversión agrícola que requieren datos cuantitativos confiables para maximizar su rentabilidad, eficiencia hídrica y resiliencia productiva. Combinamos tecnología de sensores, inteligencia artificial, visión computacional y modelamiento agroclimático para ofrecer herramientas precisas y escalables, orientadas a la toma de decisiones estratégicas en tiempo real.
Nuestro enfoque se centra en desarrollar plataformas adaptadas a los desafíos reales del sector agrícola, desde el diseño técnico de unidades de cultivo hasta la validación científica de indicadores clave como el estrés hídrico, el vigor vegetativo y el potencial productivo.

Ámbitos de especialización:
– Inteligencia agronómica aplicada a proyectos de inversión
– Monitoreo térmico, espectral y climático de cultivos
– Automatización de informes y visualización avanzada de datos
– Desarrollo de sistemas de bajo costo para agricultura de precisión

 Con presencia en Chile y redes de colaboración en América Latina, Biovisión Chile apunta a liderar la innovación agrícola regional con soluciones accesibles, científicamente validadas y orientadas al impacto económico y ambiental.

Name: GrowyTech Endüstriyel Tarım
Description:
GrowyTech is an agricultural technology company founded by a team with over 10 years of experience in industrial automation. Initially, we provided innovative solutions to various sectors of industry through our expertise in custom machine manufacturing and software development.

Today, under the GrowyTech brand, we operate in the field of industrial soilless agriculture. Our system is based on cultivating plants in NFT (Nutrient Film Technique) channels, and all processes can be remotely controlled through our proprietary software. This enables critical operations such as irrigation, nutrient balance, lighting, and climate control to be managed fully automatically, maximizing efficiency.

The Future of Smart Agriculture
At GrowyTech, the systems we develop are not only automation-driven, but also feature self-learning capabilities and automated error notifications. In case of malfunctions or abnormal conditions, our system instantly sends feedback via SMS, email, and emergency calls, ensuring uninterrupted agricultural processes.

“Smarter Agriculture, Greener Future!” is not just a slogan — it's our roadmap.

At GrowyTech, we aim to revolutionize agricultural production by harnessing the power of technology.

Name: Finca Dehesa Frías
Description:
Dehesa Frías es una finca ubicada a orillas del embalse del Huéznar. Se encuentra enmarcada en el Parque natural de la Sierra Norte de Sevilla, el cual abarca una gran parte de la reserva de la Biosfera-Dehesas de Sierra Morena.

OBJETIVOS:

- Diversificación e innovación dentro de actividades tradicionales en un entorno de sierra y dehesa.
- Apuesta por las energías renovables como uso alternativo, viable y sostenible en el medio rural.
- Compromiso con la agricultura integrada, no perturbadora del entorno de Parque Natural.
- Eliminación de intermediarios entre la producción agrícola-ganadera y el cliente final.
- Defensa de las actividades cinegéticas respetuosas y compatibles con el mantenimiento y mejora del medio ambiente.
- Responsabilidad con el entorno forestal y sostenibilidad a largo plazo de nuestra dehesa y nuestra empresa.
- Acercamiento de actividades agro-ganaderas a personas ajenas al mundo rural.

Aunque nuestra actividad principal es la agrícola-ganadera, en especial, el toro de lidia (Ganadería de D. ª Dolores Aguirre Ybarra), la ganadería ovina y la porcina, en los últimos años hemos llevado a cabo una intensa estrategia de diversificación incluyendo actividades de transformación y ocio.

Evolución
La empresa, constituida en 1980, se ha ido diversificando con el paso del tiempo. A las actividades tradicionales de la finca se han añadido varias iniciativas que persiguen aumentar la rentabilidad y la sostenibilidad de un sector muy castigado como es el agrícola-ganadero.

Estas actuaciones permiten hoy presentar, una empresa que conjuga lo más tradicional del campo andaluz con lo más innovador en iniciativas productivas y de sostenibilidad en el medio natural.

Dehesa Frías sigue apostando año tras año por la innovación y la diversificación y como resultado, hemos conseguido una finca líder en sostenibilidad en la Sierra Norte Sevillana.

Paolo e la sua famiglia hanno deciso di preservare il patrimonio ambientale che li circonda scegliendo l’impianto di vitigni resistenti e aderendo all’associazione PIWI INTERNATIONAL, ma anche supportando tra i primi l’associazione del territorio bellunese Consorzio Coste del Feltrino che con un’importante storicità documentata dallo statuto dei vignaioli indipendenti del 1517, tutt’oggi coltiva le pendici ghiaiose del Monte Aurin.

Name: Forest Lidar Ltd
Description:
Forest LiDAR Ltd – Smarter Forestry Through Data You Can Trust
About Us

Forestry is one of the most important industries on earth. It locks up carbon, supports wildlife, and underpins the future of farming, building, and climate resilience. Yet for all its importance, much of the data that drives forestry today still comes from people walking the ground with clipboards, counting trees by eye, and estimating what’s out there.

That worked for a long time. But the industry is changing fast. Pressure is growing to back up decisions with hard evidence – whether that’s proving carbon capture, measuring growth rates, or assessing how a restock is performing.

Forest LiDAR Ltd was set up to make that possible. We bring together drone technology, LiDAR scanning, multispectral and thermal imaging, and artificial intelligence to give forest owners, managers, and contractors clear, reliable data on what’s happening across their sites.

Our goal is simple: to help the forestry sector work smarter, safer, and faster – using accurate data that removes guesswork and supports better decisions on the ground.

 What We Do

Forest LiDAR provides a complete aerial analytics service for forestry and woodland projects across the UK.

We combine four different data sets in one flight:

LiDAR, which gives a 3D map of the ground and canopy

RGB imagery, which provides high-resolution visual mapping

Multispectral imaging, which measures plant health and growth

Thermal imaging, which highlights temperature and moisture variation

By combining these, we can produce an accurate digital model of a forest – from the ground surface right up through the canopy – and use AI to extract key metrics such as:

Stocking density

Tree counts and survival rates

Average height and canopy closure

Plant health (NDVI / NDRE indices)

Carbon and biomass estimates

Thermal anomalies and stress zones

This means a manager or estate forester can see exactly what’s happening across every compartment, with

Derrière chaque ferme, il y a des mains rugueuses, des cœurs dévoués, et des rêves parfois oubliés dans le tumulte des défis quotidiens. Alors, nous nous engageons à leur offrir les outils, le savoir-faire et l’accompagnement nécessaires pour transformer leurs efforts en succès durables.

Parce que pour nous, la réussite ne se mesure pas qu’en récoltes ou en chiffres. Elle se mesure au sourire de l’éleveur fier de son troupeau, à la paix intérieure du paysan qui sait qu’il travaille en harmonie avec la nature, et à l’espoir des générations futures.

Name: Regeneratieve zelfooogsttuin De Blije Bodem

Hierbij is belangrijk dat iedereen toegang heeft tot gezondene en lokale voeding, al onze deelnemers mogen naar draagkracht bijdragen. Oogsten mogen onze deelnemers zelf, op een moment dat het hen het beste uitkomt. Lokaal en supervers dus.

Maar De Blije Bodem is meer dan een groentetuin; we zijn hard bezig om van deze plek een groene oase maken, vol van leven en openbaar voor iedereen. Een plek van rust, maar ook van inspiratie & educatie, voor onze nieuwe generaties.

Description:
Genangus produce animales de gran valor genético, cumpliendo con todas las normas y estándares internacionales que permitan su comercialización a cualquier punto del planeta.
Como parte de su estrategia de crecimiento, Genangus se dedica al cultivo de soja en campos arrendados, en diferentes ubicaciones, buscando así minimizar riesgos climáticos.

Name: Redwing Ranch
Description:
Mission: Grazing forward—Regenerating land, livestock, and livelihoods.

Vision: At Redwing Ranch, we’re proving that ranching done right means healthy land, happy people, and profitable cattle. We work with nature, not against it, building soil, using livestock as a tool for regeneration, and cultivating a community rooted in resilience. We take risks, share what we learn, and lead by example—because the future of ranching is built on blending historic techniques with modern, science-based management, integrity, and a damn good team.

Name: Bronson Family Farm LLC
Description:
At Bronson Family Farm, we believe in growing more than crops. We’re cultivating a community built on health, sustainability, and togetherness. Our farm is more than just a place for fresh produce and family fun—it’s a beacon of hope for food security, workforce development, and lifelong learning. 

Through our Mission we’re addressing critical needs in our community:
	•	Providing fresh, nutritious food to families in need.
	•	Training the next generation of agricultural leaders.
	•	Supporting veterans and seniors with housing and care initiatives.
Every donation brings us closer to creating a thriving farm and educational hub that benefits all of Mahoning County and beyond. Your support will:
	•	Help us plant and harvest sustainable crops.
	•	Fund workshops that teach children and families about regenerative farming.
	•	Provide surplus food to local food banks, putting meals on tables.
	•	Equip veterans and youth with skills to build fulfilling careers in agriculture.
Together, we can make Bronson Family Farm a space where families come to learn, grow, and connect, and where every visit contributes to the health and well-being of our community.

Name: fidanistanbul.com
Description:
fidanistanbul.com, online alışveriş yapılabilen ve aynı zamanda bitkiler ile ilgili bilgilerin paylaşıldığı bir e-ticaret sitesidir.
2005 yılında peyzaj mimarları tarafından tasarlanmıştır. Bu alandaki en kapsamlı-en eski fidan, fide, tohum ve bahçe malzemeleri satışı yapan websitesidir. 
 
fidanistanbul.com'un özellikleri
    Almış olduğunuz ürünleri bir hafta içinde iade edebilirsiniz. Para iadesi derhal yapılır.
    İlgili bakanlıkça üretimleri onaylanmış sertifikalı ürünler bulundurur.
    Ürün fiyatları kesinlikle piyasanın altında tutulur.
    Sadece üyelere satış yapılır ve güvenliğiniz kazançtan ön plandadır.
    Kredi kartı ile yapılan ödemelerde, ödeme sayfası 256bit ssl güvenliğiyle korunmaktadır. Ödeme banka ve kart sahibi arasında gerçekleşir.
    Kargo ücreti peşin alınmaz. Dolayısıyla kargoya ne ödediğinizi bilirsiniz. Kampanya dönemlerinde ve yıl boyunca bir çok üründe kargo bedavadır.
    fidanistanbul.com'da Müşteri her zaman haklıdır.
    Havale ve EFT ile ödemelerinizde peşin ödeme avantajı sizlere yansıtılır.
    Fidan ve Bahçecilikle ilgili bilgiler haftalık olarak e posta yoluyla sizlere ulaşır. Peyzaj Mimarı ve Ziraat Mühendislerimiz bilgiyi paylaşmaktan mutluluk duyar.
    Ticari amaçlarının yanı sıra bilgi aktarımı ve paylaşımını da hedefler.
    Siparişlerinizi 150 dekar mevcut fidanlıklarından en bakımlı fidanları seçerek gönderi yapar.
    Ürünler hızlı kargo şirketiyle %60 indirimli olarak anlaşmalı gönderilir. İstanbul ve çevresine 1-2 günde, diğer bölgelere en geç 4 günde teslimat yapılır.
   
fidanistanbul.com yıllar içinde kazandığı tecrübe ve güveni ileriye taşıma gayretindedir.
Alışverişlerinizde fidanistanbul.com'u seçtiğiniz için sizleri mutlu etmek fidanistanbul.com'un misyonudur.

     
Kargo ile fidan gönderimi tecrübe gerektiren özel bir süreçtir.
2005'den beri sayısız bitkinin farklı boyutlarda kargo ile Türkiye'nin her yerine adrese teslim gönderimini sağladık.

Name: OWONIKOKO RANCH AND FARMS
Description:
Owonikoko Ranch & Farms is the livestock & grains unit of Vertmance Agric Partners Ltd, located at Roguwa Keffi- Abuja Highway. We specialized in innovative agricultural practices, enhancing the agricultural value chain through livestock faming, crops, grains, and pasture cultivation coupled with agro-tourism activities such as tree-planting exercise, wildlife viewing, gardening and a host of recreational activities geared towards tourist edutainment and relaxation for guest and tourist.  

We also operate a 230-hectares feedstock farm at Doma Nasarawa, as well as feedlots for ruminants in Lagos and Ekiti state. 

Our objective is to build an integrated, efficient, and sustainable agricultural market capable of providing high-value-added products and services for domestic and foreign markets leveraging smallholder farmer networks, technology, and scientific methods that boost productivity and last-mile retail & distribution strategies that empower women and youths. 

Thus Enriching The Motherland.

Name: Tillie's Game Ranch, LLC
Description: Located 30 miles northwest of Fredericksburg, Texas, Tillie's Game Ranch offers affordable all inclusive hunting packages for both whitetail deer and exotic big game. Part of the original Adolph Evers Ranch founded in 1860, Tillie’s has been in continuous agricultural production by succeeding generations of the Evers family for nearly 150 years. The rich tradition of the family’s contributions to the unique history of Texas agriculture continues today under the current owners who are direct descendants of Adolph Evers. Named after a great aunt, Tillie’s is a working cattle ranch with a focused effort on creating diverse habitat for indigenous and non-indigenous wild game concentrating primarily upon whitetail deer, wild turkey, African antelope, axis deer and blackbuck antelope.

Name: Brattingsborg Gods
Description:
På sydspidsen af Samsø finder du Brattingsborg Gods. Her ligger det midt i Samsøs smukke natur – omkranset af marker, skov og hav.

Godset, hvis historie går tilbage til 1200-tallet, dækker et areal på godt 2.400 ha og drives i dag som en moderne landbrugsvirksomhed med fokus på markbrug, svineproduktion, skovdrift, jagt samt udlejning af ferie- og helårsboliger.

Udover Brattingsborg består godset af avlsgårdene Hjalmarsgård, Vesborggård, Sannholm og Bisgård. Dertil kommer områderne Nordby Hede og Mårup Skov samt øerne Vejrø, Kyholm, Lindholm, Lindholm Rumpe, Karlskold, Bosserne, Hjortholm, Mejlsholm og Ydersteholm.

Name: Grupo Martini
Description:
Em 15 de setembro de 1990, na cidade de Pinhalzinho, a então Martini Máquinas Agrícolas nascia da vontade de empreender de seu fundador Jairo Martini.

Em 1994 a matriz foi transferida para a cidade de Serra Alta, objetivando uma melhor localização junto aos clientes.

Nos seus primeiros anos de história, a empresa comercializava alguns produtos da linha STIHL, bem como produtos do setor avícola, setor leiteiro e maquinário agrícola em geral.

Procurando melhorar seus serviços e seu foco, e reconhecendo o potencial do setor leiteiro, a empresa passou a direcionar seu foco no produtor de leite.

Sempre mantendo parcerias com as melhores marcas do mercado, a empresa mantém a tradição de oferecer qualidade e inovação ao produtor. Pioneira da região em oferecer a ordenha robotizada, o free stall e o compost barn, a empresa participou e participa ativamente na disseminação do conceito de conforto animal. Fomentando, também, o uso de vagões de trato animal com foco na automação do dia-a-dia do produtor.

Buscando difundir o cultivo da fenação e pré-secado, em meados de 2015 a empresa firmou parceria com um dos maiores fornecedores de máquinas e equipamentos do ramo, oferecendo à região os equipamentos Krone, líder mundial no segmento de fenação e forragem.

Em 2020 a empresa, com base em seus conhecimentos adquiridos, dá início a comercialização de produtos de higienização de ordenha, pré e pós dipping de marca própria

Aos seus 30 anos de história, a Martini Máquinas Agrícolas, em sua constante busca por melhoria e inovação, se atualiza e torna-se o Grupo Martini.

O Grupo Martini, em suas divisões - concessionária YANMAR, soluções para ordenha, implementos e concessionária STIHL – busca oferecer soluções especializadas ao agronegócio.

Name: Aero-Crop Solutions
Description:
Agricultural Drone Services for Farms, Horticulture & Forestry

At Aero-Crop, we provide specialist agricultural drone services across the UK, helping farms, plant nurseries, orchards, and forestry projects work smarter, faster, safer and more sustainably.

Using the advanced XAG P100 Pro drone, we deliver precise aerial applications that save time, reduce labour, and minimise crop damage — even in hard-to-reach or wet areas.

Our drone services include:
>Drone Spraying – Foliar feed application, biostimulants, nematodes, glasshouse shading & removal as well as pesticides as they become approved for aerial application.
>Drone Spreading – Granular fertiliser spreading, cover crop sowing, undersowing, direct seeding (forestry).
>Glasshouse & Polytunnels Care – Safe, even coverage of approved algaecides to maintain the light transmission optimal throughout the growing season.
>Forestry Drone Applications – Support for forest natural regeneration and establishment projects, especially in hard to reach areas.

Why choose us?
 Fully certified GVC drone operator with an Operational Safety Case (OSC)
 Precise application to reduce product waste and costs
 No heavy machinery or soil compaction
 Flexible, reliable service tailored to your needs

Whether you need any crops drone spraying, glasshouse & polytunnles care, or forestry aerial applications, we can help you get more done in less time and at the right time.

 Contact us today to arrange a free demonstration and see how drones can transform your growing season.

Name: Gen Agri S.r.l.
Description:
GenAgri nasce nel 2010 da un ambizioso progetto di un gruppo di imprenditori che hanno maturato solide, affidabili e competenti esperienze nel settore dell’agricoltura.

La missione è quella di individuare e sviluppare soluzione tecniche per l’agricoltura in un mercato in continua evoluzione.

Con visione innovativa e risposte concrete andiamo incontro alle esigenze degli operatori del mercato agricolo nel rispetto e salvaguardia dell’ambiente.

Per questo, oltre ai fertilizzanti, che rimangono il cuore dell’azienda, l’obiettivo di GenAgri è quello di offrire delle alternative, sempre legate al ciclo agricolo, nel campo dell’alimentazione animale e nella fornitura di prodotti per l’industria.

Name: Fazenda Sonho e Realidade
Description:
A Fazenda Sonho e Realidade, assim nomeada em março de 1996, recebeu este nome em consideração ao grande sonho de seu proprietário em possuir uma fazenda, já que na sua infância trabalhou em uma grande propriedade rural e pensava que um dia aquele sonho poderia se tornar palpável sendo que em 1996 este sonho pôde tornar-se uma realidade que perdura até hoje.

Alguns fatores geográficos são marcantes na propriedade como o pôr-do-sol, as planícies e os ciprestes que ficam paralelos à entrada principal da fazenda, além do fato de se encontrar em uma região de elevada altitude, possuindo fatores como o vento que dificilmente cessa e temperaturas amenas que durante o inverno podem chegar a valores negativos. É relevante frisar que a participação de clientes e amigos é, até hoje, de fundamental importância para o crescimento da Fazenda Sonho e Realidade, pessoas que fazem a diferença e ficam marcadas na história da propriedade.
O grande objetivo da Fazenda Sonho e Realidade é satisfazer as necessidades de seus clientes e amigos de forma extremamente responsável, buscando sempre proporcionar um desenvolvimento para ambas as partes. Procuramos estar sintonizados com as necessidades da pecuária moderna que busca animais produtivos, precoces e adaptados.
Hoje em dia todos nós temos grandes sonhos e é um prazer para nós aliar
qualidade, genética e responsabilidade podendo transformar sonhos de muitos pecuaristas em uma realidade.

Name: Agri Sustain
Description:
Agri Sustain, votre allié terrain pour la durabilité en Afrique de l’Ouest
Chez Agri Sustain, nous accompagnons les organisations agricoles et agro-industrielles à traduire leurs engagements durables en actions concrètes sur le terrain.

 Basé en Côte d’Ivoire, nous disposons d’un ancrage solide en Afrique de l’Ouest et d’une expertise opérationnelle éprouvée en audit, certification, accompagnement technique et renforcement de capacités.

Nous vous aidons à :

 Mettre en œuvre efficacement votre stratégie RSE ou vos engagements de durabilité

Déploiement de feuilles de route durables

Gestion déléguée de programmes RSE

Renforcement des capacités de vos partenaires terrain

 Auditer vos opérations et votre chaîne d’approvisionnement

Audits internes et correctifs

Préparation aux audits de certification (UEBT, ISCC, RA…)

Due diligence sociale et environnementale

 Renforcer les capacités des acteurs du terrain

Formation de coopératives et producteurs

Appui technique sur les bonnes pratiques agricoles et sociales

Accompagnement vers la certification

 Nos missions couvrent plusieurs secteurs : cacao, hévéa, coton, huile de palme, énergie, agriculture durable, RSE et droits humains.

Agri Sustain agit comme pont entre les exigences globales et les réalités locales. Ensemble, construisons une durabilité réaliste, mesurable et ancrée dans les territoires.

Who We Are

Kampura grows organic cacao and cardamom, along with natural rubber, mahogany and Honduran rosewood. We are a healing project rooted in the forests of Guatemala.

On 2,000 acres of regenerated land in Caqui Creek, Izabal, we’ve transformed degraded terrain into a thriving agroforestry system where cacao grows underneath rosewood & mahogany, where cardamom thrives under natural rubber, and native trees.

Our work is guided by two parallel missions:

1. **Healing the land** through regenerative practices that restore biodiversity, capture carbon, and protect water systems.

2. **Healing relationships** by partnering with Qʼeqchi’ Maya communities to provide dignified work, living wages, and pride in the shared craft of cacao.

At Kampura, every tree planted, every seedling nurtured, and every cacao block produced is part of a bigger circle of renewal.

#What We Make#

We craft **ceremonial-grade cacao** at origin in Guatemala — stone-ground, lightly roasted, and free from sugar or additives.

Unlike most cacao that’s exported as raw beans and processed overseas, Kampura **keeps every step close to the forest it comes from**. Fermentation, roasting, winnowing, grinding, and packaging all happen here in Izabal. 

The result: fresher cacao, complete transparency, and more local value creation.

Why We Exist

Cacao is often marketed as a “superfood” or “ceremonial” drink. For us, it’s much more.

Cacao is the link between soil health, human health, and community well-being. 

Kampura cacao is crafted for:

Health-conscious professionals seeking an alternative to coffee.

Wellness and yoga practitioners who incorporate cacao into ritual and daily practice.

Foodies and ethical consumers who want transparency and taste.

Biohackers and nutrition seekers who value lab-grade nutrition.

Wholesale buyers and distributors in North America, Europe, Australia & New Zealand, Japan, and Latin America America.

Healing the land and communities together in one process

Description:
Medition Precision S.L. es una compañía aragonesa especializada en aparatos y accesorios para salas de ordeño, y material informático en general. La compañía nace el 1 de enero de 2005, fundada por Javier Pérez Portero y Miguel Geijo Garcia, que habían empezado a trabajar en este campo como autónomos en mayo de 2002.

La firma surge con el objetivo de reunir en un mismo catálogo todos los aparatos y accesorios necesarios para realizar el control de las máquinas de ordeño y ofrecer servicio técnico a todos sus clientes.

La compañía inicia sus actividades en el sector de la informatica en enero de 2008. En un primer momento la actividad surge de forma casual, comercializando en otros sectores impresoras que ya se vendían junto con el material de ordeño. Actualmente la empresa cuenta con un catálogo que abarca hardware y software, lectores-validadores de billetes y servicio técnico para los clientes.

Medition Precision S.L. trabaja en España, fundamentalmente en las provincias de Zaragoza y Soria, y en el ámbito internacional con gran parte de los países de América Latina.

Cuenta con tres sedes, en Zaragoza, Madrid y la localidad zaragozana de Torrijo de la Cañada, en la comarca de Calatayud. La firma está presente en Internet en las siguientes web:

- http://www.pulsografo.net/. Productos y servicios para salas de ordeño.

- http://medition.es/. Catálogo de productos y servicios informáticos.

Name: Valley of the Kings
Description:
The Valley of the Kings business model is aimed at developing unique wilderness reserves into the most sought after private game reserves in Africa. To achieve a sustainable and successful business model, it is important to accommodate all contributing facets of conservation into one workable plan. 

This means that our reserves need to derive income from several sources of potential revenue, which includes luxury eco-safaris, exclusive trophy hunting opportunities, exotic breeding programs of certain animal species and the marketing of the reserve as an elite destination for corporate getaways to local South African businesses.

Two such projects are successfully owned and managed by the Valley of the Kings, one in Zeerust known as Valley of the Kings Great Marico (Lion Lodge) and the second in Thabazimbi known as Valley of the Kings Thaba Motswere (Rock Lodge), both reserves stocked with a wide variety of animals ranging from most plains game species such as Impala, Tsetsebe, Blesbuck, Kudu, Waterbuck, Red Hartebeest, Blue Wildebeest, Gemsbuck, Zebra, Giraffe and many more, to the Big 5 - Lion, Leopard, Rhino, Buffalo and Elephant.

On the Valley of the Kings Thaba Motswere reserve, we also own and run exotic game breeding operations with breeding programmes in White Lion, disease free Cape Buffalo, Roan Antelope, Sable and Black Impala.

Name: Pascoe's Field
Description:
Pascoe's Fields is a leading sustainable farming company in Ghana, revolutionizing vegetable and honey production through climate-smart agricultural practices. With a strong commitment to environmental sustainability, food security, and youth empowerment, Pascoe Fields operates across multiple regions, with its main farm in Aprekusu (Eastern Region), a branch in Nsuta (Volta Region), and a dedicated beekeeping farm in Nkuranza (Bono Ahafo Region).

At the heart of Pascoe's Fields’ mission is the drive to create innovative and eco-friendly farming solutions that boost productivity while preserving natural ecosystems. The company has directly and indirectly employed over 100 youth, providing opportunities in agribusiness and fostering economic growth in rural communities.

Pascoe's Fields’ impactful work in sustainable agriculture earned it recognition as part of the Ghana Climate Innovation Centre (GCIC) project by Ashesi University, GIZ, and the Government of Canada, a prestigious initiative supporting climate-focused enterprises with over $20,000 in funding.

With a vision to transform the agricultural landscape in Ghana and beyond, Pascoe's Fields continues to set the standard for sustainable farming, ethical beekeeping, and community-driven agribusiness innovation.

Name: EPAtupeoit
Description:
Un métier d’avenir : Technicien de Bien-être

C’est une école unique en son genre. L’école Privée Arnika est en effet la seule en France à proposer une formation complète permettant de devenir un véritable technicien de Bien-être.

A temps plein ou durant le week-end, la formation que propose de suivre l’école Arnika a pour but de vous donner les clés d’un métier en pleine expansion. Cette école s’appuie sur un enseignement complet. A commencer par les bases en anatomie, physiologie, psychologie, et aussi gestion d’entreprise, développement personnel et communication.
Ensuite alors peut commencer l’apprentissage des techniques manuelles relaxantes (protocole californien, Chinois, ayurvédique, réflexologie, shiatsu, …) et innovantes (pierres chaudes, techniques de Spa, …). Enfin, la connaissance des outils comme la médecine chinoise, la naturopathie, l’aromathérapie ou les fleurs de Bach permettrons au praticien d’adapter les séances en fonction du besoin et des attentes de chacun de ses clients.
Il ne restera qu’à réaliser les stages en entreprises prévus pour parfaire la professionnalisation du futur praticien.
C’est un bagage complet pour celles et ceux ayant choisi la voie du bien-être…des autres.

Name: Wolfcamp Equine Center
Description:
Wolfcamp Equine Center is a boutique horse boarding facility nestled in the Pilot Point/Aubrey area of North Texas, just a bit north of the Dallas Metroplex. This area is known as "Horse Country U.S.A." because it is home to one of the largest concentrations of horse farms in the United States and boasts over 25,000 horses in the county.
 Our facility currently comprises two barns with 32 stalls, 8 pastures, a large world-class covered riding arena that is right at an acre under roof, and associated facilities. Two large multi-bedroom apartments are currently under construction to offer bed and breakfast service.
 We pride ourselves on the excellent, hands-on care provided to all the equines boarding at our ranch.
 At present, trainers operating their businesses from our facility specialize in everything from reining to hunter-jumper to barrel racing to western pleasure.
 Wolfcamp has hosted corporate and institutional events from 20 to 200 people, providing a venue for relaxed entertainment, including live music, catered food, and various ranch-related activities.
 In addition to our gorgeous personal and client horses, Wolfcamp is also home to a menagerie of other critters, including ponies, miniature horses, full and mini donkeys, our goat mascot (George), and assorted foul. Easy to find and fun to visit.

Name: La minute de l'agronome
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page "La Minute de l'Agronome" ! 
Découvrez le monde passionnant de l'agronomie, où science et durabilité se rencontrent. 
Explorez les secrets de la terre, les défis de l'agriculture moderne et les innovations qui façonnent notre avenir alimentaire. 
En tant qu'agronome, nous sommes des gardiens de la terre, des scientifiques dévoués à la gestion durable des ressources naturelles.

Name: Bangalore Agrico
Description:
Since our establishment in 2005 in Bangalore, Bangalore Agrico has been dedicated to advancing agriculture through innovation and sustainable practices. Originally serving the seed and irrigation needs of farmers around Bangalore, we have grown to support agricultural endeavors throughout India with a broad range of high-quality supplies and services.

Our Expertise:

High-Density Farming: Specializing in maximizing yields using minimal space.
Hydroponics and Aquaponics: Pioneering in soil-less farming techniques for cleaner, more sustainable cultivation.
Terrace and Container Gardening: Tailored gardening solutions for urban spaces.
Productive Landscaping: Creating functional, beautiful landscapes that thrive.
Butterfly Garden Projects: Designing vibrant ecosystems for butterflies, enriching biodiversity.
Our Farm:

Mature Fruit Plants: Our farm specializes in producing and selling mature fruit plants, ready to transplant. This initiative supports local and regional farmers with ready-to-harvest solutions, enhancing immediate productivity and yield.
Our Services:

Garden Maintenance: Expert care and maintenance to ensure the health and productivity of gardens.
Vegetable and Fruit Gardens: Custom setups for fresh, directly harvested produce.
Farming Projects: Comprehensive management from inception to harvest.
Our Evolution:

Bangalore Agrico was established as an independent entity focused on aiding local farmers with essential agricultural supplies, including seeds and irrigation solutions.
In 2016, Towncraft Agrico Pvt Ltd was founded, and Bangalore Agrico became a prominent brand under its umbrella. The creation of Towncraft Agrico marked a new phase of innovation and expansion, driven by the vision of our founder, Najeem Illyas.
Our Promise:
Dedicated to enhancing agricultural productivity and sustainability, Bangalore Agrico commits to continuous innovation and exceptional customer service, fostering long-term relationships based on trust and quality.

Name: Lundsgaard Gods
Description:
Lundsgaard Gods ligger med skov og strand ved Kerteminde. 

Godset rummer kulturhuset Anexet med stor koncertsal og galleri, et væld af forskellige mødefaciliteter samt badehotel og en lille café.

På Lundsgaard Gods samles og inspireres man. Her stimler kunstnere, forskere, musikere, og alle mulige andre dygtige mennesker sammen. For her er bogstaveligt talt højt til loftet. Her er ro til at tænke og plads til at skabe. Her emmer af virkelyst.

Ejerne Vini og Rudolf Iuel driver den store kulturarv med gæstfrihed, kvalitetssans og bæredygtighed i højsædet.
 
Lundsgaards historie strækker sig helt tilbage til 1200-tallet, mens det nyeste hovedhus kom til i 1765. Stedet har altid været samlingssted for kunstnere og forfattere, og traditionen for stor gæstfrihed føres videre hver eneste dag. Sammen med dogmer om høj kvalitet og bæredygtighed, er godsets værdier tilstede i alt fra økologisk produktion til løbende istandsættelse og de mange innovative tiltag.

Name: Glacier Grown
Description:
Welcome to Glacier Grown! We raise grass fed, grass finished bison on 1600 pristine acres just outside of Glacier National Park. Our bison are free range and are watered from the finest artesian wells the Rockies have to offer. We use No pesticides, herbicides, hormones, or antibiotics of any kind.
When properly raised and processed, 100% grass-fed bison meat has a distinctly natural flavor. It's almost sweet, just the way nature intended. There is no bland fatty after taste which is often associated with grain-fed bison or beef, a product that actually tastes a lot like most store bought meat.

Our goal at "Glacier Grown" is to promote personal and family health. We believe that God intended for us to eat from the natural resources He provided. In today's society of "convenience", where fast food chains continue to thrive, there needs to be change. That change starts with you, making choices to eat healthy.

Bison meat is the healthiest red meat there is. It is the only red meat endorsed by the American Heart Association.

Make the right choice. Start eating healthy TODAY!

Many Blessings,
The Dunham Family

Description:

E' il pranzo di famiglia della domenica e il fugace ma gustoso pranzo di lavoro.
E' produzione.
Ogni giorno, le materie prime vengono lavorate nel caseificio interno all’azienda. I prodotti finiti, come i formaggi e latte vengono distribuiti ai clienti oppure venduti all'interno dello Spaccio Vendita o impiegati per la preparazione dei piatti nel nostro agriturismo. 
Tutto ciò consente di avere all' interno una realtà produttiva a km zero nello spazio di pochi metri.
E' lo spazio che accoglie esperienze ludico-educative per bambini, che possono entrare in contatto con gli animali o cimentarsi in laboratori pensati su misura per loro.
Ed è un'azienda con una vera e propria economia circolare, dopo tanti anni di progettazione da febbraio è attivo un distributore di biometano in azienda per rifornire i mezzi aziendali e le auto della comunità.
In azienda l’argomento delle bioenergie è sempre stato di massimo interesse, come fatto etico e      anche come opportunità di ottimizzazione delle risorse a disposizione.

Name: Carne Organiq
Description:
Organiq: la mejor carne del mundo. Cría y alimentación animal ecológica certificada. En nuestras fincas en Toledo, los animales se crían en dehesas de encinas, alcornoques y fresnos, siempre al aire libre y alimentándose directamente de la dehesa.

En Organiq, creemos firmemente que lo que es bueno para nuestros animales y para nuestras fincas, es bueno para todos. Por eso, nos esforzamos por ofrecer la más alta calidad en carnes y productos derivados, mediante un proceso de cría y alimentación sostenible y respetuoso con el medio ambiente.

Nuestros animales son criados ecológicamente y cuentan con el Certificado Ecológico Oficial, garantizando el cumplimiento riguroso de los requisitos legales y normas de bienestar animal. Además, disponemos de nuestra propia fábrica de alimentación animal ecológica certificada, lo que nos permite garantizar la calidad de nuestros piensos en caso de ser necesaria su suplementación.

En Organiq, controlamos todo el ciclo vital de nuestros animales, desde su nacimiento y crianza hasta su selección, maduración y corte de todas nuestras piezas. De esta forma, podemos garantizar la trazabilidad de nuestros productos y ofrecer una experiencia única en carnes y productos derivados de animales criados en dehesas.

Nuestra carne ecológica es de una calidad superior, con una terneza máxima, una infiltración extraordinaria y una jugosidad excepcional. Además, es muy saludable gracias a su riqueza en vitaminas, betacarotenos y ácidos grasos buenos.

En Organiq, estamos orgullosos de ofrecer productos de la más alta calidad, respetuosos con el medio ambiente y con un enfoque en el bienestar animal. Si eres empresario, carnicero profesional o restaurante, contáctanos y descubre la diferencia.

Name: Motapé S.A.
Description:
Motapé S.A. es una empresa vinculada a Estancias y Cabaña Las Lilas S.A.

Los Toros se dedica a la agricultura y a la cría de caballos de la raza Peruano de Paso. Cuenta con instalaciones propias para reproducción, inseminación artificial y extracción de embriones para equinos.
Nuestro objetivo es criar caballos Peruano de Paso, lo más cercano posible al biotipo ideal de la raza, de buenos pisos, elegantes, longevos y mansos.
Para ello incorporamos las mejores líneas de sangre en un programa de selección que incluye fortaleza y funcionalidad.
Los animales son criados en pasturas y de forma extensiva. Las yeguas madres deben, necesariamente, parir una vez al año y criar su potrillo en forma natural.

Name: Granjas TECO
Description:
Granjas TECO es una empresa proveedora de huevos ecológicos de gallinas (y de oca en la temporada de puesta) producidos con los más altos valores de ecología, bienestar animal y cuidado del medio ambiente, lo cual sin duda repercute en obtener unos huevos de altísima calidad. Las gallinas de granjas TECO viven en gallineros móviles con suelo natural (sin slats) y pastan en parques de uso rotativo, lo cual permite que este se recupere asimilando los abonos naturales proporcionados por las gallinas y regenerando pastos e insectos que serán un alimento natural para nuestras gallinas. Esta técnica permite regenerar y conservar todas las capas microbiotas del suelo logrando, además, una aireación de este mediante los picoteos y escarbeos llevados a cabo por las gallinas.
El sistema de producción va más allá de los mínimos fijados en la normativa ecológica proporcionando un grado de bienestar animal superior. Evitamos, en la medida de lo posible, el uso de materiales que puedan repercutir de forma negativa sobre el medioambiente. Todo en la granja ha sido diseñado para lograr un uso adecuado de todo aprovechando al máximo los recursos naturales y la capacidad regenerativa de nuestros suelos. Los aseladeros (palos donde les gusta dormir a las gallinas) son de madera y los suelos interiores son complemente naturales, formados por yacija natural (mezcla de arena y paja) en su totalidad.
También nos apoyamos en nuevas tecnologías para lograr mejorar la calidad de vida de nuestros animales y hacer uso eficiente de todos los recursos, aprovechando al máximo la energía solar y el agua. Nuestras naves están conectadas a internet los nos permite monitorizar a los animales y verificar el correcto funcionamiento de todo en cualquier momento y lugar. Y también que tú mismo veas el día a día de nuestras gallinas y verifiques que la procedencia de nuestros huevos, puedes entrar en la sección de transparencia de nuestra página web (www.granjasteco.es) y comprobarlo.

Name: A SECOND CHANCE PUPPIES AND KITTENS RESCUE INC
Description: A Second Chance Puppies and Kittens Rescue, founded in October 2007, is a 100% volunteer, foster-based 501(c)(3) non-profit rescue group based in Palm Beach County, Florida. From the Board of Directors to our Foster Caretakers to our Event Staff, each volunteer gives generously of their time and skills, motivated solely by a desire to help animals. A Second Chance Puppies and Kittens Rescue combines a no-nonsense goal of saving animals' lives with the blood, sweat, and tears of countless volunteers with financial support from various donors (individuals and corporations alike). Now in its sixth year, the group has rescued over 5,000 animals and continues to grow rapidly thanks in large part due to established relationships with various pet supply stores in Palm Beach County, including PetSmart and PETCO. All of the grant writing, fundraising, application reviewing, event planning, supply collection, bathing and bottle feeding is done by volunteers who seek only to save the lives of pets. When opening their hearts just isn’t enough for some, they open their doors - fostering dogs and cats in need until they are adopted. Their dedication has made the group one of the largest no-kill rescue groups without a shelter. Rescuing and arranging adoptions into loving homes for so many animals and successfully treating dozens of heartworm positive dogs are monumental tasks that have not gone unnoticed by the local media.

Name: The FARM 1780
Description:
The FARM has been in the Monts Family for eight generations. George Monts and his family arrived in Lexington, SC in 1780, and by 1787 had been decreed several land grants totaling more than 900 acres.

The granting of land was an important practice in establishing South Carolina. Like early versions of homesteads, land grants insured the cultivation of the land since acreage was determined by the number of family members.

George Monts’ original  acreage has been divided among families over the years.  Today, The FARM sits on just over 34 acres and remains the only intact piece of the original land grant.  It was inherited in 2017 by George’s 7th great-grandson Brett Flashnick.

Brett and his wife, McKenzie, felt an innate sense of obligation to continue the tradition and protect the original purpose of the land.  And, so, The FARM was born.  The property remains a family farm focused on growing local, seasonal fruits and vegetables, raising heritage breed livestock, and connecting the community.

Name: Regenerative Growth Network (RegenGRO) LBG
Description: RegenGRO Network is a nonprofit organization dedicated to promoting regenerative and sustainable agricultural practices among our members across Ghana. Recognizing the harmful effects of extensive chemical input use, which leads to poor food quality and environmental degradation, RegenGRO champions a solution for the future. At the same time, we understand the growing demand for sustainably produced, high-quality food products. Consumers today are increasingly seeking foods that are environmentally friendly, ethically produced, and superior in quality. RegenGRO Network is a platform that empowers our farmers to adopt regenerative practices, improve soil health, boost yields, and access premium markets. By building the largest farmer network focused on sustainability, we aim to renew our environment while providing our farmers with opportunities to meet consumer demand for eco-friendly, high-quality food products.

Name: MNC Farms
Description:
MNC Farms - Cultivating a Sustainable Future in Liberia 

At MNC Farms, we are dedicated to transforming agriculture through sustainable and organic farming practices. Located in the fertile lands of Liberia, our mission is to produce fresh, high-quality food that nourishes our communities while preserving the environment for future generations.

What We Do:

Crop Cultivation: We grow a variety of vegetables and fruits, focusing on organic methods that enrich the soil and protect our ecosystem.
Livestock Farming: Our livestock operations include raising goats, chickens, ducks, and pigs, ensuring quality, pasture-raised products.
Aquaculture Initiatives: We are exploring aquaculture opportunities in our natural swamps to diversify our production and maximize our resources sustainably.
Community Empowerment: We believe in empowering local communities by providing education, job opportunities, and support for small farmers.
At MNC Farms, we’re not just growing food—we’re growing a movement toward a healthier, self-sufficient Liberia. Connect with us as we continue to innovate, educate, and cultivate a sustainable agricultural landscape.

 Join us on our journey from seed to harvest! 

#MNCFarms #SustainableAgriculture #OrganicFarming #LiberiaAgriculture #CommunityEmpowerment

Name: de Claville ApS
Description:
Hos de Claville ApS fungerer vi som bindeleddet mellem bæredygtige løsninger og økonomisk succes. Vi rådgiver virksomheder i den grønne sektor om at optimere deres drift med fokus på strategisk udnyttelse af den grønne omstilling, tilskudsmuligheder, bæredygtigt byggeri og datadrevet produktion.

Vi hjælper vores kunder med at identificere og implementere løsninger, der reducerer CO₂-udledningen og fremmer CO₂-neutralitet. Dette inkluderer rådgivning om energieffektivisering, anvendelse af vedvarende energikilder og optimering af processer for at minimere miljøpåvirkningen.

Inden for landbruget kombinerer vi kortlægning af markdrift, identifikation af ineffektive områder og implementering af vildtvenlige tiltag for at maksimere jagtlejeindtægterne. Vi assisterer med at kortlægge vildtagre, optimere jagtlejekontrakter og sikre, at GLM-arealer bidrager positivt til både biodiversitet og bundlinje.

Med en passion for naturen og en dyb forståelse for landbrugets udfordringer arbejder vi målrettet på at skabe løsninger, der gavner både miljøet og økonomien.

Name: Reboisement Et Exploitation Des Forêts
Description:
At Reboisement et Exploitation des Forêts, we turn reforestation into a vehicle for environmental restoration, rural development, and sustainable investment. Based in Togo, we coordinate forest carbon credit projects that align with the highest global standards—transforming tree planting and forest protection into verified carbon assets.

We work with landowners, community groups, NGOs, and impact investors to design, certify, and scale forest projects that generate carbon credits while creating jobs, protecting biodiversity, and improving local livelihoods.

 What We Offer:
Project design & registration (Verra, Gold Standard, national frameworks)

Carbon baseline assessments, monitoring & verification

Community-based forestry & reforestation coordination

Certification and third-party validation

Market access and transparent revenue sharing

Our local expertise and commitment to environmental integrity ensure every project delivers measurable, lasting value—for the planet and for our partners.

 Join us in building nature-based climate solutions that deliver both impact and returns.

Name: CoVE Belgium - AgriFood4Future
Description:
Nederlands
CoVE Belgium - AgriFood4Future is een praktijkgericht opleidingscentrum met een focus op regeneratieve landbouw – de landbouw van morgen. Met aandacht voor bodemgezondheid, biodiversiteit en veerkracht bouwen we samen met internationale partners aan een toekomstbestendig agrovoedingssysteem.
Dit initiatief is een samenwerking tussen VIVES Hogeschool en Inagro, beide gevestigd in Roeselare, waar onderwijs, onderzoek en praktijk elkaar versterken.

----------

 English
CoVE Belgium - AgriFood4Future is a practice-oriented training centre with a focus on regenerative agriculture – the agriculture of tomorrow. With attention to soil health, biodiversity, and resilience, we work together with international partners to build a future-proof agrifood system.
This initiative is a collaboration between VIVES University of Applied Sciences and Inagro, both based in Roeselare, where education, research, and practice come together.

Name: Alternative Solutions to Somali Indigenous Farmers - ( ASOIF)
Description:
ASOIF as humanitarian organization gives its maximum priority to develop the rural society in the field of agricultural, food security and livelihoods. ASOIF is not restricting its activities and operational zones in south central regions of Somalia, however its strategy  encompasses  widening the scope of  ASOIF  to  other  regions of Somalia. Currently ASOIF is operating actively in the all south central regions of Somalia. ASOIF is focusing on Food Security, Increasing Incomes through Sustainable Agribusiness. Or order to make maximum impact the following operational areas will be guided its current intervention these includes
 
 
Strategic Objective 1:
 
Increase	the	capacity	of poor resource	beneficiary households to effectively practice sustainable agro- economic activities
 
Strategic Objective 2:
 
Increase food  security  and  environmental  conservation
practices at household level
 
ASOIF PROFILE 
 
With the aim to attain the desired strategic objectives ASOIF support will be provided to organised farmers organizations/associations to have the capacity to effectively provide services to individual farming households in their areas of operations to access agricultural inputs, to improve their farming practices, increase their agricultural based income, taking into considerations different and complimentary roles of male and female farmers in order to ensure food security and increased income.  Emphasis will be in the following areas:

Agricultural Extension
•- Support of participatory extension approaches with an important role of farmer organisation’s as intermediaries
•- Search for new partnerships between government extension system and farmers on farmer to farmer learning and exchange On improved access to extension systems based on through establishment and supporting farmers cooperatives
•- Revitalise traditional crops, in addition to new crops
•- Collaboration with research institutes

Magna Virtus owns eleven digitalized poultry houses, a well-equipped and modern feed preparation mill and 30.000 m2 of olive trees . All of the above is based on investments in modern technological equipment and the strict daily supervision of the entire production process by our experienced scientific and technical staff.

Name: NIRS2CUSTOM
Description:
Investigación para el desarrollo innovador de un prototipo equipado con la técnica NIRS para analizar la composición química del suelo en tiempo real, asociado a un cuaderno de campo digital dotado de
una capa de Inteligencia Artificial con predicción para la fertilización personalizada de los cultivos. El mundo agrícola ha cambiado radicalmente, profesionalizándose al ritmo que requería el mercado y los agricultores necesitan contar con un asesoramiento y un apoyo que es de vital importancia para alcanzar las producciones optimas de sus explotaciones, con la finalidad de optimizar el uso de fertilizantes y fitosanitarios y así proteger el medio ambiente. La utilización del análisis de infrarrojo cercano NIR, una técnica espectroscópica que utiliza de forma natural el espectro electromagnético, nos permitirá conocer a tiempo real estas carencias, permitirá al agricultor aplicar adecuadamente los fertilizantes, cumpliendo las normativas vigentes (Directiva 91-676-CEE o el futuro reglamento europeo por el que establecen las normas para la nutrición sostenible de los suelos agrarios).

Description:
Our company operates according to specifications, strictly adheres to all industry standards and guidelines. Our work offers maximum performance of quality product. The main purpose is to ensure an uninterrupted and stable supplies of high-grade product. 
Our product solves specific problems of nutrition and increase productivity on the farm. One can significantly reduce the cost of feed by replacing 5-7% of soybean cake to fodder yeast. 
The approved and stabilized production conditions are carried out by using modern equipment. Our experts build companies work on the basis of standardization and biotechnology of Research Institute of Ukraine. 
Fodder yeast is one of the most useful product, it contains high quality digestible protein, vitamins, carbohydrates, amino acids. Our product improves and balance feed efficiency, favor the growth of animals, and also it is a significant source of energy.

Contamos con una amplia trayectoria, iniciando nuestras actividades en 1981, con la meta de “lograr implantar una verdadera cultura en el manejo racional de los recursos naturales”.

Name: Projeto Mejuruá
Description:
The Mejuruá Project is a groundbreaking initiative dedicated to preserving and protecting over 900,000 hectares of the Amazon rainforest. Our approach intertwines environmental conservation with the empowerment of local communities, fostering sustainable development practices. 

Our project is more than just forest conservation; it's a journey towards sustainable living. By working hand-in-hand with local communities, we aim to develop sustainable livelihoods that align with the preservation of this crucial and unique ecosystem. 

Join us as we strive to safeguard the region's rich biodiversity, mitigate the impacts of climate change and ensure a sustainable future for the Amazon.

Name: Dzomo La Mupo
Description: Dzomo la Mupo work to preserve and revive cultural diversity and food sovereignty in South Africa. Based in the Limpopo province of the Vhembe district, the organisation strengthens local communities in ecological governance through awareness on the value of indigenous forests, by reviving indigenous seed, facilitating and encouraging intergenerational learning, and rebuilding confidence in the value of indigenous knowledge systems. The organization was founded in 2007 by Mphatheleni Makaulule, driven by her concern that cultural values are being eroded and indigenous forests are facing mass destruction, causing possibly irreversible disorder within Mupo. Dzomo la Mupo wants to restore this order. The protection of sacred sites plays a vital role in indigenous living, and hence it is core to the work of Dzomo la Mupo. The Dzomo la Mupo (DLM) vision is to protect nature in all its forms, especially indigenous forests, rivers, wetlands, and sacred natural sites, and to enhance the indigenous skills of traditional agriculture which support agro-ecological farming, and to preserve healthy nutritional food security.

Aunque nuestro inicio se originó en 2021, cuando nuestro proyecto ganó el primer lugar nacional en los fondos concursables llamado "Aplica tu Idea" de la Fundación Copec-U y segundo lugar en concurso Emprende con Impacto, organizado por la Facultad de Economía y Negocios de la Universidad de Chile. Name: Uniagro S.A.
Description:
Somos una granja de produccion intensiva de cerdos de 400 madres que cuenta con un alto grado eficiencia habiendo sido premiados en el año 2019 por la empresa Agriness con el 2do sobre mas de 200 granjas por el grado de productividad. 
Nuestro criadero posee la más avanzada tecnología para la producción de cerdos, lo que permite que sus crías puedan pasar correctamente por las etapas de lactancia, recría, desarrollo y terminación en perfectas condiciones nutricionales e higiénicas hasta alcanzar un óptimo estado de peso corporal. 
Como primera medida de bioseguridad, en resguardo de la salud de los animales, nuestro criadero se encuentra alejado de zonas urbanas y de rutas transitadas y cada sector  rodeado de alambrados perimetrales, a efectos de impedir el ingreso de personas y objetos no autorizados. Este estricto manejo sanitario elimina la posibilidad de ingreso de agentes extraños, desde el nacimiento de los cerdos hasta la edad de venta, asegurando los mejores resultados en la obtención de un producto sano y natural.
Los animales son alimentados con raciones elaboradas en planta de balanceados propia, con cereales comprados y analizados estrictamente, asegurando de esta forma la calidad e inocuidad de los alimentos producidos.
Nuestro objetivo primordial es mantener un alto status sanitario, para disminuir al máximo la utilización de medicamentos y obtener una muy buena calidad de carne.

La Fattoria Veneta è una azienda agricola che si tramanda di generazione in generazione, caratterizzata da strutture tipiche della corte veneta, immersa nel verde dove i profumi e i colori danno la sensazione della vera bellezza della campagna.

"Fattoria Veneta: direttamente dal produttore al consumatore"

Name: City to Village
Description:
At City to Village, we believe in a future where people live closer to nature without losing the benefits of modern innovation. Our platform explores how AI, smart farming, and sustainable technologies can empower rural communities, restore balance with the land, and inspire a healthier way of living.

Whether you dream of leaving the city, building resilience in your village, or simply learning how technology can support sustainability, City to Village is your guide. We share insights, research, and stories at the crossroads of tradition and innovation, helping individuals and communities rediscover what it means to live in harmony with the earth.

Join us in shaping a movement: slower living, smarter choices, and stronger communities.

Name: Delsasso Boomverzorging en Bosbeheer
Description:
Delsasso Boomverzorging en Bosbeheer verzorgt op professionele wijze het planten, snoeien en omhalen van bomen en onderzoekt en behandelt ziektes. Het belang van de boom of het bos staat daarbij altijd voorop. Daarnaast is de veiligheid van mens en omgeving belangrijk aandachtspunt.

Vakkundig in grote én kleine klussen
Delsasso Boomverzorging en Bosbeheer is een kleinschalig bedrijf dat werkt voor zowel particulieren, bedrijven als overheidsinstanties. Wij zijn voornamelijk werkzaam in het midden en zuiden van het land en werken nauw samen met collega’s in heel Nederland en zelfs in het buitenland. Daardoor is geen klus voor ons te groot. Daarentegen is ook geen klus te klein. We helpen u graag, of het nu gaat om een enkele boom of een heel bos.

Veilig en met zorg voor de natuur
Delsasso Boomverzorging en Bosbeheer is aangesloten bij Branchevereniging VHG, lid van de Kring Praktiserende Boomverzorgers (KPB) en ETW- en VCA-gecertificeerd. Onze boomverzorgers zijn flexibel en deskundig en werken volgens strenge veiligheidsnormen. Waar het kan met duurzame materialen. Zo werken onze machines op biologisch afbreekbare benzine en oliën en wordt al ons snoeiafval gebruikt voor het opwekken van groene energie.

Name: Auld Macdonald Farm Arabians
Description:
Auld Macdonald Farm is the home of US National champion and herd sire, Legacys Renoir+ (Legacy of Fame x SC Psavannah), and our outcross stallion, 2007 Gazal Al Shaqab son, Caravagio.

We are a private facility nestled in the mountains of southeastern Arizona in Cochise County. We are amateur handlers & riders who focus on Sport Horse (SHUS & SHIH) and Dressage disciplines. There is a 7-stall barn, a 60 x 200-meter dressage arena, a 60-foot round pen, and several turnout paddocks.

Transplants to Arizona, we love the fact that we can keep our horses in training year-round focused on a full show schedule, up to and including national-level shows. In addition, we have a small band of broodmares and breed 2 or 3 purebred Arabian and Half Arabian foals each year.

Our horses are part of the family. We expect the best for them and expect each to perform and behave to the best of their ability.

Name: Consorcio de Ganaderos para Experimentación Agropecuaria
Description:
Es una asociación privada sin fines de lucro, con sede en Asunción, República del Paraguay. Tiene por objeto unir a propietarios y representantes de establecimientos rurales de producción agropecuaria para promover:
Técnicas y prácticas administrativas y científicas que hagan posible mejorar el volumen y calidad de la producción de los establecimientos asociados; analizar y ejecutar proyectos que incrementen la eficiencia de las empresas; estudiar y realizar ideas de acción social que permitan elevar el nivel cultural y humano de los miembros, del personal de los establecimientos y sus familiares para irradiar entre los establecimientos vecinos la conveniencia de implementar tales técnicas e ideas.
La conservación, la recuperación y la elevación de la fertilidad de los suelos; el aumento de la productividad del trabajo y de los bienes de capital.
La reducción de costos y la defensa de sistemas de comercialización de productos que hagan posible un mejor desarrollo del campo.

La conservación de la fauna, la flora y del ecosistema. La transferencia de tecnología entre sus asociados y entidades afines es la razón de ser del Consorcio.

Name: Green Farmer
Description:
Founder’s Message 2025
At Green Farmer, everything we do begins with a simple idea: if we take care of the earth, it will take care of us.

What started as a small patch of soil, a few seeds, and a whole lot of hope has become something much bigger—a place where people reconnect with nature, learn where their food comes from, and discover the joy of growing things with their own hands. We’re more than just an organic farm. We’re a space for learning, for healing, and for community.

Our mission is to grow honest, healthy food without chemicals or shortcuts—and to do it in a way that respects the land, the seasons, and the people who eat from it. But just as importantly, we want to plant ideas. We want to show children that tomatoes don’t grow in supermarkets. We want families to learn how compost can turn scraps into soil. We want people to feel the magic of pulling a carrot from the ground and tasting something real.

That’s why we started Project G.R.O.W. (Green, Resilient, Organic, Whole)—an initiative that invites schools, youth groups, and everyday folks to roll up their sleeves and get involved. Through farm tours, workshops, and hands-on experiences, we help people understand not just how food is grown, but why it matters.

We also believe farming builds more than food—it builds character. On the farm, there are no shortcuts. The weather doesn’t always cooperate. Things don’t always go as planned. But that’s where resilience, teamwork, and responsibility take root. Our farm life education programmes are designed to nurture not just green thumbs, but grounded, thoughtful individuals who care about their world.

Every season brings something new, and every person who visits Green Farmer adds something to our story. Whether you come here to learn, to lend a hand, or simply to breathe fresh air and walk among the rows, you’re always welcome.

Name: Elm Run Farms
Description: Elm Run Farms has been family owned since its purchase in 1893. Over the course of 120 years the 200 acre farm has seen many changes in what has been grown or raised.  Fifth-generation owner, Ken Ressler, has returned the focus back to the basics of healthy and sustainable farming. Ken has many years of experience as a cattle nutrition consultant and has seen first-hand the importance that proper nutrition has in raising healthy cattle. Elm Run Farms operates on the philosophy that food should be consumed as close to how it was raised or grown as possible. This is done through sustainable farming practices and by producing naturally raised, minimally processed food. Elm Run Farms raises 100% grass fed beef. Cows are never given grain—even during the cold and snowy Ohio winters. Chickens are pasture-raised and given only non-GMO feed. No chemical fertilizers are used on Elm Run Farms pastures.

Name: Hallstedt Homestead Cherries
Description:
We are first generation farmers who are passionate about providing the best u-pick experience for you! Once you arrive, we will provide everything you need – buckets, instructions, and friendly “pit crew” members who will teach you where and how to pick sweet cherries! Enjoy the drive to this slice of heaven on the Leelanau Peninsula, and you will want to come back again and again!

Each of our eight sweet cherry varieties and our Montmorency tarts are available at different times.

Cavaliers
First – second week in July

White Golds
First – second week in July

Summits
Second – Third week in July

Ebony Pearl
Second – Third week in July

Ulsters
Second – Third week in July

Attikas
Second – Third week in July

Reginas and Montmorency Tarts
Third – Fourth week in July

Sweethearts
Fourth – Fifth week in July, mid-late August

We also have gorgeous flowers.  What started as our daughter’s “wedding Flower Garden” in 2017 is now an opportunity for you and your family to come experience the amazing variety of an ever-changing array of flowers! Come pick at your leisure, breathe in the scents, and design your own bouquet. We provide the snippers, a packet of flower food, and instructions as needed (including approximate size of bouquet).

HH Cherries is built on what we value as owners, farmers and a family. From the earliest days, three things inspired us and sustained us through the years, and much like the trees themselves that were planted and matured over time, our values of the land, access and joy grow with each year of operation.

Ești medic veterinar, administrezi un petshop sau un adăpost pentru animale? Atunci nu trebuie să ratezi oportunitatea de a deveni partener DorianaVet! Înregistrează-te acum și bucură-te de avantajele noastre exclusive pentru parteneri:

- Asistență dedicată: Echipa noastră de experți în îngrijirea animalelor și produsele veterinare este întotdeauna la dispoziția ta pentru a oferi sfaturi și suport personalizat.
- Livrare rapidă: Beneficiezi de servicii de livrare rapidă și eficientă, astfel încât să poți avea mereu produsele de care ai nevoie la timp.

Oferim distributie de medicamente, hrana si accesorii pet, produse apicultura, etc., pentru tine si afacerea ta. Acoperim prin flota proprie pe raza judetelor Iasi, Suceava, Botosani, Neamt, Bacau, Vaslui si acoperim distributia la nivel national prin curierat rapid .

Name: Lweya Honey Malawi
Description:
Lweya Honey is a social enterprise dedicated to sustainable beekeeping, environmental conservation, and community empowerment in Malawi. Founded to combat poverty and restore degraded land, we integrate innovative honey production practices with reforestation efforts to create lasting social, economic, and environmental impacts.
Our work empowers women and youth by providing climate literacy, beekeeping, and entrepreneurial skills training. Through partnerships and local engagement, we address deforestation, promote sustainable agriculture, and contribute to economic stability by building resilient communities.
At Lweya Honey, we believe in harnessing nature’s power to drive sustainable development while preserving ecosystems for future generations.

Somos una empresa que busca la concientización ambiental con miras a una ciudad más verde y con más vegetación nativa, que promueva el impacto ambiental positivo. 

Además, contamos con un vivero propio para lograr una escala mayor de producción de árboles nativos, y nos encargamos de su plantación y seguimiento. 

Creemos que es responsabilidad de todos la construcción de valores y la toma de decisiones para lograr construir un modelo de desarrollo sostenible; basado en la equidad, la justicia social y el respeto por la diversidad biológica y cultural.  

Desde Forestando nos encargamos de llevar adelante la gestión de alianzas estratégicas y la coordinación de las jornadas de reforestación, para lograr una plantación adecuada y un seguimiento de nuestros árboles nativos.

Si tu empresa u organización está interesada en hacer una campaña de reforestación, escribinos. Acá estamos para asesorarte!

Description:

Este espacio servirá de nexo entre agricultores e industria con ganaderos y fabricantes de pienso, ofreciéndoles una plataforma en la que se puedan dar a conocer y adquirir estos recursos. Si generas subproductos/destríos o tienes excedentes de producción, no dudes en ponerte en contacto con nosotros.
El consorcio está integrado por AFACA, Cicap, COVAP y Cooperativas Agro-alimentarias de Andalucía.
Proyecto financiado a través de los Fondos Europeos Agrícolas de Desarrollo Rural (FEADER) y cofinanciado por la Consejería de Agricultura, Pesca, Agua y Desarrollo Rural de la Junta de Andalucía en la convocatoria para el Funcionamiento de Grupos Operativos Regionales de la Asociación Europea de Innovación en Materia de Productividad y Sostenibilidad Agrícola (EIP AGRI) de 2022.

Name: Seifert Belmont Reds
Description:
Welcome to Seifert Belmont Reds, a name synonymous with premium cattle breeding and agricultural innovation. Situated in the heart of Queensland, our properties are dedicated to the meticulous breeding of Belmont Red cattle. A breed renowned for its superior genetics in fertility, tropical adaptation, growth and exceptional meat quality. At Seifert Belmont Reds,
we blend tradition with leading-edge technology to ensure selection pressure is at its highest. Our commitment to excellence begins with our breeding program, where we specifically select sires and dams that exhibit the best phenotypic and genetic traits of the Belmont Red breed. By focusing on traits of economic importance, such as fertility, growth, temperament, tropical adaptation and carcass quality, we consistently produce cattle that
meet and exceed industry standards. Our industry best practice stock husbandry, handling and facilities, plus sustainable grazing practices reflect our dedication to animal welfare and environmental stewardship. We believe that happy, healthy cattle are the cornerstone of a successful breeding program. Our cattle graze on native and improved pastures, where we prioritize their well-being at every stage of life. Seifert Belmont Reds is not just about cattle; it’s about community and collaboration. We work closely with our clients, other beef producers, researchers, and industry experts to advance cattle breeding practices and share our knowledge with the broader agricultural community. Our properties are a hub for innovation, where new techniques and technologies are tested and refined to improve the efficiency and sustainability of cattle farming. Our passion for excellence extends beyond the farm gate. We are committed to delivering the highest quality beef genetics from paddock to plate.

Name: Ochez Agro Allied Services Limited
Description:
Ochez Agro Allied Services Limited (RC 1890890)

About Us
Ochez Agro Allied Services Limited is a diversified agribusiness enterprise dedicated to building sustainable value across the agricultural value chain from farming and ranching to commodity trading, agro consulting, and rural development services.
We connect farmers, buyers, and markets through innovative agricultural and supply chain solutions that drive productivity, profitability, and sustainability.
Our business activities cut across crop cultivation, animal husbandry, agribusiness advisory, and agro trade facilitation, helping clients and partners achieve measurable growth and impact.
At Ochez Agro, we believe that every link in the value chain matters.
By integrating professional expertise, agricultural finance, and green development practices, we empower farmers, agripreneurs, and stakeholders to grow smarter and trade better.
We are not just cultivating farms we are cultivating trust, sustainability, and long-term prosperity across communities.
Our Mission
To deliver innovative and sustainable agribusiness solutions that enhance productivity, strengthen value chains, and create prosperity for all participants in the agricultural ecosystem.
Our Vision
To become a leading catalyst for sustainable agricultural growth in Nigeria and beyond, bridging people, products, and possibilities through responsible agribusiness practices.
Our Core Values
Integrity: We uphold trust and transparency in every transaction.
Innovation: We adopt modern methods to solve agricultural challenges.
Partnership: We build strong networks across farmers, traders, and institutions.
