Name: GP Paulownia s.r.o.
Description:
Introduction:
The price of timber has seen stable growth over the past 25 years and has become a scarce commodity worldwide. Investing in the production of timber is safe, stable, and profitable.
-	Forestry and timber production can provide a worthwhile alternative and complement to traditional agriculture within only a few years. It is not labor or energy intensive and can help to absorb large volumes of carbon from the atmosphere.

We recommend growing Paulownia trees for the production of timber.
-	Paulownia is one of the fastest growing trees in the world.
-	Paulownia provides timber of outstanding quality with many uses in construction, manufacturing and design.

GP Paulownia s.r.o. is the exclusive distributor in Czech Republic of Paulownia trees from WeGrow CropTec GmbH in Germany. WeGrow is the market leader in Europe with more than 12 years history and their own developed varieties of Paulownia trees with proven success in our climates.

We are looking for land-owners and farmers that own suitable land for Paulownia plantations.

Growing Paulownia is not only a sustainable business that contributes to a better environment; it is a very profitable way of using land.

We are offering different programs to fit land-owners and farmers to plant and grow Paulownia plantations.

Starting from ready to plant trees, the programs offer services up to fully managed plantations with guaranteed buy-out contracts for the produced Paulownia wood. 
The starters program has a duration of 6 to 10 years depending on factors (such as soil type, position of the plantation site, maintenance and other factors that can influence the speed of growth). After harvesting Paulownia trees, they will grow again from the trunk to be harvested again after 6 to 10 years.

The income from one harvest should not be less than 50.000 Euros per hectare after harvesting costs form a well managed plantation. 

For more information, please contact us.

Name: Prosperous Farms
Description:
Welcome to our vision. We are in the process of establishing our eco-friendly, open-pasture, free-range farm, a sanctuary where nature thrives, and farm-to-table excellence is a way of life.

Our farm embraces a holistic approach to agriculture, balancing the well-being of the land and its inhabitants. Our animals roam freely in open pastures, nurtured by our commitment to their happiness and health. Stress-free lives lead to superior products, and this ethos extends to every facet of their care.

Sustainability is the core of our farming philosophy. We employ organic practices that enrich the soil and yield premium, flavorful harvests. From seed to plate, we oversee every stage, ensuring only the finest reaches your table.

Our farm-to-table offerings are a testament to our dedication to quality and transparency. You can trust the source of every ingredient, delivering extraordinary flavor and nutrition. Dining with us is an immersion in the essence of the land.

But we're more than a culinary destination; we offer an eco-conscious travel experience. Our farm accommodations let you embrace rural life, waking to nature's sounds, exploring scenic beauty, and indulging in farm-fresh breakfasts.

We extend an invitation to join our farm family. Take guided tours, get your hands dirty in the fields, and discover our sustainable farming practices.
Every day is a celebration of the land, animals, and culinary traditions. Whether for a meal, stay, or educational adventure, you'll leave with a profound appreciation for sustainable farming's beauty and abundance.

Join us in this journey toward a greener, tastier future. We're more than a farm; we're a commitment to excellence, nature, and you. Come, savor the difference, and be part of our eco-friendly, farm-to-table community.

Watch us build this vision into reality one step at a time!

Name: L'HIRONDELLE CENTRE DE SOINS POUR ANIMAUX SAUVAGES
Dog Center
Description:
Dog Center est un centre d'éducation et de bien-être du chien d'un genre nouveau. Au sein d'infrastructures de qualité, nous vous accueillons au centre de Charleroi, à 100 mètres du Marsupilami. Chacun de nos services est assuré et encadré par un ou plusieurs professionnels. Nous souhaitons nous démarquer par notre esprit positif et notre approche qualitative dans l'ensemble des domaines touchant au chien.

Chez Dog Center, nous vous proposons de réfléchir aux différentes facettes de l'éducation de votre chien en les abordant dans l'ordre et avec efficacité. Vous imaginez-vous un seul instant apprendre à lire et à écrire sans maîtriser l'alphabet ? Il en va de même pour votre chien… Chez nous, un éducateur comportementaliste vous apprendra en premier lieu à mettre un cadre et des limites à votre chien en choisissant la méthode qui VOUS correspond le mieux. Cette façon de travailler en collaboration avec vous et votre compagnon, permettra de construire un chien serein et équilibré, bien dans sa tête et agréable à promener. Lorsque ces bases seront acquises, vous pourrez, en compagnie d'un éducateur canin, aborder l'obéissance non par la contrainte mais par le jeu. La relation entre vous et votre compagnon se consolidera au fil des apprentissages. 

Parce qu'un chien bien dans sa tête est aussi un chien bien dans son corps et dans ses poils, chez Dog Center, nous vous proposons une gamme complète de services. Le toilettage, bien que devenu, avec le temps un soin esthétique, reste avant tout un soin important pour tous les types de chiens. Il permet une bonne hygiène corporelle : ongles coupés, oreilles et yeux propres, poils de bonne qualité et peau qui respire. Fidèles à notre approche centrée sur l'intérêt du chien, nous utilisons uniquement des produits et shampoings naturels et non agressifs. Le massage qu'il soit relaxant ou apaisant, produit des effets dont les vertus font de plus en plus d'émules. Il peut également être un service utile en complément de la thérapie comportementale. 

Dog Center propose aussi des conseils sur l'alimentation adéquate à proposer à votre chien. Loin de la propagande des grandes marques de croquettes, nous vous proposons des croquettes 100% naturelles. De même, nous vous accompagnons dans une démarche alimentaire B.A.R.F. (Biologically Appropriate Raw Food) haut de gamme.

Dog Center c'est également une pension dans un cadre familial avec la possibilité de travailler quotidiennement votre chien (marche en laisse, obéissance, etc..) Nous organisons des balades encadrées par des comportementalistes et éducateurs canins.

Name: Black Herd
Description:
Black Herd is a premium Black Angus beef brand built on a deep commitment to quality, traceability, and sustainable production. The brand develops its beef from embryo conception through final cut delivery, managing every stage of the process under strict international standards.

Black Herd’s work goes far beyond producing beef. It operates a fully integrated value chain, supported by advanced genetic research, superior Purebred Angus bloodlines, comprehensive animal welfare practices, and responsible production methods that protect both the environment and human health.

The brand follows a Never Ever program, meaning no antibiotics, no hormones, and no steroids are used at any stage. Cattle are finished with Non-GMO grains and raised under intensive rotational grazing systems, ensuring natural protein with exceptional flavor, tenderness, and nutritional quality.

Natural protein of extreme quality, highly healthy, with excellent flavor and tenderness. AS IT SHOULD!

Name: Ganinsect
Description:
El futuro de la nutrición y la agricultura no requiere necesariamente más tierra, sino nuevas perspectivas. En Ganinsect, trabajamos en el rediseño de la cadena de valor, aprovechando la tecnología más antigua y perfecta del planeta: la biología misma.

Nos dedicamos a transformar biomasa subutilizada en recursos de alto valor, cerrando ciclos productivos que antes permanecían abiertos. A través de procesos de bio-conversión acelerada, colaboramos con los ingenieros más eficientes de la naturaleza para crear un sistema donde el desperdicio se convierte en oportunidad y la eficiencia es la norma.

Somos un eslabón que conecta la economía circular con la sostenibilidad alimentaria.

Name: Audiagro Consultoria Ambiental
Description:
A Audiagro – Consultoria e Licenciamento Ambiental é uma empresa especializada em oferecer soluções completas para propriedades rurais e empresas que buscam conformidade ambiental, segurança jurídica e sustentabilidade.
Atuamos em processos de licenciamento ambiental, regularização rural, geoprocessamento, diagnósticos ambientais, organização documental e elaboração de estudos técnicos, sempre com foco na agilidade, transparência e precisão das informações.
Nossa equipe é formada por profissionais do agro com experiência prática em campo, gestão de processos, qualidade, sistemas produtivos e responsabilidade ambiental. Unimos conhecimento técnico, visão estratégica e compromisso com o cliente para entregar serviços confiáveis e personalizados.

Missão
Promover soluções ambientais confiáveis, ágeis e sustentáveis para o agro.

Visão
Ser referência regional em licenciamento ambiental e consultoria responsável para propriedades rurais.

Valores

• Sustentabilidade aplicada
• Responsabilidade técnica
• Agilidade e organização
• Respeito ao produtor e ao meio ambiente

Name: SIMBIOT AgroTech
Description:
SIMBIOT Agro Inteligente
Tecnología y datos para una agricultura más productiva y sostenible.

SIMBIOT es una plataforma digital de agricultura de precisión que apoya la toma de decisiones estratégicas en el campo mediante información confiable, georreferenciada y en tiempo real. Integramos imágenes aéreas multiespectrales, mediciones en campo, sensores de suelo y estaciones meteorológicas, ofreciendo una visión integral del estado productivo de los cultivos.

Nuestra plataforma web permite a productores, técnicos y organizaciones visualizar mapas de vigor, análisis de suelo, variables climáticas, diagnósticos foliares y estadísticas productivas, facilitando la planificación, el seguimiento y la optimización de los recursos agrícolas.

En SIMBIOT desarrollamos y fabricamos nuestros propios equipos de medición, lo que nos permite brindar soluciones adaptadas a las condiciones locales y un acompañamiento técnico cercano, especialmente para pequeños y medianos productores.

 Nuestros servicios:
• Agricultura de precisión y monitoreo de cultivos
• Imágenes multiespectrales y análisis geoespacial
• Mediciones de suelo y variables climáticas
• Diagnóstico y seguimiento nutricional
• Plataformas digitales para gestión agrícola
• Innovación tecnológica aplicada al agro

 Nuestro propósito: Impulsar la transformación digital del sector agrícola, mejorando la productividad, reduciendo riesgos y promoviendo una agricultura más eficiente y sostenible, basada en datos reales.

Name: Watterson Ranch Inc.
Description:
Natural. Local. Grass fed. Sustainable. These are principles that Watterson Ranch has embodied since the 50’s. The 1850’s.

As the sixth generation to grow up on this land raising cattle, we grew up eating beef we had raised, a luxury then available only to family. Things are done right when you know your family will put it on their plates.

We produce food that is honest-no shortcuts, fillers or additives. We never use hormones or antibiotics. Our cattle freely roam and graze on what God has provided.  Fresh grass in the summer, hay from our own pastures in the winter, free choice natural minerals and plenty of fresh, clean water. Our cattle are never penned up in a feedlot or fed grain, a 100% contrast from the mass produced beef sold in most grocery stores.  Grass fed means it takes nearly twice as long to produce our Watterson beef, but we believe that quality matters-in the happiness of our animals, in our impact to the land and the world, and in the food that you consume. It matters.

Great tasting certified grass fed natural beef from a local, sustainable and proud Texas ranch, previously available only to our kin.

Welcome to the family.

Name: Sare Yaffa Ranch
Description:
Established in 2018 by Professor Sidat Yaffa, Sare Yaffa Ranch is a Gambian agricultural enterprise that provides healthy, nutritious, and affordable meat protein to the local community and beyond. Located near Missira Village, Sandu District, Upper River Region, The Gambia, our ranch encompasses approximately 2.4 hectares and offers a unique environment for raising high-quality livestock. Our drilled borehole provides a clean and consistent water supply for our livestock, ensuring their health and well-being.
Our approach to animal care is meticulous. We practice a semi-intensive grazing system, allowing our animals to roam freely in natural pastures for a portion of the day. This is complemented by supplemental feeding with high-quality grains to ensure optimal health and growth. Veterinary services are readily available to address any health concerns.
Sare Yaffa Ranch goes beyond simply producing top-quality livestock. We are passionate about sharing our knowledge and expertise. We serve as a teaching laboratory, welcoming Gambians and visitors interested in sustainable livestock production and climate change adaptation strategies.
By combining a commitment to quality, community, and sustainability, Sare Yaffa Ranch strives to be a leader in Gambian agriculture and a model for the future of livestock production in West Africa.

Para oportunizar a aquisição desse conhecimento sem exigir afastamento do ambiente de trabalho, a AGROACADEMIA se apresenta como uma alternativa de fácil acesso aos profissionais.

Valha-se dos cursos da AGROACADEMIA para se tornar um profissional diferenciado na área.

Somos la Asociación Chilena de Ganadería Regenerativa, ACHIGANAR, una corporación sin fines de lucro fundada en 2024.  Nuestra misión es la difusión de la ganadería regenerativa, para contribuir a la transición del Sector Ganadero chileno hacia un modelo regenerativo y sostenible. 
ACHIGANAR está comprometida con:

La restauración de la salud del suelo, el bienestar animal y la biodiversidad, y la restauración de los ecosistemas, tanto en Chile como en el mundo

La prosperidad y resiliencia de los productores agropecuarios, así como de las comunidades y territorios a los que pertenecen.

La producción de alimentos saludables y densos en nutrientes, que generan impacto positivo ecológico, económico y social.

La creación de sistemas agroalimentarios más equitativos, inclusivos y sostenibles, a nivel local, nacional y global.

La educación y difusión para el consumo consciente de alimentos saludables, producidos regenerativamente.

Nuestras líneas de acción son: 
1. Generación de valor para nuestros socios/as
2. Representación para incidir en las políticas públicas
3. Difusión de la Ganadería Regenerativa
4. Generación de impacto positivo en territorios y comunidades

Name: Apis Urbana
Description:
Apis Urbana est née d’une conviction simple : la biodiversité doit retrouver sa place au cœur des espaces de vie et de travail. Au début, en 2011, centrée sur l’apiculture urbaine et la production de miel, l’activité a progressivement évolué au fil des projets et des partenariats.

C’est en 2019 que le virage a été pris. Suite aux demandes des entreprises et des collectivités partenaires depuis 2012, Apis Urbana a élargi son champ d’action pour répondre à des enjeux plus globaux : biodiversité, bien-être, pédagogie et responsabilité sociétale.

Aujourd’hui en 2026, Apis Urbana se positionne comme un acteur de terrain de la transition écologique dans le monde de l’entreprise et dans le département du Nord, proposant des solutions concrètes, mesurables et durables, adaptées aux nouvelles exigences QVCT, RSE et CSRD.

Daarnaast kunnen we onze klanten volledig ontzorgen in de wortelachtige gewassen. Zoals ruggen frezen, zaaien, (mechanische) onkruidbeheersing, en uiteindelijk het rooien van uw product.

Name: Ibi Tech
Description:
BI TECH es una empresa peruana, con protocolos únicos consistente en formalismos de crecimiento acelerado de Caoba, Cedro, Palo Rosa y otras 30 especies nativas de alto valor maderable.
Contamos con el vivero de caoba más grande del mundo con una de producción anual de (1 millón de plantones).
Sómos una Organización 100% ecológica, nuestros principios se fundamentan en la protección del ambiente, los protocolos que formulamos y los insumos que aplicamos los respaldan. Por lo que, en el manejo de viveros para la germinación de los plantones, la plantación, y el control de plagas, utilizamos insumos 100% naturales libres de químicos.
La materia prima para la producción de nuestros árboles maderables son semillas seleccionadas, trabajamos en áreas de recolección debidamente establecidas, que son usuarias del patrimonio forestal y de fauna silvestre; promoviendo el manejo sostenible con suficiente variabilidad genética para ser consideradas como productoras de semilla de calidad.
Los protocolos utilizados por IBI TECH, son en absoluto respeto y en armonía con la naturaleza, por lo que no trabajamos con clones ya que utilizamos las semillas para no perder la variabilidad genética.

Description:
Somos uma empresa com mais de 100 anos de tradição agropecuária, passada de pai para filho, e, se há algo que aprendemos trabalhando duro nestas mais de três gerações no agronegócio, é que eficiência e sustentabilidade são pilares fundamentais para a construção de uma empresa de sucesso. Aliando tecnologia a raízes sólidas, contamos com uma equipe de consultores altamente especializados, além de parcerias estratégicas com grandes grupos do agronegócio afim de estimular o desenvolvimento tecnológico e sustentável do setor.
Temos uma visão consolidada a respeito da integração do meio-ambiente com a alta produtividade rural. Entendemos que a conservação ambiental é indispensável quando pensamos em eficiência a longo prazo.
Além disso, seguimos o lema “terra é sempre terra”. Em outras palavras, entendemos que o maior patrimônio do fazendeiro não são os animais que cria ou aquilo que planta, mas sim o que está debaixo de tudo isso, destacando em seu modus operandi o respeito ao ciclo de crescimento das forrageiras e a adoção das melhores práticas em correção de solo de modo a evitar o desgaste pelo uso continuado.
A AGROTEF, ou Agropecuária Tocando Em Frente, acredita num modelo de negócios dinâmico, disposto a absorver as constantes mudanças da modernização, sem perder os pilares fundamentais de antigamente.

Name: Fazenda Jaracatiá
Description:
A Fazenda Jaracatiá tem o objetivo de servir genética zebuína de alta qualidade e desempenho, com animais precoces que garantem bons resultados e satisfação de nossos clientes. 

O pecuarista Celso Garcia Cid deu início à Fazenda Jaracatiá que agora é administrada pela terceira geração da família.
Com uma visão ousada, Celso Garcia Cid tinha como propósito pessoal garantir o alimento na mesa do brasileiro, pela melhoria da pecuária no país, e, certamente, esse foi o motor propulsor de todo o seu empenho na busca de animais na Índia nos anos 1960. 

Foi ideia sua firmar parceria única com o Governo do Paraná, por meio de um convênio, em 30 de julho de 1961, que consistia em trocar um reprodutor sem qualidade por um touro Nelore. 
Esse acordo tinha como objetivo o “aprimoramento da pecuária de corte no Estado”. E deu certo! Atualmente o Zebu é a base do rebanho paranaense e também nacional.

Muito se fala nos dias atuais sobre genética zebuína. Na Fazenda Jaracatiá temos este constante desafio de melhoria, pois, assim como no início, com Celso Garcia Cid, continuamos a nos preocupar com o melhoramento genético de nossos animais. 

A genética é algo precioso para nós, mas o empenho e a determinação que sempre tivemos de melhor servir a mesa do brasileiro, é o que move nosso trabalho. 

Faz parte da genética da família Garcia Cid atuar com muita qualidade, seriedade e inovação, fazendo sempre o melhor.

GADOS
Raças: Nelore e Brahman

Fale conosco
(43) 9 9925-7111
www.fazendajaracatia.com.br

Name: Hidden Hills Ranch
Description:
Hidden Hills Ranch offers the finest experience in Trophy Whitetail and Exotic hunting in Central Texas. It is  conveniently located only 1.5 to 2.5 hours’ drive from Houston, Dallas, Fort Worth, San Antonio and Austin in what is known as the Texas Triangle, in Burleson County. Acres upon acres of rugged terrain offer all hunters a challenging experience; the panoramic backdrops of the giant oak trees, rolling hills, and the nomadic creek beds will provide you with a one of a kind whitetail deer or exotic game hunting experience. Our remote location will get you off the grid and away from your day to day, giving you peace and relaxation.

We have a variety of game available including quality Whitetail deer, Axis deer, Fallow deer, Blackbuck antelopes, Oryx antelopes, and native hogs. Excellent genetics programs and strict management practices as well as one on one professional guiding set us apart from others, and when it comes to price, we are by far the fairest in the market!

Our cozy cabin will make you feel at home after an adventurous and strenuous hunting adventure. You will also be treated to some extraordinary homemade meals and drinks that are sure to satisfy your appetite.
Wonderful hospitality welcomes you at this premier destination for hunting, where amazing animals and breathtaking views could call you back again and again.

Give us a call today at (979) 567-6825 or shoot us an email at info@hiddenhillsranchtx.com to book your next trophy hunt!

We hanteren de breedst mogelijke definitie van het instrument stadslandbouw, namelijk alle maatregelen die bijdragen aan een natuurlijke, voedselrijke en klimaatbestendige leefomgeving en die tegelijkertijd de betrokkenheid van inwoners bij hun eigen leefomgeving vergroten.
Daarom stimuleren we activiteiten en projecten die mensen gezamenlijk uitvoeren, in wijken, buurten, op scholen of in projectteams. Natuurlijk speelt de productie en verkoop van gezond en lokaal voedsel een belangrijk rol.
We dragen er zorg voor dat al onze activiteiten bijdragen aan het vergroten van de biodiversiteit.

Description:
Traumhof Dressage offers excellent care and training for your prized dressage horse. We care deeply about the health and safety of the horses, and go to great lengths to ensure their well-being. We feed premium Timothy hay five times a day and grain/supplements twice a day. Our facility is bright and well-ventilated, with oversized rubber-matted stalls generously bedded with shavings and cleaned daily. We guarantee that your horse will never want to leave - many of our clients call Traumhof "the horse spa"!

Nicki Grandia offers training for you and/or your horse in a variety of disciplines, with a focus on dressage. Her recent successes include winning five championships in 2010 and competing successfully on the CA Spring 2011 CDI circuit. Her students have great success in the ring, as well. She spent three intensive months this spring in training at Arroyo Del Mar with Steffen Peters and David Blake. Nicki, a USDF Bronze, Silver & Gold Medalist, also rides in many clinics throughout the region as well as at her home base of Traumhof (which hosts an ongoing clinic series by David Blake, Shannon Peters, and Steffen Peters). Nicki's riding and training emphasizes the horse-first, high- expectations, soft-hands style championed by Steffen Peters. Her program, complemented by the Traumhof clinic series, offers our clients a unique opportunity to get great ongoing training with supplemental, yet consistent, training by some of the greatest riders and trainers in the world.

Name: Tomatopia
Description:
Tomatopia was born from the meeting of Paolo Riente and Francesco Martorelli, with the idea of bringing together their paths, skills, and passions into a project rooted in their land of origin. Sharing the same purpose, they also involved Francesco Guaglianone and Luca Spinelli: together they shaped Tomatopia.

Tomatopia is a regenerative mountain agriculture project based in Sant’Agata di Esaro, Calabria, focused on enhancing the territory and its agricultural heritage. Our work starts from cultivation, but looks at the value chain as a whole: we aim to develop a broad range of fruit and vegetable production, promoting local (native) varieties and Calabrian traditions, while also adopting crops and solutions that are consistent with the farm’s operational sustainability and product quality.

We operate with a regenerative approach, with the goal of improving soil fertility over time and supporting biodiversity through practical, verifiable practices. In parallel, we work to reduce the environmental impact of our farming activities, with particular attention to efficient water management and continuous improvement of field operations.

Our vision goes beyond building an agricultural business: Tomatopia aims to evolve into a broader project that can include a hospitality component and a community of supporters. Our goal is to contribute positively to local life and the surrounding area, strengthening the existing community and welcoming people who share the same approach, including supporters from other parts of Italy and the world.

Name: YAVUZ ÇAPA MAKİNALARI
Description:
Sizlerle elele ve işbirliği içerisinde çalışabilmek için kaliteli ve randımanlı motorlu çapa makinalarını (Bahçe El Traktörü) imal etmeyi ana hedef olarak seçmiş bulunuyoruz. Bu nedenle firmamız en son teknolojileri kullanarak çiftçimizin daha rahat iş yapabileceği bir şekilde geliştirmiş olduğu makineleri itinayla ve titizlikle üretmektedir. Makinelerimiz, diğer ülkelerde üretilen aynı tür makinalardaki en son teknikler ve yenilikler dikkate alınarak Türk Tarımı ve çiftçisine sunulmuştur. Üretmiş olduğumuz ürünler 2 YIL firmamız garantisi altındadır. Bizi tercih ettiğinizden dolayı ilginize teşekkür eder, mahsülünüzün bol, kazancınızın bereketli olmasını dileriz.


Firma olarak, çalışanlarımızın eğitimini ve gelişimini daima sağlamakta, ürün kalitemizi etkileyecek teknolojik gelişmeleri takip ederek kendimizi sürekli yenilemekteyiz. Firmamız mimari projeler doğrultusunda fonksiyonel, estetik, ergonomik ve kaliteli ürünler üretmektedir. Günümüzde müşteriler sadece ürünü değil arkasındaki firmayı da dikkate alarak tercihini yapmaktadır. Bu vesile ile firmamız en değerli varlığı olan müşterilerine daha iyi hizmet verebilmek için TSE/TSEK kalite belgelerine haizdir.

Bugünlere gelmemizde büyük paya sahip müşterilerimizin bize güveni ve desteğiyle birlikte deneyimli ekibimizle müşterilerimizin beklentilerine en iyi şekilde cevap vermeye devam edeceğiz.

We have established more than 30 indigenous tree nurseries in multiple locations and regularly work with communities to restore forests and  riparian areas. Name: Nes Ammim FloriCulture Ltd
Description:
The flower company Nes Ammim Floriculture Ltd. consisted of 25.000 square meters of (Dutch) glasshouses and several “dunam” of outdoor grown flowers. The company known by insiders as "FC" has determined the face of Nes Ammim for many decades. All this time the Nes Ammim roses found their way from Israel to auctions in the Netherlands. The name Nes Ammim is inseparably linked with "roses".

It's good to share the history of FC, where a lot of people were working, toiled, learned and laughed recent decades, shortly lived. They carry precious memories to remember and share.

In the sixties of the last century floriculture in Israel began. Gladiolus first and then roses. Roses were initially grown mainly in Kibutziem and Moshaviem shitoefi. Five principles formed the basis for this development: low labor costs makes it a good competitive position compared to the Dutch growers, obtaining currency, the ability of women to be employed in part-time, favorable climate, increasing mechanization in agriculture as resulting in less need for labor and finally realizing efficiencies of water. Thus, subsidized by the Israeli government, the first 3,000 m2 Dutch greenhouses set. 

.......

Unfortunately, the project was ended, have thus been anything but vain efforts. FC has been to the end the figurehead of Nes Ammim and has offered employment to a significant part of the village. Partly due to the existence of the company and the hard work of her many collaborators and supporters has Nes Ammim flourish for years. Not only in financial terms but certainly because many young people could gain from Israel, its people and its history, knowledge and experience. The closing of the last export season with the traditional export Party was full of proud, of what had well performed for many years, held on May 31, 2001.

Name: OnForest
Description:
Visão Geral | Onforest

Na Onforest, transformamos dados florestais em decisões estratégicas. Somos especializados em planejamento, controle e qualidade florestal, aliando ciência, tecnologia e inteligência analítica para impulsionar resultados no setor de florestas plantadas.

 Desenvolvemos soluções inovadoras que otimizam o monitoramento, o planejamento operacional e a tomada de decisão, com foco em produtividade, sustentabilidade e eficiência técnica. Nossos sistemas proporcionam agilidade, precisão e assertividade na gestão florestal.

 Os produtos Onforest integram plataformas tecnológicas inteligentes e modelos estatísticos robustos, permitindo um controle rigoroso de indicadores silviculturais, como sobrevivência, uniformidade, qualidade de plantio e manutenção. Trabalhamos com indicadores personalizados, adaptados à realidade e aos objetivos de cada cliente.

 Nosso compromisso é com a entrega de valor técnico e estratégico ao setor florestal. Acreditamos que a inovação baseada em dados é o caminho para florestas mais uniformes, produtivas e financeiramente viáveis.

 Se sua empresa busca precisão, inteligência e alto desempenho na gestão de florestas plantadas, a Onforest é seu parceiro ideal.

Name: Estancia Los Lapachos
Description:
Nuestra historia comienza hace 10 años con la adquisición de un icónico establecimiento rural llamado "Pino Cambi", que fue transformado por sus nuevos dueños en lo que hoy conocemos como "Estancia Los Lapachos".

En la actualidad, somos un grupo diversificado en el sector agropecuario, con dos unidades de negocios principales: la Unidad Forestal y la Unidad Ganadera.

La Unidad Forestal desarrolla la cadena completa pasando por la producción de materia prima, aserrado, secado e impregnado hasta la comercialización de la amplia gama de productos a nivel nacional e internacional. Estamos comprometidos con la mejora continua, utilizando nuevas tecnologías y un equipo de alto desempeño para asegurar productos de primera calidad. Mantenemos un compromiso firme con la sustentabilidad de nuestros recursos naturales y con nuestras comunidades locales. 

Por otro lado, la Unidad Ganadera se dedica a producir reproductores Elite de Bovinos Braford y Equinos de razas Sangre Pura de Carreras (SPC) y Cuarto de Millas de Carreras, enfocándose en el mejoramiento genético de los rodeos.

Name: Bhagachasi Farmer Producer Company Lilited
Description:
Bhagachasi Farmer Producer Company Limited
Grow Pure • Eat Pure • Earn Pure

Bhagachasi FPC Ltd is building Odisha’s first complete farm-to-kitchen community farming ecosystem — a transparent, member-owned model where families regain control over their food, health, and land. We believe purity cannot be bought from markets; purity must be grown on your own land.

We help members purchase freehold farmland units and then manage 100% of the farming for them. Using natural, cow-based, chemical-free methods, Bhagachasi grows vegetables, fruits, spices, fish, eggs, and chicken — all delivered directly to member families with full traceability. Surplus harvest is sold through community, retail, and online channels, creating additional income for members.

Our vision is simple: restore pure food, sustainable farming, and land ownership to every family.
Supported by agencies like SFAC, NABARD, NCDC, APEDA, ICAR, and State Agriculture Departments, Bhagachasi operates with scientific guidance, transparency, and community-first values.

Current Projects:
• Sandal Nest (Phase 1 & 2) — 2000 sq.ft units with sandalwood trees, desi chicken, and haldi farming.
• Vegetable Village — 10,000 sq.ft vegetable units with multi-season natural farming.
• Fish Paradise — 1-acre scientific fish ponds with integrated duck farming.

Why Members Join:
• Pure vegetables, eggs, chicken, fish, rice, dal, spices
• Farmland legally registered in their name
• 0% tax on agricultural income
• Weekly member delivery (city activation at 200+ families)
• Dashboard monitoring, surplus income, and long-term agro-wealth
• Shareholding, dividend, and voting rights in the FPC

Bhagachasi is not a retail brand — it is a farming movement uniting families who value purity, nature, and community.
Our mission is to make pure food a daily reality and farming a respected, profitable, and sustainable lifestyle for generations.

Name: LUBO FARMS AND RESORT
Description:
Agriculture impacts society in many ways, including: supporting livelihoods through food, habitat, and jobs; providing raw materials for food and other products; and building strong economies through trade. In our country, Nigeria, over 70 per cent of Nigerians live in rural areas and most of them are farmers who are involved in agriculture. Farmers produce the food items we eat everyday. We also need these foods to sustain our energy for work; but, nowadays, people don’t want to venture into farming again thereby increasing the rate of unemployment in the country when technology has taken over virtually everything and also government jobs.
Lubo farms and resort is committed to helping the government deal with unemployment by employing both skilled and unskilled workers to work in the farm. We are also committed to tackling food scarcity in Nigeria. We are into integrated farming.

Name: Bee Happy Sardinia
Description:
La Bee Happy Sardinia è un’ azienda apistica nata a Cagliari alla fine del 2016 dalla passione di Simone Pireddu per il mondo rurale ed in particolare per l’ingegnosa architettura biologica che è l’arnia-alveare.
L’azienda esplora costantemente i territori dove potrebbe collocarsi unanuova piccola sede-colonia così da produrre un ampliamento dell’ offerta dei prodotti. Punto non derogabile per l’individuazione di una piccola sede , anche temporanea, è l’assenza totale di fonti d’inquinamento, problematiche per la vita delle api e per la qualità del prodotto stesso. 
Resta un obiettivo primario per la Bee Happy Sardinia la salvaguardia delle api, dunque permettere loro di abitare questo pianeta il più a lungo possibile e la produzione di miele genuino e naturale, seguendo una metodologia tradizionale consolidata e tramandata e promuovere la cultura del miele come prodotto culinario genuino.
L’azienda ha la sua maggior produzione a Villasimius (CA), in località Brennas (200 mt s.l.m), splendido territorio costiero, in una zona che gode di un clima mite e con abbondanza di fioriture che regalano una varietà eterogenea di mieli monoflora profumati e pregiati quali Asfodelo, Lavanda selvatica, Agrumi, Cardo, Eucalipto, ma anche un delizioso Millefiori di collina. 
Ha inoltre una sede anche ad Iglesias, nella valle del Marganai, notevole per patrimonio naturalistico, in località Palmieri, un territorio punteggiato da fiori di Sulla , da cui proviene un miele caratteristico, oltre al Millefiori di valle.
Di recente si è aggiunta anche una sede nel territorio della Barbagia di Belvì ( 660 mt s.l.m) dove sarà prodotto miele di Castagno, tipicamente mediterraneo.
Nell’ambito del concorso regionale promosso dall’Agenzia Regionale Laore, per la qualità e la valorizzazione dei mieli tipici, la Bee Happy Sardinia ha ottenuto due attestati di qualità come “Miele tipico sardo”. I riconoscimenti sono arrivati nel 2017 per il miele di Eucalipto e nel 2018 per il miele Millefiori

Description:
Tribe Ranch is family owned and operated. We are here to produce the most premier beef the market has to offer. We are dedicated to treating all of our animals with love and respect. We do not use any hormones or steroids, because we believe in a natural organic way of life. Tribe Ranch is also practicing regenerative ranching; which is a practice where we move our cows from pasture to pasture. This allows our cattle to eat on new grass and leaves the previous pastures behind to rest for a minimum of 30 days. By doing this, the soil and all of the creatures underneath breakdown and process all of the cows waste and rejuvenate the land, creating an organic and regenerative fertilizer for the grass.

Akaushi is a wagyu breed of cattle, flown straight from Japan. We have a herd of 100% Akaushi wagyu, and another herd that is Angus. Both herds will produce Akaushi offspring. All of our Akaushi (wagyu) cows and offspring are DNA certified and registered with the American Akaushi Association.

Name: De Dames van Akkerlust
Description:
Demi is een jonge boerin met een missie: "het lekkerste ijs maken van dagverse weidemelk van “de dames” van haar man boer Rick, met zorg voor mens, dier en natuur."

Opgeleid door Meester-ijsbereider en Meester-patissier Hidde de Brabander maakt Demi, samen met haar team van boerenmeiden uit het dorp, ijs dat écht is, blij maakt én goed voelt!

Eerlijk geprijsd, bomvol smaak, met de beste ingrediënten en zonder opgeklopte lucht. Kortom; ijs zoals het hoort: puur, zonder poespas en slimrekenarij, rechtstreeks van de boerderij.

Waarom haar ijs écht is?!

 Verse rauwe melk en room, direct zelf gepasteuriseerd.
 Recepturen met gezond boerenverstand 
      en Meester-ijsbereider Hidde de Brabander.
 Vol van smaak want minimaal 12-18 uur gerijpt.
 Rijk aan écht eiwit (14,3%) – een Natuurlijke Bron van Eiwit. 
 Aardbeienijs met 35% vollegrond aardbeien – 
      een Natuurlijke Bron van vitamine C. 
 50% minder calorieën.
 75% meer ijs: want slechts 12% lucht i.p.v. 50%. 
      Waar elders 1 liter ijs 500 gram weegt, krijg je bij Demi 872 gram!
 100% op zonne-energie gemaakt
 100% recyclebare verpakking – dus geen “duurzame” karton…. 
      met verborgen plastic 
 Professionele ijskeuken, voedselveiligheid (HACCP) extern streng gecontroleerd. 

Demi levert ijs in diverse smaken aan klanten waarmee ze samen het verschil wil maken; met restaurants, cateraars, Keurslagers, Kaasspeciaalzaken, Bakkers en Foodmarkets. Daarnaast scheppen Demi en haar team boerenmeiden ijs in hoorntje vanuit haar ijsfietsen of delen "op boeren-buikbakken" bekers ijs uit.

Name: Capto Biotech & Infra Limited
Description:
Agriculture has long been the backbone of India's economy, providing employment to 90% of the population. While India is self-sufficient in agriculture, meeting both domestic food security needs and exporting high-quality produce, the demand for quality agricultural products has been steadily increasing. To meet this demand, Indian agriculture requires new and effective production technologies to enhance productivity, profitability, and sustainability.

Modern agricultural practices are crucial for the growth of the sector, with CBIL offering farmers various scientific advances and methods, specializing in Horticulture. Our team focuses on providing affordable, advanced, and sustainable techniques to improve quality and affordability in farming. Our goal is to help farmers reduce production costs, enhance profitability, and navigate the unpredictable market conditions influenced by fluctuating crop prices and economic shifts.

Visamos explorar todo o potencial da terra— desenvolvendo o potencial industrial e preservando o meio ambiente — com tecnologia de ponta, gerando impacto positivo no Brasil e no mundo.

Nossos Valores
Inovação com raízes – Valorizamos o conhecimento tradicional aliado à ciência e à tecnologia.
Sustentabilidade integral – Buscamos impactar positivamente o meio ambiente e a sociedade.
Excelência e qualidade – Operamos com rigor técnico e foco nos mais altos padrões regulatórios.
Diversidade e bem-estar – Respeitamos a biodiversidade e promovemos saúde em todas as dimensões.
Responsabilidade social – Geramos empregos, movimentamos a economia e promovemos o desenvolvimento local.

Objetivos Estratégicos

Implantar uma operação moderna, com baixo impacto ambiental
Desenvolver fitoterápicos com valor agregado para o setor farmacêutico
Criar eco-florestas inteligentes e regenerativa
Garantir conformidade regulatória e padrões internacionais de qualidade
Atuar no mercado nacional e internacional com visão sustentável e inovação contínua

Diferenciais da Nossa Proposta

União entre tradição agrícola e alta tecnologia
Aplicação de automação e sensoriamento no campo
Foco em pesquisa e desenvolvimento

As a 6th generation family farm dating back to the 1880s, we are thrilled to follow in the footsteps of those who cared for this land before us. Name: CEPAA
Description:
La CEPAA est une Compagnie d'Experts Judiciaires en productions agricoles, agro-alimentaires, activités horticoles et vétérinaires, pollution, dépollution et servitudes de l'environnement près les Cours d'Appel et les Tribunaux Administratifs.

La CEPAA est une association loi 1901.

Dans le cadre de nos activités judiciaires, nous sommes soumis aux règles de déontologie édictées par le Conseil National des Compagnies d'Experts de Justice. Dans le cadre de nos activités extra-judiciaires ou amiables, nous nous engageons à respecter en particulier les bases d'éthique suivantes :

1 - le respect de l'esprit du Nouveau code de procédure civile français,
2 - la compétence, l'objectivité, la diligence
3 - l'indépendance, c'est à dire de n'avoir aucun lien d'intérêt avec les parties,
4 - le respect du non conflit d'intérêt,
5 - la confidentialité et le secret professionnel,
6 - la garantie d'assurance de notre responsabilité civile professionnelle.

Ingénieurs et économistes experts sont à votre disposition pour le règlement des conflits liés aux activités agricoles et agro-alimentaires, forestières, environnementales, à l'alimentation, aux milieux vivants et naturels.

Dans notre société Française qui apparaît de plus en plus urbanisée, paradoxalement, le monde agricole reste l'incontournable partenaire de notre quotidien. Il est présent partout : dans notre assiette et dans nos verres, dans nos loisirs (jardinage, horticulture, jouissance de l'espace rural, partage avec les animaux domestiques…) et au-delà même.

L'expert de justice lié aux domaines de l'agriculture et de la nature, principalement au service du magistrat, apporte à tous les lumières d'un technicien de terrain et d'expérience, sans cesse en formation et à l'écoute des nouveautés de sa spécialité. Certaines dépassant même le milieu agricole, l'agro-alimentaire par exemple, qui est devenu un véritable secteur industriel avec un volume d'affaire prodigieux et de très nombreux emplois.
Location: Compagnie Nationale couvrant toutes les Cours d'Appel

Name: ReForest-Kolkata
Description:
Reforest Kolkata | Green Kolkata 

At Reforest Kolkata, we are committed to transforming urban landscapes into thriving green spaces. Our mission is to combat deforestation, restore biodiversity, and create sustainable ecosystems through Miyawaki forests, urban afforestation, and eco-friendly landscaping.

 Our Vision
We envision a greener, healthier Kolkata where communities thrive in harmony with nature. By planting dense, native forests in urban and semi-urban areas, we aim to improve air quality, increase biodiversity, and combat climate change.

 Our Services
 Miyawaki Urban Forests – Rapid, self-sustaining green spaces using the Japanese Miyawaki method.
 Corporate Green Initiatives – CSR-driven afforestation projects for businesses.
 Residential & Community Green Spaces – Bringing forests to your neighborhood.
 Eco-friendly Landscaping – Sustainable and aesthetic green solutions.
 Tree Plantation Drives – Partnering with communities, schools, and NGOs.

 Why Choose Us?
 Expert-driven afforestation techniques
 Climate-resilient, native species plantations
 Long-term maintenance & ecosystem monitoring
 Strong community involvement & awareness programs

Join us in our mission to make Kolkata greener, one tree at a time! 

 Connect with us for partnerships, CSR collaborations, or volunteering opportunities.

#ReforestKolkata #GreenKolkata #MiyawakiForest #UrbanAfforestation #SustainableLiving #ClimateAction #CSR

Name: PPGFS - UFPEL
Description:
A Pós-Graduação em Fitossanidade foi iniciada em 1991 como área de concentração do Programa de Pós-Graduação em Agronomia. Em 1999, com a inclusão do nível de doutorado, passou a Programa de Pós-Graduação em Fitossanidade (PPGFs), com áreas de conhecimento em Entomologia, Fitopatologia e Herbologia, esta última com início no ano de 2001. Atualmente, o curso recebe estudantes de todo Brasil, da América do Sul e de outros países. Nosso público alvo são Biólogos, Engenheiros Agrônomos e Engenheiros Florestais.

Nosso objetivo é formar profissionais altamente capacitados para desenvolver atividades de ensino, pesquisa e extensão e assim atender importante demanda na formação de recursos humanos no Brasil e nos países do Mercosul. O PPGFs possibilita o treinamento em diversas linhas de pesquisa nas áreas de Entomologia, Fitopatologia e Herbologia, preparando o profissional para atuar com plantas cultivadas, especialmente arroz irrigado, soja e milho, hortaliças, frutíferas, florestais, pastagens de clima temperado, na tecnologia de aplicação, legislação e impacto ambiental de agrotóxicos.

Name: Freiherr von Fürstenberg'sche Forstverwaltung
Description:
Wir bewirtschaften zwei Forstbetriebe im Sauerland, NRW, nach den Grundsätzen der naturgemäßen Waldwirtschaft, also mit dem Ziel einen klimastabilen Mischwald aufzubauen.

Beim Umbau der Betriebe von im wesentlichen von der Fichte dominierten, zu stärker durchmischten Beständen, setzen wir auf gezielte Einbringung von Mischbaumarten und ansonsten auf Naturverjüngung und konsequente Bejagung. Dabei versuchen wir immer wieder neuartige Ansätze, wie die Drohnensaat einzusetzen und "über den Tellerrand zu schauen" um von anderen Branchen zu lernen.

Neben der Holzvermarktung, machen wir gezielte (Vertrags-)Naturschutzmaßnahmen und verkaufen das in den Revieren erlegte Wild in Direktvermarktung.

Name: Fresh & Ferry Rabbitry
Description:
What is the best way to raise rabbits for meat?

If you’re into rabbit rearing for meat, then you have several options to choose from. You’ll want a breed that is on the larger side and produces lean, muscular meat, and gives birth to larger litters. With this in mind, the New Zealands, Californians, and Champagne d’Argents are good choices, particularly if you’re just starting out.

Name: Buffalo Ridge
Description:
Buffalo Ridge began in 2011 with a "starter herd" of 13 buffalo on 80 acres. Over the next few years, we expanded to a 100 head operation on 300 acres. Working hand-in-hand with the Missouri Department of Conservation, we set up a rotational grazing program that allows the buffalo to have fresh grass on a regular basis while giving grazed pastures a chance to recover. All of our buffalo live on pasture and are never subjected to the stress and unsanitary conditions of a feed lot. We strongly believe in respecting the dignity of this majestic animal and refuse to reduce them to a simple commodity. Our goal is to encourage consumers to choose grass fed and finished bison as their meat source to benefit not only their family's health but to also increase demand for more producers to raise bison. 

When you choose Buffalo Ridge, you choose a local, family-owned business endeavoring to serve the community in a responsible and sustainable way. You share your passion for the outdoors and for protecting and preserving all who dwell in it.

Name: Northeast Regional Food Business Center

- Sourcing and acquisition of Mexican origin stocker steers and spayed heifers for U.S. clients
- Sourcing and acquisition of horses and cattle in the U.S. and Mexico for clients throughout the Americas

Description
We are honored to have been featured in the Sept/Oct 2023 issue of Working Ranch Magazine, September 2023 Issue of Cowboy Lifestyle Network, and April 2007 issue of Western Horseman magazine. 

We are the first ranch in Mexico accepted into the AQHA Ranching Heritage Breeders Program. 

Additional information about our horse program, including additional photos and detailed, individual listings for many of our broodmares and foals, is available on our Facebook page, www.facebook.com/RanchoLaChimenea, and on our website, www.chimeneaqh.com

Our ranches are located in the state of Sonora, Mexico, which borders the U.S. state of Arizona.

Name: Bindgalvão
Description:
A Bindgalvão é uma empresa Paranaense de pesquisa e desenvolvimento de equipamentos exclusivos para extração de óleos extra-virgem e farelo tostado. Está  constituída no seu processo por próprias e peculiares técnicas para extração, desenvolvidas e patenteadas pela mesma.

O que faz:
Trata-se de uma tecnologia simples, embora, eficiente e suficiente para transformar a matéria prima (Soja, Girassol, Canola, Amendoim, etc...) em óleo e farelo utilizando um único equipamento com capacidade de industrialização dentro dos padrões exigidos pelo consumidor nacional.

Possibilita atender desde o pequeno ao grande agricultor à retirada de  óleo e produção de farelo com padrão de qualidade mais avançado  ao que se apresenta as indústrias atualmente no mercado. O equipamento tem como característica determinante e exclusiva, a retirada do óleo a frio sem nenhuma composição de  produtos químicos ou aquecimento dos grãos, eliminando, dessa forma,  vários procedimentos  que hoje são  utilizados pela indústria, possui considerável economia de energia elétrica, sendo  o custo para aquisição  deste equipamento, menor que os existentes no mercado, viabilizando o desenvolvimento sustentável a produtores e possibilitando a produção de seu próprio combustível e farelo natural sem agressão ao meio ambiente num sistema ecologicamente correto.

Name: Bar XT Ranch - Land & Livestock Management
Description: We produce natural beef - From Gate to Plate.  No hormones, no drugs.  Animals are treated kindly, and with respect.  Our cattle are free-range, with access to plenty of grass and fresh water.  Our beef is processed in provincially inspected facilities, cut and wrapped to your specifications, and delivered to you.

Name: DNA Genética do Brasil
Description:
DNA Genética do Brasil empresa do segmento de melhoramento genético dos bovinos .

Há mais de 8 anos de atividade no mercado brasileiro, a DNA Genética do Brasil, consolida-se, como sendo uma empresa que prima pelo uso das mais sofisticadas e modernas tecnologias no campo da melhora genética bovina.

Nossa metodologia de ações compreende um produto que está a altura das exigências de todos os produtores de leite e corte, respeitando seus interesses na atividade e principalmente colaborando nas definições de modelos genéticos que melhorem suas rentabilidades, fazendo progresso genético das próximas gerações, fidelizando as famílias no campo e respeitando os direitos dos animais.

Com a biotecnologia da DNA Genética do Brasil você alavanca seus resultados em gados de corte e gados leiteiros.

Name: FLX Agroforestry Solutions
Description:
Agroforestry, the strategic integration of trees and shrubs with other crops or livestock, can offer a variety of economic, ecological, and social benefits. That includes the potential for greater net production relative to monoculture cropping systems, “overyielding” where the whole is truly greater than the parts. The value generated by these systems can also include benefits like carbon sequestration, enhanced biodiversity, improved soil and water quality, and increased resilience to social and environmental perturbations. 

Drawing on a wealth of resources and opportunity in our area, FLX Agroforestry Solutions works with a wide range of partners in support of agroforestry based initiatives in New York State's Finger Lakes region.

Name: 22Bee

L’amore per la natura è il motore che muove 22bee, nata dall’idea di Francesco, giovane ragazzo pratese, che ogni giorno, sulle splendide colline toscane, coltiva con dedizione la sua passione per le api, producendo il suo miele nel pieno rispetto della natura e delle sue piccole alleate.

Questa passione è il filo conduttore che lo ha accompagnato sin dai suoi primi anni di vita: dalle lunghe passeggiate in montagna col nonno, fino ai pomeriggi a giocare libero nei campi con gli amici, sempre a stretto contatto con la natura, fino a farne della sua passione un lavoro.

Dal 2018 si immerge nel mondo della produzione del miele Biologico Toscano, guidato dallo spirito di collaborazione e cooperazione coi suoi colleghi, proprio come fanno le api.

Arnie, api, miele, un circolo virtuoso di crescita in continua espansione: oggi, infatti, 22bee si sta specializzando nella produzione di pappa reale italiana made in Tuscany – Biologica e si prevede l’avvio di tanti altri innovativi progetti.

Name: Raptor Shield
Description:
Wow just WOW!  Best customer service I have experienced in I can’t tell you when.  Michael went above and beyond!  A little backstory… I ordered a small Raptor Shield off Amazon for my chihuahua back in March after measuring her.  After ordering I ended up being away from home for almost 2 months looking after my dad. When I returned home I put it on her and it was a little big.  I tried to make it work because I was afraid the Xsmall wouldn’t be big enough.  When I purchased I also thought it would have a leash attachment but it did not. Two weeks ago not long after having my dog outside I saw a red tail hawk at the end of my driveway maybe 100 feet away.  I just had my dog outside without her vest, again because it seemed too big at the back and just didn’t strap right for her body structure (4.5lbs). I decided to look at my return window on Amazon and it had expired so I called Raptor Shield as they had commented on a previous post that they now offered harness versions with leash attachments.  I figured I would call and get further information but would be stuck with the one I already had and just have to buy another one.  Nope…. Michael offered to send me the new harnesses style with leash attached in a XSmall and Small for me to try.  They provided me a return envelope so I could return the two I can’t use.  I love the Harness style with leash attachment, and I can tell my princess feels more comfortable in it too!  Thank you again for the wonderful customer service and going above and beyond.  We are one happy mom and doggie and feel so much safer now with having hawks around my property.   Thanks again!  I’ll definitely be referring you guys. With Raptor Shield, you can have a peace of mind knowing that your pet is protected from these dangerous predators. 
Now, there's finally an option to help your pet.  Raptor Shield is a harness style vest made with quality material to comfortably fit your pet with adjustable straps, and ventilation for warmer climates.

Name: KAZURI LONDON CROCODILE FARM
Description: Kazuri London Crocodile Farm combines captive breeding of Nile crocodiles with commercial ranching. We run a successful programme that links conservation of crocodiles with benefits to local communities. Our farm promotes sustainable use of Nile crocodile skin and meat production as a legitimate conservation tool and a major contributor to both Kenya's local economy and international trade. We are CITES registered and fully licensed by the Kenya Wildlife Service. We are passionate about helping the less fortunate and are in partnership with a major US charity regarding feeding school children in Kenya from some of the poorest communities. Our mission is to encourage the conservation of Nile crocodiles and promote the understanding that crocodiles as a managed resource can bring economic benefits to the local communities.

Name: Fondazione Le Eccellenze Agroalimentari e Zootecniche dei Parchi Naturali della Sardegna
Description:
La Fondazione denominata “Le Eccellenze dei Parchi Naturali della Sardegna” si occupa delle aziende agroalimentari e zootecniche, di tutta la Sardegna, nasce nel centro Sardegna, il Sarcidano, cuore selvaggio della Sardegna.

La Fondazione si occupa di favorire lo sviluppo delle imprese agroalimentari e zootecniche di ogni dimensione così come di favorire la ricerca, la commercializzazione, la formazione delle imprese di ogni settore di attività, si occupa altresì di favorire la cultura d’impresa,

Tra i vari riconoscimenti, già ottenuti, prima la Regione Sardegna, Assessorato Regionale all’Agricoltura, quindi il MIPAAF hanno riconosciuto la Fondazione, quale titolare del Distretto Agroalimentare di Qualità: Le Eccellenze Agroalimentari e Zootecniche dei Parchi Naturali della Sardegna”. Successivamente, é giunto anche il riconoscimento di Distretto del Cibo. In virtù di tale attributo, la Fondazione si propone quale vettore per la diffusione di produzioni agroalimentari e zootecniche di qualità certificata nonché strumento per la valorizzazione della tradizione culinaria e territoriale dell’Isola.

Attraverso la collaborazione con istituzioni locali e del settore Ricerca, la Fondazione vuole creare nuove filiere agroalimentari regionali. Si tratta di micro, piccole e medie realtà che ancora conoscono i segreti della natura e che meritano di essere arricchite con le più moderne conoscenze.

Infine, ultimo ma non per importanza, la Fondazione si propone come mezzo per la cooperazione tra filiere complementari, come quelle ricollegabili al Turismo. Quest’ultimo, per noi, vuole manifestarsi, con rispetto ed eticità, costituendo un vero e proprio strumento per la valorizzazione delle tradizioni locali.

Name: Fazenda Quiron
Description:
A Fazenda Quiron é mais do que um projeto sobre natureza, agro e entretenimento. Somos um espaço onde histórias se conectam, inspirações florescem e a sabedoria ancestral encontra a modernidade. 

Na mitologia grega, Quíron era um centauro diferente dos demais. Enquanto os centauros eram frequentemente descritos como selvagens e indisciplinados, Quíron destacava-se por sua sabedoria, bondade e habilidades como curandeiro e educador. Ele foi mentor de grandes heróis como Aquiles, Jasão e Hércules, ensinando lições de vida, ciência e harmonia com a natureza.

Assim como Quíron, acreditamos no poder do conhecimento para transformar realidades e no papel fundamental da natureza em nosso equilíbrio e aprendizado. 


Nossa missão é criar um espaço onde a conexão com a terra, o cultivo de práticas sustentáveis e o entretenimento educativo sejam o centro de tudo o que fazemos.

Nossa missão é oferecer um espaço online onde você possa explorar e se maravilhar com a beleza da natureza, aprender sobre práticas agrícolas sustentáveis, conhecimentos de medicina natural e desfrutar de conteúdo de entretenimento inspirador.

No coração da Fazenda Quiron está o compromisso com a preservação ambiental e o respeito pela biodiversidade. Acreditamos que é fundamental compartilhar conhecimento sobre conservação e manejo responsável dos recursos naturais para construirmos um futuro mais sustentável para as próximas gerações.

Em nosso site e redes sociais, você encontrará uma variedade de conteúdos, desde artigos informativos sobre técnicas de cultivo orgânico até entrevistas com especialistas em conservação da fauna e flora. Além disso, oferecemos uma dose de entretenimento com histórias inspiradoras de pessoas que estão fazendo a diferença em suas comunidades, bem como curiosidades sobre o mundo agrícola e a vida no campo.

Name: Native Breed Solutions CIC
Description:
Native Breed Solutions is a research organisation registered as a UK-based Community Interest Company focused on the conservation and practical use of native livestock breeds in modern agriculture. We work to demonstrate how these breeds contribute to sustainable food systems, environmental stewardship, and rural livelihoods.

Our approach is grounded in science. We support and conduct research on the nutritional value, health outcomes, and environmental impacts of native breeds. We collaborate with farmers, researchers, and other partners to assess production systems, improve product quality, and strengthen the case for native genetics in commercial and small-scale farming.

We aim to improve understanding of how native breeds fit into regenerative grazing, low-input systems, and climate adaptation. We also support traceability and transparency in supply chains, promoting high-quality meat, milk, and fiber products linked to breed and origin.

Our work combines evidence-based research, practical fieldwork, and stakeholder engagement. Whether supporting a farmer trial, contributing to a policy discussion, or sharing data on breed performance, our goal is to keep native breeds relevant, productive, and valued.

We welcome collaboration with producers, academics, retailers, and anyone committed to improving food systems through better livestock, better land use, and better data.

 Science-led. Breed-focused. Future-ready.

We welcome collaboration and conversation. Please feel free to contact us directly via LinkedIn message or via Email at NativeBreedSolutions@gmail.com

Name: Buschhoff
Description:
Уже в 1890 году с первым укомплектованным молотильным устройством мы привносили новаторские идеи в сельское хозяйство. В результате, в Алене на протяжении многих десятилетий мы конструировали молотильные машины и, вместе с тем, заложили фундамент для часто востребованных и на сегодняшний день шнеков и элеваторов. Уже с 1910 года техника Buschhoff стала известной и в соседних странах. С 1960 года мы распознаем потенциал новой сферы производства и концентрируемся на изготовлении молотковых дробилок, кормосмесителей, установок для очистки зерновых, а также пневматических и механических подъёмно-транспортных установок. Тем временем нашим семейным предприятием управляет уже четвертое поколение, при этом, зарекомендовав себя, как надежный партнер и ведущий поставщик современной техники для хранения и транспортировки зерна, а также техники для изготовления комбикорма. 
Как компетентный партнер, мы поддерживаем тесный контакт с Вами на всех этапах сотрудничества: от консультации, монтажа, ввода в эксплуатацию и до технического обслуживания, а также предлагаем комплексные решения для долгосрочного успеха.

Name: Grupo IECASA
Description:
Grupo IECASA es una sociedad de capital guatemalteco, con base en el Oriente del país y que representa empresas que se desarrollan dentro de la industria ganadera guatemalteca. Su rango de acción cubre desde la crianza y comercialización de ganado, la industria alimentaria ganadera, los espectáculos departamentales e internacionales y la representación de equipos de fabricación norteamericana, dedicados a la ganadería. 

Nuestra misión es ofrecer soluciones para la industria ganadera centroamericana, anteponiendo para ello la ética, la justicia y el conocimiento. Nuestra visión es más amplia: Identificar las necesidades potenciales del sector ganadero y la población general en la región y ofrecer a largo plazo, soluciones y propuestas concretas que ayuden al desarrollo de la misma.

Actualmente, Grupo IECASA trabaja en las áreas de crianza y venta de ganado, venta y renta de equipos para la ganadería a través de la representación de Priefert en Guatemala, El Salvador y Honduras y trabaja en la industria del entretenimiento con  VC Rodeo, llevando espectáculos de rodeo y sana diversión a los pobladores de Guatemala y Honduras.

En un futuro próximo, Grupo IECASA busca ampliar sus operaciones con empresas relacionadas a la industria turística y la industria alimentaria ganadera. Todo esto a través del desarrollo de proyectos que ya están en fase avanzada y que esperamos presentarles muy pronto.

Name: Agrosolux
Description:

Entregamos a solução completa para produção de FVH a partir de cerais como Aveia, Milho, Cevada, Trigo, etc.
A Agrosolux também produz projetos técnicos personalizados, contando com profissionais das ciências agrárias e engenheiros especializados nesta inovadora tecnologia, da Espanha e do Brasil, permitindo assim, o aproveitamento de áreas de galpão, casas, etc., que possam ser climatizadas para implementação da planta de produção hidropônica.
Oferecemos a Solução Completa para uma agropecuária mais orgânica e sustentável, pense nisso!!

Name: Top Nutrition
Description:
Top Nutrition SRL este o companie cu capital integral românesc care a fost înființată în anul 2007, având ca obiect principal Nutriția Animală.

Astfel, venim în ajutorul fermierilor cu cele mai recente și performante concepte nutriționale pentru echilibrarea, optimizarea rațiilor și a recepturilor la toate categoriile și speciile de animale.

Top Nutrition, cu sediul și depozitul central în localitatea Tărtășești, Str. Independenței nr. 593B, Dâmbovița are de asemenea în domeniul de activitate achiziția și distribuția la nivel național de blenduri vitamino-minerale, premixuri, concentrate, furaje, aditivi furajeri, suplimente proteice și energetice, produse de igienă, dezinfectanți pentru animalele de fermă și de companie.

Produsele noastre ajung la fermieri în cel mai scurt timp posibil de la lansarea comenzii, atât cu mașinile proprii, cât și prin intermediul partenerilor noștrii logistici.

Cu seriozitate și calitate am reușit să promovăm pe piață o gamă largă de produse și servicii necesare nutriției, care să contribuie la ameliorarea calității și cantității producțiilor animaliere destinate consumului uman.

Cu ajutorul furnizorilor din Germania, Franța, Polonia, Cehia, Bulgaria reușim să ținem pasul cu genetica și ameliorarea animalelor de fermă. Produsele inovatoare permit asigurarea competitivității zootehnice și economice a fermelor în diferite conjuncturi apărute pe piața europeană aflată mereu în mișcare.

Împreună cu o echipă de specialiști, nutriționiști, ingineri zootehniști, medici veterinari reușim să acoperim și să promovăm produsele la nivel național. Pentru toate produsele din ofertă, Top Nutrition are exclusivitate pe piața din România.

Name: Best Farming Animals
Description:
Welcome to Best Farming Animals, your go-to source for comprehensive information and resources on the best practices for raising and nurturing a variety of animals on your farm. Whether you're a seasoned farmer looking to enhance your skills or someone just starting on the path to sustainable agriculture, our platform is designed to cater to your needs.

At Best Farming Animals, we believe in fostering a deep connection between farmers and their livestock, recognizing that the well-being of the animals directly correlates with the success of the farm. Our mission is to provide valuable insights, expert advice, and practical tips to empower farmers in creating healthy and thriving environments for their animals.

What sets us apart is our commitment to promoting ethical and sustainable farming practices. We understand the vital role animals play in agriculture, and our goal is to help farmers maximize productivity while prioritizing the welfare of their livestock. From traditional farm animals like cows, chickens, and pigs to lesser-known species, we cover a wide range of topics to ensure that farmers have access to a diverse set of knowledge.

Our team consists of passionate experts in the field of animal husbandry, veterinary science, and sustainable farming. We continuously research and update our content to provide you with the latest information, innovations, and advancements in the farming industry.

Key Features of Best Farming Animals:

In-Depth Guides: Explore detailed guides on the best practices for raising and caring for different farm animals. From selecting the right breeds to managing nutrition and health, our guides cover it all.

Expert Advice: Benefit from the expertise of our seasoned professionals who share their insights on various aspects of animal husbandry. Our team is dedicated to answering your queries and providing personalized advice to ensure the success of your farm.

Community Hub: Connect with like-minded individuals in our vibrant com

Name: Lindauer Family Farms
Description:
OUR HERITAGE

Our family farming tradition began in 1889 when our great-great grandfather, Frederick Lindauer, homesteaded in Eastern Nebraska after emigrating to the U.S. from the Bavarian region of Germany shortly after the Civil War. In 1910, his son, William, moved further west and founded our family farm near Brule, Nebraska. Over the years, our family has acquired parcels of adjacent land and we now have thousands of acres of well managed pasture and cropland. 

We are proud of our heritage. Our farm represents one of the few remaining family owned and operated businesses, a segment that has declined since the advent of large corporations entering the business and employing "efficient" factory farming techniques. 

OUR PASSION 

From the beginning, our passion has been raising premium quality beef that our customers trust to be always natural and authentic. Our Heritage beef comes from prize-winning Polled Herefords. We free-range pasture our cow-calves and exceed the recommended cow-calf to acre ratio for grazing. We are self-sustaining and do not use hormones, antibiotic feed additives or pesticides. We respect our animals, and treat them humanely. We believe that raising beef that is always natural and authentic not only produces the best tasting steaks, but also provides our customers with peace of mind knowing the beef they serve to family and friends is true to nature. 

OUR VALUES 

Our traditional values drive our focus on providing our customers with the finest cuts of beef. Hard-work, integrity and excellence are time-honored traditions at the Lindauer Family Farm. We will never compromise. Your complete satisfaction is extremely important to us. Every Lindauer Family Farms purchase comes with a 100% unconditional satisfaction guarantee. Our goal is to ensure that every one of our customers has a truly extraordinary experience - every time.

Name: Planalto
Description:
Planalto is a company specialised in sustainable forestry and permaculture in +2000 hectares of land, with the goal of developing systems which increase production while drawing carbon down into the soil. We aim to remove 1 million tonnes CO2 every 10-year cycle with nature-based solutions (reforestation + biochar). Also we are pioneering agroforestry systems in the tropical lowlands.
Planalto has completed 650 hectares of forest plantations of logwood (Haematoxylum campechianum) which is the main source of hematoxylin.
Additionally, we have set up a 360-hectare conservation area which we are enriching to provide habitats for critically endangered native species.

Name: Fouragehandel Bus
Description:
Fouragehandel bus is een familiebedrijf uit Winsum met al ruim 60 jaar ervaring in de fourage sector. Ons bedrijf is opgericht in 1958 en sindsdien garanderen we de beste kwaliteit voor de scherpste prijs. In die 60 jaar hebben we niet stil gezeten. Innovatie staat centraal in ons bedrijf. Zo introduceerde we nog niet zo lang geleden onze fourage veilingsite. Makkelijk, snel en nóg voordeliger.

Door ons grote netwerk van transporteurs en leveranciers in heel Europa kunnen we vaak rechtstreeks vanaf de producent leveren. De korte lijntjes zorgen ervoor dat we onze fourageproducten niet alleen heel snel kunnen leveren, maar ook voordelig kunnen aanbieden. Inmiddels bestaat het team van Fouragehandel Bus uit meer dan 25 specialisten. Onze klantenservice staat elke werkdag voor u klaar met passend advies.

Fouragehandel Bus is onderdeel van de Logispan groep. Logispan Resthout en de webshop Bustotaal vallen ook onder de Logispan groep. Samen hebben ze een unieke manier van samenwerken. Dit komt omdat ze alle drie dezelfde fundamentele kwaliteiten delen: passie, ondernemerschap en duurzaamheid.

Name: Team Servicehunden Danmark
Description:
Som leverandør af certificerede servicehunde, der udplaceres hos psykisk sårbare mennesker, lægger vi i Team Servicehunden Danmark stor vægt på:

At udvælge egnede hvalpe og tilføre dem alt det nødvendige “råstof” en robust og pålidelig servicehund har brug for at have med sig.
At træne – for derefter, at certificere de af vores egnede unghunde – til servicehunde.
At sikre det ideelle og optimale match mellem bruger og servicehund.
At støtte bruger og servicehund i, at opnå et stærkt og bæredygtigt samarbejde.
Dette gennem hele udplaceringsprocessen, der tilrettelægges individuelt med udgangspunkt i brugerens forudsætninger og behov.
I Team Servicehunden Danmark ønsker vi, at møde alle vores samarbejdspartnere – både brugere, sagsbehandlere, opdrættere og foderværter – i øjenhøjde.

Vores arbejde hviler på kerneværdier om autenticitet, empati, troværdighed, åbenhed og tålmodighed.

Vi prioriterer, at investere tid og nærvær i relationen mellem bruger og instruktør – både før og efter udplaceringen af en servicehund.

Vores erfaring er, at en god relation med vores brugere – baseret på tryghed og tillid – er en afgørende forudsætning for succes.

Vores opgave som leverandør af servicehund til en bruger, er først “færdig”, når brugeren – med hjælp og støtte fra sin servicehund – kan mestre livet igen, og selvom vores opgave er udført, yder vi support og følger bruger og servicehund, i hele hundens levetid.

Vi samarbejder med fagkonsulenter, som inddrages i udplaceringsforløbet i de tilfælde, hvor der er brug for ekstra faglig ekspertise omkring brugerens udfordringer.

Name: Get Well Polska
Description:
Spółka Get Well jest firmą zrodzoną z pasji i zamiłowania do prawdziwej ekologii. Założyciele swoje zawodowe życie związali z produkcją żywności, szczególnie z produkcją zwierzęcą, w tym drobiarską.

„Wykorzystując swoje 30-letnie doświadczenie połączyliśmy wiedzę z zakresu hodowli, weterynarii, ekonomii i ekologii w nowe przedsięwzięcie, które ma wpływ na produkowaną żywność. Widząc postęp, jaki dokonał się w genetyce zwierząt, wyposażeniu obiektów, sposobach zarządzania stadami, weterynarii, zwróciliśmy uwagę na pomijany dotychczas aspekt produkcji, jakim jest ściółka, na której zwierzęta przebywają całe swoje życie.”

Spółka Get Well w pracach nad opracowaniem nowego procesu technologicznego ukierunkowanego na wdrożenie do produkcji wysokiej jakości podłoża torfowo-wiórowego, realizowała działania polegające na możliwości wyeliminowania z produktu czynników stanowiących potencjalne zagrożenia dla zdrowia zwierząt hodowlanych. Bezpieczeństwo zdrowotne produkowanej żywności oraz poprawa dobrostanu zwierząt to istotne aspekty, do których przywiązuje się duże znaczenie w hodowli zwierząt. Natomiast, produkcja drobiarska do której skierowany będzie produkt jest obecnie najintensywniej rozwijającą się gałęzią produkcji. Zauważalny na rynku, znaczny postęp gospodarczy branży drobiarskiej wymusza sprostanie wymogom w zakresie warunków utrzymywania i hodowli drobiu w aspekcie zapewnienia wysokiej jakości podłoża hodowlanego. Mając na uwadze dobrostan ptaków hodowlanych oraz wysoką jakość produktów pochodzenia zwierzęcego, producenci drobiu powinni dbać o to, by warunki bytowe ptaków były ściśle związane z ich naturalnymi potrzebami. Zauważając tę potrzebę rynkową spółka Get Well podjęła się działań ukierunkowanych na opracowanie innowacyjnej technologii wytwarzania ściółki torfowo-wiórowej o podwyższonych parametrach użytkowych w następujących aspektach:

Name: Biocomp 3.0
Description: O Projecto BioComp_3.0 identifica três problemas fundamentais relacionados com: A baixa fertilidade dos solos, a gestão deficiente de resíduos orgânicos e a falta de soluções economicamente viáveis e seguras para o controlo eficaz de plantas exóticas invasoras aquáticas, nomeadamente jacinto-de-água (Pontederia crassipes). É com estas 3 preocupações presentes que o projecto BioComp 3.0 visa conciliar a necessidade de controlo físico do jacinto-de-água, à recuperação e aproveitamento dos nutrientes que esta espécie concentra, respeitando os princípios da Economia Circular, transformando a biomassa da planta invasora em compostos orgânicos equilibrados, com qualidade para a agricultura. Através do valor dos compostos produzidos é possível aliviar a fatura dos custos com o seu controlo e, ao mesmo tempo, aumentar a fertilidade e resiliência dos solos por via do aumento do teor em matéria orgânica.

Name: Gracias Algas
Description:
Gracias Algas is a family-owned, Chile-based wholesale seaweed company, dedicated to providing premium, organic seaweed in bulk to customers worldwide. Founded in the early 1990s in Chile’s Coquimbo region, Gracias Algas was born from the vision of María Graciela Ortiz, a marine biologist, and her husband, Rubén Rojas, an aquaculture engineer. Together, they saw an opportunity to sustainably cultivate, harvest, and export high-quality Chilean seaweed.

Over the years, Gracias Algas has grown into a trusted name in the seaweed industry, working closely with local non-industrial fishing communities and associations. We are committed to fair trade and sustainability, overseeing every step of the production process—from cultivation and harvesting to drying and export. Our focus on quality and collaborative practices ensures our customers receive the best Chilean seaweed while supporting the communities that help make it possible.

Name: AGROLAB_BIOGAL
Description:
El reto del proyecto GO AGROLAB BIOGAL es conseguir un aprovechamiento de purines más eficiente mediante el conocimiento de sus características en términos de NPK. Perseguimos una fertilización y producción agrícola sostenible y para ello nos apoyamos en la sensórica avanzada. En concreto, en AGROLAB BIOGAL empleamos la fotónica mediante la espectrofotometría NIRs.

Además de hacer más precisa la fertilización con purines, y que satisface al agricultor; también esperamos mejorar la salud del suelo, reduciendo la contaminación difusa por metales.

Participantes del proyecto: TALLERES CARRUXO SL, CLUN (Cooperativas Lácteas Unidas), SAT As Cavadas Ganadería, Universidade de Santiago de Compostela y el grupo de investigación BioMODEM.

Con la colaboración de: Medrar Innovation Office, AMSlab y AOTECH.

Puede consultar más información sobre el proyecto en la página web.

El proyecto Agrolab_Biogal se desarrollará durante los próximos tres años al amparo de las ayudas convocadas por la Agencia Gallega de Calidad Alimentaria (Agacal) en el año 2024 para la ejecución de proyectos innovadores de los grupos operativos de la Asociación Europea de la Innovación (AEI), cofinanciadas con el Fondo Europeo Agrícola de Desarrollo Rural (Feader) en el marco del Plan Estratégico de la Política Agraria Común (Pepac) 2023-2027.
